title: A kind of method for identifying mathematical formula, device, equipment and storage medium
abstract: This application provides a kind of method for identifying mathematical formula, device, equipment and storage medium, method includes: acquisition images to be recognized；Using preset formula decision rule and/or the formula discrimination model pre-established, differentiate whether images to be recognized is formula image；If images to be recognized is formula image, target formula is identified from images to be recognized using the formulas solutions model pre-established.On the one hand the application can determine whether images to be recognized is formula image, so as to avoid subsequent carrying out identifying brought computing resource waste to non-formula image, on the other hand, when being identified to formula image, directly carrying out whole figure identification to images to be recognized using formulas solutions model Direct Recognition can go out entire formula from images to be recognized so as to directly obtain the recognition result of entire image, recognition efficiency is higher, and recognition effect is preferable.

title: Vein and artery identification method based on neural network
abstract: The invention provides a vein and artery identification method based on a neural network, which comprises the following steps: inputting an ultrasonic image to be identified into a neural network model for processing; acquiring the position information of veins and arteries from an ultrasonic image to be identified through the neural network model; the marked veins and arteries are distinguished according to the acquired position information, and an ultrasound image containing the vein marks and the artery marks is generated. The method is used for automatically identifying the artery and the vein in the ultrasonic image to be identified, is safe and efficient, can help doctors to improve the diagnosis accuracy, better assists the doctors in identifying the artery and the vein, and further assists the doctors in performing venipuncture.

title: A kind of multi-modal video scene dividing method based on sound and vision
abstract: The present invention discloses a kind of multi-modal video scene dividing method based on sound and vision, and method is the following steps are included: step S1: carrying out shot segmentation to input video, obtains each camera lens segment；Step S2: vision and sound feature extraction are carried out in each camera lens segment that segmentation obtains, obtains the corresponding vision of camera lens and sound feature vector；Step S3: according to vision and sound characteristic, the adjacent camera lens for belonging to identical semanteme is merged into Same Scene, obtains new scene time boundary.

title: Device and method for tracking object in image based on deep learning using rotatable elliptical model
abstract: In-depth learning-based object tracking device using a rotatable elliptical model is a model definition unit that defines an elliptical model corresponding to an object to be tracked from a previous frame image, and an artificial object that inputs characteristics of the previous frame image and the current frame image as input. An object tracking unit that tracks the object to be tracked in the current frame image based on a model predictor predicting an elliptical model corresponding to the object to be tracked in the current frame image through a neural network and an elliptical model of the predicted current frame image. It may contain wealth.

title: Character recognition, including method and system for processing checks with invalidated micr lines.
abstract: An automated analysis method and tool (50) for a digitally imaged financial item (58) can digitally recognize a plurality of characters across an area of a digital image containing character indicia (54) at predetermined positions in the area and also possibly containing non character indicia (54) in the area. This finds exemplification in an automated check processing method and check sorting system in which a check s MICR line that has been read and interpreted as invalid can be digitally analyzed (66), via a digital image (56) of the check, to identify MICR characters that could not be validly read or interpreted by the conventional MICR processing equipment. This includes digitally applying character recognition processing to an invalidated MICR line in a digital image of the financial item (e.g., a check). Previously invalidated MICR line data can then be corrected.

title: Content-based medical image retrieval method and retrieval system
abstract: A content-based medical image retrieval method and a retrieval system using the same include: obtaining m (2≤m≤n) number of unit images from a three-dimensional (3D) medical image including n (n≥2) number of unit images and extracting features per unit image from each of the m (2≤m≤n) number of unit images through a feature extraction unit, wherein the 3D medical image is voxel data including a plurality of slices and each of the plurality of slices is defined as a unit image; inputting features of each unit image extracted from the m (2≤m≤n) number of unit images to a recurrent neural network to generate an output value; and performing medical image retrieval using the output value through an input processing unit, wherein a plurality of 3D medical images to be compared with the output value include a 3D medical image having p (p≥2, p≠n) number of unit images.

title: Image denoising method based on channel attention mechanism and characteristic pyramid
abstract: The invention relates to an image denoising method based on a channel attention mechanism and a characteristic pyramid, which comprises the following steps: step 1, in a first stage, based on deep learning, directly extracting original features of a noisy image by using convolution; step 2, giving different importance to the extracted original features by using a channel attention mechanism; step 3, in the second stage, obtaining multi-scale depth characteristics by using a pooling kernel; step 4, continuous down-sampling and up-sampling are used for denoising the depth characteristics respectively, and bilinear interpolation is used for carrying out up-sampling cascade on the denoising result; and 5, in the third stage, a convolution kernel size dynamic selection structure based on a multi-path attention mechanism is used, and the characteristics are expressed in a self-adaptive mode to obtain a final clean image. The invention has reasonable design, considers the importance of different characteristic channels, gives consideration to global information and local information, and ensures the image denoising quality.

title: A kind of zero resistance insulator detection method based on deep learning
abstract: The zero resistance insulator detection method based on deep learning that the invention discloses a kind of, it includes step 1, according to Insulator Infrared Image feature, is pre-processed to image；Step 2 is split pretreated infrared image and image angle correction；The extraction of step 3, insulator disk；The extraction and deep learning of step 4, Insulator Infrared Image feature；Step 5, detection zero resistance insulator, classify to Insulator Infrared Image using trained deep learning network model, detect zero resistance insulator；The present invention is based on the zero resistance insulator detection algorithms of infrared imagery technique and deep learning algorithm, the workload of insulator inspection can be greatly reduced, the safety accident occurred by electric power detection is reduced, the probability for causing to have a power failure because of insulator contamination is reduced, facilitates the stability for enhancing Operation of Electric Systems.

title: Image processing method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium
abstract: The disclosure relates to an image processing method, an image processing apparatus, an electronic device and a storage medium. In the image processing method, a neural network model is utilized to perform image processing on an image to be processed to obtain image processing results of various processing types; the neural network model includes multiple processing layers; each stage of treatment layer comprises: the convolutional network and the branch networks are shared, and each non-final processing layer also comprises a characteristic aggregation network; the plurality of branch networks correspond to the plurality of processing types one to one. According to the image processing method provided by the embodiment of the disclosure, when a neural network model is used for carrying out image processing of multiple processing types on an image, the accuracy of image processing results of the multiple processing types can be improved, and the training phase of the neural network model can be converged quickly due to the fact that the accuracy of the image processing results determined by the neural network model is high, so that the learning efficiency of the neural network model can be improved.
text: Image processing method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium The disclosure relates to an image processing method, an image processing apparatus, an electronic device and a storage medium. In the image processing method, a neural network model is utilized to perform image processing on an image to be processed to obtain image processing results of various processing types; the neural network model includes multiple processing layers; each stage of treatment layer comprises: the convolutional network and the branch networks are shared, and each non-final processing layer also comprises a characteristic aggregation network; the plurality of branch networks correspond to the plurality of processing types one to one. According to the image processing method provided by the embodiment of the disclosure, when a neural network model is used for carrying out image processing of multiple processing types on an image, the accuracy of image processing results of the multiple processing types can be improved, and the training phase of the neural network model can be converged quickly due to the fact that the accuracy of the image processing results determined by the neural network model is high, so that the learning efficiency of the neural network model can be improved.

title: Video image danger Situation Awareness method, system, device based on pattern-recognition
abstract: The invention belongs to information technology and security technology areas, and in particular to a kind of video image danger Situation Awareness method, system, device based on pattern-recognition, it is intended to solve the problems, such as that existing video image danger Situation Awareness real-time difference and precision are low.This system method includes obtaining picture group to be perceived；It obtains wait perceive the risk object in the picture to be perceived of each in picture group；To each picture to be perceived, according to preset risk object grade corresponding relationship, its corresponding risk object grade is determined；The risk object grade wait perceive respectively picture to be perceived in picture group is chronologically arranged, corresponding risk object rate sequence is obtained；Based on preset dangerous state of affairs pattern rules table, obtained risk object rate sequence is matched, obtains the corresponding dangerous situation grade of the picture group to be perceived.The present invention uses convolutional neural networks identification model, and risk object chronologically pattern definition grade improves the real-time and precision of dangerous Situation Awareness.

title: Cotton-plant pest-insects method for identifying and classifying and device
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a kind of cotton-plant pest-insects method for identifying and classifying and device, the method obtain include cotton-plant pest-insects to be sorted original image, obtain the Hu of the original image not overall profile characteristic parameter of bending moment parameter and cotton-plant pest-insects to be sorted；Based on Otsu Threshold Segmentation Algorithm and Canny edge detection algorithm by the background separation of cotton-plant pest-insects image and original image to be sorted, wing image is extracted from original image, the wing contour feature parameter of cotton-plant pest-insects to be sorted is obtained according to wing image；Wing image is optimized using mathematical Morphology Algorithm, and the corresponding math-morphological features parameter of the wing for extracting cotton-plant pest-insects to be sorted；Identification classification is carried out to cotton-plant pest-insects to be sorted using radial basis function neural network.This method and device so that the identification classification of cotton-plant pest-insects is more accurate, and then plays the role of great, reduces economic loss caused by cotton-plant pest-insects to the prevention and treatment of the specific aim of cotton-plant pest-insects.

title: Optical character reader
abstract:
PURPOSE: To surely perform read of a character recorded in a state that it comes into contact with a character entry frame or protrudes therefrom by detecting a character pattern from a sheet image obtained as a result of elimination executed by an image eliminating means.  
     CONSTITUTION: To a line buffer 10, a black frame eliminating circuit 20 for eliminating a character entry frame so as to leave a character pattern in a sheet image stored in said buffer is connected. To the black frame eliminating circuit 20, a character segmenting circuit 30 for segmenting a character pattern at every one character from an image from which a frameless part is eliminated is connected. To the character segmenting part 30, a matching circuit 40 for executing a character recognition processing with regard to the segmented character pattern is connected. In such a state, the matching circuit 40 reads out a connected standard pattern from a dictionary store memory 50, executes matching to the character pattern, and the result of matching is outputted as the result of character recognition processing. In such a way, an exact character read result is obtained.

title: Fully-automatic three-dimensional liver segmentation method based on convolution nerve network
abstract: The invention relates to the field of medical image processing and aims to provide a fully-automatic three-dimensional liver segmentation method based on a convolution nerve network. The fully-automatic three-dimensional liver segmentation method based on the convolution nerve network comprises the following processes: preparing a training set, and training the convolution nerve network, processing CTA volume data of an abdominal liver by utilizing the trained convolution nerve network to obtain a segmentation result of the liver. The liver is segmented by means of the three-dimensional convolution nerve network; the three-dimensional liver segmentation method is fully automatic and can also prevent under-segmentation and over-segmentation phenomena well; and the accurate liver segmentation result is obtained.

title: Object Detection and Candidate Filtering System
abstract: Disclosed herein are system, method, and computer program product embodiments for providing object detection and filtering operations. An embodiment operates by receiving an image comprising a plurality of pixels and pixel information for each pixel. The pixel information indicates a bounding box corresponding to an object within the image associated with a respective pixel and a confidence score associated with the bounding box for the respective pixel. Pixels that do not correspond to a center of at least one of the bounding boxes are iteratively removed from the plurality of pixels until a subset of pixels each of which correspond to a center of at least one of the bounding boxes remains. Based on the subset, a final bounding box associated with each object of the image is determined based on an overlapping of the bounding boxes of the subset of pixels and the corresponding confidence scores.

title: The training method and equipment of human body segmentation's neural network
abstract: The embodiment of the present disclosure provides the training method and equipment of human body segmentation's neural network, this method comprises: the first training image is labeled processing, wherein the pixel value in human body segmentation region is labeled as 1, and the pixel value of background area is labeled as 0；By the pixel value of the first training image after mark multiplied by 255, the second training image that pixel value is 0 and 255 is obtained, and interpolation is carried out to the pixel value of the second training image, obtain the third training image that pixel value is 0 to 255；By the pixel value of third training image respectively divided by 255, the exposure mask that pixel value is 0 to 1 is obtained, the exposure mask that the pixel value is 0 to 1 is truncated according to preset value, obtains the exposure mask that pixel value is 0 and 1；Data are input to preset neural metwork training to the exposure mask for being 0 and 1 by pixel value after truncation as a result, and when the trained preset neural network of the embodiment of the present disclosure is split the human region in image, the edge of obtained human body segmentation's image is smoother.

abstract: The invention discloses a kind of Pancreatic Neuroendocrine Tumors automatic division method and system based on deep learning, method include: the computed tomography enhancing image for obtaining Pancreatic Neuroendocrine Tumors patient；It carries out lesion to the computed tomography enhancing image of acquisition using the method for deep learning to divide automatically, the method for the deep learning uses depth convolutional neural networks.The method of present invention deep learning carries out lesion to the computed tomography enhancing image of acquisition and divides automatically, deep learning and computed tomography enhancing image are combined in the lesion segmentation applied to Pancreatic Neuroendocrine Tumors, the focal area of tumour can be partitioned into automatically by the feature learning of depth convolutional neural networks, it is influenced by the experience of doctor small, it is more accurate, and the time and efforts that doctor manually sketches out focal area is saved, it is more efficient.It the composite can be widely applied to field of medical image processing.

title: System and method for quantitative analysis of borehole images
abstract: A method is described for ways to generate a Fraction of Sand (F sand ) estimate and net-to-gross (NTG) estimate of sand in a formation using a machine-learning algorithm such as a neural network based on borehole image logs. The method may use the F sand  and other information to estimate hydrocarbons in place in a subsurface formation. The method may be executed by a computer system.

title: System and method for evaluating symbols
abstract: Evaluating a symbol on an object can include acquiring a first image of the object, including the symbol. A second image can be derived from the first image based upon determining a saturation threshold for the second image and possibly scaling of pixel values to a reduced bit-depth for the second image.

title: Image signal processing apparatus and method
abstract: The invention provides for image signal processing method and apparatus in which input analog image signals are converted into digital image data using sampling clocks from a PLL circuit by A/D conversion means. Next, image data that has delayed by a 1 clock delay circuit is subtracted from the digital data by a subtractor. The maximum value of one screen of the subtracted output is then determined, and 5 is subtracted therefrom to provide a threshold value. A comparator compares the subtracted output and the threshold value, and outputs a signal when the subtracted output is greater than the threshold value. A counter then supplies the count value of these signals to a CPU, and the CPU controls the phases of the sampling clocks using a switch. The CPU is thus able to control the frequency characteristics of the input image signals by switching a switch of a frequency correction circuit in accordance with the count value.

title: Registering device of standard pattern
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve the speed of character recognition and the precision of character recognition considerably, by registering additionally standard patterns of characters and symbols which are not prepared in a character recognizing device. CONSTITUTION:A picture input device 80 converts a picture on a form to an electric signal to quantize it to a binary. The signal of the picture obtained by the device 80 is stored in a picture storage device 81. A timing mark detector 82  detects the position of a timing mark on a basis of the picture signal stored in  this device 81. A character frame segmentting device 83 calculates the position of a character frame by the position of this timing mark and takes in the picture signal in this calculated position from the device 80. An entry character  frame detector 84 counts the number of black points in the picture signal segmented by the device 83; and if this number is larger than a certain value, it is  discriminated that a picture is written in the character frame. A standard pattern storage device 85 stores features of the signal in the character frame as a standard pattern. A code storage device 86 determines a code corresponding to  the standard pattern on a basis of the position of the character frame and stores  it.

title: Deep quality enhancement of adaptive downscaled coding for image compression
abstract: Techniques are disclosed for coding image data adaptively at different levels of downscaling. Such techniques may involve partitioning input data into pixel blocks for coding and performing content analysis on the pixel blocks. The pixel blocks may be input to block coders that operate at different pixel block sizes, which may code the pixel blocks input to them at their respective sizes. Except when a block coder operates at the partitioning size, block coders that operate at different pixel block sizes may perform downscaling of the pixel blocks to match their size with the block coders' respective coding size. A block decoder may invert the coding operations performed by the block coders, decoding coded image data at respective pixel block sizes, then upscaling decoded image data obtained therefrom to a common pixel block size. Image reconstruction may synthesize a resultant image from the decode pixel block data output by the decoders. Quality enhancements may be added by neural network processing systems that have been trained to other segmented images.

title: Methods and apparatus to generate a three-dimensional (3d) model for 3d scene reconstruction
abstract: Methods, apparatus, systems and articles of manufacture for generating a three-dimensional (3D) model for 3D scene reconstruction are disclosed. An example apparatus includes a 3D scene generator to generate a 3D model for digital image scene reconstruction based on a trained generative model and a digital image captured in a real environment. An image simulator is to generate a simulated image based on the 3D model, the simulated image corresponding to the captured image. A discriminator is to apply a discriminative model to the simulated image to determine whether the simulated image is simulated.

title: A kind of intelligent video monitoring method
abstract: The present invention relates to the common scene intelligent video monitoring methods that a kind of view-based access control model conspicuousness and depth encode certainly, it include: that single frames decomposition is carried out to video, motion information is extracted using vision significance, then the light stream of consecutive frame moving object is calculated, detection process later is divided into two processes of training and test, in training, using the light stream of training sample as the input from coding, entire autoencoder network is trained by minimizing loss function, in test phase, respectively using trained and test sample light stream as input, extract the encoder in trained autoencoder network, the feature of input is extracted by dimensionality reduction, then the result after dimensionality reduction is visualized, the visualization range of training sample is indicated using suprasphere, in input test sample, it is visualized using same method, if the visual result of sample falls into suprasphere range It is interior, then determine that sample is normal；Conversely, falling in except suprasphere range, determines that sample is abnormal, be achieved in the intelligent monitoring of video.

title: Apparatuses and methods for machine vision system including creation of a point cloud model and/or three dimensional model
abstract: Machine vision systems/methods and related application systems/methods are provided that includes steps/control sections including capturing pairs of multiple images from at least two cameras having overlapping fields of views and camera settings, first and second category depth estimation (DE) modules (DEM) that generates a first and second depth estimate (z), DE neural network trainer (NN) trigger system, a camera setting module, and an application that uses outputs from the first or second category DEM. The first category DEM includes featuring matching, structure from motion (SFM), depth from defocus (DFD), ratios of depth (RoD) and relative blur estimates (RBE) generators, systems of equations (SoEs) based on camera model projective geometry equations and thin lens equations module, and multiple SoE variable elimination modules using the RoDs and RBEs to reduce variables in the SoEs. The second DEM includes a NN DE trainer/use system. Also uses a reinforcement learning camera setting selection system.

title: Model training method, metal fracture analysis method based on deep learning and application
abstract: The invention discloses a model training method, a metal fracture analysis method based on deep learning and application, and aims to solve the problem that no efficient and reliable metal fracture identification method exists. The model training method comprises the steps of inputting a plurality of image samples in a sample set into a target feature extraction network to extract image features; inputting the extracted image characteristics into a target classification network, and identifying the category of the metal fracture; according to the comparison result of the metal fracture categories identified by the target classification network and the metal fracture categories correspondingly marked, adjusting the weight values of all layers of the target classification network to finish the training of the target classification network; constructing a target model based on a target feature extraction network and a trained target classification network; inputting a plurality of image samples in a sample set into a target model, and identifying the category of the metal fracture; and adjusting the weight values of all layers of the target model according to the comparison result of the metal fracture class identified by the target model and the metal fracture class correspondingly marked, so as to finish the training of the target model.

title: Method for detecting breakage fault of shaft end bolt of railway wagon
abstract: The utility model provides a railway freight car axle head bolt rupture fault detection method, relates to freight train and detects technical field, to the problem that artifical detection railway freight car axle head bolt rupture fault efficiency is low among the prior art, include: firstly, the method comprises the following steps: acquiring an image of a passing truck and constructing a sample data set; II, secondly: performing data amplification and marking on the sample data set to obtain a marked image set; thirdly, the method comprises the following steps: training a deep learning network model by using the marked image set and the original image; fourthly, the method comprises the following steps: the method comprises the steps of judging a shaft end bolt breakage fault by using a trained deep learning network model, wherein the judging process comprises the steps of firstly obtaining an image, roughly positioning a sub-image of a shaft end bolt component region, calling the sub-image by a shaft end bolt breakage target segmentation deep learning framework, carrying out real-time shaft end bolt target segmentation, carrying out binaryzation on the segmented shaft end bolt target image, and judging whether a bolt is broken or not by adopting a mode of combining deep learning and an image processing algorithm and calculating the number and the area of the bolts and the position relation among the three bolts.

title: Image analysis apparatus and method
abstract: Provided are an apparatus and a method for analyzing an image which analyze an image including one or more objects using a previously learned deep learning-based model and output an analyzed result. The method for analyzing an image comprises: a receiving step of receiving an analysis target image related to a cargo including at least one object; a preprocessing step of performing preprocessing on the analysis target image; an analyzing step of analyzing the analysis target image by using a previously learned deep learning-based model; an outputting step of outputting an analyzed result; a step of receiving information on an opening inspection result of the cargo; and a model updating step of updating the deep learning-based model by using information on the opening inspection result, the analyzed result, and the analysis target image.

title: Solid state image pickup device
abstract: PURPOSE:To execute quantitative hue adjustment in color separation processing, and in addition, to keep a good color separation characteristic, by executing color separation while adjusting an operation coefficient in a process to obtain a primary color component. CONSTITUTION:An image pickup video signal read out of a two-dimensional color image pickup element 5 is amplified by a variable gain amplifier 8 after a clock component and a reset noise are removed by a correlative double sampling circuit 7, and its black level is fixed to the lower limit standard of the input range of an A/D converter 20 by a clamp circuit 9, and it is converted into a digital data signal, and is inputted to a signal processing circuit 10. In the circuit 10, a brightness signal and a color difference signal in a television signal are generated by giving arithmetic processing to the digital data signal. Then, in the process to obtain the primary color component by executing the color separation, the color separation is executed while adjusting the operation coefficient from the outside. Thus, the quantitative hue adjustment can be executed in the color separation processing.

title: Image encoding method and apparatus, and test method and test apparatus using the same
abstract: The invention relates to an image encoding method and apparatus, and a test method and test apparatus using the same. According to the present invention, there is provided a CNN-based image encoding method, comprising the steps of: a learning device (a) including first to nth convolution layers acquires an input image; (b) causing at least a portion of the convolutional layers to perform the steps of: (i) applying a transposed convolution operation to an input image or to an input feature map obtained from a previous convolution layer, generating transposed feature maps having mutually different sizes, (ii) applying a convolution operation having correspondingly different step sizes and different convolution kernel sizes to the transposed feature maps, generating an initial feature map as a first group; and (c) connecting or adding the initial feature maps included in the first group by element to generate an output feature map corresponding thereto.

title: Single-image super-resolution method based on tree polymerization lightweight
abstract: The invention relates to a single-image super-resolution method based on arborescence polymerization lightweight, and belongs to the technical field of image processing. The method comprises the following steps: preprocessing a high-resolution image training data set, downsampling to obtain a high-resolution image pair and a low-resolution image pair, and inputting the low-resolution image pair into a standard model to obtain the characteristics of the standard model; mapping the low-resolution image to obtain a high-dimensional low-resolution characteristic map; taking the features of different depth levels from the high-dimensional low-resolution feature map; using the aggregation point of the tree-shaped aggregation structure to fuse the features of different depth levels to obtain fusion features; calculating loss and returning, and updating all convolution layer parameters; fusing and reconstructing the fusion features by using an deconvolution layer to obtain a super-resolution image; calculating pixel-level loss and training, and finishing training when the pixel-level loss is basically kept unchanged; and reconstructing the low-resolution image into a super-resolution image by using the trained convolutional neural network parameters. The method has simple steps, and the quality evaluation of a single image is better ensured.

title: Method for tracking high-speed target image of unmanned aerial vehicle
abstract: The invention discloses a method for tracking a high-speed target image of an unmanned aerial vehicle. With the adoption of the method, a high-speed target can be tracked precisely in real time. By means of analysis of real-time tracking errors of the image, two existing image tracking algorithms are introduced, and fast tracking and high-precision tracking are realized with the two algorithms respectively. A high-precision algorithm result is used for correcting the fast algorithm, and the precision of the fast algorithm is improved; meanwhile, motion displacement of the unmanned aerial vehicle in the calculation period is compensated with a Kalman filtering technology, and the requirements of unmanned aerial vehicle image tracking for fastness and accuracy are met.

title: Method of Constructing Gray Value or Geometric Models of Anatomic Entity in Medical Image
abstract: A gray value model is generated encoding photometric knowledge at landmark positions. This step exploits intensity correlation in neighborhoods sampled around landmark positions. A geometric model is generated encoding geometric knowledge between landmarks. This step exploits spatial correlation between landmarks of segmented anatomic entities.

title: A kind of sensitive image discrimination method and device
abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses a kind of sensitive image discrimination method, for solving the prior art swimsuit big to colour of skin area, to shine into false drop rate when row differentiates high, and when smaller to colour of skin area but show sexual parts pornographic images differentiate the problem of easy missing inspection.Present invention method includes：Image to be identified is sent into the convolutional neural networks that training in advance is completed, obtains the convolution characteristic layer of image to be identified；The convolution characteristic layer of the image to be identified is divided into two or more region to be sorted；Extract the characteristic vector in region to be sorted；The characteristic vector in all regions to be sorted is sent into the full articulamentum of the convolutional neural networks and carries out discriminant classification, obtains classifying corresponding to each region to be sorted, the classification includes normal category and sensitive classification；Judge whether image to be identified is sensitive image according to the statistical result for being categorized as the other region to be sorted of sensitive kinds, obtain judged result.The embodiment of the present invention also provides a kind of sensitive image identification device.

title: Image processing method and device, readable medium and electronic equipment
abstract: The disclosure relates to an image processing method, an image processing device, a readable medium and an electronic device, and relates to the technical field of image processing, wherein the method comprises the following steps: the method comprises the steps of identifying an image to be processed according to a preset face identification algorithm to obtain a target face image, inputting the target face image into a pre-trained image identification model to obtain target pixel points which are output by the image identification model and labeled as specified part labels, wherein the specified part labels are used for indicating that the target pixel points belong to specified parts, and executing preset operation on the specified parts in the target face image according to the target pixel points. According to the method and the device, the target pixel points belonging to the designated parts in the target face image can be recognized through the image recognition model, and the target face image is processed according to the target pixel points, so that the accuracy of image processing is improved.

title: CSM assistant analysis system and method based on tensor image
abstract: The invention belongs to the field of medical image assistant analysis technologies, and particularly relates to the CSM assistant analysis system and the CSM assistant analysis method based on tensor images. The CSM assistant analysis system comprises an image pre-processing module, an expert knowledge base module, an ELM learning module, a classifier module and a result output module, wherein the image pre-processing module is used for acquisition of diffusion tensor images, dual measurement registration of the diffusion tensor images, segmentation of the diffusion tensor images, and dimensionality reduction and feature extraction of the diffusion tensor images; the ELM learning module is used for utilizing an ELM learning algorithm for analyzing and solving information in an expert knowledge base; and the classifier module is used for classifying feature information extracted by the image pre-processing module according to parameters determined by the ELM learning module. The CSM assistant analysis system and the CSM assistant analysis method based on the tensor images fully excavate original information of the images, increases pattern classification precision, ensure image segmentation effect, avoid time-consuming iteration process, significantly reduce training time, and can better adapt to efficiency requirement of mass data.

title: Image Correction Using A Deep Generative Machine-Learning Model
abstract: For correction of an image from an imaging system, a deep-learnt generative model is used as a regularlizer in an inverse solution with a physics model of the degradation behavior of the imaging system. The prior model is based on the generative model, allowing for correction of an image without application specific balancing. The generative model is trained from good images, so difficulty gathering problem-specific training data may be avoided or reduced.

title: Machine learning of real-time image capture parameters
abstract: Methods, apparatuses and systems may provide for operating a machine learning device by obtaining training image data, conducting an offline prediction analysis of the training image data with respect to one or more real-time parameters of an image capture device, and generating one or more parameter detection models based on the offline prediction analysis. Additionally, methods, apparatuses and systems may provide for operating the image capture device by obtaining a candidate image associated with the image capture device, determining that the candidate image corresponds to a particular type of scene represented in a parameter prediction model, and adjusting one or more real-time parameters of the image capture device based at least in part on one or more parameter values associated with the particular type of scene.

title: Method for reconstructing three-dimensional space scene based on photographing
abstract: The invention discloses a method for reconstructing a three-dimensional space scene based on photographing, which comprises the following steps: s1: importing the photos of all the spaces, and enabling the photos to correspond to the three-dimensional space according to the shooting direction and the shooting angle, so that the watching direction of each pixel is consistent with the shooting direction when the photos are watched from the camera position of the three-dimensional space; s2: regarding a room as a set of a plurality of planes, determining one plane, and determining all planes one by one through the mutual relation among the planes and the intersection line among the planes; s3: marking the room space structure through a marking system and obtaining size information; s4: the point coordinate information collected through S3 builds a three-dimensional space model of the room. The method can restore the three-dimensional space model of the scene, simultaneously contains the size information and the texture information without losing details, can quickly and conveniently edit and modify the three-dimensional space scene, and can simultaneously generate the two-dimensional plane graph with the size information and without distortion.

title: Apparatus for detecting object and method thereof
abstract: Disclosed are an object detection apparatus and a method thereof which can more accurately detect an object compared to the existing object detection. The object detection apparatus comprises: a candidate area detection unit for detecting a candidate area for each input image by using a plurality of first neural network models on each of a plurality of identical input images of an object detection target; an integration unit for integrating candidate area data corresponding to the candidate area for each image detected by the candidate area detection unit in a time-series data form; and a calculation unit for drawing a final area corresponding to an object detected by performing overfitting on the candidate area data in the time-series data form integrated by the integration unit by using a second neural network model. Then, the drawn final area is displayed in the input image to be output as an object detection result image.

title: Identification method and device of skin object and electronic equipment
abstract: The present disclosure provides a method of identifying a skin object, comprising: a target image of the skin object corresponding to a first magnification and a reference image corresponding to a second magnification are obtained, wherein the first magnification is greater than the second magnification. Based on the reference image, a target region of the skin object is located, wherein the skin object can be identified from the target image based on the target region. Based on the target area, a skin object is identified from the target image. In addition, the invention also provides a device for identifying the skin object and an electronic device.

abstract: To provide an imaging apparatus capable of simplifying operations from self-timer shooting having a delay time from shooting instruction to shooting start, remote control shooting, and shooting start to improve the shooting result. title: Learning copy space using regression and segmentation neural networks
abstract: Techniques are disclosed for characterizing and defining the location of a copy space in an image. A methodology implementing the techniques according to an embodiment includes applying a regression convolutional neural network (CNN) to an image. The regression CNN is configured to predict properties of the copy space such as size and type (natural or manufactured). The prediction is conditioned on a determination of the presence of the copy space in the image. The method further includes applying a segmentation CNN to the image. The segmentation CNN is configured to generate one or more pixel-level masks to define the location of copy spaces in the image, whether natural or manufactured, or to define the location of a background region of the image. The segmentation CNN may include a first stage comprising convolutional layers and a second stage comprising pairs of boundary refinement layers and bilinear up-sampling layers.

title: Rendering images from deeply learned raytracing parameters
abstract: Images are rendered from deeply learned raytracing parameters. Active learning, via a machine learning (ML) model (e.g., implemented by a deep neural network), is used to automatically determine, infer, and/or predict optimized, or at least somewhat optimized, values for parameters used in raytracing methods. Utilizing deep learning to determine optimized, or at least somewhat optimized, values for raytracing parameters is in contrast to conventional methods, which require users to rely of heuristics for parameter value setting. In various embodiments, one or more parameters regarding the termination and splitting of traced light paths in stochastic-based (e.g., Monte Carlo) raytracing are determined via active learning. In some embodiments, one or more parameters regarding the sampling rate of shadow rays are also determined.

title: Systems and methods for privacy-enabled biometric processing
abstract: In one embodiment, a set of feature vectors can be derived from any biometric data, and then using a deep neural network (“DNN”) on those one-way homomorphic encryptions (i.e., each biometrics' feature vector) an authentication system can determine matches or execute searches on encrypted data. Each biometrics' feature vector can then be stored and/or used in conjunction with respective classifications, for use in subsequent comparisons without fear of compromising the original biometric data. In various embodiments, the original biometric data is discarded responsive to generating the encrypted values. In another embodiment, the homomorphic encryption enables computations and comparisons on cypher text without decryption of the encrypted feature vectors. Security of such privacy enable biometrics can be increased by implementing an assurance factor (e.g., liveness) to establish a submitted biometric has not been spoofed or faked.

title: Identify character positions method, apparatus, computer equipment and storage medium in image
abstract: This application involves method, apparatus, computer equipment and the storage mediums of character positions in a kind of identification image neural network based.The described method includes: obtaining monitor video file to be identified, and monitor video file to be identified is pre-processed, obtains video image to be identified；Determine the image type of video image to be identified；When image type is color image, the human body key point in video image to be identified is identified by the human body attitude model that training obtains, and the character positions information in video image to be identified is determined based on the human body key point identified；When image type is night vision image, the lightweight target detection model obtained by training identifies the character positions information in video image to be identified.Working efficiency can be improved using this method.

title: Vehicle control system with traffic driving control
abstract: A control system for a vehicle includes a camera having a field of view exterior of the vehicle. Responsive at least in part to processing by a processor of image data captured by the camera, the control system determines traffic lanes on the road. The control system determines a leading vehicle ahead of the equipped vehicle and determines a traffic condition where two traffic lanes change to a different number of traffic lanes. The traffic lane being traveled by the equipped vehicle is one of the two traffic lanes that change to the different number of traffic lanes. Responsive to determination of the traffic condition and responsive to detection of the leading vehicle moving from the traffic lane being traveled by the equipped vehicle into another traffic lane, the control system controls the steering system of the equipped vehicle to follow the leading vehicle into the other traffic lane.
text: Vehicle control system with traffic driving control A control system for a vehicle includes a camera having a field of view exterior of the vehicle. Responsive at least in part to processing by a processor of image data captured by the camera, the control system determines traffic lanes on the road. The control system determines a leading vehicle ahead of the equipped vehicle and determines a traffic condition where two traffic lanes change to a different number of traffic lanes. The traffic lane being traveled by the equipped vehicle is one of the two traffic lanes that change to the different number of traffic lanes. Responsive to determination of the traffic condition and responsive to detection of the leading vehicle moving from the traffic lane being traveled by the equipped vehicle into another traffic lane, the control system controls the steering system of the equipped vehicle to follow the leading vehicle into the other traffic lane.

title: Robot automatic tracking method and system based on RGBD face detection
abstract: The invention relates to a robot automatic tracking method and system based on RGBD face detection, wherein the system comprises the following steps: the system comprises an RGBD camera, an image algorithm processing platform and a robot motion control unit; the RGBD camera is used for collecting RGB images and depth images of a human body and is used for identifying the upper half body and the face images of the human body; the image algorithm processing platform is used for receiving a human body image acquired by the RGBD camera, realizing human face recognition of a human body through algorithm processing, and calculating the distance between the robot and the human face; the robot motion control unit obtains the longitudinal forward and backward distance of the human face through the image algorithm processing platform and controls the robot to move along with the movement of the human face according to the distance change information. The invention solves the problems of face tracking accuracy and face longitudinal accurate distance measurement, and ensures that the robot moves along with the face with higher accuracy and stronger human-like function.

title: Predicting response to pemetrexed chemotherapy in non-small cell lung cancer (nsclc) with baseline computed tomography (ct) shape and texture features
abstract: Methods, apparatus, and other embodiments predict response to pemetrexed based chemotherapy. One example apparatus includes an image acquisition circuit that acquires a radiological image of a region of tissue demonstrating NSCLC that includes a region of interest (ROI) defining a tumoral volume, a peritumoral volume definition circuit that defines a peritumoral volume based on the boundary of the ROI and a distance, a feature extraction circuit that extracts a set of discriminative tumoral features from the tumoral volume, and a set of discriminative peritumoral features from the peritumoral volume, and a classification circuit that classifies the ROI as a responder or a non-responder using a machine learning classifier based, at least in part, on the set of discriminative tumoral features and the set of discriminative peritumoral features.

title: Solar cell defect detection system and method based on image
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of image detection, in particular to the field of solar cell defect detection, and particularly relates to a solar cell defect detection system and method based on an image. The device provided by the invention can obtain the electroluminescence test image of the solar cell, extract the image of the single solar cell block after image preprocessing and image segmentation, detect and identify the defects of black sheets, rosin joints and broken sheets of the segmented single solar cell image by adopting a traditional image processing mode, detect and identify the defect of split sheets by adopting a convolutional neural network mode, classify the solar cell in real time according to the detection result by adopting the detection device, and realize the real-time detection of the defect in the production and manufacturing process of the solar cell.

title: METHOD OF CUTTING A MODEL OF A DENTAL ARCH
abstract: Method for cutting out a three-dimensional model of a dental scene, or “scene model”, said method comprising the following steps: a) acquisition of a view of said scene model, called “analysis view”; b) analysis of the analysis view by means of a neural network in order to identify, in said analysis view, at least one elementary area representing an element of the dental scene, and assignment of a value to au at least one attribute of said elementary area; c) identifying a region of the scene model represented by said elementary area on said analysis view, and assigning, to said region, a value to an attribute of said scene model as a function of said value of said attribute of the elementary area.

title: Generation of synthetic image data for computer vision models
abstract: Techniques are generally described for object detection in image data. First image data comprising a first plurality of pixel values representing an object and a second plurality of pixel values representing a background may be received. First foreground image data and first background image data may be generated from the first image data. A first feature vector representing the first plurality of pixel values may be generated. A second feature vector representing a first plurality of pixel values of second background image data may be generated. A first machine learning model may determine a first operation to perform on the first foreground image data. A transformed representation of the first foreground image data may be generated by performing the first operation on the first foreground image data. Composite image data may be generated by compositing the transformed representation of the first foreground image data with the second background image data.

title: License plate recognition method using differential image and neural network
abstract:
The present invention relates to a license plate recognition method using a neural network and a car image, a method of distinguishing a new / old license plate by labeling, a method of recognizing a number by a reference font image and a car image, and a region by using a neural network and a car image It includes how to recognize letters. The present invention, unlike the conventional recognition structure, has the advantage of using a different reference font for each type of license plate and by applying the stability of the neural network and the simplicity of the difference image can be recognized more quickly and accurately.

title: Quality control method for medical image, computer device and readable storage medium
abstract: The application relates to a quality control method of medical images, a computer device and a readable storage medium. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring a medical image to be detected, wherein the medical image comprises a plurality of tomograms; inputting a plurality of tomographic images into an image detection model, extracting the characteristics of each tomographic image through the image detection model, and obtaining the detection result of each tomographic image according to the continuity characteristic information among the tomographic images; the image detection model is a machine learning model, and the detection result represents the quality result of the medical image; and displaying the detection result on a display interface of the medical image. The method can be used for timely displaying the detection result to a corresponding technician after obtaining the detection result, so that the technician can know the problems existing in the shooting process and timely correct the problems, and the quality of the obtained medical image can be greatly improved. Furthermore, the process of obtaining the medical image detection result is executed by the image detection model, manual participation is not needed, and the accuracy and efficiency of quality control are greatly improved.

title: Optimal cropping of digital image based on professionalism score of subject
abstract: In an example embodiment, an optimal cropping of a digital image is determined. A machine learning algorithm is used to generate a professionalism score for the digital image, the utilizing a machine learning algorithm comprising a training mode where a plurality of sample images with labeled professionalism scores are used to train a classification function in a model that produces as professionalism score as output; and an analysis mode where the model is used to generate a professionalism score for the digital image. Then, the professionalism score is used as an input to a discrete variable optimization algorithm to determine an optimum cropped version of the digital image from a plurality of possible cropped versions of the digital image using the classification function.

title: Defect segmentation network training method, device and equipment and readable storage medium
abstract: The application discloses a defect segmentation network training method, a device, equipment and a readable storage medium, wherein the method comprises the steps of carrying out feature extraction on a sample training set to obtain a feature map; generating a defect area frame for each training image in the sample training set; generating a non-defect area frame for each training image in the sample training set; intercepting the feature map according to the defect area frame and the non-defect area frame, and acquiring the intercepted feature map and corresponding intercepted marking information; and carrying out supervision training on network parameters of the defect segmentation network according to the interception feature map and the interception marking information. And intercepting the feature map through the defect area frame and the non-defect area frame, so that the proportion of the defect area in the input information in the training process is adjusted, and the identification accuracy of the defect segmentation method is improved.

title: Method, apparatus, storage medium and the terminal device of product defects detection positioning
abstract: The present invention proposes method, apparatus, storage medium and the terminal device of a kind of product defects detection positioning, wherein the described method includes: choosing the neural network structure of detection model to be trained according to the image data feature and product defects complexity of product to be measured；Obtain training data；Wherein, the training data includes the standard category and normal place of product defects in trained product picture and the trained product picture；According to the detection model for each neural network structure that training data training is chosen；The best detection model of fitting degree is chosen from the detection model after training carries out product defects detection to be supplied to detection service device；Wherein, the prediction classification and predicted position of product defects in the product picture that the detection model receives described in acquisition for being calculated according to the product picture received.Using the present invention, the accuracy of testing product defect can be improved.

title: Community archive management system
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a community archive management system, which comprises: the system comprises a video processing module, a file storage module and a big data processing module, wherein the video processing module is used for utilizing monitoring to shoot images in a community and extracting personnel features contained in the images; the file storage module is used for establishing a personnel electronic file for each personnel in the community and storing the personnel characteristics extracted by the video processing module into the corresponding personnel electronic file; and the big data processing module is used for carrying out data mining and data analysis on the files stored in the file storage module. By applying the embodiment of the invention, the information is updated more timely.

title: Optical otoscope device
abstract: A system to optically measure an ear includes a controller with logic that when executed by the controller causes the system to perform operations. Operations may include capturing the one or more images of the ear using the one or more image sensors, and generating image data from the one or more images. 3D keypoints of the ear are calculated from the image data, and a 3D model of the ear is generated using the 3D keypoints.

title: Segmentation Method of Retinal Blood Vessels based on middle layer block space structure
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of Segmentation Method of Retinal Blood Vessels based on middle layer block space structure, including construction sample set；The corresponding blood vessel structure label value of feature representation is extracted from the block structure of color image sample set；Random forest grader is constructed, is classified to block structure, indicates the blood vessel structure on new images using the content linear combination in feature integrated model；Input colored eyeground figure to be analyzed, blood vessel structure classification belonging to random forest grader detection structure block is used after extracting feature, color image medium vessels structure is indicated using the content sparse linear in model, and match blood vessel label value, by calculating the probability of overlay structure block label value on single pixel point, the segmentation to image is completed.The method of the present invention can quick and precisely divide retinal vessel, and high reliablity, Riming time of algorithm are short.

title: Method and device for recognition of a handwritten pattern
abstract: A method for recognition of a handwritten pattern comprises the steps of forming ( 4 ) a representation of the handwritten pattern, forming ( 6 ) at least two subconfigurations by dividing the representation of the handwritten pattern, and processing the subconfigurations. The step of processing comprises the steps of comparing ( 8 ) each subconfiguration with reference configurations, selecting ( 10 ) at least one subconfiguration candidate for each subconfiguration among the reference configurations based on said step of comparing, and determining ( 12 ) at least one candidate pattern consisting of one selected subconfiguration candidate for each subconfiguration. The method further comprises the steps of comparing ( 14 ) the representation of the handwritten pattern to the candidate pattern, and computing ( 16 ) a cost function in order to find a closest matching candidate pattern. The cost function is based on the comparing of the representation of the handwritten pattern to the candidate pattern and on the comparing of the subconfigurations to the selected subconfiguration candidates in the candidate pattern.

title: Face recognition device applied to entrance guard
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of image recognition and information processing, and discloses a face recognition device applied to an entrance guard. The face recognition device applied to the entrance guard mainly comprises a camera, a face recognizer, a memorizer, a door lock control module and a microprocessor unit, wherein the camera is connected with the face recognizer, the memorizer is connected with the face recognizer, the microprocessor unit is connected with the door lock control module, and the face recognizer is connected with the microprocessor unit. The face recognizer is used for receiving and recognizing the face information obtained by the camera and comparing the face information with data memorized in the memorizer, the compared result can be output to the microprocessor unit and can be judged by the microprocessor unit, and a door lock is unlocked by the door lock control module which is controlled by the microprocessor unit if the comparison is succeeded. By adopting the face recognition mode based on a video, the security of an entrance guard system is increased, and the misjudgment as an identity card is stolen by others can be avoided; and by adopting the non-contact type face recognition mode, the sanitation problem due to the adoption of contact-type fingerprint recognition can be avoided.

title: Method and apparatus of deep learning based object detection with additional part probability maps
abstract: The present invention relates to a technology related to image recognition using machine learning. A method of detecting an object based on deep learning including a part probability map comprises the following steps of: receiving an image including an object to be detected by an apparatus of detecting an object; training a deep learning network formed by repeating at least two of multi-layers of convolution, full-connection and pooling, and particularly, receiving a part probability map of an object to be detected to train the same in order to emphasize a specific position for each of layers; and outputting an object detected from a training result for an image by using regression loss and classification loss.

title: Artificial intelligence (ai) encoding device and operating method thereof and ai decoding device and operating method thereof
abstract: An artificial intelligence (AI) decoding apparatus includes a memory storing one or more instructions, and a processor configured to execute the stored one or more instructions to obtain image data corresponding to a first image that is downscaled from an original image by using first parameters of a first filter kernel included in a first deep neural network (DNN), reconstruct a second image corresponding to the first image, based on the obtained image data, and obtain a third image that is upscaled from the reconstructed second image, by performing an operation between the reconstructed second image and second parameters of a second filter kernel included in a second DNN corresponding to the first DNN. Each of the second parameters is represented by a product of a scale factor and one among integer values, and each of the integer values is 0 or ±2 n, where n is an integer.

title: Method for analysing an image of a dental arch
abstract: A method of evaluating the shape of an orthodontic gutter, said method comprising the following steps:   a ") acquisition of at least one image at least partially representing the gutter in a service position in which it is carried by a patient, called" analysis image ";   b ") analysis of the analysis image by means of a deep learning device, preferably a neural network, trained by means of a learning base, so as to determine a value   for at least one tooth attribute of an "analysis tooth area" representing, at least partially, a tooth on said analysis image, the tooth attribute being relative to a gap between the tooth represented by the area analysis tooth, and the gutter shown on the analysis image, and / or   for an image attribute of the analysis image, the image attribute being relative to a spacing between at least one tooth represented on the analysis image, and the gutter represented on said analysis image.

title: Multi-target tracking method and related equipment
abstract: The application discloses a multi-target tracking method and related equipment, which are applied to electronic equipment, wherein the method comprises the following steps: acquiring a first image and a second image which comprise N tracking targets from the same target video file, and acquiring N first tracking frames of the first image, wherein the first image is a front preset frame image of the second image, and the N first tracking frames are used for framing the N tracking targets in the first image; superposing and synthesizing the first image and the second image to obtain a target image; inputting the target image into a hourglass network model for feature extraction, and outputting a target feature map; inputting the target characteristic diagram into a prediction network to output a thermodynamic diagram, a width and height value set, a slight deviation value set and a characteristic vector set; and determining N second tracking frames based on the thermodynamic diagram, the width and height value set, the fine deviation value set, the feature vector set and the N first tracking frames, wherein the N second tracking frames are used for framing N tracking targets in the second image. By adopting the embodiment of the application, the tracking accuracy can be improved.

By adopting the embodiment of the application, the tracking accuracy can be improved.

title: A kind of data processing method for the control of Magnetic resonance imaging quality
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of data processing methods for the control of Magnetic resonance imaging quality, obtain the MRI image of magnetic resonance Water ball first, and the gray value of bead in magnetic resonance Water ball is extracted by Edge-Detection Algorithm；Then the spatial information (si) of MRI image is utilized, frequency domain low-frequency information and related coefficient, establish the model of initial least square method support vector machines, it is calculated again by the least square method supporting vector machine optimized by particle swarm algorithm, final output simultaneously records corresponding data, finally its result is compared with corresponding nuclear magnetic resonance parameter, and then judge whether magnetic resonance imaging device is qualified, it is small with calculation amount, calculating speed is fast, the high advantage of computational accuracy, can accurately judge whether magnetic resonance imaging device is qualified, to guarantee the life security of each magnetic resonance examination person.

title: Product defect classification method, device, equipment and medium based on artificial intelligence
abstract: The disclosure provides a product defect classification method, device, equipment and medium based on artificial intelligence, and belongs to the technical field of artificial intelligence and computer vision. The method comprises the following steps: the method comprises the steps of determining a predicted label corresponding to a product defect image based on acquired first training sample data comprising at least one product defect image and an artificial label corresponding to the product defect image, determining a first target label based on the predicted label and the artificial label, updating the artificial label in the first training sample based on a preset target threshold and the first target label to obtain second training sample data, training a product defect classification model obtained through the second training sample data, and classifying product defects. The product defect classification model obtained through training of the second training sample data is used for determining the defect classification label, the problem of false labeling of manual labeling can be effectively avoided, and the accuracy of defect classification is improved.

title: Ceramic glaze defect detection method based on transfer learning and deformable CNN
abstract: The invention discloses a ceramic glaze defect detection method based on transfer learning and deformable CNN (CNN). S1, a ceramic glaze image sample data set is constructed, S2, an improved CNN is constructed by a transfer learning and variable convolution method, the ceramic glaze image sample data is subjected to feature extraction, and S3, a random forest algorithm is used for classifying feature data. According to the method, on the basis of the ceramic glaze image sample data set, the characteristics of the ceramic glaze image are further extracted through a variable convolution algorithm, and the accuracy of classification and identification is improved through a random forest algorithm. The method is beneficial to facilitating the factory to detect the unqualified ceramic glaze in production, improving the production efficiency of enterprises and reducing the production cost of enterprises.

title: A kind of hippocampus dividing method, device and electronic equipment applied to MRI
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a kind of hippocampus dividing method, device and electronic equipments applied to MRI.The described method includes: obtaining MRI 3-dimensional image；Building size is pre-set dimension, and includes the target image of the sensitizing range of the MRI 3-dimensional image；The target image is inputted in at least two interaction neural networks that training in advance obtains respectively, obtains the pre-segmentation result of each interactive neural network output；According to the pre-segmentation of the weight of predetermined each interactive neural network and each interactive neural network output as a result, determining the segmentation result of the MRI 3-dimensional image.The efficiency to hippocampus segmentation can be improved in the embodiment of the present invention.

title: Graphic defects identification and localization method based on implicit Di Li Crays distributed model
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of graphic defects identification based on implicit Di Li Crays distributed model and localization method, including training stage and test phase, training stage to comprise the following steps：The picture point time sequence of training image is calculated using chaology, extracts multiple features, composition chaos characteristic vector, a training image is represented by a chaos characteristic vector matrix；The skilled chaos characteristic vector matrix of institute is clustered by k means clustering methods, code book is formed, primary histogram is then formed by code book；Primary histogram is learnt to obtain advanced histogram by implicit Di Li Crays distributed model, training image is represented by advanced histogram；Test phase comprises the following steps：Test image is represented by an advanced histogram；The similarity degree of above-mentioned one advanced histogram and advanced histogram is calculated, classification and position the defects of to judge test image.

title: Predictive use of quantitative imaging
abstract: The present disclosure provides systems and methods for predicting a disease state of a subject using ultrasound imaging and ancillary information to the ultrasound imaging. At least two quantitative measurements of a subject, including at least one measurement taken using ultrasound imaging, as part of quantified information can be identified. One of the quantitative measurements can be compared to a first predetermined standard, included as part of ancillary information to the quantified information, in order to identify a first initial value. Further, another of the quantitative measurements can be compared to a second predetermined standard, included as part of the ancillary information, in order to identify a second initial value. Subsequently, the quantitative information can be correlated with the ancillary information using the first initial value and the second initial value to determine a final value that is predictive of a disease state of the subject.

title: Method for generating license plate training sample in complex environment
abstract: The invention provides a method for generating a license plate training sample in a complex environment, which comprises the following steps: the method comprises the following steps: generating a standard license plate picture; step two: color disturbance; step three: adding noise; step four: adding a frame; step five: affine transformation; step six: adding frame noise and color disturbance; step seven: a motion blur effect is generated. The invention can effectively avoid the cost of manpower, time and the like caused by license plate collection, solves the problem of limited number and types of collected license plates, and can accelerate the training speed of the deep learning model.

title: Segmentation and view guidance in ultrasound imaging and associated devices, systems, and methods
abstract: Ultrasound image devices, systems, and methods are provided. An ultrasound imaging system comprising a processor circuit configured to receive, from an ultrasound imaging device, a sequence of input image frames of a moving object over a time period, wherein the moving object comprises at least one of an anatomy of a patient or a medical device traversing through the patient's anatomy, and wherein a portion of the moving object is at least partially invisible in a first input image frame of the sequence of input image frames; apply a recurrent predictive network to the sequence of input image frames to generate segmentation data; and output, to a display, a sequence of output image frames based on the segmentation data, wherein the portion of the moving object is fully visible in a first output image frame of the sequence of output image frames.

title: Character recognizing device
abstract:
PURPOSE: To increase the recognition speed for recognition of characters written in a drawing or a sentence and to automatically register characters so as to prevent mis-recognition of characters of the same type due to forgetting of registration.  
     CONSTITUTION: A character recognition processing part is divided into two stages. A character recognition processing part in the first stage matches one- character components of character contour data with the type of a standard dictionary 8. If the recognition result does not meet a prescribed reference, a character recognition processing part 7 in the second stage matches the recognition result of the preceding stage with both of dictionaries 8 and 9. If the type of the character to be recognized is different from those of the standard dictionary 8 and the user dictionary 9, a recognition result editing processing part 11 performs interactive correction, and a character register part 12 registers the pertinent character in the user dictionary 9. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1992,JPO&Japio
