title: A kind of medicine CT image dividing method based on 3D confrontation network
abstract: The present invention discloses a kind of medicine CT image dividing method based on 3D confrontation network, includes the following steps：Medicine CT image sample is acquired, pretreatment is standardized；Establish final segmentation network；Any one medicine CT image to be identified will be given to be put into final segmentation network, obtain final segmentation result.The present invention carries out whole design by fighting the structure type of network to 3D, using segmentation network as the generation network G of 3D confrontation network, differentiation network D of the VGG11 that pre-training is crossed as 3D confrontation network.The present invention increases labeled data using confrontation network, and pass through similarity calculation and circulation random screening, enhance the confidence level of image, with the mark image collection of Mass production high quality, finally by differentiating network D and segmentation network progress dual training to update segmentation network parameter and differentiating network D parameter, to realize the optimization to segmentation network and improve segmentation accuracy.The method of the present invention design is simple, it is easy to accomplish.

title: Joint Depth estimation and semantic segmentation from a single image
abstract: Global semantic and depth layouts of a scene in an image are estimated (126) through machine learning (e.g. as a template classification problem) by computing device(s). Local semantic and depth layouts are also estimated (128) for respective ones of a plurality of segments of the scene of the image through machine learning (e.g. using a convolutional neural network, CNN, or support vector machine, SVM) by the computing device(s) (e.g. also as a template classification problem). The estimated global semantic and depth layouts are merged (130) (e.g. using conditional random field) with the local semantic and depth layouts by the computing device(s) to semantically label (120) and assign a depth value (122) to image pixels (e.g. thereby ensuring consistency). The estimated global depth layout may assign a respective absolute distance to a plurality of pixels in the image. The merging may include smoothing the depth labels assigned to individual pixels. Also disclosed is the prediction of local semantic and depth layouts of individual segments using the estimated global semantic and depth layouts of the scene, and jointly forming a semantically-labelled version of the image in which individual pixels are assigned a semantic label and depth value.

title: Foreground and background detection method
abstract: The present invention concerns a method for assigning a pixel to one of a foreground pixel set and a background pixel set using asynchronous semantic post processing to improve motion detection by an imaging device, the pixel belonging to an image of a chronological sequence of images taken by the imaging device that includes background and foreground objects.

title: Picture processing method and picture processing device
abstract: The application is applicable to the technical field of image processing, and provides a photo processing method and a photo processing device, which comprise the following steps: acquiring a photo to be processed, and intercepting a plurality of sub-images from the photo to be processed, wherein the sub-images comprise at least one portrait; respectively calculating the group aggregation degree corresponding to each sub-image, wherein the group aggregation degree is used for representing the aggregation degree among the human images in the sub-images; and determining the sub-image corresponding to the highest group aggregation degree as the processed picture. By the method, the composition of the figure photo can be effectively adjusted, and the integrity and the harmony of the figure photo picture are further improved.

title: Automatic Detection, Counting, and Measurement of Lumber Boards Using a Handheld Device
abstract: An image processing system receives an image depicting a bundle of boards. The bundle of boards has a front face that is perpendicular to a long axis of boards and the image is captured at an angle relative to the long axis. The image processing system applies a homographic transformation to estimate a frontal view of the front face and identifies a plurality of divisions between rows in the estimate. For each adjacent pair of the plurality of divisions between rows, a plurality of vertical divisions is identified. The image processing system identifies a set of bounding boxes defined by pairs of adjacent divisions between rows and pairs of adjacent vertical divisions. The image processing system may filter and/or merge some bounding boxes to better match the bounding boxes to individual boards. Based on the bounding boxes, the image processing system determines the number of boards in the bundle.

title: Systems and methods for predicting vehicle and human interaction
abstract: Systems and methods for predicting user interactions with vehicles. A computing device receives an image and video segment of a road scene, at least one first image and video segment being taken from the perspective of a participant in the road scene and then generating stimulus data based on the image and video segment. The stimulus data is transmitted to the user interface, and response data including at least one of an action and an action possibility corresponding to another participant in the road scene is received. The computing device aggregates a subset of the plurality of response data to form statistical data, and a model is generated based on the statistical data. The model is applied to different image or video segments and user predictions in different image or video segments are generated.

title: Vehicle Autonomous Driving Method Using Camera and LiDAR Sensor
abstract: The present invention relates to an autonomous vehicle driving method using a camera and LiDAR sensors comprising the steps of: obtaining sensor values from a left LiDAR sensor and a right LiDAR sensor installed at a front side of a vehicle; allowing the left LiDAR sensor or the right LiDAR sensor to sense an object and checking the distance to an object sensed by one or two LiDAR sensors to determine whether an emergency occurs; checking the distance to the object to transmit a signal for performing an emergency stop when the distance is less than a set value; when performing the emergency stop is not necessary, checking whether an obstacle exists around the vehicle through a rotary LiDAR sensor; recognizing the position of an object through the obtained rotary LiDAR sensor value to determine the means to avoid the obstacle; when an object around the vehicle is recognized, transmitting a signal to perform a maneuver to avoid the obstacle; when no obstacle exists around the vehicle, obtaining data through a webcam camera; sensing a lane through the obtained data and tracking the lane along the sensed lane; and transmitting the speed and steering commands while making an emergency stop signal the highest priority, transmitting the speed and steering commands while making an obstacle avoidance signal the next priority, and transmitting the speed and steering commands through the lane tracking as the next priority to drive the vehicle. The present invention can ensure safe vehicle driving.

title: Detection of dangerous things to infants through image analysis and deep learning
abstract: A method for detecting dangerous infants and infants using image analysis and deep learning according to an embodiment of the present invention includes the steps of recognizing the plurality of surrounding objects from an image including an infant and a plurality of surrounding objects using a deep learning algorithm, Analyzing coordinate information on the perceived plurality of peripheral objects in the at least one child, and predicting the risk situation of the infant and child based on the analysis.

title: Method for recognizing a machine encoded character
abstract: A METHOD FOR RECOGNIZING A MACHINE ENCODED CHARACTER        Abstract of the Disclosure An optical character recognition system and method therefor is disclosed for reading a machine encoded character font, such as the E13B magnetic ink character (MICR) font.  The digitized data of an optical scan band of the document to be read is read by an optical scanner and stored in memory.  A two pass oper-ation of the digitized data is then performed by the respective algorithms of the system to locate and recognize the characters read.

abstract: The invention discloses a kind of image depth estimation method and system, the realization of wherein method includes：Estimation of Depth network is built, estimation of Depth network includes：Coded portion, convolution coupling part and decoded portion, the warp lamination of decoded portion are connected with last layer of convolutional layer in the yardstick identical convolution block of coded portion, form final warp lamination；The depth map of two consecutive images and wherein one image in selection sample image trains estimation of Depth network, the estimation of Depth network trained as training sample using training sample；Collecting test image, extracts the current frame image of test image and the previous frame image of current frame image；The estimation of Depth network that the Color Channel input of current frame image and previous frame image is trained, obtains the depth map of current frame image.The inventive method efficiency high, obtains depth map accuracy height, compactness strong.

title: Variable-focus monocular and binocular vision sensing device
abstract: The invention provides a variable-focus monocular and binocular vision sensing device comprising a mirror image type optical system, a high-precision bearing holder, an image acquisition system, a digital information processing device and other parts. The variable-focus monocular and binocular vision sensing device can guarantee that a variable-focus image sensor (a CCD (Charge Coupled Device) or an analog video camera) mounted on the high-precision bearing holder can be accurately located at a certain required monocular vision preset station, and can automatically regulate the focus to the required value so as to perform monocular vision measurement or guidance work; the variable-focus monocular and binocular vision sensing device also can accurately locate the image sensor at the unique determined binocular vision preset station, and can automatically regulate focus to the required value, and thus, the image sensor and the mirror image type optical system jointly form a binocular vision sensing system, and sequentially, the function of binocular vision guidance or measurement is realized; and moreover, the variable-focus monocular and binocular vision sensing device can realize automatic switching between a monocular vision station and a binocular vision station through programming of the digital information processing device according to the task requirements, so as to realize the functions such as monocular and binocular vision measurement, guidance or obstacle avoidance.

title: Signal processing device and image display apparatus including the same
abstract: Disclosed is a signal processing device and an image display apparatus including the same. The signal processing device includes: a quality calculator configured to compare a previous frame image and at least a region of a current frame image, and calculate image type information based on a comparison result; an image quality setting unit configured to set an image quality based on the image type information; and an image quality processing unit configured to perform image quality processing according to the set image quality. Accordingly, it is possible to improve accuracy of image analysis and perform image quality processing according thereto.

title: Vision-based aircraft cable bracket assembly state detection method
abstract: The invention discloses a method for detecting the assembly state of an aircraft cable support based on vision, which mainly combines deep learning and binocular stereo vision, utilizes a deep convolutional neural network to extract characteristics and judge the misassembly of the aircraft cable support of the characteristic representation, and finally utilizes the binocular stereo vision to carry out support characteristic representation and aircraft cable support space positioning so as to realize the pose judgment of the aircraft cable support. The method of the invention realizes the detection of the installation state of the cable support in a complex assembly scene, completes the detection of neglected loading, wrong loading and installation positions of the cable support, compares the detection with a standard database file, generates a structured installation report and feeds the report back to an operator; the method can greatly reduce the manpower labor and the operation errors and recording errors caused by the cooperation of multiple persons.

title: A kind of ship identification method in ship lock monitoring system
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of ship identification methods in ship lock monitoring system, it includes the following steps: 1) to obtain video of the shooting from ship lock entrance area, and the background modeling based on Vibe algorithm is carried out according to the preceding f frame video frame of the video, it obtains background model, and then determines in the f+1 frame and frame later of the video and whether there is moving object；If 2) in (n+1)th frame and frame later there are moving object, which is input to training is completed in advance ship into lock detection Mobilenet-ssd model, recognizes the classification information and spatial positional information of ship；3) artificial to mark two monitoring points 0 and 1 on the image in advance for the spatial information gone out given in step 2), the actual travel speed of each ship is calculated by the time of the two monitoring points by ship in record image.The present invention can provide effective reference for the identification technology of ship in hydraulic power plant's navigation lock control system.

title: Medical scan viewing system with enhanced training and methods for use therewith
abstract: A multi-label generating system is configured to: store a first plurality of medical scans with corresponding global labels and a second plurality of medical scans with corresponding region labels, wherein the global labels each correspond to one of a set of abnormality classes and wherein each of the region labels correspond to one of the set of abnormality classes; generate a computer vision model by training on the first plurality of medical scans with the corresponding global labels and the second plurality of medical scans with the corresponding region labels; receive a new medical scan; generate global probability data based on the computer vision model, wherein the global probability data indicates a set of global probability values corresponding to the set of abnormality classes, and wherein each of the set of global probability values indicates a probability that a corresponding one of the set of abnormality classes is present in the new medical scan; and transmit the global probability data to a client device for display via a display device.

title: Vertebral artery dissection risk evaluation method, computer device, and storage medium
abstract: Method and apparatus for vertebral artery dissection risk analysis using hemodynamic variable based four dimensional magnetic resonance flow imaging, comprising obtaining four-dimensional phase-contrast magnetic resonance imaging data, performing pre-processing of the four-dimensional phase-contrast magnetic resonance imaging data, obtaining at least one blood hemodynamic marker from the four-dimensional phase-contrast magnetic resonance imaging data, classifying the at least one blood hemodynamic marker as a hemodynamic predictor of vertebral artery dissection, and creating a comprehensive risk evaluation of vertebral artery dissection using the hemodynamic predictor.

title: Video signal processor
abstract: (57) [Summary] An object of the present invention is to provide a video signal processing device having a high operation rate of a decoder and capable of simultaneously displaying a plurality of videos. SOLUTION: A demultiplexer 4 separates individual compressed video data from a transport stream. In this case, which compressed video data is output from which output port among the plurality of output ports is set in advance according to the profile and the level. Decoder 51,   52 also sets in advance which part of the input compressed video data is to be decoded in accordance with the video format of the video data. Therefore, for high definition video such as 1080i, the same compressed video data is input to the decoders 51 and 52 and both decoders share and decode. For standard video such as 480i, different compressed video data is input for each decoder, and another video is decoded for each decoder.

title: A kind of image processing method and device
abstract: This application involves technical field of image processing, in particular to a kind of image processing method and device, to shorten the period that facial image is converted into cartoon image.The embodiment of the present application obtains at least one picture to be converted comprising human face region；Obtain the face image data for the human face region for including in picture to be converted；Cartoon image data are converted to by the face image data that the neural network trained will acquire respectively；Cartoon image is generated according to the cartoon image data obtained after conversion, and the human face region in picture to be converted is replaced with to the cartoon image of conversion.Quickly due to Processing with Neural Network speed, it can be realized and be quickly converted in such a way that facial image is converted to cartoon image by neural network, shorten the period that facial image is converted to cartoon image, improve the efficiency that facial image is converted to cartoon image.

title: Automated placental measurement
abstract: A method for analyzing the placenta in two or three dimensions comprising: selecting one or more placental samples to be analyzed; obtaining a digital image of each placental sample; and performing an analysis on the digital images, wherein a mathematical algorithm is applied to the digital image. The results of the analysis are correlated with data on health outcomes in infants, children, or adults and are used to assess future health risks to a patient.

title: Infrared road image water body detection method based on condition generation countermeasure network
abstract: The invention discloses an infrared road image water body detection method based on a condition generation countermeasure network, which comprises the following steps: acquiring a road image by using an infrared camera, zooming the road image to a specified size, and marking to obtain a mask representing water body position information; constructing a conditional generation countermeasure network, wherein the network adopts a wasserstein GAN structure, takes a full convolution neural network as a generator, takes a convolution neural network as a discriminator, and simultaneously utilizes a preprocessing function in a reflex attention unit to preprocess input images of the generator and the discriminator in the network; training a network by using the infrared road image and the corresponding mask; and scaling the image to be detected to a corresponding size, inputting a trained condition to generate a countermeasure network, wherein the output of the generator is a binary image representing a water body detection result. The method for detecting the water body area on the road surface by using the infrared road image has high accuracy and recall rate and is suitable for related tasks in the field of unmanned driving.

title: Systems and methods for classification and alignment of highly similar or self-similar patterns
abstract: Systems and methods for training a machine vision system create geometric models. The disclosed methods can extract one or more corresponding features and one or more differentiating features from different sets of training images. The one or more differentiating features can be used to differentiate between the different work pieces. The disclosed methods can generate an alignment model using the corresponding features and a classification model using the one or more differentiating features.

title: Using image analysis algorithms for providing training data to neural networks
abstract: The present invention relates generally to training a neural network that receives a plurality of input digital images and outputs, for each particular input digital image, data for determining a relevance level for groups of pixels in a particular input digital image A computer program, a computer, and a system.

title: Vehicle count method based on video image
abstract: Disclosed is a vehicle counting method based on video pictures, comprising steps as follows: catching a multi-frame video picture and collecting the pixel value of each pixel in the multi-frame video picture, beginning from the preset frame picture to calculate the probability density value of the pixel value at the preset time of each pixel in the preset frame video picture according to each collected pixel value in the multi-frame picture, confirming the foreground picture of the video picture via utilizing the probability density value by calculating, confirming the area in the foreground picture being larger than a certain area of specified value as motive vehicles, and running after the vehicles in the video picture to obtain the number of new vehicle and that of departed vehicles. The invention can be carried out by a network camera, a microprocessor, a video codec and hardware system of computers. The method of the invention employs computer vision technology to realize vehicle counting, further, the invention is simple in required equipment, easy in realizing and low in cost.

title: Automatic parking system and automatic parking method
abstract: There is provided an automatic parking system according to an exemplary embodiment of the present disclosure. The automatic parking system includes: a smart key recognition processor recognizing a smart key positioned in a first area; a sensor unit acquiring images around a subject vehicle if the smart key is recognized, and converting the acquired image into external images and synthesizing the images; a parking space recognizing sensor periodically receiving the external images and sequentially comparing the consecutive external images using an image recognition technology to recognize parking areas; and a controller calculating a moving path between a current position of the subject vehicle and an optimal parking area among the parking areas and controlling the subject vehicle based on the moving path, in which the parking space recognizing sensor may detect the parking areas in consideration of a length and a width of the subject vehicle.
text: Automatic parking system and automatic parking method There is provided an automatic parking system according to an exemplary embodiment of the present disclosure. title: Method and device for explaining sports game
abstract: The disclosure relates to a method and a device for explaining a sports game. The method comprises the following steps: carrying out character recognition on a video frame of a sports game video, and determining the name of an athlete in the video frame; performing posture recognition on the athlete and determining the action of the athlete; determining corresponding action description information of the athlete according to the action of the athlete; and generating the commentary content corresponding to the sports game video according to the name of the athlete and the action description information. The method and the device can improve the accuracy of the explanation content, avoid the condition of manual misstatement, greatly reduce the error rate and save manpower.

title: Online sparse prototype tracking method based on twin neural network linear representation model
abstract: The invention discloses an online sparse prototype tracking method based on a twin neural network linear representation model, which comprises the steps of carrying out linear superposition on different pictures based on an image mixing method to obtain a complex background picture; modeling is carried out on an appearance model through online sparse prototype tracking, and a tracked target is sparsely and linearly represented by a prototype composed of orthogonal subspace basis vectors and trivial templates; and outputting an occlusion tracking result based on the observation model and the observation likelihood function. The method has the advantages that different pictures are linearly overlapped through a data augmentation method, a complex background picture with semantic information is generated by using a limited training set, the distinguishing capability of the siamrPN to different objects is enhanced, the problem of background clutter is solved, an online sparse prototype target representation model is combined with the improved siamrPN, the target shielding condition is considered, a robust tracker manufactured by using an observation likelihood function and an updating mechanism is used, the positioning accuracy of a tracked target is improved, and the overall tracking performance is improved.

title: Image instance segmentation method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium
abstract: The disclosure relates to an image instance segmentation method, an image instance segmentation device, electronic equipment and a storage medium, relates to the technical field of computer vision, and is used for solving the problem of inaccurate instance segmentation in the related technology, and the image instance segmentation method comprises the following steps: inputting a feature map of a target into a trained segmentation network, determining a sub-image of the target in the feature map based on the segmentation network, and training the segmentation network in the following manner: the method comprises the steps of down-sampling a sample image, processing the down-sampled sample image based on a hole convolution kernel with different expansion rates, determining sample images with different receptive fields, fusing the sample images with different receptive fields to obtain a fused sample image, up-sampling and example segmentation the fused sample image, determining a first sub-image, and training an initial segmentation network according to the first sub-image and a marked second sub-image; and (4) marking the position of the sub-image in the image, wherein the pixel information of pixel points in the feature maps of different receptive fields is more, so that the example segmentation is more accurate.
text: Image instance segmentation method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium The disclosure relates to an image instance segmentation method, an image instance segmentation device, electronic equipment and a storage medium, relates to the technical field of computer vision, and is used for solving the problem of inaccurate instance segmentation in the related technology, and the image instance segmentation method comprises the following steps: inputting a feature map of a target into a trained segmentation network, determining a sub-image of the target in the feature map based on the segmentation network, and training the segmentation network in the following manner: the method comprises the steps of down-sampling a sample image, processing the down-sampled sample image based on a hole convolution kernel with different expansion rates, determining sample images with different receptive fields, fusing the sample images with different receptive fields to obtain a fused sample image, up-sampling and example segmentation the fused sample image, determining a first sub-image, and training an initial segmentation network according to the first sub-image and a marked second sub-image; and (4) marking the position of the sub-image in the image, wherein the pixel information of pixel points in the feature maps of different receptive fields is more, so that the example segmentation is more accurate.

title: Camera device and camera system
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of a camera and provides a camera device and a camera system. The camera device comprises a camera module, a control module and a communication module. An infrared sensor detects external environment and obtains electrical signals; the communication module receives a sensitivity adjusting signal sent by an external device; the control module obtains a gain control signal according to the sensitivity adjusting signal, and adjusts gain of a signal processing module according to the gain control signal; the signal processing module sends the amplified electrical signals to a processor; the processor obtains a voltage value according to the amplified electrical signals, compares the voltage value with a preset voltage value and controls the camera according to the comparison result, thereby realizing remote adjustment of the sensitivity of the camera device, and preventing the problem of error alarm of an infrared sensor in the camera device; and meanwhile, sensitivity can be adjusted in real time to enable the camera device to be suitable for various actual use occasions dynamically.

abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of target identification method based on smooth multi-instance learning, including sample training step and target identification step, sample training step is：Extract the exemplary characteristics of training picture；According to exemplary characteristics, carry out smooth treatment and obtain the related continuous probabilistic model of example；It is trained according to the continuous probabilistic model that example is related, obtains training weight w；Target identification step is：Extract the exemplary characteristics of picture to be detected；According to the exemplary characteristics of picture to be detected and training weight, calculate and determine in picture to be detected with the presence or absence of the target for needing to recognize.Compared with prior art, the present invention has the advantages that recognition efficiency is high, recognition accuracy is high and recognition effect is good.

title: Interpretable deep machine learning for clinical radiology
abstract: One aspect of the invention provides a computer-implemented method of identifying one or more clinical factors associated with an artificial intelligence prediction. The computer implemented method includes: applying a previously trained deep neural network to one or more images for a subject to produce a prediction, the previously trained deep neural network comprising a plurality of nodes; comparing outputs of the nodes to previously identified patterns of node outputs for a plurality of individual clinical factors; and identifying which of the plurality of individual clinical factors are most correlated with the outputs of the nodes.

The computer implemented method includes: applying a previously trained deep neural network to one or more images for a subject to produce a prediction, the previously trained deep neural network comprising a plurality of nodes; comparing outputs of the nodes to previously identified patterns of node outputs for a plurality of individual clinical factors; and identifying which of the plurality of individual clinical factors are most correlated with the outputs of the nodes.

title: A kind of target image extracting method, system and terminal device
abstract: The present invention is suitable for column reconstruction technical field, provide a kind of target image extracting method, system and terminal device, pass through the first image being split to target image, it is input to the closed type for being classified to obtain non-close vertebral foramen in neural network, further according to the closed type of the non-close vertebral foramen, the non-close region of the non-close vertebral foramen is marked, then by the first image the image of promising non-close vertebral foramen and its label in non-close region be input to production confrontation network, obtain completing the second image of vertebral foramen completion, the profile of all vertebral foramens in the second image and filling are extracted again, three-dimensional reconstruction is carried out according to the profile filled, it is enable to realize the three-dimensional reconstruction of canalis spinalis according to the vertebral foramen of closure, realize the extraction to vertebral column canal.

title: Cross-arm attitude measurement method under a kind of complex background based on binocular vision
abstract: The invention discloses cross-arm attitude measurement methods under a kind of complex background based on binocular vision, include the following steps：The inside and outside parameter of binocular camera is initialized first；Then cross-arm image is acquired；Image segmentation is carried out to cross-arm image later, is partitioned into cross-arm administrative division map；The cross-arm administrative division map after edge detection is obtained by edge detection, mask operation again；Then the straight line in Hough transformation detection cross-arm administrative division map is used, and obtains three straight lines at cross-arm edge by cluster, Slope Constraint；Then characteristic matching is carried out to three straight lines at cross-arm edge in three straight lines at cross-arm edge in left mesh cross-arm administrative division map and right mesh cross-arm administrative division map, and obtains the three-dimensional coordinate of all characteristic points using binocular range measurement principle；Least square method is finally utilized to solve the normal vector of two planes of cross-arm.The present invention can accurately measure the posture of cross-arm under complex background, and valid data are provided for mechanical arm tail end gesture stability, be conducive to hot line robot and replace arrester operation.

title: Ultrasonic pulse-echo apparatus
abstract: Abstract of the Disclosure For use in an ultrasonic pulse-echo apparatus including an ultrasonic wave transducer for transmitting an ultrasonic wave into an object to be examined and for producing a first image signal corresponding to echo pulses reflected from the interior of the object, an improved signal processing means for compensating for brightness variations of effects caused by varying the object and for providing a second image signal corresponding to the first image signal, and an X-  Y type display device for displaying the image of the object from the second image signal.  Compensation for the brightness varying effect is secured by a gain controlled amplifier of which the gain is controlled by a control signal corresponding to the cumulative second image signal of the preceding frame.

title: Visual SLAM front-end attitude estimation method based on deep learning
abstract: The invention provides a visual SLAM front-end pose estimation method based on deep learning, which is used for estimating pose transformation between frames in real time. Firstly, carrying out data preprocessing on an original data set, and then constructing a Brox network to carry out dense optical flow extraction on input continuous frame images; dividing the extracted optical flow diagram into two networks for feature extraction, extracting high-dimensional features by adopting global information for one branch, dividing the optical flow diagram into 4 sub-images in the other branch, and respectively sampling to obtain image features; and finally, fusing the features obtained by the training of the two branches, and performing pose estimation on the final cascade full-connection network to acquire the pose between two adjacent frames. The invention solves the problem of true scale estimation in monocular vision, can extract camera motion and proportion information by using global information and local information, and improves the learning ability and the intelligent level of the robot.

title: Photo relighting using deep neural networks and confidence learning
abstract: Apparatus and methods related to applying lighting models to images of objects are provided. A neural network can be trained to apply a lighting model to an input image. The training of the neural network can utilize confidence learning that is based on light predictions and prediction confidence values associated with lighting of the input image. A computing device can receive an input image of an object and data about a particular lighting model to be applied to the input image. The computing device can determine an output image of the object by using the trained neural network to apply the particular lighting model to the input image of the object.

title: Human body interaction behavior identification method, system and device based on video image
abstract: The invention provides a human body interactive behavior recognition method, a human body interactive behavior recognition system and a human body interactive behavior recognition device based on video images, aiming at the problems that motion characteristic information is difficult to extract and the relationship between a motion whole and a motion individual cannot be fully combined in the existing human body interactive behavior recognition method. The method starts from the perspective of interactive individual segmentation and integral fusion, firstly carries out motion human body detection and segmentation to respectively obtain motion videos of two interactive individuals, then respectively sends the interactive integral videos and the motion videos after individual segmentation into a convolutional neural network to extract preliminary characteristics, then sends characteristic descriptors into a multi-layer perceptron neural network to train, and finally carries out preliminary behavior classification, and finally carries out multi-characteristic learning based on a global classification result and an individual classification result to form a final classification result.

title: Multi-mode pedestrian detection method based on improved YOLO model
abstract: The invention relates to a multi-mode pedestrian detection method based on an improved YOLO model, and belongs to the field of deep learning target detection. The multimode pedestrian detection algorithm based on the improved YOLO model is characterized in that visible light picture and infrared light picture samples which correspond to each other in a KAIST data set one by one are used for training to obtain a trained model, whether a pedestrian target is contained in a visible light-infrared light picture pair or not is detected through the trained model, the multimode pedestrian detection algorithm based on the YOLO network uses parallel Darknet53 as a feature extraction network to respectively extract multi-scale feature maps of a visible light mode and an infrared light mode, a weighted feature fusion layer and a CBAM attention mechanism are used to enable the visible light feature pictures and the infrared light feature pictures to be better fused, and then the multi-scale attention weighted fusion feature maps are sequentially cascaded and sent to the YOLO layer for pedestrian detection.

title: Methdo and system for measuring image thickness based on artificial intelligence
abstract: Disclosed is a method and system for measuring the thickness or volume of an image of interest or a region of interest in image information using an artificial neural network for 2D or 3D image information and visualizing the same. The artificial intelligence-based brain region classification system, the artificial intelligence-based image thickness measurement system, is a model generation unit that generates information necessary to create a model, a model training and evaluation unit that learns and evaluates data, and quantifies based on the learned results. And a digitization and visualization unit that performs visualization, wherein the digitization and visualization unit three-dimensionally visualizes the result value of the ratio of the thickness of the image area from the model learning and evaluation unit, and this ratio result value and the voxel of one area (voxel) After measuring the distance result, combine and quantify.

title: Generating image segmentation data using a multi-branch neural network
abstract: A multi-branch neural network generates segmentation data for a received image. The received image is provided to a high-level branch and a low-level branch. Based on the received image, the high-level branch generates a feature map of high-level image features, and the low-level branch generates a feature map of low-level image features. The high-level feature map and the low-level feature map are combined to generate a combined feature map. The combined feature map is provided to a boundary refinement module that includes a dense-connection neural network, which generates segmentation data for the received image, based on the combined feature map.

title: Image quality detection method and device
abstract: The application relates to the technical field of image information processing, in particular to an image quality detection method and device, which are used for solving the problem that the image quality detection efficiency needs to be improved in the prior art; the method provided by the embodiment of the application comprises the following steps: extracting quality characteristics of the image to be detected based on a pre-trained deep learning model for detecting the image quality; the deep learning model comprises at least one feature derivative layer connected in series, and each feature derivative layer is used for: after receiving the processing result of the previous layer of image to be detected connected with the detection device, extracting different image characteristics from the processing result respectively, integrating the extracted image characteristics into image data, and delivering the image data to the next layer for processing so as to extract quality characteristics finally; and determining the image quality of the image to be detected according to the extracted quality characteristics. In the embodiment of the application, more image features are extracted through the feature derivative layer and are integrated, so that the quality evaluation is more comprehensive and accurate.

title: Method and system for estimating blur kernel size
abstract: A method for estimating a blur kernel size, the method including: (1) pre-processing a blurred image, to obtain an image, so that a size of the image satisfies an image input size of a multi-class convolutional neural network (CNN); (2) inputting the image into a multi-class CNN with completed training, to obtain a blur-kernel-size probability distribution vector; and (3) comparing each element in the blur-kernel-size probability distribution vector, so that an estimated blur kernel size of the blurred image is the blur kernel size corresponding to a largest element. The invention also provides a system for estimating a blur kernel size. The system includes an image pre-processing module, a training-set synthesizing module, a multi-class CNN module, and a blur kernel size estimation module.

title: Crop disease detection system based on neural network
abstract: The invention provides a crop disease detection system based on a neural network and relates to the field of artificial intelligence. The system comprises a network module, a neural network module, a CPU master control module and a database and the like. The network module is connected with a user terminal, and is used for receiving data of the user terminal or sending data to the terminal. The neural network module is a software program or a hardware system comprising a convolution neural network. The CPU master control module is used for analyzing the output of the neural network module, querying the database and sending the result to the user terminal. The database is used for recording disease information and treatment method of each crop. With the neural network module being combined, the crop disease detection system overcomes the defect that a feature matching algorithm is not fully considered, has good generalization ability and improves predication accuracy.

title: Method and apparatus for detecting a desired behavior in digital image data
abstract: A method for detecting stellate lesions in digitized mammographic image data includes the steps of prestoring a plurality of reference images, calculating a plurality of features for each of the pixels of the reference images, and creating a binary decision tree from features of randomly sampled pixels from each of the reference images. Once the binary decision tree has been created, a plurality of features, preferably including an ALOE feature (analysis of local oriented edges), are calculated for each of the pixels of the digitized mammographic data. Each of these plurality of features of each pixel are input into the binary decision tree and a probability is determined, for each of the pixels, corresponding to the likelihood of the presence of a stellate lesion, to create a probability image. Finally, the probability image is spatially filtered to enforce local consensus among neighboring pixels and the spatially filtered image is output.

title: Automatic background replacement for single-image and multi-view captures
abstract: A segmentation of an object depicted in a first visual representation may be determined. The segmentation may include for each image a first respective image portion that includes the object, a second respective image portion that includes a respective ground area located beneath the object, and a third respective image portion that includes a background area located above the second respective portion and behind the object. A second visual representation may be constructed that includes the first respective image portion and a target background image portion that replaces the third respective image portion and that is selected from a target background image based on an area of the third respective image portion relative to the respective image.

title: A kind of 3 dimensional drawing identifying system based on convolutional neural networks
abstract: The 3 dimensional drawing identifying system based on convolutional neural networks that the invention discloses a kind of, belongs to artificial intelligence technical field of data processing.3 dimensional drawing identifying system based on convolutional neural networks of the invention includes input picture cache module, process control module, parameter distribution module, convolution and up-sampling basic unit and Vistavision image processing module；The process control module is for providing control signal, control system working condition；Parameter distribution module is for storing and distributing parameter needed for convolutional neural networks calculate；Input picture cache module for storing the three-dimensional image of input pixel-by-pixel.The 3 dimensional drawing identifying system based on convolutional neural networks of the invention can sufficiently extract the depth information and range information of three-dimensional image, and to each pixel classifications in original image, achieve the purpose that isolate Vistavision image that there is good application value.

title: A kind of X-ray weld image fault grading method and system
abstract: The present invention discloses a kind of X-ray weld image fault grading method and system, and the grading approach includes: to obtain X-ray weld image；Type, position and the size of X-ray weld image defect are determined according to the X-ray weld image；The defect rank of the X-ray weld image is determined according to the type of the defect, position and size.Grading approach in the present invention realizes the full-automation of X-ray weld image defects detection and deciding grade and level, avoids and is failed to judge and judged by accident by manually judging to bring, improves deciding grade and level precision.

title: Defect detection method and device and electronic equipment
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a defect detection method, a defect detection device and electronic equipment, wherein the defect detection method comprises the following steps: acquiring an image to be detected; inputting an image to be detected into a pre-trained main depth learning network to obtain a detection result graph of the image to be detected; the main deep learning network is obtained based on calibration sample training; the calibration sample comprises a calibration sample obtained by calibrating an uncalibrated sample according to the sample probability obtained by inputting the uncalibrated sample into a pre-trained auxiliary deep learning network; the auxiliary deep learning network is obtained based on the test performance training fed back by the main deep learning network; and carrying out post-processing on the detection result image, and determining the defect area and the defect type in the image to be detected. By the scheme, the accuracy of defect detection can be improved.

title: Countermeasure support vector machine
abstract: The invention provides a generation countermeasure support vector machine based on edge computing cooperation and a text image vector processing system based on a generation countermeasure network model. The text image vector processing system comprises a text description input module and a collaborative edge computing terminal. The cooperative edge computing terminal generates a long text description based on a plurality of text keywords provided by a text description input module and based on different-depth learning models configured respectively; inputting the long text description into a classification model comprising a support vector machine for classification, and outputting image vectors corresponding to different classifications; returning the image vectors to the plurality of collaborative edge computing terminals, the edge computing terminals generating scene descriptions of different scene categories corresponding to a plurality of differently classified image vectors; and taking the image vector and the scene description as the input of the confrontation network model to obtain multi-object image output. The invention can generate high-resolution images containing multiple objects quickly and accurately.

title: Determine autonomous vehicle drives free space
abstract: In the various examples, it can receive sensing data, which indicates the visual field of the sensor for the vehicle being located in physical environment.Sensing data can be applied to machine learning model, the machine learning model calculate with by the class label of not dirigible space corresponding with the boundary that dirigible free space separates one group of boundary point and the boundary point for being used for this group of boundary point corresponding with the boundary in physical environment.The position in physical environment can be determined from the one group of boundary point indicated by sensing data, and position can be used and class label controls vehicle by the physical environment in dirigible free space.

title: It is a kind of based on super voxel and the dispersion tensor image partition method for estimating study
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of based on super voxel and the dispersion tensor image partition method for estimating study, comprising the following steps: firstly, calculating the geometrical characteristic and direction character for describing each voxel hydrone disperse to dispersion tensor image.Then, in the tissue regions uniform sampling seed point of dispersion tensor image, binding site, geometry and direction character generate super voxel using local space fuzzy clustering method.Then, under the frame of spectral clustering, the Optimized model for estimating study and cluster is established, objective function is alternately solved using iteration, realizes the classification of super voxel.Finally, the classification results of super voxel are mapped back image space, to obtain the segmentation result of dispersion tensor image.The method of the present invention can efficiently, steadily obtain accurately tissue segmentation, have scientific meaning for cerebral nerve image analysing computer, medical diagnosis on disease and brain Cognitive Study etc..

title: Pipe video defect inspection method based on convolutional neural networks
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of pipe video defect inspection method based on convolutional neural networks, frame is taken out to video, the multiple CNN of training classify to every frame image, count the result that each CNN is returned, it determines the defect type of the frame, is input with pipeline closed-circuit television video, be successive image frame by video slicing, every frame image is sent into multiple trained CNN and carries out two classification, classification results are only included containing certain specified defect and zero defect.Invention significantly improves the accuracys rate of pipeline defect detection, a kind of feasible method is provided for video detection, the automatic detection efficiency of defect of pipeline not only can be improved, also it can reduce the labor intensity of staff, this method Detection accuracy is high and detection speed is fast, has very big application value in pipe video defects detection, and achieves more satisfied result, it can be used as the Technical Reference of pipeline defect detection worker, the needs of practical application can be met well.

title: A kind of removing rain based on single image method based on the compression rewards and punishments neural network for reusing raw information
abstract: The present invention relates to it is a kind of based on reuse raw information compression rewards and punishments neural network removing rain based on single image method, first with quick guiding filtering by rainy picture breakdown be low frequency figure layer and high frequency figure layer；Then high frequency figure layer is input to and carries out feature learning in the neural network that one combines the reuse raw information connection type that compression rewards and punishments neural network structure block, batch normalized and this method propose and extracts, remove rain line therein；It the high frequency figure layer after rain line will finally be removed is added with original low frequency figure layer to obtain and final go rain result.This method carries out rain for single width rain image, compared with existing traditional rain removing method, based on deep learning rain removing method, can obtain higher-quality no rain figure picture；And the network that this method proposes is based on compression rewards and punishments neural network, and compression rewards and punishments block structure used in the network that this method proposes can then portray the relationship between feature channel well, to improve the expressiveness of network, rain effect is gone in promotion.

title: RGB-D SLAM method and system based on dynamic scene
abstract: The application discloses  RGB-D SLAM methods and systems based on dynamic scenes, and the method comprises the steps of adopting a semantic segmentation network model based on deep learning to determine a potential dynamic region of an image, adopting a motion  consistency method to identify the potential dynamic region as the dynamic region, extracting ORB feature points in the potential dynamic region and a background region, adopting an ICP algorithm to match the ORB feature points to obtain pose information of a robot so as to initially optimize the pose of the robot.

title: Real-time video stream analysis system using deep neural networks
abstract: A video processing apparatus includes a registration component that registers configuration information associated with the video information; a filter component that filters the video frame such that all but the area of interest is excluded in a filtered video frame; a configuration component that configures a plurality of neural networks in at least one of a parallel configuration, sequential configuration, mixed parallel and sequential configuration that provides a configured plurality of neural networks; a processing component that processes the filtered video frame using the configured plurality of neural networks that provides insight information; a display that provides insight information to a user; and a storage component that stores the configuration information and insight information in persistent cloud-based storage. A corresponding method of processing video information and computer-readable medium are also disclosed.

title: Process for the preparation of dioxolane (meth) acrylates
abstract: The invention relates to a process for preparing dioxolane (meth) acrylate by transesterification with basic catalysts, wherein hydroxydioxolane are reacted with (meth) acrylate in the presence of pulverfoermigem alkali metal alcoholate solvent-free. The Temperaturfuehrung and catalyst addition carried out in such a way that the alcohol formed as a by-product is removed by distillation from the equilibrium. As the alkali metal alkoxide, sodium methylate or the sodium alcoholate of hydroxymethyldioxolane is preferably suitable.

title: Integrated Distillation Chamber and Discharge Unit with Integrated Key
abstract: A distillation unit multiple rejection areas at each of a top of a flask and a top of a lower distillation tube in embodiments. A middle distillation tube is narrower than the lower tube and extends into the lower distillation tube as well as a fraction collector. A distillation key with rings extends downwards through the fraction collector, middle distillation tube, and lower distillation tube, a portion of the distillation key and the lower distillation tube extending into a flask where product to be purified is placed. In this manner, the flask itself acts as a heat jacket in addition to having a heat jacket around all the afore-described parts.

The adoption of said method can completely proceed from angle of said method can completely proceed from angle of user, can be directed against the characteristics of that all the safety measures and authority distribution are completely transparent for all the users and can effectively prevent internal various possible illegal connections with interconnected network, illegal copy and data transfer, illegal data utilization, unauthorized contact with confidential data and document and malicious breakage of data, etc. so as to implement monitoring control and safety management of whole internal network and single computer.

title: system for remote measuring mosquito and method for recognizing image of mosquito depending on their kinds from their video
abstract: The present invention relates to a mosquito telemetry system and a method for recognizing mosquitoes from a mosquito image by type. The mosquito telemetry system according to the present invention comprises a attracting unit for injecting carbon dioxide gas to attract mosquitoes to the interior of the main casing, And a communication module provided to transmit image data photographed by the image capturing unit to the outside; and an image capturing unit configured to capture an image of the mosquito taken by the main body casing, An image server configured to receive image data transmitted from the catcher; A database server connected to the image server and configured to store image data of a mosquito received by the image server and information on the number of mosquitoes classified by type of the mosquito; An image analysis server connected to the database server for analyzing image data stored in the database server to calculate population information for each type of mosquitoes collected in the captor and send the information to the database server; A statistical analysis server configured to calculate statistical values based on the analyzed data from the image analysis server to select mosquito object images, to classify the selected mosquito objects by type, and to send the classified statistical data back to the database server; And a terminal connected to the database server and remotely receiving mosquito information stored in the database server.   In this way, it is possible to make more precise and easy to classify according to the shape, size and type of mosquitoes captured through capturing images of mosquitoes captured by trappers capturing mosquitoes, so that captured mosquitoes are mosquitoes carrying infectious pathogens, A mosquito telemetry system capable of accurately knowing whether or not a mosquito is damaging to livestock, and a method of recognizing a mosquito by type from a mosquito image.

title: Traditional Chinese medicine preparation for treating psoriasis and preparation method of traditional Chinese medicine preparation
abstract: The invention relates to a traditional Chinese medicine preparation for treating psoriasis and a preparation method of the traditional Chinese medicine preparation. The traditional Chinese medicine preparation comprises the following active ingredients in parts by weight: 30-60 parts of rhizoma smilacis glabrae, 20-40 parts of saffron crocus, 30-60 parts of herba cistanches, 10-20 parts of periostracum cicada, 20-40 parts of nodus nelumbinis rhizomatis, 30-60 parts of realgar, 10-20 parts of radix paeoniae rubra and 10-20 parts of palembus dermestoides. The preparation method comprises the steps of mixing and grinding the active ingredients in the above parts into powder of above 100 meshes, mixing the powder and pharmaceutical purified water with equal weight, uniformly stirring to prepare a blank, putting the blank in an environment at 20-25 DEG C, volatilizing water in the blank naturally to prepare a half-dry blank, and finally preparing into a corresponding dosage form. The traditional Chinese medicine preparation adopts high quality materials, is reasonable in compatibility, scientific to prepare, significant in curative effect, convenient and quick to take, safe and reliable, and stable in quality, meets requirements of traditional Chinese medicine preparation modernization and is suitable for industrial mass production.

title: Automobile anti-air pollution device
abstract: A device for separating the combustible gases from the noncombustible gases in the exhaust gas being emitted from an internal combustion engine which comprises an elongate conical vortex tube terminating in a small discharge outlet at one end and having a closed end wall at the large end with a central, or axial, opening therein. An inlet pipe adjacent the large end of the vortex tube admits the exhaust gas tangentially into the tube whereby a centrifugal flow is set up in the converging vortex tube so that the heavier, fully or substantially burned gases are thrown radially outward in an outer layer component and carried out through the discharge outlet and the lighter, incompletely burned gases are squeezed back along an axial path as a core component and returned through the opening in the end wall of the tube to the air intake of the engine. A preferred modification of the invention utilizes a freely rotating turbine at the inlet end of the vortex tube which increases the efficiency of the apparatus by isolating the incoming exhaust gas mixture from the surrounding wall at entry thereby minimizing friction and turbulence as well as having other advantages in increasing the efficiency of gas separation.

title: Thread rolling machine special for double-headed screw
abstract: The invention discloses a thread rolling machine special for a double-headed screw. The thread rolling machine comprises two main shafts, a machine tool main seat and a transmission system, wherein the machine tool main seat is divided into two parts, which are a fixed main seat and a sliding main seat; the fixed main seat is directly connected with one of the main shafts; the sliding main seat is indirectly connected with the other one of the main shafts; the sliding main seat is provided with two oil cylinders and is pushed by the two oil cylinders, so feeding and returning in a machining process can be realized; the two oil cylinders are controlled by a proportional servo, so the synchronous feeding of the sliding main seat is more accurate and more reliable. The thread rolling machine special for the double-headed screw has the advantages of simple structure, stable operation, high machining efficiency, small deformation of a workpiece and high machining precision.

title: Method for producing a soundproofing trim panel for the interior of a motor vehicle
abstract: The invention relates to a method of producing a sound proofing trim panel comprising the steps of providing an elastically compressible lower layer, heating the lower layer and placing it in a mould to shape it to form a spring layer of a spring-mass type damping system. The method further includes associating the lower layer with an upper layer, to form the mass of the spring-mass system. According to the invention, the lower layer comprises a blend of elastically compressible foam flakes forming at least 80 wt.-% of the lower layer and being mixed with binder fibres. The fibres comprising a core and a sheath that is fusible at a moderate temperature, and the flakes being bonded to one another by means of the fusing of the sheath forming a binder, such that the lower layer takes the form of a bonded foam.

title: Position detector
abstract: To enable position or distance of sensing target making approach, etc. to the range of sensing area to be detected securely with simple configuration at low cost and improve latitude of designing, position detector includes capacitance sensor unit and detecting circuit unit. Capacitance sensor unit includes first and second sensing electrodes and dielectric material therebetween. Dielectric material has range L of sensing area defined on its sensing surface. Detecting circuit unit includes selector switches SWA and SWB, capacitance sensing circuits, A/D converters, and arithmetic processing circuit. Arithmetic processing circuit judges and detects the position of sensing target in range L of sensing area based on detected values of capacitances C 1  and C 2  sensed by first and second sensing electrodes under switching control on selector switches SWA and SWB.

title: Filter insert, in particular for preparing a coffee or tea filtrate
abstract: A filter insert (1) is described and illustrated, in particular for preparing a coffee or tea filtrate, comprising a filter layer (4) joined together in at least one joining region (2) as a double layer (3), the filter layer (4) comprising at least one first layer ( 5).   A filter insert (1), in which the passage time of water filled into the filter element (1) can be set very precisely, is realized in that the filter layer (4) comprises at least one second layer (7), and in that the second layer (7 ) is a textile layer.

title: Cloud repair scheme for server software problem
abstract: The invention discloses a cloud repair scheme for a server software problem. A software bug or upgrade database is established by a cloud theory and a practical repair tool in a company or by entrusting a third party. An intelligent software cloud repair platform is constructed. The cloud repair platform has three functions of online acceptance and detection, online repair, and continuous collection or import of a repair database, a non-customer privacy big database and user surveys. According to the scheme, the privacies (service staffs are not required to go out with repair software and devices with company property rights for repair) of customers and companies are protected by utilizing the cloud repair platform, so that the leakage risk of confidential data of the companies is lowered; possible disputes between customer service staffs and customers are avoided; one cloud repair platform reasonably distributes resources, so that the repair needs of the customers in different places can be met at the same time; and excessive service staffs are not required to be on a business trip at the same time, so that precious time spent in traveling on the repair road can be saved.

title: Osteoacusis loudspeaker arrangement
abstract: This application discloses a kind of osteoacusis loudspeaker arrangements, including circuit shell, elastic backing, key and button circuit board, the auxiliary side wall that circuit shell includes major side wall and connect with major side wall, it is provided with the first depressed area on the outer surface of auxiliary side wall, the key hole of the outer surface for being connected to auxiliary side wall and the inner surface of auxiliary side wall is provided in the first depressed area；Elastic backing is set to the first depressed area, and is provided with the second depressed area corresponding with key hole, and the second depressed area extends to the inside of key hole；Key, which protrudes above, is provided with key contact, and keying body is set to side of the elastic backing far from circuit shell, and key contact extends in the second depressed area；Button circuit board is set to the inside of circuit shell, and is provided with key switch corresponding with key hole, to allow user in pressing keys by key contact and trigger key switch.By the above-mentioned means, the application can reduce the occupied space of press-key structure, keep osteoacusis loudspeaker arrangement more frivolous.

title: Method for delivering sound tracking movement of object using directional speaker
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for transmitting sound using a directional speaker by predicting the movement of an object, and generates location information of the tracking object in the sensing region of a sensor having a sensor signal generated, selects at least one of the directional speakers corresponding to the generated location information, and transmits the sound using the selected directional speaker. In particular, when the sensor signal is generated by at least one of the sensors, the sound is transmitted using the directional speaker corresponding to the sensor having the sensor signal generated, and generating the sound by turning on in advance the speaker in charge of the location a person will move towards by predicting the movement of the person ahead of time enables the person to hear the sound consecutively.

title: Simple toilet for elevator
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a simple toilet for an elevator high in convenience in use and reliability.  <P>SOLUTION: The simple toilet Z comprises a lower stage unit 1 with the interior usable as an equipment storage chamber 61, and an upper stage unit 2 detachably placed on the upper face side of the lower stage unit 1. A waste container 4 is enclosed on the lower side of a toilet seat plate 22 provided on the upper face side of the upper stage unit 2, while a seat body 3 is detachably mounted on the upper face side of the toilet seat plate 22 to cover it. With this constitution, the simple toilet Z can be effectively used as a chair by sitting on the seat body 3. title: N-ary tree for mapping a virtual memory space
abstract: A page table is a data structure used by a virtual memory system in a computer system to store the mapping between virtual addresses and physical addresses. Embodiments herein use a tree to map a virtual memory address space in the page table. The tree may be an N-ary tree where N is a power of two (e.g., 2, 4, 8, 16, etc.). The tree may include multiple levels that each correspond to a different page table size. For example, an octree includes eight different entries for each child node which may include per-thread sub-entries. Child nodes in the first level of the octree may each correspond to a 512 GiB page, while child nodes in the second level, however, may each have eight entries that correspond to a 64 GiB page. In this manner, an N-ary tree may be used to support a computing system with varying page sizes.

title: Vibration isolation plate device in earth base processing engineering
abstract: The utility model discloses a vibration isolation plate device in the earth base processing engineering. The vibration isolation plate device comprises a vibration isolation array formed by a plurality of paratactic vibration isolation units. The front end of the first vibration isolation unit at the end of the vibration isolation array is closed to prevent soil chips from falling. The connected parts of every two adjacent vibration isolation units are partially overlapped and used for blocking the soil chips. Each vibration isolation unit comprises two vibration isolation single plates which are arranged in parallel in an up-and-down mode, and vibration isolation modules are arranged between the two vibration isolation single plates at intervals. According to the vibration isolation plate device in the earth base processing engineering, collapse caused by vibration of groove walls in the dynamic compaction process can be avoided, and the vibration isolation effect of a vibration isolation groove can be ensured to the maximum. The vibration isolation modules are arranged in the vibration isolation single plates, the vibration isolation single plates are supported, wave energy can be absorbed, and the influences on adjacent buildings due to vibration are reduced. According to the vibration isolation plate device, the vibration isolation effect of the vibration isolation groove is greatly enhanced, and the use amount of filling materials is reduced.

title: Channels Supporting Competitive and Non-Competitive Modes in Mobile Communication Systems
abstract:
The present invention relates to a mobile communication system, and more particularly, to a channel supporting a contention mode and a contention mode in a mobile communication system.
   
   
    The present invention proposes a method in which a user equipment can use both a non-competitive method and a competitive method among methods for accessing a specific channel. In addition, if a non-competitive method is used, the method is suggested. In addition, we propose a channel structure design method that can efficiently use non-competitive and competitive methods and reduce access delay.

title: Plastic-drainage-plate soft soil roadbed processing construction method
abstract: The invention discloses a plastic-drainage-plate soft soil roadbed processing construction method. The plastic-drainage-plate soft soil roadbed processing construction method includes the following construction steps: 1, plastic drainage plates are arranged in a beat mode; 2, the plastic drainage plates are positioned; 3, the plastic drainage plates extend out from pipe shoes through guide pipes; 4, the plastic drainage plates are connected with pile toes, and the pile toes are tightly attached to the pipe shoes and aligned with the pile positions; 5, the plastic drainage plates are inserted; 6, the pipes are pulled out, and the plastic drainage plates are cut off. By means of the plastic-drainage-plate soft soil roadbed processing construction method, the problem that after a roadbed is deformed, neck breaking and neck reduction are prone to occurrence is solved, the defects of a sand well are overcome through a plastic drainage plate method, the construction technology is greatly simplified accordingly, and the work efficiency is multiplied.

title: Acidic cyanide-free copper-tin alloy electroplating bath
abstract: The invention discloses an acidic cyanide-free copper-tin alloy electroplating bath. The electroplating bath is an acidic system and adopts inorganic salt as the main salt, a dispersing agent and a gloss agent are added and used in the electroplating bath, and the system can be used for effectively increasing the current efficiency of a process, thus the deposition velocity of an electroplating layer is increased, and the defect that an alkali cyanide-free copper-tin alloy electroplating layer is thinner is overcome. The electroplating bath disclosed by the invention is simple in operation, low in cost and wide in current density range; and the prepared electroplating layer is uniform and bright in appearance, good in binding force and high in corrosion resistance. The electroplating bath disclosed by the invention contains no cyanide and lead and no other heavy metal additives and organic complexing agents, so that the electroplating bath is safe and environment-friendly, the damage of the electroplating bath to the ecological environment is effectively avoided, and the wastewater treatment cost is effectively reduced.

title: Dual mode I/O
abstract: This secondary processing attachment to a primary (host) data processing system provides a dual mode I/O operation having unique "real time" applications. In this mode the attachment subsystem may exchange data concurrently with two potentially separate storage areas in host system main storage, under the direction of a single device control block (DCB) command descriptor prepared by host system software. Examples of real time processing applications include encryption and decryption of "secure" data by the attachment subsystem, matrix multiplication, or signal processing operations by the subsystem, and conservative movement of data between host storage and process control devices which link to the attachment subsystem via a device multiplexor and are co-addressed with that subsystem (by the host system).

title: Stacked microlattice materials and fabrication processes
abstract: A system and method for forming microlattice structures of large thickness. In one embodiment, a photomonomer resin is secured in a mold having a transparent bottom, the interior surface of which is coated with a mold-release agent. A substrate is placed in contact with the top surface of the photomonomer resin. The photomonomer resin is illuminated from below by one or more sources of collimated light, through a photomask, causing polymer waveguides to form, extending up to the substrate, forming a microlattice structure connected with the substrate. After a layer of microlattice structure has formed, the substrate is raised using a translation-rotation system, additional photomonomer resin is added to the mold, and the photomonomer resin is again illuminated through the photomask, to form an additional layer of microlattice structure. The process is repeated multiple times to form a stacked microlattice structure.
