title: Apparatus with disc drive that uses cache management policy to reduce power consumption
abstract: Data blocks are loaded in multi-block fetch units from a disc. Cache management policy is selects data blocks for non-retention in cache memory so as to reduce the number of fetch units that must be fetched. Use is made of the large multi-block fetch unit size to profit from the possibility to load additional blocks essentially without additional power consumption when a fetch unit has to be fetched to obtain a block. Selection of data blocks for non-retention is biased toward combinations of data blocks that can be fetched together for a next use in one fetch unit. Between fetching of fetch units the disc drive is switched from a read mode to a power saving mode, wherein at least part of the disc drive is deactivated, so that energy consumption is reduced. Retention is managed at a granularity of data blocks, that is, below the level of the fetch units. If a combination of blocks from the same fetch unit can be fetched together at one go before their next use, these blocks are not retained if as a result other blocks, from a plurality of other fetch units, can be retained in place of the combination of blocks.

title: ULTRA FAST ELECTRICAL SAFETY CONNECTOR FOR AUTOMOTIVE BATTERIES
abstract: This invention relates to a system for an electrical connection limiting body contact, dirt, handling time in connection / disconnection, with increased safety during operations. It consists of a brass terminal (1), the conical orifice (2) of which fits onto the terminal (3) of the battery; at one end of this terminal (1), a concavity (4), receives the electric power cables of the vehicle; a bar (5), tightened by means of two 6m / m diameter screws (6), keeps the cables firmly centered on the terminal (1). The end of the terminal (1) is elongated to allow to receive a pin (7), intended to tilt the cover / clasp, the internal lateral bulges (9) of the cover (8), in the lateral cells (10). which correspond to them on the outer edges of the metal terminal (1). When the cover / clasp is engaged, the bulges (9), of volume slightly greater than the depth of the cells (10), make the assembly integral by the combined effect of the interlocking of the cover / clasp, and of the flexibility of the metal in (11). The cover / clasp reinforced by a steel core in its molding, is hollowed out in order to completely cover the metal part of the device in the engaged position. The device according to the invention is particularly intended for the connections of the electric harness, of light and heavy-duty vehicles, as well as for all batteries whose terminals are conical.

title: Data transmission device of client / server system
abstract:
The data transmission apparatus of the client / server system according to the present invention enables direct data exchange between a client and a server program through a socket descriptor.
   
   
    Therefore, when a client makes a service request to a server program by the data transmission apparatus of the client / server system according to the present invention, the server accepts the socket connection of the client, processes it, and delivers the result directly to the client through the received socket. As a result, the data transfer speed between the client and the server can be remarkably improved, and there is an advantage of not having to provide a separate shared memory for data input / output.

title: Vehicle collision determination method and collision determination device
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] A vehicle collision is judged from the impact force based on acceleration and the amount of speed change. [Structure] The acceleration output by the sensor 22 is integrated in a short-term integrator 24 with a positive / negative sign for a relatively short period up to the current value, while the absolute value circuit 25 takes an absolute value to accelerate the acceleration. The absolute value of is integrated by the long interval integrator 37 over a relatively long interval up to the current value, the short interval integration output exceeds a predetermined short interval integration threshold Vrs3, and the long interval integration output is predetermined. By making a collision determination when the long-range integration threshold value Vrl is exceeded, it is possible to prevent an erroneous determination due to the accumulation of quantization errors and prevent the airbag from being deployed when a rear-end collision accident occurs.

By making a collision determination when the long-range integration threshold value Vrl is exceeded, it is possible to prevent an erroneous determination due to the accumulation of quantization errors and prevent the airbag from being deployed when a rear-end collision accident occurs.

title: Method of controlling the start of combustion for an internal combustion engine
abstract: A method of controlling the start of combustion is a HCCI internal combustion engine whereby a target start of combustion is determined as a function of engine speed and load, and the actual start of combustion, calculated using the measured in-cylinder pressure, is adjusted by means of a feed forward control loop to the target value.

title: Common lamiophlomis root chewable tablet and preparation thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a common lamiophlomis root chewable tablet and preparation thereof. The chewable tablet is a novel dosage form of common lamiophlomis root prepared from a common lamiophlomis root, a filler, a corrigent, a lubricant, and a binder. It is proposed that the medicament is made into chewable tablets with consideration on inconvenience in taking the medicament by patient and fear of medicament admission of the aged and the children. Comparing with the ordinary tablets and capsules, the chewable tablet can be chewed and swallowed, having great disintegrating degree. The chewable tablet is not only beneficial to absorption of effective ingredients, shortening affecting time, but also better in mouth feeling comparing with ordinary tablet and capsule, making the aged and the children eager to take, thus adaptability of patient in taking the medicament is enhanced. And the chewable tablet is suitable for large scale production because of no special requirement for the apparatus.

title: Improvements relating to light current relays
abstract: 596,094. Electromagnetic relays. SIEMENS BROS. & CO., Ltd., and FOOT, G. H. July 18, 1945, No. 18421. [Class 38(v)] In a sensitive light-current relay, one or more contact balls 3 serve as bridging members between contacts on two relatively moving members 1, 2. In the form shown in Fig. 1 rotation of an inner member 1 causes four balls 3 to roll so that each moves out of engagement with a contact 5 and into engagement with a contact 6 on the outer member 2 while remaining in contact with a contact 4 on the member 1. The contacts 4 project slightly and may be resilient or mounted on springs. One or both of the ball races 1, 2 may be slightly concave. Fig. 3 shows a relay having two arrangements of the kind shown in Fig. 1 placed respectively above and below a horse-shoe magnet 12 with a moving coil 14 arranged between its poles. Current flowing through the coil 14 causes it to turn and operate a spindle 31 to which are fixed the two inner members 28 and 32 of the ball races. The relay may be provided with a return spring 33 or it may be returned by reverse current or an additional coil. In modifications, the contact mechanism is operated by a pivoted or plunger armature.

title: Charging system for electric automobiles
abstract: The invention relates to a charging system for electric automobiles, which comprises a solar photovoltaic panel and a photoelectric beam brush, wherein the solar photovoltaic panel is arranged in an isolation strip of a road; the photoelectric beam brush is arranged at the side of an electric automobile and used for scratch brush conductive matching with a current induction area below the solar photovoltaic panel; a receiving coil is arranged in the photoelectric beam brush; and the photoelectric beam brush is sequentially electrically connected with an inverter, a solar control and a storage battery. By the charging system for electric automobiles of the invention, the electric automobiles are charged in real time by solar generation when the automobile travel, thereby ensuring the energy source in operation of the electric automobiles, and relieving the troubles when the electric automobiles travel.

title: Communication base station
abstract: The utility model relates to a communication base station and constructs the communication station. The communication base station comprises a machine room and a communication iron tower, wherein the communication iron tower is arranged on the roof of the machine room, the machine room has a hexahedron frame structure and comprises a frame and a room plate, the room plate is arranged on the frame, the frame comprises four vertical posts, the communication iron tower comprises an iron tower base and a tower body, the tower body is arranged on the iron tower base, the iron tower base is fixed at the top ends of the vertical posts, the tower body comprises a plurality of sections of tower body modules, and the plurality of sections of tower body modules are sequentially spliced. The communication base station adopts a tower-on-room structure, the machine room and the communication iron tower adopt modular structures, the weight of a single part is small, lifting equipment is not required, and the communication base station is particularly applicable for regions which a transport vehicle and the lifting equipment cannot reach in operating environments such as mountaintop, field and the like.

title: Gas filling system and method for lng storage tank
abstract: A gas filling system and method for an LNG storage tank is disclosed. The gas filling system of the LNG storage tank of the present invention comprises: an emergency pump column provided in the LNG storage tank and provided as an installation place of the emergency pump; An opening / closing unit provided in the emergency pump column for introducing the evaporated natural gas into the interior of the LNG storage tank at the time of top filling in which the inside of the LNG storage tank is replaced with the evaporated natural gas; And a gas supply portion connected to the emergency pump column to introduce the evaporated natural gas into the immersion pump column.

title: Frequency converter
abstract: The utility model discloses a frequency converter comprising a frequency converter body and an externally-arranged heat radiator. The heat radiator is provided with a fan which is provided with a power line connected into the frequency converter body. The frequency converter is characterized in that heat-radiating fins are provided with an installation block which is internally provided with a sealing mechanism. The sealing mechanism comprises a slide block and a gear which are slidably connected with the installation block. The slide block is provided with a through hole which is used for penetration of the power line and saw-teeth which are matched with the gear. The installation block is provided with a through port which is used for replacement of the power line. The gear is provided with a knob which extends out of the installation block. With application of the aforementioned technical scheme, the frequency converter which is convenient in disassembling and assembling of the fan power line and dustproof is provided.

title: Manual / electric switching device for electric shutter
abstract: (57) [Problem] To improve the operability by reducing the switching operation force for switching from electric to manual, and to prevent accidental return to the electric state. A case body (13) having a storage part (12) on a front plate (11), a slide plate (14) that can move up and down by connecting a wire (10) connected to a clutch (8), and a lever (15) stored in the storage part (12) , An engagement means 16, a lock mechanism 17, and a return spring 18. In the event of a power failure or the like, by rotating the lever 15, the locking portion 29 lowers the slide plate 14 via the engagement means 15, and is locked by the lock mechanism 17 in a manual state. When the lock mechanism 17 is released, the slide plate 14 is raised by the return spring 18 and returns to the original electric state.

title: Energy-saving environment-friendly coal hot air furnace
abstract: The utility model discloses an energy-saving environment-friendly coal hot air furnace. The energy-saving environment-friendly coal hot air furnace comprises a hot air furnace combustion chamber, a dust chamber and a heat exchanger. The dust chamber is mounted between the hot air furnace combustion chamber and the heat exchanger. The dust chamber comprises a smoke baffle, a dust particle waste heat recovery tube and dust chamber tube plates. The smoke baffle is mounted on the upper portion of the space between the dust chamber tube plates in a penetrating mode. The dust particle waste heat recovery tube is mounted on the lower portion of the space between the dust chamber tube plates in a penetrating mode. An air inlet duct is arranged outside the rear portions of the dust chamber tube plates and covers the rear end, extending out of the dust chamber tube plates, of the smoke baffle and the rear end, extending out of the dust chamber tube plates, of the dust particle waste heat recovery tube. The front end, extending out of the dust chamber tube plates, of the dust particle waste heat recovery tube is covered by a wind collection hood. The energy-saving environment-friendly coal hot air furnace has the advantages of being reasonable in structural design and remarkable in dust removal effect and consumption reduction effect. Due to the fact that the dust chamber is additionally mounted between the existing hot air furnace combustion chamber and the heat exchanger, dust accumulated on the heating surface of the heat exchanger can be reduced remarkably, the wear condition on the heating surface is mitigated remarkably, the operating thermal efficiency of the hot air furnace is improved, and the service life of the hot air furnace is prolonged. The energy-saving environment-friendly coal hot air furnace is suitable for being installed and used by various enterprises which use coal hot air furnaces.

title: Method for bleaching pulp with ozone
abstract: In a reactor plant for treating finely divided bulk material an acid bulk material or pulp having a solids content of approximately 35-50% is conveyed to a combined high-consistency ozonizer and maturation reactor as a substantially vertical pulp column forming a gas blocking means. In the transition area between the ozonizer and the maturation reactor the finely divided and ozonized pulp which has a very acid pH-value is mixed with chemicals to a pH-value of approximately 8-11 and to a solids content of approximately 15-20%, at which solids content the alkaline pulp in the form of a continuously advancing column is subjected to a maturation process which terminates at a pH-value of the pulp of 6-7.

title: Method and apparatus for remote web-based technical support
abstract: A system provides task-oriented enhancement of a software application that allows for remote, Web-based, technical support. The system observes user-interactive elements in the software application. Based on the observed user-interactive elements, the system generates at least one task indication and at least one respective instruction indication associated with the software application. Generation of the indications may be done dynamically as the software application loads or executes. The system may be activated locally or remotely to provide technical support, or “coaching”, to a user. The system may also be used to generate documentation for the software application.

title: Seat
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of seat, relate to chair art, in order to optimize the structure of seat.This seat includes chair framework, base and locking device；The cooperation face of described base and described chair framework is designed with pore structure, and described locking device includes locking bar and tensioner；First end of described locking bar can extend in described pore structure and be locked with chair framework by described base, and the second end of described locking bar is connected with described tensioner.Wherein, pulling the locking bar pull-out that described tensioner can will extend in described pore structure, to realize the unblock of described base and described chair framework, the described chair framework unlocked can change its inclination angle relative to described base.Technique scheme, uses tensioner to realize the unblock of locking bar, can reduce the manufacture difficulty of locking device, it is ensured that unlock effect, and can realize the pose adjustment of chair framework easily.

title: TDMA radio and synthesizer output level adjustment circuit
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Problem] To insert a variable voltage attenuator into the synthesizer output,   It is an object to vary the output level of a synthesizer whose frequency fluctuates by switching the synthesizer at the time of unnecessary guard time of the transmission output and at the time of transmission transient response. SOLUTION: In a TDMA wireless device which switches and uses a synthesizer which outputs a plurality of frequencies, a variable voltage attenuator whose attenuation varies with a control voltage is provided for the synthesizer output, based on a rising timing at the time of transmission. Counting means for changing the amount of attenuation of the variable voltage attenuator at a predetermined time and with a predetermined slope, and the voltage of the variable voltage attenuator is reduced by the voltage output from the voltage generating means based on the count of the counting means. The amount changes, the output level of the synthesizer rises at a predetermined slope before the rising timing at the time of transmission, and the output level of the synthesizer falls at a predetermined slope after the falling timing of the transmission. Features.

title: Chinese prickly ash picker
abstract: The invention discloses a pepper picker, which consists of a pepper containing bag, a thumb sleeve cutter and a forefinger sheath, wherein the pepper containing bag is a hollow soft bag, and the upper side edge of the wall of the bag at one side of the upper opening of the pepper containing bag is connected with the lower end of the thumb sleeve cutter; the upper side edge of the bag wall at the other side of the upper opening of the pepper containing bag is connected with a hollow soft middle finger sleeve, and the shape of the middle finger sleeve corresponds to that of the middle finger. In the use process, a thumb sleeve is sleeved on a thumb, a middle finger sleeve is sleeved on a middle finger, and finally a forefinger sleeve is sleeved on a forefinger.

title: Method for sensing the readiness of a driver to steer
abstract: The invention relates to a method for sensing the readiness to steer or the steering behavior of the driver of a motor vehicle, at least one pressure and/or contact sensor which supplies an electrical signal when it is touched and/or pressure is exerted being integrated into the steering wheel or mounted on the steering wheel. The pressure sensor and/or contact sensor has a multiplicity of sensor elements or segments arranged along the circumference of the steering wheel. Each of the sensor elements or sensor segments has, in the cross section of the steering wheel rim, a multiplicity of pressure-sensitive and/or contact-sensitive zones so that it is possible to detect whether the driver's hand grasps the steering wheel from the inside, outside, top or bottom. A signal which represents the readiness to steer can be used to generate in an evaluation unit, for example, an audible, optical, haptic or similar warning to the driver as a function of the travel situation at a particular time or the events on the road detected around the vehicle.

title: Suction pipeline change-over apparatus of endoscope
abstract:
PURPOSE: To perform good observation by keeping a proper amount of a air in the body cavity, by perfectly blocking the gap between a suction pipe and a suction channel by an O-ring in a stand-by state.  
     CONSTITUTION: The gap between a suction pipe 4 and a suction channel 6 is perfectly blocked by two O-rings 23, 24 in a stand-by state and the suction pipe 4 communicates with the open air through an air passage 17 to suck the open air. When sucking operation is performed by pushing in a piston 21, the suction pipe 4 communicates with the suction channel 6 through a communication hole 26 to perform suction from the suction port at the leading end of an insert part. At this time, the air passage 17 is perfectly blocked from the open air by the O-ring 30 provided to the upper end part of the piston 21 and the open air is not sucked at all. When the piston 21 advances and retracts, the central O-ring 23 mounted on the outer periphery of the piston goes in and out through the lower end part of a sleeve 13 and, since the mouth part 13c of the lower end part of the sleeve is chamfered, the O-ring is not damaged or cut. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Synthesis of compound having ester or amide bond
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain the subject compound useful for peptide synthesis, etc., by reacting a thiazolidine-2-thione derivative with a nucleophilic reagent.  
     CONSTITUTION: The objective compound of formula III having ester or amide bond can be produced by reacting a compound of formula I (A is -CO-, -CS-, -SO 2 -, etc.; R 1  and R 2  are H or arbitrary organic group; W is organic group; n is 1 or 2; X is hydrophilic group; Z is linking group; m is 0 or 1) with a compound of formula II [Y is H or organic group; B is -N(R 3 )-(R 3  is alkyl, alkenyl, etc.), -O- or -S-].

title: Boxcar platform
abstract: The utility model discloses a boxcar platform. The boxcar platform comprises a platform floor, wherein a front baffle is fixedly arranged at the front end of the platform floor, a left side plate, a right side plate and a rear baffle are hinged to the left portion, the right portion and the rear end of the platform floor respectively, triangular side plate supporting boards are further arranged on the left side and right side of the platform floor respectively and used for supporting the left side plate and the right side plate when the left side plate and the right side plate overturn to the horizontal positions, fastening devices are arranged on the left side plate or/and the right side plate to enable goods to be fixed conveniently, sliding grooves are formed in the left side plate and the right side plate to further guarantee the longitudinal loading compactness of goods and enhance fixation of the goods, and movable baffles are arranged in the sliding grooves. Due to the structural design, the boxcar platform has the advantages that the area of a loading platform of a truck is enlarged easily and conveniently, and fixation of goods can be effectively guaranteed.

title: Ground environment detection method and apparatus
abstract: A ground environment detection method and apparatus are disclosed, where the method includes: scanning a ground environment by using laser sounding signals having different operating wavelengths, receiving a reflected signal that is reflected back by the ground environment, determining scanning spot information of each scanning spot of the ground environment based on the reflected signal, determining space coordinate information and a laser reflection feature of each scanning spot based on each piece of scanning spot information, partitioning the ground environment into sub-regions having different laser reflection features, and determining a ground environment type of each sub-region. Lasers having different operating wavelengths are used to scan the ground, and the ground environment type is determined based on the reflection intensity of the ground environment under different wavelengths of lasers, thereby improving a perception effect of a complex ground environment, and better determining a passable road surface.

title: Hearing aid data transmission device
abstract: A hearing aid data transmission device that occupies little space and consumes less current.   A hearing aid data transmission device includes a modulatable oscillator circuit (L, C) for generating a variable transmission signal and an antenna device for radiating the transmission signal. C) includes a coil device used as a transmitting / receiving antenna device. The inductance (L) of the oscillator circuit (L, C) is simultaneously used as an antenna. The controllable current source (I) is controlled by the comparator (K) such that energy is supplied to the oscillator circuit only during one half-wave.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 1

title: Structure for preventing vibration of bottom cover of drum washing machine
abstract: The invention provides a structure of cylinder washing machine for preventing bottom cover from vibrating. The structure includes: a bottom cover having hook and bulge driven in pin; a bottom frame, which has a hook groove corresponding to the hook of the bottom cover and a bulge inserting hole corresponding to the bulge driven in pin of the bottom cover; a bulge for inserting into the bulge inserting hole fixed on the bottom frame. The structure can also include the following: a bottom cover having multiple bulge driven in pins; a bottom frame, which has a bulge inserting hole corresponding to the bulge driven in pin of the bottom cover; a bulge for inserting into the bulge inserting hole fixed on the bottom frame. The beneficial effects of the invention are: 1.the invention has a more firm structure, as a result, can counteract part of vibrations and reduce noises. 2.preventing hook damage caused by misplug using current technique, and can improve product quality and production efficiency.

title: Information display apparatus and method
abstract: An information display capable of setting a scroll speed based on a contact position on a display screen by a user by a touch operation on the display screen, quickly scrolling information displayed on the display screen, and displaying desired information. Get the device.   A scroll speed of map information is determined in accordance with a distance L from the contact position to the nearest edge. When the distance L is in the constant speed region 101a, the scroll speed is determined to be the maximum speed HiS. When the distance L is in the stop area 101c, the scroll speed is determined to be zero. When the distance L is in the adjustment region 101b, the scroll speed CS is CS = (HiS−LoS) / (ST) · (LS) + HiS. Here, LoS is the scroll speed CS at the boundary between the adjustment area 101b and the stop area 101c, S is the distance from the boundary between the constant speed area 101a and the adjustment area 101b, and T is the stop distance from the adjustment area 101b. This is the distance from the boundary with the region 101c to the nearest edge.   [Selection] Figure 2

title: Improvements in or relating to means for promoting contact between fluids
abstract: 1,223,254. Contacting gases with liquids; liquid/liquid extraction. PENCHEM DEVELOPMENTS Ltd. 9 April, 1968 [14 April, 1967], No. 17237/67. Headings B1F and B1R. A dished helical fin element for use in apparatus for gas/liquid or liquid/liquid contact has at least one row of perforations extending around the fin in the outer half, preferably in the outer one tenth thereof, the area of the fin between the perforations and the inner edge of the fin being without perforations. As shown two elements 53 and 54 each with rows of circular perforations 55 are combined to form a two-start element. Alternatively the perforations may be in the form of slots. As shown each fin comprises twenty eight turns and the cone angle is e.g. 20‹. In use the fin(s) are mounted between concentric cylindrical members and one or more units thus formed is or are mounted on a rotatable shaft extending axially with a column casing. In operation the contact phases are passed countercurrently through the column and the axis of the column is inclined to the vertical at an angle up to 15‹, preferably between 2 and 4‹, greater than the cone angle of the fin elements.

title: A knapsack
abstract:
The present invention relates to a backpack provided with an external storage means, by storing the goods that are difficult to be stored in the storage unit formed in the inside of the backpack by the external storage means to accommodate a variety of articles.
   
   
    Such a backpack is formed of a body having a storage unit for storing an object therein, opening and closing means for conveniently opening and closing the storage unit formed on one side of the body, and a shoulder strap for hanging the body on a human shoulder In the backpack, it is formed on the front of the body is characterized in that the outer storage means for receiving the goods to the outside of the body is provided.

title: Inspection apparatus for molded material
abstract: PURPOSE: A device for inspecting a molded product is provided to grasp a changed state of a molding condition by confirming the generation of residual stress caused by a fluid flow generated in a product through a double refraction inspection of a transparent molded product. CONSTITUTION: A device for inspecting a molded product comprises a base unit(10), a moving guide member, a first transferring unit(20), a second transferring unit(30), a vertical moving member, and a jig unit(40). A position of the moving guide member is adjustable in an X-axis direction with respect to the base unit. One end of a molded product(100) is fixed. The first transferring unit moves to the X-axis direction with respect to the base unit. The second transferring unit is provided to the first transferring unit and moves in a Y-axis direction. The vertical moving member is provided to the second transferring unit and moves in a Z-axis direction. An inspection device is attached in the vertical moving member. The jig unit is installed in the base unit. The other end of the molded product is fixed in the jig unit.

title: Piston ring failure diagnosis device
abstract: PURPOSE:To permit an early detection of breakage by signaling such occurrence by making a judgment by comparing the frequency data from a detection device that detects the acoustic wave generated due to a piston ring breakage with the frequency data of a normal piston ring. CONSTITUTION:A sensor 4 that detects the sliding vibration noise caused by the breakage of a piston ring 2 fitted to a piston 1 is disposed outside a cylinder 3, and its detected signal is outputted to a breakage detection section 10. The breakage detection section 10 consists of a frequency analyzer 12 that is inputted a signal based on the amplified 11 detected signal, a first and a second memory sections 13, 14 that respectively memorize the normal and abnormal frequency data, a pattern differential comparator 15 that compares the detected frequency data with the normal frequency data, and a failure mode diagnosis section 16 that diagnosis the failure mode based on the output from the comparator 15 and the abnormal frequency data. In accordance with the output from said breakage detecting section 10, the breakage condition is displayed on a warning indicator.

title: Gear
abstract: The present invention relates to a gear device that can reduce the backlash by engaging the two or more gears by adjusting the rotation angle to produce. The present invention includes a first unit gear formed with at least one screw tab, and having a certain number of gear teeth; A second through hole communicating with the screw tab and having the same number of gear teeth as the first unit gear and being in surface contact with the first unit gear such that the gear teeth are alternately arranged with the gear teeth of the first unit gear; Unit gears; And a fastening means penetrating the through hole and fastened to the screw tab to engage the first unit gear and the second unit gear.

title: Channel connecting optical switch possessing photodetector
abstract: PURPOSE:To realize a miniature channel connecting optical switch which excels in the economical performance, by incorporating the photodetector which can be shared by several subscribers into the optical switch. CONSTITUTION:The calling optical signal is transmitted when a certain subscriber picks up the telephone receiver and then sent to channel connecting optical switch 2 through fiber cable 3. And this optical signal is supplied to photodetector 8 via call detecting mirror 7 since full-mirror 5 is hanged at the lower part. Detector 8 converts the optical signal into the electric signal to then supply it to call detecting mirror control circuit 9. Thus circuit 9 stops mirror 7 and at the same time gives the control to switch 2 to raise up necessary mirror 5. Thus the connection is secured between the X and Y rows. And when this connection is over, the optical signal is cut to mirror 7 since the optical switch features the full-mirror.  As a result, circuit 9 drives mirror 7 again to start searching, and then has expectation to the call to be given from another subscriber.

title: Spring clip retainer for can closure
abstract: A retainer clip attached to the ring portion of the ring-andtear-strip easy-opening devices commonly used on metal beverage cans, for the purpose of affixing the ring-and-tear-strip to the rim of the can and thereby conveniently disposing of the ringand-tear-strip after removal from the can, formed with the minimum distance between the opposite sides of the clip less than the maximum cross sectional thickness of the can rim bead, and with contact points located so that the clip will be retained on the bead of the can rim with a rotational couple acting to press the ring-and-tear-strip against the can side, and formed and located on the lateral periphery of the ring with the open end of the clip on the uppermost side of the ring to ensure convenient placement in the optimum and least conspicious position on the can, thereby precluding interference with normal use of the opened can.

title: Cooling a one-piece can combustor and related method
abstract: A cooling arrangement for cooling a single-piece, combined combustor liner/transition piece (10) substantially enclosed within a surrounding flow sleeve, with a cooling annulus (22) radially between the flow sleeve and the single-piece combined combustor liner/transition piece, the cooling arrangement including a first plurality of impingement cooling holes (40) in the flow sleeve, the plurality of impingement cooling holes having first diameters and arranged to direct cooling air onto designated areas of the single-piece, combined combustor liner/transition piece; and a second plurality of effusion cooling holes (36) in the single-piece, combined combustor liner/transition piece having second diameters smaller than the first diameters, and located to cool by effusion other areas of the single-piece, combined combustor liner/transition piece.

title: A kind of wisdom computer lamp light control system
abstract: This utility model discloses a kind of wisdom computer lamp light control system, and system server is connected with main LAN；Main LAN is connected with network communication module signal；Network communication module is connected with computer lighting control module and power module by controlling bus；Modular converter is connected with serial server, and modular converter is connected with controlling bus, and serial server is connected with network communication module；Liquid crystal control module is connected with controlling bus；Infrared induction module is connected with network communication module by controlling bus；Some computer light sources are connected with computer lighting control module；Computer lighting control module and power module are electrically connected with mains circuit.Compared with prior art, the wisdom computer lamp light control system that this utility model provides, carries out the system of Based Intelligent Control and management to light.

title: Rainwater pipe
abstract: The utility model relates to a rainwater pipe which is made of iron sheet in a water rolling mode. The inner and the outer surfaces are provided with porcelain enamel; the left and the right side surfaces of the front surface of a down pipe are provided with convex ribs. The utility model has simple structure, beautiful appearance and high durability, having no pollution for walls. The utility model can be invested and mounted by one step, and can not be replaced or maintained for a long term, which basically solves the long-term unsolved problem that an existing rainwater pipe has easy damage and short service life.

title: Dual-mode driven transreflective liquid crystal display
abstract: The present invention relates to a dual-mode driven transreflective liquid crystal display, more particularly, to a transreflective liquid crystal display having a electrode layer capable of, under transmission or reflection displaying mode, providing different gray scale voltages according to the voltage- light transmission rate under the transmission display mode, or the voltage-light reflection rate under the reflection display mode, enabling the transreflective liquid crystal display to display gray scale with different voltage-light transmission/reflection rate curves under different display modes.

title: Flexible composite material, permeable to water vapour
abstract: The invention relates to a flexible composite material (1) for producing waterproof items of clothing and similar which consists of an outer layer (11) of textile fabric, a hydrophilic membrane (12) and an inner layer (13). The inner layer (13) is formed by a hydrophilic, textile surface (14) or by a hydrophilic layered surface (15) which takes several forms. This configuration not only enables water vapour to be rapidly transported through the composite material (1) but allows above all liquid to be quickly transported to the exterior. Water droplets are immediately absorbed by the inner layer (13) which acts in a hydrophilic manner and are transported through the hydrophilic membrane (12) to the outer layer (11).

title: Inertial navigation alignment performance evaluation method based on main inertial navigation attitude variation quantity assistance
abstract: The invention discloses an inertial navigation alignment performance evaluation method based on main inertial navigation attitude variation quantity assistance. The method comprises the following steps of implementing preheating preparation; performing navigation solution on a main inertial navigation system and a secondary inertial navigation system respectively; constructing a measurement equation of attitude variation quantity; constructing a performance evaluation measurement equation; performing Kalman filtration solution; performing reverse smoothing estimation; acquiring an attitude misalignment angle at a transfer alignment ending moment so as to realize alignment precision evaluation of transfer alignment of the inertial navigation system of a ship-borne weapon. The invention designs the inertial navigation alignment performance evaluation method based on the main inertial navigation attitude variation quantity assistance, linear motion information of GDPS position and speed is taken as main reference information, and the main inertial navigation attitude variation quantity is taken as auxiliary reference information, so that the requirements of accuracy evaluation on mechanical strength of a carrier can be reduced; integral output based on angular rate is taken as an observed value, so the influences on the inertial navigation alignment performance evaluation effect caused by external environmental interferences can be effectively inhibited, and the inertial navigation alignment accuracy evaluation performance of the ship-borne weapon can be improved.

title: BALANCED REMOTE CABLE FOR TRANSMISSION OF PCM SIGNALS
abstract: The PCM signals are transmitted in both directions, with at least two of several wire bunches combined in the cable core. The wire bunches in the cable core are screened from each other by a metal screen surrounding each bunch. The screen (5) consists of two layers made of tapes wound with overlapping on each bunch (2). The inner layer is made of a tape of a well conducting material, and the outer tape is of a ferromagnetic material, whose thickness is between 10 and 100 mu m, depending on its relative permeability.

title: Preparation method for nano-alumina particle modified ceramic diaphragm
abstract: The invention relates to lithium-sulfur battery diaphragms, in particular to a preparation method for a nano-alumina particle modified ceramic diaphragm. The method includes: firstly weighing certain mass Al2O3 and an adhesive in a mortar; then weighing N-methyl pyrrolidone and adding it into the mortar, and grinding the material uniformly; coating a conventional high polymer diaphragm with the ground nano-alumina particles, and putting the diaphragm into a drying oven to conduct drying. According to the invention, by coating the conventional high polymer diaphragm with a layer of thin nano Al2O3 particle ceramic membrane, the problem that conventional high polymer diaphragms are easy to pierce can be eased, thereby improving battery performance, improving the discharge rate of batteries, significantly prolonging the cycle period of lithium-sulfur batteries, and improving the high temperature resistance and safety of lithium ion batteries. And the ceramic coated special diaphragm is especially suitable for power batteries.
text: Preparation method for nano-alumina particle modified ceramic diaphragm The invention relates to lithium-sulfur battery diaphragms, in particular to a preparation method for a nano-alumina particle modified ceramic diaphragm. The method includes: firstly weighing certain mass Al2O3 and an adhesive in a mortar; then weighing N-methyl pyrrolidone and adding it into the mortar, and grinding the material uniformly; coating a conventional high polymer diaphragm with the ground nano-alumina particles, and putting the diaphragm into a drying oven to conduct drying. According to the invention, by coating the conventional high polymer diaphragm with a layer of thin nano Al2O3 particle ceramic membrane, the problem that conventional high polymer diaphragms are easy to pierce can be eased, thereby improving battery performance, improving the discharge rate of batteries, significantly prolonging the cycle period of lithium-sulfur batteries, and improving the high temperature resistance and safety of lithium ion batteries. And the ceramic coated special diaphragm is especially suitable for power batteries.

title: Structure for self-aligned silicide contacts to an upside-down FET by epitaxial source and drain
abstract: An upside-down p-FET is provided on a donor substrate. The upside-down p-FET includes: self-terminating e-SiGe source and drain regions; a cap of self-aligning silicide/germanide over the e-SiGe source and drain regions; a silicon channel region connecting the e-SiGe source and drain regions; buried oxide above the silicon channel region; and a gate controlling current flow from the e-SiGe source region to the e-SiGe drain region.

title: Preparation method for barley decomposed solution used for controlling harmful algae
abstract: The invention discloses a preparation method for a barley decomposed solution used for controlling harmful algae. The barley decomposed solution is prepared by mincing barley straws; putting the minced barley straws in sterile water after high pressure moist-heat sterilization; aerating with an air pump to make the minced barley straws carried out an aerobic degradation; immersing for 25-30 days under light conditions; and filtering the immersed solution. The barley decomposed solution can be used for inhibiting the growth of algal bloom-forming microcystis aeruginosa. The preparation method has the characteristics of simple and easy operation, low cost and wide materials. With the preparation method, the straw decomposed solution with high activity for inhibiting the algae can be obtained. The preparation method can be widely used for controlling algal blooms in lakes and reservoirs. The preparation method can not cause secondary pollutions to water environment, because no chemical extraction agent is used in an extracting process.

title: Rare soil high-iron aluminum alloy cotton covered wire
abstract: The invention relates to a rare soil high-iron aluminum alloy cotton covered wire which structurally comprises an aluminum alloy conductor and an insulating layer wrapping the periphery of the aluminum alloy conductor. The aluminum alloy conductor is a rare high-iron aluminum alloy conductor. The insulating layer is a crosslinked polyethylene layer. Main chemical components of the rare high-iron aluminum alloy conductor include aluminum, iron, silicon, copper, beryllium, rhenium and a mixture of lanthanum, cerium and yttrium. The outer side of the insulating layer is provided with an identification layer. Compared with the prior art, the rare high-iron aluminum alloy conductor which is high in cost performance is used for replacing a copper conductor or an aluminum conductor in an existing cotton covered wire, so that conductivity of the cotton covered wire is guaranteed, production cost of the cotton covered wire is greatly reduced, meanwhile, service life of the cotton covered wire is prolonged, the application field of the cotton covered wire is expanded, and a major revolution in the cotton covered wire occurs.

title: Ultrasonic test device with a number n of individual test heads arranged side by side
abstract: The invention relates to an ultrasonic test device, in particular for non-destructive material testing and with a number n of individual test heads (20) arranged next to one another and with at least one transmitter (26) and one receiver (28) for operating at least one test head (20 ), the test device working in test cycles and within a test cycle the transmitter (26) first emits a transmission pulse and then the receiver (28) has a reception time. Adjacent test heads (20) are each electrically connected to one another by a switch that a control unit (24) is provided for these switches, which actuates the switches clocked by the test clock so that a test head (20) during a test clock at least for part of the time period Test cycle is connected to the test head (20) adjacent to it on the left, but not to the test head (20) adjacent to it on the right, and the same test head (20) is not connected to the test head (20) adjacent to it on the left during another test cycle.

title: Polymer battery and flexible packaging film for polymer battery
abstract: The utility model provides a flexible packaging film for a polymer battery. The flexible packaging film is formed by folding an aluminum plastic composite film; a pit matched with the shape of a battery cell is formed in at least one folding surface; the folding edge formed during folding serves as a bottom edge of the pit; a notch is formed in the top, in which the folding surface is positioned, of the pit; the bottom of the notch extends to the top of the pit; the position of the pit corresponds to that of a tab on a battery cell. The utility model also provides the polymer battery packaged by employing the flexible packaging film. According to the flexible packaging film provided by the utility model, the notch is formed in a top seal of the battery, the phenomenon that the battery is ultrahigh due to glue extrusion on the top seal is avoided, the battery molding height can be increased, and the battery capacity is improved; meanwhile, the position of the notch corresponds to the position of the tab of the battery cell, the top-seal tab is positioned at the notch, and exposed glue of the tab is conveniently checked.

title: Post-soldering-free tin-coating method, printed circuit board and device thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a post-soldering-free tin-coating method which comprises the following steps: a plurality of solderable bars and a plurality of soldering-resistant areas are arranged on the surface of copper foil needing excessive current, wherein the shape of the solderable bars includes mesh shape, and the shape of the soldering-resistant areas comprises quadrilateral which has equal side length and can be separated by the mesh-shaped solderable bars; and tin is coated on the solderable bars to cause the tin to extend between adjacent solderable bars so as to cover the surfaces of the latticed soldering-resistant areas. The invention also discloses a printed circuit board and a device using the circuit board. The implementation of the post-soldering-free tin-coating method, theprinted circuit board and the device thereof has the following beneficial effects: tin is not needed to be complemented for the post-soldering of the copper foil, post-soldering work time is saved, tin-coating is uniform, and automated production can be realized.

title: Method for gas-liquid separation of sprayed mist
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent atmospheric pollution and to recover a chemical component to utilize the same, by allowing gas-liquid spray mist mixture generated from a spray type metal surface treatment apparatus to pass through a gas-liquid separator.  
     CONSTITUTION: A spray type metal surface treatment apparatus consists of degreasing zone 1A→washing zones 1B→6B→film chemical forming zone 2A→washing zones 1BW6B and steam mist or spray mist is generated from a heating process. This gas-liquid mist mixture passes through gas-liquid separators 21G, 22G to be separated into gas and liquid particles. The gas containing steam after gas-liquid separation is introduced into a heat exchanger 23H for condensing steam to attain to utilize waste heat and condensed water. The liquid separated by the gas-liquid separators 21G, 22G is re-utilized by separated mist return pipes 21M, 22M. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1987,JPO&Japio

title: Electric leakage detection and protection device for direct current regulated power supply
abstract: The present invention discloses an electric leakage detection and protection device for a direct current (DC) regulated power supply. The device comprises a direct current regulated power supply, a leakage voltage detection apparatus and a leakage current detection apparatus connected to an output terminal of the DC regulated power supply, wherein the output terminals of the leakage voltage detection apparatus and the leakage current detection apparatus are connected to a controller by wires; and the first digital output terminal of the controller is connected to an output loop of the direct current regulated power supply by a relay. As commonly, grounding wire connection is adopted in electric leakage protection for a direct current regulated power supply, though the ground wire is frequently unattached. By using the device provided by the present invention, the problem of the ineffective protection for electronic equipment is solved.

title: Intelligent circulation pump controller
abstract: The utility model provides an intelligent circulation pump controller, and belongs to the technical field of controllers. The intelligent circulation pump controller solves the problems that an existing pump controller is low in the integration degree and poor in the control effect and comprises an integration control chip. An input module, a pump rotation speed control module, a pump pressure control module, a pump torque control module, an intelligent pump flow measuring module, a pump operation information reading module, a pump alarm protection module, a pump drive module and a display module are arranged on the integration control chip in an integrated mode. The pump rotation speed control module is connected with the pump alarm protection module and the pump pressure control module respectively, the pump torque control module is connected with the pump pressure control module, the pump operation information reading module is connected with the pump alarm protection module, the display module and the intelligent pump flow measuring module respectively, and the pump alarm protection module is connected with the display module. The intelligent circulation pump controller has the advantages of being high in reliability and the integration degree, good in the control effect and the like.

title: Measurement method and apparatus by phase shift method
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a measuring apparatus by a phase shift method with a reduced apparatus size and high measurement accuracy.   SOLUTION: A first LED 12 that emits light having a first wavelength and a light having a second wavelength that is different from the light having a first wavelength that is emitted from the first LED 12 are transmitted from the first LED 12. And a second LED 22 that emits light with a wavelength of a predetermined time interval. A moving table 34 for moving the measuring object 36 along the direction in which the light from the first and second LEDs 12 and 22 travels, and the light from the first and second LEDs 12 and 22 to measure the measuring object 36. A semi-transparent mirror 32 is provided that branches from the light traveling toward the reference mirror 38 toward the reference mirror 38 and returns the light reflected by the reference mirror 38 to the optical path of the light from the LEDs 12 and 22 again. A CCD camera 40 is provided that captures, as an image, interference light generated by reflected light obtained by the light reflected by the measurement object 36 and reflected light reflected by the reference mirror 38. Based on the phase value difference calculated from a plurality of output images for each pixel of the CCD camera 40 and the phase value at the time of capturing the image, the uneven shape of the surface of the measurement object is measured.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Battery power supply applied to crane transition
abstract: The utility model discloses a battery power supply applied to a crane transition. A battery discharge device is connected in parallel with a city power supply. The battery discharge device comprises a main controller, a rectifier feedback device and a battery group. The rectifier feedback device is electrically connected with the city power supply. The rectifier feedback device is electrically connected with a second switch through a transformer. The battery group is electrically connected with the rectifier feedback device. The rectifier feedback device acquires the waveform of an electric signal of the city power supply, and carries out comparing and synchronization adjusting on the electric signal waveform which is output by the battery group through the rectifier feedback device and the electric signal waveform of the city power supply. An inverter completes adjusting and outputs a complete signal. The main controller controls switching between the city power supply and the battery discharge device according to the complete signal. The rectifier feedback device is composed of a number of rectifier tubes which are connected in series and parallel. Each rectifier tube is electrically connected with a reactor. According to the utility model, the advantage of energy storing of the batteries can be fully used; energy conservation is realized; and outage is prevented when power supply switching is carried out.

title: Servo driver of electric locomotive and driving method of electric locomotive
abstract: The invention provides a servo driver of an electric locomotive and a driving method of the electric locomotive. The servo driver comprises an inversion module, a current sensor, a processor, a pulse width modulation (PWM) module and a vector control module. The servo driver provided by the invention has the advantages of low-speed and large-torque output, large traction force, more stable operation, settable operation speed, flexible startup and shutdown and capability of greatly reducing an impact force; and an inner power circuit adopts controllable silicon rectifier technologies, so that the fault protection performance of the servo driver can be greatly improved. The traction method of the electric locomotive is characterized in that a storage battery on the electric locomotive can directly supply power, and therefore, an external power distribution device for the servo driver can be omitted; a power source voltage alarm threshold value can be set arbitrarily, so that protection for the storage battery can be benefitted. With the servo driver of the electric locomotive and the driving method of the electric locomotive of the invention adopted, when the external power distribution device is not provided, the servo driver can complete traction for the electric locomotive, and the electric locomotive can be put into and delivered out from a warehouse accurately, quickly and conveniently.

title: Method for recording an image of ionizing radiation
abstract:
A method for recording an image of ionizing radiation comprising the steps of: 
     (1) image-wise exposing to ionizing radiation an element containing at least one phosphor which converts said ionizing radiation into photochemically active radiation, 
     (2) image-wise exposing a recording material to the thus obtained photochemically active radiation, said recording material containing at least one non-luminescent substance or poorly luminescent substance by means of which through said photochemically active radiation at least one compound is produced forming in said recording material or by transfer into a receptor element a latent luminescent image or by means of which through said photochemically active radiation (a) compound(s) is (are) formed that is (are) allowed to transfer from the recording material into a receptor element to form therein by chemical reaction a latent luminescent image, 
     (3) exposing said latent image to radiation stimulating the fluorescent light emission of the formed luminescent compound(s), and 
     (4) detecting a pattern of fluorescent light emitted by said latent image.

title: Process data monitoring method, device and system
abstract: The invention provides a process data monitoring method, a process data monitoring device and a process data monitoring system. The method comprises the following steps of: reading a process data set acquired by a monitoring lower computer, and generating a display image according to the process data set; receiving at least one updated process data, and adding the at least one updated process data to the process data set to generate an updated process data set; and generating an updated display image according to the updated process data set. The invention provides a technical scheme that a monitoring upper computer receives the updated process data actively uploaded by the monitoring lower computer to generate the updated display image; and compared with the mode of actively acquiring various acquired process data to generate the updated display image in the prior art, the updated process data processing capability of the monitoring upper computer is not affected any more.
text: Process data monitoring method, device and system The invention provides a process data monitoring method, a process data monitoring device and a process data monitoring system. The method comprises the following steps of: reading a process data set acquired by a monitoring lower computer, and generating a display image according to the process data set; receiving at least one updated process data, and adding the at least one updated process data to the process data set to generate an updated process data set; and generating an updated display image according to the updated process data set. The invention provides a technical scheme that a monitoring upper computer receives the updated process data actively uploaded by the monitoring lower computer to generate the updated display image; and compared with the mode of actively acquiring various acquired process data to generate the updated display image in the prior art, the updated process data processing capability of the monitoring upper computer is not affected any more.

title: Connector
abstract: A connector (1) which has: a male connector (3) provided with a locking part (11); an aligning plate (7) which comprises a receiving engaging part (15), and a receiving locking part (17) that is provided at the base side surface of a male terminal, and which prevents, when temporarily mounted to the male connector, the movement of the male terminal towards the base side by the receiving locking part being in contact with the locking part; a female connector (5); and a lever (31) which comprises an engaging part (19), and makes a prescribed limited movement relative to the female connector, and when the female connector, and the aligning plate are detached from the male connector, the engaging part engages with the receiving engaging part of the aligning plate, and the aligning plate is moved away from the male connector.

title: Outdoor AC high-voltage fusible cutout of organic fall type
abstract: The utility model relates to an organic falling type outdoor AC high-voltage fuse, which is mainly composed of an anti-fouling cap, an upper contact copper clamp, an insulator, a composite arc-extinguishing tube, a high-voltage fuse and a suspended falling point. The utility model is characterized in that the anti-fouling cap is fixedly connected with the upper contact copper clamp, and the upper contact copper clamp is clamped on a connecting tube; the connecting tube is screwed on one end head of the composite arc-extinguishing tube, and the insulator is sheathed out of the composite arc-extinguishing tube; one end of the insulator is fixedly connected with the anti-fouling cap via a clamping hoop, and the high-voltage fuse is connected in series in the composite arc-extinguishing tube. The utility model provided with a sealed top cover has high ability of resisting wind and snow and adopts an inner inserting structure and double-dot arc-extinguishing technology with good performance for arc-extinguishing, and arc short circuit in operation is solved.

title: Composite bearing
abstract: The utility model relates to a compound bearing, which comprises a non-metallic base and an external metallic base, both of which are bonded with adhesive agent. The non-metallic base is woven with organic fiber yearn by means of plain weave or satin. The utility model has the advantages of simple structure, easy manufactured into sliding bearings of varieties of shapes upon demands, high rigidity and bearing capacity and high hardness, excellent self-lubrication and wear resistance, and superior pollution prevention and corrosion resistance.

title: Insulating sleeve
abstract: An insulating sleeve for a compressor discharge pipe is provided. The insulating sleeve includes a first half-sleeve having a first curved body portion and a first extended portion. The first curved body portion is configured to fit at least partially around a portion of the compressor discharge pipe. A second half-sleeve has a second curved body portion configured to attach to the first curved body portion such that the first and second curved body portions completely encircle the portion of the compressor discharge pipe. The second half-sleeve includes a second extended portion configured to attach to the first extended portion. Each of the first and second extended portions include respective first and second cavities which, together, encase a temperature sensor in contact with, or in spaced relation to, the compressor discharge pipe.

title: Air cooler
abstract: The utility model relates to a new air cooler which mainly solves the problems that in the present air cooler electric defrosting process, a large amount of water vapor can be generated in defrosting, which increases the temperature in a cold chamber or cold room, increases the workload of the compressor and electrical power consumption; the air cooler also solves the problem that in water defrosting process, the equipment is large in volume and water consumption, the surface of the evaporator forms a layer of ice, and the refrigerating effect is poor. The air cooler of the utility model is composed of an outer shell, a draught fan, an evaporator, an air inlet, an air outlet, etc., and is characterized in that a heat-insulating layer is arranged on the outer shell, the air inlet and the air outlet are all provided with heat insulating seal doors capable of opening and closing, and the outer shell is provided with a defrosting air inlet and a defrosting air water outlet. The utility model has the advantages that the air cooler is sealed in defrosting, temperature raising phenomenon can not occur in the cold chamber or cold room, water and electricity are saved in defrosting, and the defrosting effect is favorable; meanwhile, the evaporator is dry after defrosting, and the refrigerating efficiency is increased.

abstract: Cooling performance is improved by using a cooling medium in which a liquid and a solid having high thermal conductivity are mixed. title: Quartz smashing graded production line
abstract: The utility model discloses a quartz smashing graded production line. After being coarsely ground, a material is elevated to an upper part in an elevator; the coarsely-ground material is fed into a ball mill through a variable-frequency feeder for grinding; coarse powder and fine powder pass through a discharge grid plate from the other end of the ball mill, and are discharged through a discharge valve; discharged coarse powder and fine powder enter a grading machine under the action of wind power introduced through the grading machine; separation of coarse powder and fine powder is realized under the actions of the centrifugal force of a grading wheel of the grading machine and the attraction force of a fan; coarse powder is discharged from the lower part of the grading machine, and is returned into the ball mill through a return belt conveyer for continually smashing; and fine powder enters a cyclone separator through the grading machine for collecting, and is fed into a packing machine for packing and warehousing. Sieve-free collision smashing is performed, fine powder of qualified particle size is obtained by repeatedly and circularly smashing, dust-containing air is exhausted in time, a production environment is excellent, and equipment failures and production interference caused by blockage of a screen are avoided.

title: Manufacturing method of plastic bend pipe
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] To provide a method for producing a plastic bend pipe in which the wall thicknesses at both ends and the central part are substantially uniform. [Structure] In a method of manufacturing a plastic bend pipe 2 by heating and softening a cylindrical plastic straight pipe 1 and bending it using a mold, the outer peripheral surface and the inner peripheral surface of both ends have substantially the same cross section. A step of forming a plastic straight pipe having a circular shape having a center and a substantially uniform thickness, and a circular shape having a center with an outer peripheral surface and an inner peripheral surface having different centers and one of which is thicker than the opposite side, A method of manufacturing the plastic bend pipe 2, comprising a step of bending the thick portion 12a in the central portion of the plastic straight pipe as a back wall portion 23 of the plastic bend pipe 2.

title: Chip scale packaging (CSP) structure of power device and manufacturing method of power device
abstract: A CSP structure of a power device disclosed by the present invention is characterized in that by utilizing the scribing ways between the chips and/or the areas at the four corners of a chip and by using a corrosion or scribing method, the epitaxial layers at the areas are removed to expose an N+ substrate, and then a layer of metal is evaporated and plated on the surface of the chip by a sputtering or evaporation method to lead an N+ layer to the surface, thereby realizing the CSP requirements. The beneficial effects of the present invention are that the surface area of the chip is utilized effectively and fully, and the on-resistance of the power device is reduced greatest possibly.

title: Controller of chopper inverter
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve the controlling accuracy of an AC voltage with respect of the variation of a load by controlling the chopper reference voltage so that the ordinary output voltage of an inverter becomes constant by feeding back a chopper output voltage. CONSTITUTION:The output voltages of a chopper 2 and an inverter 3 are respectively detected by output voltage detectors 7, 8 at every prescribed time, and respectively converted by A/D converters 9, 10 into digital signals. A control circuit 11 calculates on the basis of the sampled two digital signals to control the conducting width of the switching element of the chopper 2 so that the AC output voltage of the inverter 3 coincides with the reference voltage.

title: COLLAR-TYPE DIRECTION SYSTEM FOR A MOTOR VEHICLE
abstract: The present invention relates to a steering system without a steering column for a motor vehicle which comprises an actuator (V) capable of being set in motion by a user, a steering element (3) being able to be set in motion by the actuator ( V) and a system for limiting the movements of the actuator. Characteristically, according to the invention, the limitation system comprises: - at least one drive shaft (5); - at least two stops (61; 62) arranged on this drive shaft (5); and- a coupling element (2) between the steering element (3) and the motor shaft (5), which is mounted movable in translation between the stops (61; 62), the stops (61; 62) limiting its translation, whereby, when the coupling element (2) abuts against one of the stops (61; 62), the movement of the actuator (V) is stopped.

title: Promoting hair growth by laser
abstract: A method of treating the scalp to promote hair growth comprises bathing the scalp with the output from a cosmetic/medical laser for periods in the range often minutes and one hour, and preferably between twenty minutes and forty minutes, the periods being spaced from a few days to several weeks and, preferably, also specifically, applying the laser to acupuncture points which are directly related to hair growth.

title: Differential pressure diaphragm seal structure of transmitting instrument
abstract: The utility model discloses a differential pressure diaphragm seal structure of a transmitting instrument, comprising a measuring head of the transmitting instrument, a pressure sensing head and a protective hose, wherein a high voltage side containing chamber and a low voltage side containing chamber are arranged in a diaphragm box body in the middle of the pressure sensing head; a voltage inlet at the high voltage terminal, a high voltage diaphragm and a high voltage side capillary tube are arranged in the high voltage side containing chamber, and the high voltage side capillary tube is communicated with a containing chamber formed by the high voltage diaphragm and the diaphragm box body; a voltage inlet at the low voltage terminal, a low voltage diaphragm and a low voltage side capillary tube are arranged in the low voltage side containing chamber, and the low voltage side capillary tube is communicated with a containing chamber formed by the low voltage diaphragm and the diaphragm box body; and the high voltage side capillary tube as well as the low voltage side capillary tube are arranged in the protective hose. The seal structure can carry out measurement without heat tracing, and dispenses with extra heating and heat-insulating structures, thus reducing the operating cost. The high voltage side capillary tube and the low voltage side capillary tube are arranged in the same protective hose, thereby reducing the influence of variation of ambient temperature on measuring results and improving the accuracy of the measuring results; and the seal structure is an energy-saving and environmentally friendly measuring device.

title: Method for producing catalyst for acrylic acid synthesis
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Objective] To provide a novel method for producing a catalyst used in the synthesis of acrylic acid from acrolein by vapor phase catalytic oxidation. [Composition] When a catalyst containing at least molybdenum and vanadium as active ingredients is produced, water and / or alcohol is added to a dried product obtained from an aqueous slurry of the catalyst ingredient, mixed and shaped, and the shaped catalyst is frozen. And then heat treated. [Effect] It is possible to increase the pore volume in the catalyst and manufacture a catalyst having an improved acrylic acid yield.

title: Impact blasting system for etching metal surfaces
abstract: Apparatus for etching a metal surface utilizes a specially shrouded centrifugal throwing wheel to effect a uniform, non-pulsating application of very fine, lightweight, impact blasting media. The resulting etched finish is of a fine-grained quality suitable for use in lithography. A replaceable, wear-resistant liner is provided within the shroud.

title: Biodegradable chemical delivery system
abstract: Polymeric materials are provided that are produced from a blend of hydrophilic and hydrophobic biodegradable polymers. The polymeric materials can form fibers, nonwoven fabrics, films, coatings, pellets, capsules, etc. A compound can be incorporated in the polymeric materials. The delivery of the compound can be controlled by diffusion of the compound from the polymeric material and during biodegradation of the polymeric material. The release rate is controlled by varying the composition of the polymeric material to control diffusion rates of the compound and/or biodegradation rate of the polymeric material. This technology provides methods for delivering and controlling release rates of pesticides and related compounds in agricultural and non-agricultural settings. When adhered to plants or plant parts, the polymeric materials can provide protection from insect and disease pests. In pellet or capsule form, pesticides can be delivered into seed furrows along with crop seeds, providing similar protection.

title: Air suspension
abstract: PURPOSE:To make the manufacture easier by composing a mount member into a body with a specific structure separated from a canister, in the composition where the mount member through which a piston rod penetrates upwards is provided at a part of the upper wall of the canister to compose an air chamber. CONSTITUTION:In an air suspension 25, a canister 31 to compose an air chamber around a piston rod 34 which projects from a strut main body 33 is provided, a mount member 28 to absorb the shock is provided at a part of the upper wall of the canister 31, and the piston rod 34 penetrates through the mount member 28. In this case, the mount member 28 is composed of a bracket 39 fixed to the canister 31, a buffer 40 provided at the inner surface of the bracket 39, and a bush 41 through which the piston rod 34 provided at the inner periphery of the buffer 40 penetrates. Between the bracket 39 and the canister 31, a seal member 46 is installed, through which the canister 31 and the mount member 28 are fixed integrally.

title: Disaster tolerance control device
abstract: The invention discloses disaster tolerant control equipment, which is connected between one or a plurality of master nodes and between one or a plurality of spare nodes, wherein each master node is provided with one or a plurality of spare nodes which comprises an information receiving unit for receiving a signaling or a tandem call which comes from the external and is to be transmitted to the master node, a state detection unit for detecting the states of the nodes between the master node and the spare nodes of the master node, and an information transmitting unit for processing a signaling or a tandem call according to the result detected by the state detection unit. The invention also provides a communication method for utilizing the disaster tolerant control equipment.

title: SAFETY DEVICE FOR OPENING VEHICLE DOORS
abstract: The invention relates to a safety device for opening vehicle doors intended to ensure the protection of persons outside the said vehicle and of its occupants as well as any vehicle fitted with such a device or traveling in the vicinity thereof, characterized by what it includes: - a means of reinforcing the interior door operation procedure by introducing a safety step (1), this safety preventing access to the interior door opening lever (2) or its effective operation as long as it has not been deleted (or actuated) by the user (maneuver taking place in two stages) and significantly delaying the effective opening of the door, - signaling means (4) and (5) capable of being triggered by said means of reinforcing the procedure and in particular as soon as the action of erasing the security is initiated by the user. The device according to the invention is particularly intended for motor vehicles.

title: Transmitter and receiver
abstract: A transmitter and a receiver for automatically recording/storing a plurality of broadcasted programs or a part thereof.  The transmitter (10) comprises means (11) for storing data broadcasted and linked with a program, a program scheduler (13) for managing the broadcast schedule of a program, means (18) for broadcasting a program according to an instruction of the program scheduler, and means (14) for broadcasting the data linked with the program according to an instruction of the program scheduler, wherein the data linked with the program includes the schedule of the program linked with the data and broadcasted next.  The receiver (30) comprises means (33) for storing data linked with a program and including the schedule of the program to be broadcasted next, and means (31) for programming the recording/storing of a program, wherein recording/storing of a program is programmed according to the next broadcast schedule included in the data linked with the program.  When recording/storing of a program is programmed once, broadcast of subsequent broadcasts can be programmed recorded, and stored automatically.
