title: Semiconductor composite element, and method of detecting abnormal conditions in an inverter device having the element
abstract: A semiconductor composite element in which abnormal conditions of overcurrent, control supply voltage reduction and overheat are detected, and different abnormality signals are outputted according to the respective abnormal conditions thus detected. The semiconductor composite element includes: abnormal condition detecting circuitry for detecting the overcurrent and control supply voltage reduction of any one or all of the plurality of semiconductor switching elements and the overheat of the semiconductor composite element. An abnormality signal generating circuit is provided for producing different abnormality signals according to the respective abnormal conditions detected by the abnormal condition detecting circuitry.

title: Tablet coating method
abstract: A method for coating pharmaceutical tablets is disclosed in which polymeric coating ingredients are combined with saccharides in a melt spinning operation to form composite particulates. The particulates are then dispersed in water to form an aqueous polymer coating solution, followed by application to pharmaceutical tablets by such methods as spray coating. The particulates dissolve extremely rapidly in water to form a dispersion of the polymer coating ingredients. Such rapid dissolution allows for increased processing rates and avoids disadvantages of the prior art such as the requirement of high sheer rate mixing for long times.

title: Disc drive
abstract:
PURPOSE: To simplify the structure of a lock means by providing a single lock member holding respectively a loading mechanism to a loading standby position and an ejecting mechanism to a kick-up standby position alternatively.  
     CONSTITUTION: A slide plate 3 is moved backward against a spring 8 in non- operating state to lock so that a roller 23A of a lock member 20 is not engaged with a lock engaging section 24A and the slide plate 3 is not moved forward. In inserting a disc cartridge C into a holder 4 locked from this state, the inserted tip touches a kick claw 14 and in pushing further the cartridge C, a lock engaging section 24B of a kick member 12 is opposed to the lock engaging section 24A of the slide plate 3 at the same front/rear position, and since the lock engaging section 24A of the slide plate 3 and a roller 23A of the lock member 20 are connected elastically by a spring 8, the lock member 20 is shaken clockwise, removed automatically from the lock engaging section 24A of the slide plate 3, the lock engaging section 24B of the kick member 12 and the roller 23B are engaged to lock the restorating movement of the kick member 12 forward. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1987,JPO&Japio

title: Electric connector
abstract: The invention provides an electric connector with a novel interface, which comprises an insulated body and multiple terminals arranged on the insulated body, wherein the multiple terminals comprise first terminals applicable to a universal serial bus 2.0 standard interface. The multiple terminals also comprise second terminals for transmitting clock signals and third terminals for transmitting power signals. The electric connector with the novel interface can meet various requirements of electronic equipment due to the second terminals for transmitting clock signals and the third terminals for transmitting power signals thereof.

abstract: The present invention provides a kind of anti-clogging glue spraying heads, including rubber head shell and the piston, the striker that are set to inside rubber head shell, rubber head shell includes shell and the striker seat for being set to shell end, striker seat includes simulation platform and blanking tube, simulation platform is threadedly connected to the end of rubber head shell, the installing port of blanking tube installation is reserved on simulation platform, the outer wall of blanking tube is fixed at installing port, and piston connects striker；Striker includes the first striker, spring and the second striker, first striker includes connector and the first vertical bar, one end of first vertical bar is connected to the end face of piston by connector, the extended line of the first vertical bar other end also passes through the inner cavity of blanking tube, connector is also connected with one end of spring, and the other end of spring is also connected with the second striker；Second striker is sheathed on the outside of the first striker, and the second striker is connected to spring, and the extended line of the second striker other end intersects vertically with simulation platform.The present invention prevents residual of the glue in striker seat, prevents the blocking of glue spraying head.

title: Double-sided adhesive sheet
abstract: Provided is a double-sided pressure-sensitive adhesive sheet capable of identifying both sides even when a substrate or a pressure-sensitive adhesive is transparent.   In a double-sided pressure-sensitive adhesive sheet in which different pressure-sensitive adhesives are applied to both surfaces of a substrate, identification information of both of the pressure-sensitive adhesives is described in a left-right asymmetric form on one surface of the substrate. Moreover, when the peeling film is affixed on both surfaces of a double-sided adhesive sheet, both identification information of an adhesive is described in the left-right asymmetric form on one side of a peeling film. Here, the identification information of both adhesives is described so that one of the left and right asymmetric character strings is a normal character and the other is a back character. title: Internal combustion engine with scr and integrated ammonia production
abstract: NO x  emissions from an internal combustion engine fueled by a gaseous hydrocarbon fuel can be reduced by catalytically producing a hydrogen and carbon monoxide fuel gas stream from the gaseous hydrocarbon fuel and a portion of the hot exhaust gas from the internal combustion engine. Furthermore, ammonia is also produced catalytically by reacting a portion of the hydrogen produced with ambient nitrogen present in the exhaust gas. The ammonia produced is used in connection with a selective catalytic reduction reactor to treat the remaining hot exhaust gas produced from the internal combustion engine, resulting in a treated exhaust gas stream having near-zero NO x  emissions.
text: Internal combustion engine with scr and integrated ammonia production NO x emissions from an internal combustion engine fueled by a gaseous hydrocarbon fuel can be reduced by catalytically producing a hydrogen and carbon monoxide fuel gas stream from the gaseous hydrocarbon fuel and a portion of the hot exhaust gas from the internal combustion engine. Furthermore, ammonia is also produced catalytically by reacting a portion of the hydrogen produced with ambient nitrogen present in the exhaust gas. The ammonia produced is used in connection with a selective catalytic reduction reactor to treat the remaining hot exhaust gas produced from the internal combustion engine, resulting in a treated exhaust gas stream having near-zero NO x emissions.

title: Support and patch using the same
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an effective transdermal absorbability, which is excellent in stretchability, particularly elongation recovery property, and can prevent the volatilization of an active ingredient such as a drug in a patch composition and keep the effect of the active ingredient for a long time. Improvement in sustainability, control of transpiration rate, stable blood concentration can be expected, odor diffusion can be reduced even in the case of scented patch compositions, high friction strength, thin thickness, It is an object of the present invention to provide a support that is firm and has excellent handleability. It is another object of the present invention to provide a patch that uses this support and has less active ingredient adsorption on the support.   The support of the present invention has a stretchable resin layer formed on one side of a stretchable nonwoven fabric in which latent crimpable fibers are entangled by a hydroentanglement method and a crimp is developed. To solve the above-mentioned problems.   The patch of the present invention is characterized in that the patch composition is applied or impregnated on the surface of the stretchable nonwoven fabric of the support.

title: Sluice valve with high sealing performance
abstract: The utility model relates to a sluice valve with high sealing performance. The upper end of a valve rod is connected with a hand wheel. The valve rod is movably connected with a valve body through sealing threads. The lower end of the valve rod is connected with a valve element through a bearing. The upper end of the valve element is in an inverted cone shape. The lower end of the valve element is in an inverted 'T' shape. The valve body is provided with a portion which is matched with the inverted cone-shaped portion of the valve element in shape. A rubber pad I is arranged in a position where the inverted cone-shaped portion of the valve element contacts with the valve body. A rubber pad II is arranged at the lower end of the valve element. The sluice valve with the high sealing performance is good in sealing performance, and simple and convenient to operate.

title: Slip frequency control system
abstract: PURPOSE:To contrive energy saving, by providing a slip frequency correction part correcting the output command value from a slip frequency control means. CONSTITUTION:In a slip frequency correction circuit 6, a D/A converter 6a reads a current command I* in analog value and converts the current command I* into a digital signal and transfers the digital signal to a microcomputer 6b. In the microcomputer 6b, after adding the slip frequency correction value f's to a minor deviation portion DELTAf's for every sampling of the current command I*, a new f's is formed and the new f's is delivered to an inverter through an A/D converter 6c. Therefore, the f's successively moves in a fixed direction every sampling for the command I*.

title: Improvement of air-supporting and precipitation filling and application method
abstract: The invention discloses an improvement of air-floating and precipitation filling and an application method thereof for water treatment, food processing, light chemical engineering, paper making, pharmacy and other fields. The improvement comprises a flat sheet and a connecting mechanism playing an effect of connecting and supporting between the flat sheets; the connected flat sheets are arranged parallelly with a 50 to 64 degree angle with a horizontal plane in application. The improvement and the method are characterized in that the connecting mechanism comprises a screw rod which can be in screwed connection with the flat sheets. The invention provides an improvement with convenient use and easy maintenance of air-supporting and precipitation filling, and provides the application method for the air-supporting and precipitation filling capable of improving the air-supporting or precipitation efficiency by 10 to 50 percent.

title: Combined outer structure heat pipe used for vertical heat pipe condenser
abstract: The utility model relates to a combined outer structure heat pipe used for a vertical heat pipe condenser. The heat pipe comprises a pipe body, wherein one segment of the pipe body is a condensation segment, and the other segment of the pipe body is an evaporation segment; an outer fin structure is arranged on the portion, corresponding to the condensation segment, outside the pipe body, and an outer groove structure is arranged on the portion, corresponding to the evaporation segment, outside the pipe body. The combined outer structure heat pipe has the advantages of being simple and reliable in machining technology, good in condensation effect when applied to the vertical heat pipe condenser and easy to maintain and belongs to the technical field of parts of condensers.

title: Two-stage centrifugal pump
abstract:
FIELD: engines and pumps. 
     SUBSTANCE: invention can be used in thermal control systems of aviation and rocket equipment. Two-stage centrifugal pump includes housing (1), shaft (4) arranged in housing (1) installed on bearings (5), and two bushings (6, 7) fixed relative to housing. One of two working wheels (10, 11) fixed on shaft (4) is arranged in recesses (8, 9) of each of bushings (6, 7). Output (14) of first wheel (10) through transfer channel (15) is interconnected with input (16) of second wheel (11). Cylindrical bore (17) is made in housing (1). In bore (17) there are two bushings (6, 7) and insert (18) between them. Bores (17) of both bushings (6, 7) face insert (18). Wheels (10, 11) face their inputs (19, 16) in opposite directions from insert (18). Bearings (5) are located in inner cavity (20) of insert (18). Transfer channel (15) is made on outer surface (21) of insert (18) with outlet to both ends (22, 23), on the closest to insert (18) end (24) of sleeve (6) enclosing wheel (10), as well as on outer surface (25) and on end (26) of sleeve (7) enclosing wheel (11) on opposite end of insert (18). 
     EFFECT: invention is aimed at increasing service life and reducing axial dimensions. 
     1 cl, 3 dwg

title: Substrate cleaning system and substrate cleaning method
abstract: An object of the present invention is to effectively remove foreign matter adhering to an end face of a glass substrate after mechanical cutting or polishing treatment.   In a substrate cleaning apparatus for cleaning a substrate by supplying a liquid and a gas to a spray nozzle and spraying a fluid obtained by mixing the liquid and the gas onto the substrate by the spray nozzle, the spray nozzle supplies the spray nozzle. Liquid heating means for controlling the temperature of the liquid by heating the liquid to be controlled, and the temperature of the liquid at the spray nozzle inlet is controlled to 40 to 100 ° C. abstract: In a bus arbitration device that utilizes a resource use management device, upon detecting that a processor is permitted to access a memory, a detection unit decreases a counter by 1 and starts a timer, in a delay circuit, that is not in operation to count time. When the timer counts to a predetermined cycle time period, the delay circuit increases the counter by 1. A control unit permits the processor to access the memory, if the counter is larger than 0.

title: Method for positioning temporary supporting point of large structure base layer deck piece
abstract: The invention discloses a method for positioning a temporary supporting point of a large structure base layer deck piece. The method comprises the following steps of (1) confirming a severely-deformed rectangular region required to be supported temporarily in the deck piece; (2) optionally selecting one point in the confirmed rectangular region and using the point as the one-time temporary supporting point, using position coordinates of the one-time temporary supporting point as design variables, and then adopting a zero-order optimization method to calculate position coordinates of an optimal supporting point in the rectangular region through iteration optimizing; (3) selecting a main beam cross point closest to the position coordinates of the optimal supporting point in the rectangular region and using the cross point as the final temporary supporting point. The method has the advantages that the settling volume of a structure can be remarkably decreased, improvement of the stability of a steel structure is facilitated, the design time is shortened, and the design is scientific and reasonable.

title: Systems and Methods for Reducing Power Consumption of a Communications Device Using Multiple Elements in a Receiver Chain
abstract: Systems and methods according to embodiments of the present invention are provided for increasing the power efficiency of a communications device by allowing it to support dual-SIM functionality while issuing simultaneous wake ups for each SIM. Embodiments of the present invention leverage time sharing solutions to minimize the amount of circuitry needed in a communications device to issue wake ups while avoiding the drawbacks of other time sharing solutions that result in increased overhead due to requiring multiple transitions from an idle state to an active state.

title: Automatic control system and method for air separation units
abstract: A method for automatically setting a target production level for at least one air separation unit in a network of air separation units. Each air separation unit has a plurality of field elements and at least one regulatory controller associated with one of the field elements, and has an energy usage level corresponding to a level of production. The method includes receiving a production level requirement for the network of air separation units and generating a production target level for at least one of the air separation units which minimizes and/or optimizes the sum of the ASU energy usage levels. The ASUs then can automatically ramp the plant production to the appropriate production target levels via the use of advanced process control (multivariable process controllers and/or advanced feedforward controllers), advanced regulatory control, and regulatory control means. In another embodiment, the invention is a network of air separation units, including at least two air separation units in fluid communication with a pipeline and a control system in control communication with the air separation units for automatically setting the ASU target production levels. Each air separation unit has a plurality of field elements, at least one production level and an energy usage level corresponding to the production level. The control system includes a receiver for receiving inputs from the at least two air separation units, and a supervisory controller which generates production target levels for sending to each air separation unit, the production target levels being representative of a network production target level and a network energy usage level.

title: Fluid noise filter
abstract: The utility model relates to a filter which absorbs the flow quantity and the pressure fluctuation of the fluid medium in the pipe line of the system by using resonance. The utility model is characterized in that the fluid noise filter is provided with a fluid pole with two partial different resonant frequencies which can absorb not only thousand hertz of medium fluctuation, but hundred hertz or even lower frequency of medium fluctuation. The utility model has the advantages of good lowering noises effect and smoothing fluctuation effect.

title: Carburettor with automatic choke operated with bimetallic spiral - has action modified by pneumatic capsules to reduce pollution
abstract: The main butterfly valve (2) is actuated through the lever (25), the link (24) and the lever (23). The auxiliary butterfly plate (7) is held in the almost closed position by the bimetal spiral (9) through the linkage (16, 15) and (12) when starting the engine at low temperature so that the air flow through the venturi (4) is reduced and a richer mixture is supplied to the engine. As soon as the engine has started the low pressure in the pipe (40) actuates the diaphragm (39) and partially opens the butterfly (7). As the main butterfly is opened the low pressure in the pipe (54) actuates the diaphragm (48) to open the butterfly (7) still further and increases the air supply.

title: Non-volative (NV) memory (NVM) matrix circuits employing NVM matrix circuits for performing matrix computations
abstract: Non-volatile (NV) memory (NVM) matrix circuits employing NVM circuits for performing matrix computations are disclosed. In exemplary aspects disclosed herein, an NVM matrix circuit is provided that has a plurality of NVM storage string circuits each comprising a plurality of NVM bit cell circuits each configured to store a memory state. Each NVM bit cell circuit has a stored memory state represented by a resistance, and includes a transistor whose gate node is coupled to a word line among a plurality of word lines configured to receive an input vector of 1×m size for example. Activation of the gate of a given NVM bit cell circuit controls whether its resistance is contributed to a respective source line. This causes a summation current to be generated on each source line based on the weighted summed contribution of each NVM bit cell circuit's resistance to its respective source line.

abstract: Process for producing ethyleneamines by reacting monoethanolamine (MEOA) with ammonia in the presence of a transition metal heterogeneous catalyst in which the catalytically active mass of the catalyst before the treatment with hydrogen contains oxygen-containing compounds of aluminium, copper, nickel and cobalt and the shaped catalyst body in the case of bead shape or rod shape in each case has a diameter of < 3 mm, in the case of tablet shape has a height of < 3 mm and in the case of all other geometries in each case has an equivalent diameter L = 1/a’ of < 0.70 mm, where a’ is the external surface area per volume unit (mms2/mmp3), where : a’ = Ap/Vp, where Ap is the external surface area of the catalyst particle (mms2) and Vp is the volume of the catalyst particle (mmp3).

title: Double section screw separating evaporator
abstract: The utility model provides a double section screw separating evaporator, relating to the water distillation equipment field. The double section screw separating evaporator comprises an evaporator body, vertical pipes and a pipe inlet and a pipe outlet which are matched with the evaporator body. The double section screw separating evaporator is characterized in that the upper part of the evaporator body is an evaporation section (3) and the lower part of the evaporator body is a steam-water separating section (10); The lower part of the evaporation section (3) is provided with an evaporation vertical pipe group(4), and the upper part of the evaporation section (3) is provided with a water distribution cavity (17). A water inlet pipe (2) is arranged inside the water distribution cavity (17), and the water inlet pipe (2) penetrates downwards the evaporation section (3) and the steam-water separating section (10). The opening of the water inlet pipe extends out of the steam-water separating section (10), and a steam-water separator (7) is arranged inside the steam-water separating section (10). The utility model shortens the pipe pass of the outboard exposed pipeline of the equipment, and the heat quantity dissipation is decreased. The raw material water can be preheated inside the evaporator body, and the heat quantity utilization is improved.

title: Absorbent composition, and method of making same
abstract: An absorbent composition is disclosed which is particularly useful as an improved animal or pet litter composition, or as an absorbent for aqueous systems or oleophilic materials such as petroleum or vegetable oils and the like. Also disclosed is a method of making the improved absorbent composition and litter composition containing same. The absorbent composition is comprised of clay and a nitrogenous compound absorber, such as cyclodextrin or other agents which form a matrix system or complex similar to cyclodextrin. Such other agents include polymerized cyclodextrin and cyclodextrin derivatives and polycarboxylic acid polymers such as a acrylate polymers.

title: Cryogenic freezer
abstract: A rectangular double walled cryogenic freezer has a vacuum space filled with alternating layers of flexible insulating material and a reflective material. A support structure is also positioned in the vacuum space. The support structure is open-celled and provides structural support for the freezer walls to prevent wall deformation when a vacuum is drawn. The support structure may be open-cell rigid foam or a support grid sandwiched between two layers of rigid insulation material.

title: Continuous climbing device and method of 3D printing device used for building
abstract: The invention discloses a continuous climbing device and method of a 3D printing device used for a building in order to solve the technical problems that in the prior art, a 3D printing device can only print buildings in a certain height range and the printing precision is low. The continuous climbing device is used for supporting and driving vertical supports to move upwards, and the vertical supports are distributed all around the 3D printing device used for the building and used for supporting the 3D printing device used for the building. The continuous climbing device comprises a plurality of adhering climbing mechanisms, the lower ends of the vertical supports are arranged on the outer vertical faces of the printed building through the corresponding adhering climbing mechanisms, the adhering climbing mechanisms enable the vertical supports to firmly adhere to the printed building and can push the vertical supports to move upwards, so that as a printed building body rises, the 3D printing device also rises, therefore, the printing device is adaptive to the height of the building and accurate locating printing of 3D printing can be achieved.

title: USB unit control method and a USB unit controller
abstract:
Providing a method and a controller which readily performs a switchover of a dual-role device between a USB host and a USB device  
     The controller includes a hub function for coupling a plurality of USB units including a dual-role device acting as a USB device or a USB host, device control function for determining the function of the dual-role device assumed when it is connected, and bus management function for making a switchover of a dual-role device connected to the hub function between a USB device and a USB host based on the result of determination of the function.

title: A kind of common mode inductance
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of common mode inductance, including the first magnetic core, at least two flat copper wires and the second magnetic core, first magnetic core is provided with the first winding area and the first join domain, and the second magnetic core is provided with the second join domain, and the first join domain and the second join domain are by mirror finish；At least two flat copper wires turn to air core coil and are arranged in respectively on the first winding area respectively, are connected to the second join domain by the first join domain to fix the first magnetic core and the second magnetic core, so as to form closed magnetic circuit.The utility model has the beneficial effect that：Air core coil can be fabricated separately, the air core coil by flat copper bar coiling is enclosed on discrete magnetic core after completing, form high current common mode inductance, solves the problems, such as the endurance of magnetic core during coiling, without using plastic casing, the coiling number of turn of the cable on magnetic core is more, and it is big that rear common mode inductance amount is made by mirror finish in the joint face of the first magnetic core and the second magnetic core.

title: Reducing mechanism of pruner
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of garden machines, in particular to a reducing mechanism of a pruner. The reducing mechanism of the pruner comprises a center bearing bracket, a motor connected with the center bearing bracket through a bearing, and a transmission reducing mechanism connected between an output shaft of the motor and a blade. A transmission shaft is arranged on the center bearing bracket, the transmission reducing mechanism comprises a first grade gear coupled on the transmission shaft, a second grade gear meshed with the first grade gear, and a third grade gear meshed with the output shaft of the motor. An eccentric gear is arranged on the first grade gear, and one end of the blade is sleeved on the eccentric gear. The motor and the three reduction gears are bore by the center bearing bracket to form a second grade reduction transmission connection so as to enable the eccentric gear to drive the blade to perform incising movement back and forth, and the reducing mechanism is reasonable and compact in structure, small in volume and convenient to use; shock on the transmission mechanism when the motor is on is reduced via a flywheel, so that the overall operation is more stable and reliable, and energy consumption and noise are more lower.

title: Roller devices and systems and methods for using same
abstract: Disclosed herein are roller devices and system for compressing a medium comprising: a) an attachment frame configured to connect to a powered machine, the attachment frame comprising at least one support arm having first and second opposed ends, the first end having a first pivot portion configured to receive a pivot member, and the second end being configured to connect to a portion of the powered machine; b) a roller assembly comprising: i) at least one rotatable roller component, and ii) at least one roller frame having first and second ends, the first end being rotatably connected to a first end of the roller component with a rotating means configured to allow rotation of the roller component, the second end being rotatably connected to a second end of the roller component using a rotating means configured to allow rotation of the roller component, and the roller frame having a second pivot portion being configured to connect to the first pivot portion; and c) a pivot member configured to connect the first and second pivot portions. Also disclosed herein are methods of using the disclosed roller devices and systems.

title: Gaming apparatus and playing method thereof
abstract: The roulette game is proceeded while controlling such that a probability of having a ball fell into a pocket provided on a roulette wheel becomes relatively higher at a specific pocket among a plurality of pockets, sizes of prizes generated at the specific pocket are accumulated, and the specific pocket is changed to another pocket among the plurality of pockets in a case where that accumulated result reached to a threshold.

title: Video web inspection system employing filtering and thresholding to determine surface anomalies
abstract: Method and apparatus for inspecting the surface of a moving web of homogeneous material for anomalies, the apparatus including a light source for illuminating the web surface and a light sensitive detector for receiving data from the web surface. The data is representative of the light reflected from the surface, as the light is affected by surface anomalies and background information. Computational means are provided for receiving output data from the detector in response to the data the detector receives from the web surface, and for processing the output data in a manner that determines the presence of surface anomalies. The computation means includes a plurality of filters for transforming the surface data in a manner that effects substantial elimination of the background information, and means for establishing threshold levels for background information. In addition, automatic means is provided for modifying the threshold levels in response to changes in the reflectance, frequency, or contrast of background information received by the detector and forwarded to the computation means.

title: Airtightness detection apparatus of power supply module
abstract: The invention, which belongs to the technical field of the power supply module, relates to an airtightness detection apparatus of a power supply module. The detection apparatus comprises a detection case; and a testing air circuit connected with a power supply module is arranged inside the detection case. The testing air circuit consists of an air intake valve switch and a manifold pressure gauge. The provided detection apparatus has high portability.

title: Collapsible plastic bottle with bellows wall - has diamond shaped outwardly concave panels forming wall
abstract: The bottle is made of plastic flexible material and is essentially cylindrical in appearance. The sides of the bottle however are made in the form of bellows. Each row of bellows consists of a number of diamond shaped panels joined to each other at the edges. The bottom of the bottle is flat, and the top has a neck fitted with a cork. When the bottle is empty it may be collapsed by pressing the top and bottom together. The empty bottle may be reduced to about one fifth of its height when uncollapsed. The diamond shaped panels are concave outwards and have curved edges.

title: Virutal machine memory management method and device
abstract: Virutal machine memory management method provided by the invention and device, by obtaining demand of the virtual machine to memory block, from the total amount memory block for distributing to virtual machine, demand according to virtual machine is virtual machine configuration memory block to be used, and the array allocated physical address for managing the physical memory page is used for corresponding to memory block to be used.According to the demand of virtual machine in the present invention, the memory block of respective numbers is loaded into virtual machine, and it is virtual machine configuration memory block to be used on demand, only it is actual disposition to array allocated physical address corresponding to the memory block to be used in virtual machine, to the not allocated physical address of array corresponding to the memory block in idle condition that is not configured in total amount memory block in virtual machine, so as to save memory headroom, solve the problems, such as that virtual machine array committed memory space is big.

title: Time-of-flight measurement-type mass spectrometer device and method
abstract: A time-of-flight measurement-type mass-measuring device for accelerating ions stored in a first ion trap and introducing the ions into a flight tube to measure time-of-fight and thereby measure the mass of the ions, wherein the device is provided with: a second ion trap that is capable of storing ions to be measured and introducing the ions into the first ion trap; and a third ion trap that is capable of storing reference ions and introducing the reference ions into the first ion trap. The device is furthermore preferably provided with a control means for alternately performing in a prescribed pattern (e.g., once each): (1) introduction of the ions to be measured from the second ion trap to the first ion trap, and time-of-flight measurement of the ions to be measured; and (2) introduction of the reference ions from the third ion trap to the first ion trap, and time-of-flight measurement of the reference ions.

title: A kind of anti-fall hook of carbarn
abstract: A kind of anti-fall hook of carbarn, including the earrings on upper vehicle-carrying plate, through there is hook on earrings, hook is arranged on longeron, and longeron is arranged on four corners of vehicle-carrying plate；After upper vehicle-carrying plate rises to position, electromagnetic absorption device becomes off-position by initial "on" position, and four hooks below longeron are just conformed to a conventional pattern in four earrings under gravity due to own wt；When upper vehicle-carrying plate needs to move, electromagnetic absorption device is powered first, and hook absorption is risen, just relieves the fixed constraint to upper vehicle-carrying plate；The present invention has the characteristics of simple in construction, safe and practical.

title: Arrangement and vehicle
abstract: This invention concerns an arrangement (1) intended to be mounted at a vehicle (2) intended for forestry, comprising a load-bearing part (3) and driving bogie wheels (4) where the arrangement (1) comprises at least two extra wheels (5) that can be individually controlled in the vertical direction where each extra wheel is arranged at a shaft (6) that is fixed and that is not rotatable, pivotable, and is arranged at the frame (7) of the vehicle in order to distribute the weight of the machine. The individually controlled extra wheels (5) are subject to a driving force and mounted at least two arms (12) arranged at the frame of the vehicle, that a track (18) is placed around each set of bogie wheels (4) and the extra wheel (5) in order to protect against skidding and to distribute the weight, reducing the ground pressure, and that a tension arrangement (19) in the form of a cylinder under pressure or a coiled spring unit is arranged at each arm in order to absorb motions in the length of the arm (12) such that the length of the track does not change when the arm (12) moves up and down. The invention concerns also a vehicle (2) comprising such an arrangement (1).

title: Large fires extinguished from safe distance by projectile - containing extinguishing agent spread by explosive or pressurised gas
abstract: A fire extinguishing projectile is intended for putting out a fire from a safe distance and contains an extinguishing substance or mixt. suited to the type of fire. The projectile is pref. shot or despatched as a rocket to the fire, or dropped from an aircraft, the filling being released by an explosive or non-explosive action. An explosive action may be utilised for spreading the extinguishing substance, whereas with a non-explosive action, a non-combustible gas such as CO2 is expanded under pressure to spread the substance. Used esp. for extinguishing large fires in oil refineries or chemical works.

title: Method for manufacturing mushroom bonsai
abstract: The invention provides a method for manufacturing a mushroom bonsai. The method is characterized by comprising the following steps of: putting a mushroom mycelium culture medium into a plastic bag; sterilizing, cooling and seeding; culturing until mycelium entirely becomes white and secretes liquid; getting the mycelium out of the plastic bag, putting a mycelium bag gotten out of the plastic bag into a container, and covering soil above the surface of the mycelium bag until the thickness of covered soil is 2-3 cm; and watering and keeping the soil humidity within 60-78%. The method for manufacturing the mushroom bonsai provided by the invention is simple, convenient and scientific; the shape of the mushroom bonsai can be enriched; and meanwhile, the integrity, the freshness, the nutritional ingredients and the special flavor of the mushroom can be almost entirely kept. Therefore, the mushroom bonsai not only can be watched but also can be eaten, and is the bonsai with beautiful appearance, suitable colors and good taste.

title: Engine braking
abstract: A method for enhancing engine brake horsepower. The method includes generating an engine brake horsepower by compressing air in a cylinder of an engine. Additionally, fuel is injected into the compressed air in the cylinder. The injected fuel is combusted in the compressed air in the cylinder prior to the piston reaching the top dead center position in the at least one cylinder. The compressed combustion products are also released before the piston passes the top dead center position. The combustion of the fuel during the engine braking event allows the engine braking to be a throttable event. Further, the quantity of fuel introduced into the cylinder for combustion may be adjusted so that the engine braking horsepower remains relatively consistent despite changes in engine speed.

title: Trigger blocking device
abstract: A trigger blocking device includes a body, a cap, and a key. The body and cap include front and rear portions which are releasably connectable in front of and behind a trigger. The front of the body includes a plurality of flexible and resilient converging legs which extend away from the cap. The front of the cap includes a projection having a detent which is engageable with the legs for releasably locking the body and the cap together. The key includes fingers which are engageable with the legs to flex the legs out of engagement with the detent to unlock the body and the cap.

title: Non-slip mat
abstract: Anti-slip matting consists of a single layer with a base wt. of 100-600 g/m<2>, made of non-woven polyamide and/or polyester fibre fabric and a uniformly dispersed elastic binder consisting of dried NBR or SBR latex, with a wt. ratio of fabric:binder=(25:75)-(75:25). Pref. the non-woven fabric is a mixt. of fibres contg. 40 wt.% polyamide-6 (45 dtex), 30 wt.% polyamide-6 (17 dtex) and 30 wt.% polyester (17 dtex).

title: Lighting device for discharge lamp, and illumination apparatus
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a lighting device for a discharge lamp with high reliability which detects the end of lifetime of a fluorescent lamp accurately even at the lower limit area of light control regardless of the light control level of the fluorescent lamp, and controls the discharge lamp lighting device into a protection mode.  <P>SOLUTION: The lighting device for the discharge lamp has a DC power supply circuit (rectification smoothing circuit 1) to produce DC voltage from an AC power supply Vs, a high frequency conversion circuit 2 which has switching elements Q1, Q2 and an LC series resonance circuit (inductor L1 and capacitor C4) and converts the DC voltage into a high frequency voltage to supply to the fluorescent lamp FL, and a means (current transformer CT) to detect the current flowing to the fluorescent lamp FL. When the current value flowing to the fluorescent lamp FL exceeds a prescribed value, the high frequency conversion circuit 2 is made to stop oscillation.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2010,JPO&INPIT

title: Tiled lighting device
abstract: The present invention relates to alighting device (10) comprising a tiled light guide (16) comprising a central tile (12b) and at least one end tile (12a, 12c), the end tile(s) (12a, 12c) being arranged at an edge (24, 26) of the light guide (16); at least one solid state light source (18) arranged for coupling light into the light guide (16) in a general direction towards or awayfrom the end tile(s) (12a, 12c); and a plurality of out-coupling structures (20) arranged for coupling light out of the light guide (16); wherein the end tile(s) (12a, 12c) has inherent in-coupling and/or inherent out-coupling of light different from the central tile (12b).

title: Shower towel and manufacturing method thereof
abstract: A shower towel and a method of making the same are disclosed. The shower towel according to an embodiment of the present invention is formed by continuously woven from one end to the other end so as to have a cylindrical sleeve shape and has a false twist yarn and a relatively less flammable degree than the first false twist yarn The first false twist yarn may be provided so that the specific gravity of the first false twist yarn positioned on the outer surface is larger than that of the second false twist yarn, So that the specific gravity located on the outer surface can be increased.

title: Medical Workstation
abstract: The invention relates to a medical work station which has a medical instrument which is intended to be inserted at least partially into the interior of a lying being for treating the latter, an imaging device which is set up to create image data records of the interior of the living being during the treatment, and a robot. The robot includes a robot arm having a plurality of members situated one after another, on which the imaging device or the medical instrument may be situated, and a control device intended for moving the robot arm, which is set up to move the robot arm in such a way that the imaging device attached to the robot arm follows a motion of the medical insrument, or the medical instrument attached to the robot arm follows a motion of the imaging device.

title: Luminescent material and light emitting device comprising such luminescent material
abstract: The invention provides a luminescent material comprising a component selected from the group comprising (Y1-xLux)9LiSi6O26:Ln or/and AE5(PO4)3F:Ln,A, wherein Ln is a trivalent rare earth metal, AE is a divalent alkaline earth metal, and A is a monovalent alkaline metal, x > 0.0 and < 1.0. The luminescent material has an emission peak in the UV-C range when being excited by light in the UV spectrum range. The invention further provides a light emitting device comprising the said luminescent material and a method of using said light emitting device for disinfection or purification of air, water or surfaces.

title: Method for performing low temperature performance test on joint strip by using pull test machine
abstract: The invention discloses a method for performing low temperature performance test on a joint strip by using a pull test machine. The pull test machine comprises a pull test machine, a low temperature device and a processor. The method comprises the following steps of: preparing a test piece of the joint strip; installing and pulling, namely placing the test piece in the low temperature device and preserving heat for preset time, and then installing on the pull test machine; and testing parameters, namely pulling the test piece of the joint strip opposite to each other bidirectionally by a pull rod structure of the pull test machine and automatically acquiring and displaying a stress-strain curve by using the processor in the testing process. The method realizes the test of the key technical index, namely low temperature performance of the joint strip, and provides guarantee for the mass production, wide application and performance improvement of the joint strip.

title: Methods for electrosurgical electrolysis
abstract: Methods for electrosurgical electrolysis for treating tissue within a body, including methods that operate in an electrolyzable medium, including an aqueous electrolyzable medium, by means of electrolysis, and optionally by means of oxy-hydrogen combustion for use in treatment, including therapeutic methods of electrolysis to effect advantageous tissue changes.

title: Organophosphonate coester stabilizers
abstract:
New polyhydric phenol coesters are disclosed of polyhydric phenols, having 2 to 3 phenolic hydroxyl groups and 1 to 3 benzenoid rings, with carbonic acid and an organophosphonic acid having linked to phosphorus as alkyl, aryl, aralkyl or alkaryl group optionally substituted with a phenolic hydroxyl group. The new coesters have molecular weights up to a maximum of about 10,000, preferably from 1000 to 9000, and are highly effective stabilizers for a variety of synthetic resins. 
     Stabilizer compositions comprising a polyhydric phenol coester and a known polymer stabilizer, as well as synthetic resins stabilized with such stabilizer compositions, are also disclosed.

title: Composite polyester film
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain composite polyester film, which is excellent in transparency and has slipperiness excellent in the winding-up properties and workability of film, by a method wherein fine particle-containing easily sliding layer is laminated onto one side of polyester film and the areal ratio of particle to its circumcircle, degree of dispersion of particle diameter and average particle diameter are specified.  
     CONSTITUTION: In the composite polyester film concerned, easily sliding layer, which contains 0.01-0.1wt.% of inorganic and/or organic particle, is laminated onto one side of polyester film The areal ratio of particle to its circumcircle, which is represented by the formula (I), is set to be 60% or more. The degree of dispersion of particle diameter is set to be 25% or less. At the same time, the average particle diameter is set to be 20-300% of the thickness of the easily sliding layer. If the content of fine particle becomes below 0.01wt.%, the slipperiness of film becomes insufficient and consequently the workability lowers. If said content becomes above 0.1wt.%, the transparency of the film lowers. If the areal ratio of particle becomes below 60%, the balance between the transparency and slipperiness of the film lowers. If the dispersion of the particle size becomes larger, the balance between the transparency and slipperiness lowers. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1992,JPO&Japio

title: Drive unit of fully automatic washing machine
abstract: The invention discloses a driving device for a full-automatic washing machine, which comprises: a washing barrel; a cylinder for washing and dewatering; a dewatering axis; a washing axis; a clutch assembly, which has a stator assembly arranged on one side of the housing and generated the rotating magnetic field by AC, a rotor keeping a certain distances and encircling the stator assembly to form the magnetic pole and produce the induction current, and a horizontally arranged washing barrel of cylinder washing machine driving device. The beneficial effects of the invention are: assembling the electric motor directly under the clutch, so the transmission efficiency is improved; as the position of the rotor and the stator are exchanged, the output energy of the motor is improved; a reinforced rib is formed on the rotor frame, the deformation of the rotor frame under high-speed rotation is prevented.

title: Process control method for washing machine
abstract: The invention relates to a process control method for a washing machine. The washing machine can implement the washing process by the following two modes: the mixer mode, in which the mixer is separately driven by the reversed phase motor and the washing tube mode, in which the mixer and the washing tube are driven at the same time. The control method includes the following steps: 1.detecting current washings amount when a washing instruction is inputted; 2.pouring in the washing water in accordance with the detected clothes amount; 3.detecting whether the door is opened during the washing process, if so, then judging current mode (mixer/washing tube); 4.according to the judged mode, feeding water when necessary. The invention can improve washing performance and product reliability, and can prolong the lifetime.

title: Method of manufacturing a semiconductor device
abstract: BACKGROUND OF THE INVENTION 1. Field of the Invention The present invention relates to a method of fabricating a semiconductor device, wherein a source region and a drain region of an LDD structure are formed by performing primary and secondary impurity ion implantation processes, and then, in the drain region and an adjacent device isolation region, By performing the same or higher concentration of the third impurity ion implantation process, the margin of the contact formation process exposing the drain region can be secured, and the leakage current of the drain region can be reduced to improve the reliability of the device. A manufacturing method is presented.

title: Nail polish bottle
abstract: A nail polish bottle comprises a bottle body, a cap including a disc portion having a center hole and one or more air holes and including a discharge passage and one or more external-air introduction grooves in flow contact with the air holes. A pressure opening and closing valve is mounted to the disc portion such that a skirt portion of the valve may sit below the disc portion and a top of the valve may be above the disc portion. The skirt portion may press against the disc portion to close the air holes. When internal pressure in the bottle body opens the top of the valve, nail polish may flow through the discharge passage if the bottle is upside-down. When the internal pressure is released, the top of the valve may close and the skirt portion may move away from the disc to open the air holes.

title: Building facade cleaning procedure using moisturizing cataplasm
abstract: Desalination process after cleaning a surface, in particular of stone, of a facade of a building or a civil engineering structure, in which, for cleaning, a hydrophilic humidifying poultice is applied to the surface for a first step of a predetermined duration, then the poultice is removed and the residual soiling is removed. After a drying step of a predetermined duration, a new hydrophilic humidifier poultice is applied to the surface during a second step of a predetermined duration shorter than the first, causing the migration of the salts present by displacement of the evaporation zone in the facade across said surface to the poultice.

title: Combustion control method for waste incinerator and waste incinerator
abstract: An object of the present invention is to reduce the amount of harmful gases such as CO and NOx even when low air ratio combustion is performed in a waste incinerator, and to further reduce the total amount of exhaust gas discharged from the incinerator. Provided are a furnace combustion control method and a waste incinerator.   SOLUTION: Primary air for combustion A is blown into a combustion chamber from below a grate, and high-temperature gas B is blown into an arbitrary area between a combustion start area and a main combustion area in the combustion chamber, and is discharged from an incinerator. A circulating exhaust gas C containing at least part of the exhaust gas is blown into a post-combustion region of the combustion chamber.   Further, the exhaust gas C may consist of only the exhaust gas discharged from the incinerator.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 1

title: Device for storing and delivering energy
abstract: The present invention relates to an energy storage and delivery device (1) for storing and delivering energy such as, for example, at least some of the surplus energy produced by all types of electricity generating stations during off-peak hours or during overproduction, characterized in that it comprises at least one internal block (3) having a high thermal capacity, at least a first array of electrical heating cables (5) and at least a second array of heat recovery pipes (6), said first and second arrays being inserted directly into said internal block (3) during the manufacture thereof. The present invention also relates to a heating installation comprising at least one energy storage and recovery device (1) according to the invention.

title: Flexible display apparatus
abstract: The present invention relates to a flexible display device that provides a display device having a structure that can be folded and unfolded using light emission of rare earth elements by infrared rays of different wavelengths. According to an aspect of the present invention, there is provided a flexible display device comprising: a plurality of longitudinal infrared radiation units formed of a linear flexible material emitting infrared rays; A plurality of transverse infrared radiation portions made of a linear flexible material which intersects the longitudinal infrared radiation portion at a predetermined point and emits infrared rays of different wavelengths from the infrared rays emitted by the longitudinal infrared radiation portion; A plurality of light emitting parts made of transparent plastic or glass surrounding each intersection of the longitudinal and transverse infrared radiating parts and including rare earth elements therein; A first multiplexer for controlling an application sequence of infrared rays emitted from each of the longitudinal infrared radiation units; A second multiplexer for controlling the application order of the infrared rays emitted from each of the lateral infrared radiators; And an interface unit for converting an image signal from the outside and transferring the image signal to the first and second multiplexers.

title: Graphene and nanotube/nanowire transistor with a self-aligned gate structure on transparent substrates and method of making same
abstract: Transistor devices having a self-aligned gate structure on transparent substrates and techniques for fabrication thereof are provided. In one aspect, a method of fabricating a transistor device includes the following steps. A channel material is formed on a transparent substrate. Source and drain electrodes are formed in contact with the channel material. A dielectric layer is deposited on the channel material. A photoresist is deposited on the dielectric layer and developed using UV light exposure through the transparent substrate. A gate metal(s) is deposited on the exposed portions of the dielectric layer and the undeveloped portions of the photoresist. The undeveloped portions of the photoresist are removed along with portions of the gate metal over the source and drain regions to form a gate of the device on the dielectric layer over the channel material which is self-aligned to the source and drain electrodes.

abstract: (57) [Summary] [Object] The present invention provides a semiconductor optical device that achieves both the negative detuning method and the quantum size effect of a quantum well structure. [Structure] In order to sufficiently bring out the quantum size effect of the quantum well structure 4, the thickness of the quantum well layer 4a of InGaAs or the like is set to 4   The gain peak wavelength λg of the medium of the active region 4 is set to about 1.57 μm, and a relatively small strain is introduced into the quantum well layer 4a for negative detuning. According to the present invention, by controlling the amount of strain Δa / a or the composition ratio of the elements constituting the compound semiconductor, a semiconductor optical device that achieves both the negative detuning method and the quantum size effect of the quantum well structure at the same time. Can be provided. As a result, it is effective in reducing the threshold current, increasing the relaxation oscillation frequency, and reducing chirping.

title: Conveyor for double-sided heat treatment
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide a conveyor for double-sided heat treatment that expands the operating temperature range at high temperatures, prevents contamination of the work due to adhesion of foreign matter such as a metal scale, and does not require a jig for floating the work. . SOLUTION: A conveying element 1 is made of ceramic, and a tapered surface (work receiving portion) 6 having a downwardly sloped inward in the width direction is formed on an upper surface of a pair of inner link plates 2 included in the conveying element 1. title: Valve-type water-bag apparatus for induced abortion
abstract: The utility model relates to a valve-type labor-inducing water sac device, which is composed of a liquid-injecting tube and a water sac. Because the liquid-injecting tube in the water sac is provided with a through hole which is provided with a valve, that the injected liquid enters the water sac, and that the injected liquid can not flow back are ensured. The utility model has the advantages of simple structure, convenient manufacture, a high sterile degree, high reliable performance, etc. The tedious procedures of making the water sac before the operation, of stopping bleeding with a clamp and of stopping bleeding for ligation during the operation are omitted, which shortens operation time, and pains of the operated person can be reduced. In clinic, the utility model can be used for hospitals from all levels.

title: Flexible pedicle screws
abstract: Various bone screws and methods for accommodating stiffness regions in bone are provided. The bone screw provided generally includes a receiver member configured to receive a fixation element and an elongate shank having different stiffness regions. In one embodiment, the elongate shank can include at least one slot for increasing the flexibility of the slotted portion of the elongate shank. In another embodiment, the elongate shank can be manufactured from materials selected to alter the stiffness of the shank. The different stiffness regions allow the bone screw to mimic the flexibility of bone, reducing the risk of fracture of the bone and/or loosening of the bone screw.

If the noise amount is greater than the threshold value, the input image is adaptively histogram equalized according to the amount of noise included in the input image of the frame. That is, if the noise amount is larger than the threshold value, Thereby preventing the noise from being amplified by the histogram, The can be improved.

title: Anchor rod yield device with alert function and application method
abstract: The invention discloses an anchor rod yield device with an alert function and an application method. The device consists of a yield system and a force measurement alert system; the yield system is composed of a variable cross-section upper tray, a yield annular spring and a lower tray, the yield annular spring is flat placed between the variable cross-section upper tray and the lower tray; the force measurement alert system consists of a force measurement alert scaleplate and a force measurement pointer, scales are arranged on the force measurement alert scaleplate and the force measurement alert scaleplate has ground colors, one end of the force measurement alert scaleplate is locked at the outer side of the yield annular spring with a lock ring, and the other end of the force measurement alert scaleplate is inserted into a round hole of the force measurement pointer. In the using process, as stresses on the anchor rod increase gradually, the yield annular spring expands outward, and linkage occurs on the force measurement alert scaleplate, therefore, stress number values of the anchor rod can be read according to the force measurement pointer, and safety storage conditions of the stresses of the anchor rod can be quickly determined according to the ground colors. By utilizing the deformation property of the yield annular spring, stress states of the anchor rod and amounts of deformation of the yield annular spring are associated, so as to both achieve the purpose of yielding, and quickly and intuitively determine stress states through observation. The anchor rod yield device is convenient to install and simple to operate, and can be widely applied to a construction site.

title: Charging indicating lamp assembly installed on operation table in electric vehicle
abstract: The invention discloses a charging indicating lamp assembly installed on an operation table in an electric vehicle. The charging indicating lamp assembly comprises a charging indicating lamp which comprises an indicating lamp body and a fixing structure used for fixing the charging indicating lamp into the electric vehicle. The indicating lamp body comprises a shell, a circuit assembly arranged in the shell and indicating lamp sets. The indicating lamp sets include a plurality of indicating lamps. Lampshades are installed at the positions, corresponding to the indicating lamps, on the shell. Light sources of the indicating lamps emit light out of the shell through the corresponding lampshades. The charging indicating lamp assembly further comprises a decoration board clamped to the operation table of the electric vehicle. Second inner thread installation pillars in threaded fit with the fixing structure are arranged on the lower surface of the decoration board. The charging indicating lamp is detachably installed on the lower surface of the decoration board through the fixing structure and the second inner thread installation pillars. Through holes matched with the lampshades in a one-to-one manner are formed in the positions, corresponding to the lampshades, on the decoration board. Each lampshade penetrates out of the corresponding through hole from bottom to top.

title: Improvements in or relating to pre-polymers
abstract: 1,201,195. Coatings. CONSERVATOMEINDUSTRIE. 3 July, 1967 [1 July, 1966; 19 June, 1967], No.30565/67. Heading B2E. [Also in Divisions D1 and C3] Non-porous and porous, e.g. wood, surfaces are coated with a prepolymer or solution thereof and in the case of a porous surface is allowed to penetrate it. prior to completion or termination of polymerisation by one or more of the following: addition of another monomer or prepolymer, irradiation with ionising rays, heating, contact with air or a suitable polymerising agent. title: Self-propelled soil improvement machine and sieve device used for the same
abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide a self-propelled soil improvement machine capable of appropriately selecting the supplied soil to be reformed in accordance with its particle size, and a sieve device used for the same.   A self-propelled soil improvement machine that mixes received soil and soil with a soil improvement material to generate improved soil, a sieve device main body (10) vibratingly provided above a hopper for receiving soil and a sieve device main body. 10, a lower grid portion 11b composed of a plurality of rod-like members 20b provided at intervals along one direction of the sieve device main body 10, and a lower grid portion 11b formed at intervals along a direction orthogonal to one direction of the sieve device main body 10 And a grid upper step portion 11a comprising a plurality of rod-shaped members 20a having a large vertical dimension so as to break the block contained in the injected earth and sand and crush the broken block into the grid lower step 11b. A sieve device is provided.   [Selection diagram] FIG.

title: Methods and apparatus for mapping electrophysiological potentials in living subjects
abstract: A system for mapping and/or displaying spatio-temporal features of underlying event-related neural activity involves measuring the event-related evoked potential values at a limited number of points over the region of interest, deriving a first grid of potential values at points over the area of interest representing at least a tenfold increase in the number of points by a Kriging-type of spatial statistical interpolation, and using the first grid to derive for the region of interest a second grid of points current density values by a Laplacian conversion. A plurality of second grids of current density values spaced apart in time are derived and displayed on a monitor in cartoon-type fashion to provide a cartoon-type display of the features of the event-related evoked response over the region of interest varying with time. Various other displays are possible for highlighting specific features.

title: Automatic sampler device
abstract: PURPOSE:To insert a suction pipe for sampling shallowly and to prevent the suction pipe from damaging by mounting a sample pipe on slanting rollers and transporting it to a sampling position while slanting said sample pipe by using arms which appear and disappear between rollers. CONSTITUTION:When the sample pipe 1 is mounted on the rollers 3 which are arranged slantingly, the sample pipe 1 is transported from left rollers to right rollers in order through the elevating motion of arms 4 and 4 while stirring is carried out by the rotation of the rollers 3. When the pipe reaches the sampling position, the sample pipe 1 is pressed and fixed by a sample pipe pressing device 7. In this state, a sampling device 5 inserts the suction pipe 8 into the sample pipe 1 to sample its internal sample. Consequently, suction is carried out while the sample pipe 1 is slanted, so the insertion length of the suction pipe 8 becomes short. Therefore, the suction pipe is prevented from damaging owing to an increase in the insertion length.

title: Rear suspension of automobile
abstract: PURPOSE:To eliminate directional deviation characteristics by means of the difference in toe-changing volume due to bumps of right and left rear wheels at the time of turning, by making a fixing angle, in relation to the horizontal plane, of at least one arm out of two arms asymmetric in the right and left. CONSTITUTION:Two sets of front arms 3a, 3b, and rear arms 4a, 4b are arranged as approximately parallel in the lateral direction of a car body near righ and left rear wheels 2L and 2R and also as inclined downward to the outside of the car body. Out of the four arms 3a, 3b, 4a and 4b, fixing angles alpha1 and alpha2 of the rear side arms 4a and 4b in relation to the horizontal plane are set as larger than a fixing angle beta of fron side arms 3a and 3b in relation to the horizontal plane. And in the rear side arms 4a and 4b, the fixing angle alpha1 of the left side arm 4a is set as larger than the fixing angle alpha2 of the right side arm 4b, thereby right and left suspension arms 8a and 8b are asymmetric.

title: Numerical control machine tool fixture with improved structure
abstract: The invention discloses a numerical control machine tool fixture with an improved structure. The numerical control machine tool fixture comprises a rotary table, a plurality of slide blocks, locating devices and a power output device. The slide blocks can be located on the rotary table in a sliding mode in the radial direction of the rotary table, the locating devices are fixedly arranged on the rotary table in a position-adjustable mode and can be fixedly connected with the slide blocks, clamping claws capable of clamping workpieces are arranged on the slide blocks, and the power output device can drive the rotary table to rotate. According to the numerical control machine tool fixture, the workpieces are located on the rotary table which can rotate, then the workpieces are driven by the rotary table to rotate so as to change positions, a plurality of cutters on a numerical control machine tool are used for simultaneously machining different workpieces, the workpieces can be machined at a time without changing the cutters, and a plurality of procedures can be finished through one-time clamping; therefore, the numerical control machine tool fixture is high in machining speed, high in production efficiency and high in machining accuracy.

title: Method for producing heparinized biomaterial
abstract:
(57) [Summary]
An improved method of making a medical device having heparin immobilized on a blood contacting surface, comprising combining heparin with sufficient periodate to react with no more than two sugar units per molecule of heparin. , Wherein the mixing is carried out in a buffer solution having a pH in the range of about 4.5-8. The mixture was allowed to react for at least 3 hours while protected from light, and then added to the immobilized amine groups. This is due to the fact that the conversion of only a few natural functional groups to aldehydes preserves the antithrombotic bioavailability of the heparin molecule bound to the surface, so that after using excess periodate, It is an improvement over prior art methods that included stopping the reaction at the desired point by addition. The invention also dries and reduces heparin by providing a reacted mixture of heparin and periodate that can be stored as a stable liquid and applied directly to the aminated surface after a few days. Avoid prior art processes.

title: Current-operated circuits and structures
abstract: Current-mode OR gates useful, for example, in telephone cross-point switch systems. A current-mode OR gate withdraws an output current of predetermined level at its output terminal whenever an input current of sufficient level is applied to one or more of its plurality of input terminals. Each input terminal is connected to the base electrode of a transistor, having its collector electrode connected to the output terminal and having its emitter electrode connected by a resistor to a common terminal. Each input current will bias the transistor to which base it is applied, into conduction, to cause its collector current to be withdrawn through the output terminal. The total output current is constrained to the predetermined level by sensing the potential across the resistor and, in response to this potential reaching a predetermined value, clamping each of the input terminals receiving current to prevent further increase of the potential across the resistor.

title: Leakproof sealing flap
abstract: In order to prevent leakage to the front or rear of the trolley of the sintering machine used in the sintering operation of steel mills, by using magnetic force of the magnet, fine particles of sintered ore are attracted and stacked to form a plurality of sealing layers. An anti-sealing flap is introduced. According to the leakage preventing sealing flap, leakage of air to the front or rear of the sintering machine trolley is prevented to increase the productivity and quality of the sintered ore, and the efficiency of the blower is increased, thereby saving energy.

title: Exhaust valve for marine engine
abstract:
PURPOSE: To work a metal of heat resistance and oxidation resistance at relatively low temperature to make aging treatment and to contrive high hardness and long life integrating metal of different kinds with a main unit, thereafter performing solution treatment and warm forging further aging treatment.  
     CONSTITUTION: An exhaust valve is constituted by arranging a heat resistant steel material in a main unit and further metal of different kinds rich in wearing resistance and oxidation resistance at high temperature in a seat part. After the metal of different kinds is integrated with the main unit, solution treatment and warm forging are performed further to perform aging treatment. That is, as compared with that the conventional one is formed into a compound structure by finally padding a material of different kind welded, a maximum feature is provided in the point that warm finish forging following the solution treatment is applied after previously forming the compound structure. A composition of the metal of different kinds is left as adequately set, so that very high hardness can be obtained by aging treatment after finishing forging.

abstract: 547,018. Transformers. BRITISH THOMSONHOUSTON CO., Ltd. April 28, 1941, No. 5448. Convention date, April 26, 1940. [Class 38 (ii)] In order to obtain fractional turn ratios which do not vary with load current, the core of a transformer is subdivided to form parallel magnetic paths and the end turn of one of the windings is correspondingly subdivided into parallel-connected loops each of which embraces one only of the subdivisions of the core. Fig. 1 shows a transformer having a shell-type core in which the required conditions are produced by connecting the secondary winding 21 to a terminal 25 through two parallel conductors 23, 24 which pass respectively through different windows. Fig. 2 shows a core-type transformer in which the magnetic circuit is subdivided by a hole 43, the secondary 42 terminating in two parallel-connected loops 44, 45 embracing sections of the core on opposite sides of the hole. Fig. 4 shows an arrangement in which the effect of of a turn is produced by using three parallel-connected loops 67, 68, 69 embracing three cores 60, 61 62 all of which are embraced by the main part of the secondary 64.

title: Method to accelerate working medium flow in rocket engine channel
abstract: FIELD: electric rocket engines. SUBSTANCE: according to proposed method, acceleration is provided owing to action of electrodynamic Lorentz force in nonhomogeneous gas plasma flow. Plasmoids in gas flow are created by T-layer effect formed at artificially provoking overheat instability in channel with magnetic field cross to flow. For this purpose impulsive high current discharge is provided periodically at inlet section of MHD accelerator channel. T-layer at steady state are stable current layers acting onto gas flow at plasma pistons. MHD-process with T-layers preserves stability at high mass density of flow. This methods improves stability of plasma to development of overheat instability at multiple increase in consumption of working medium. EFFECT: increased thrust of electric rocket engine.

title: Method for manufacturing and displaying large-scale urban space energy consumption digital map
abstract: The invention discloses a method for manufacturing and displaying a large-scale urban space energy consumption digital map. The method comprises the following steps of: performing data simplification on urban space form three-dimensional data, establishing a pixel corresponding to needed data type, converting the pixel into urban three-dimensional vector information data, and loading into a geographic information system; establishing an urban space energy consumption database, uploading space energy consumption big data immediately; connecting a three-dimensional vector information module with an urban space energy consumption database; importing data and image information from the database, performing data superimposition according to geographical coordinates, and exporting a digital map capable of displaying urban space energy consumption. According to the method, urban space energy consumption data is combined with an urban digital map system in a vector image mode, so that spatial visualization display of urban space energy consumption is realized; by virtue of the digital map, the space energy consumption condition of a whole city can be mastered; based on a cloud data technology of a computer, automatic calculation processing of urban space energy consumption mass data is realized, and time-consuming and labor-consuming manual data processing is avoided.

title: Network conversation method and system
abstract: The invention relates to the field of telephone communication, in particular to a network conversation method and system. The system comprises a user terminal, Internet, a network call server, a network telephone gateway, a public switched telephone network and a telephone terminal, wherein the Internet at least comprises an interface with a hyperlink icon of a network telephone; the user terminal is connected with the telephone terminal via click of the hyperlink icon in order that the user can make a call more conveniently; and moreover, the telephone charge cost can be saved for a company with a large number of customer service calls through use of the conversion system.

title: Electric connector and device with electric connector
abstract: The utility model discloses an electric connector, which comprises a shell, an elastic sealing cycle and a locking ring. At least one convex cam is formed on the inner peripheral wall of the locking ring. Concave cam grooves are formed on the outer wall of the shell. The cams of the locking ring are matched with the cam grooves of the shell so as to guide the locking ring to rotate on the shell to the locking position. Locking grooves are formed in the cam grooves. When the locking ring rotates to the locking position, the cams of the locking ring are locked in the locking grooves of the shell. Thus, the locking ring can be reliably locked in the locking position and the locking ring can be prevented from getting loose and falling off.
