title: Method for acquiring performance index configuration data of slave network element and equipment
abstract: The invention discloses a method for acquiring performance index configuration data of a slave network element and equipment, belonging to the field of communication. The method comprises the following steps of: acquiring an installation packet of performance plugins released by the slave network element by first equipment when a new slave network element is added into a network framework or the slave network element in the network framework is upgraded, wherein the installation packet comprises a first plugin and a second plugin, the first plugin comprises the performance index configuration data, required to be stored in the first equipment, of the slave network element, and the second plugin comprises the performance index configuration data required to be stored in second equipment; acquiring the first plugin and the second plugin from the installation packet, and installing the first plugin to acquire the performance index configuration data of the slave network element; sending a first synchronous request message to the second equipment, wherein the first synchronous request message carries the second plugin; and installing the second plugin by the second equipment to acquire the performance index configuration data of the slave network element. By the method, frequent upgrading and service interrupt of the first equipment and the second equipment can be avoided.

title: Zero backlash gear structure
abstract: A zero backlash gear structure, comprising: an engaging element, a compound gear set, an elastic element, and a fixing element. Wherein, the engaging element is provided with a plurality of engaging slots. The compound gear set includes a compound gear, a gear shaft, and a spline; wherein, the compound gear is provided with at least two gears, said plurality of gears can be engaged to a plurality of engaging slots. Said fixing element is sleeved onto said gear shaft, to press against said plurality of gears and said elastic element. When backlash occurs, said elastic element is used to make said plurality of gears on said compound gear set to get close to each other automatically, so that said fixing element and said compound gear set can move in synchronism, thus achieving zero backlash in both forward and reverse rotations.

title: Hatch door lock of safety cabin
abstract: The utility model relates to a hatch door lock of a safety cabin comprising a hand wheel, a screw gearing mechanism, a main shaft, worm and worm gearing mechanisms, pinion and rack mechanisms, and locking mechanisms arranged corresponding to the pinion and rack mechanisms. The screw gearing mechanism comprises a major screw gear and a minor screw gear, each worm and worm gearing mechanism comprise a worm and a worm gear, and each pinion and rack mechanism comprises a gear and a rack. The hand wheel is in a coaxial connection with the major screw gear to drive the major screw gear to rotate, and the major screw gear is meshed with the minor screw gear to drive the minor screw gear to rotate. The minor screw gear and the worm are coaxially connected with the main shaft, the minor screw gear drives the worm to rotate, and the worm drives the worm gear to rotate. The worm gear is in a coaxial connection with the gear and drives the gear to rotate. The gear is meshed with the rack and drives the rack to move, and the locking mechanism is connected with the front end of the rack to realize the locking of the hatch door of the safety cabin. The hatch door lock has the advantages of being convenient and simple to operate, safe, reliable, and good in impact resistance and can be widely applied to various safety cabins.

title: Self-lubricating gear for vehicle wheel hub
abstract: The utility model relates to a self-lubrication gear for a wheel hub of a vehicle, which is composed of a gear and a wheel body, wherein the center point of the width of the gear is provided or drilled with an oil seeping groove or an oil seeping hole and an oil storing groove which is communicated with the oil seeping groove or the oil seeping hole is arranged in the wheel body. The sizes of the oil seeping groove or the oil seeping hole and the oil storing groove depends on the sizes of the gear and the wheel body, and the size of the oil seeping groove or the oil seeping hole is smaller than the size of the oil storing groove. The gear has the advantages of simple structure, convenient processing and low cost. When the gear has engaging transmission, under the action of centrifugal force, grease is thrown onto a gear surface along the oil seeping groove or the oil seeping hole so as to achieve self-lubrication. The utility model prolongs the service life of the gear, improves the cleanness of a transmission system and is suitable for various vehicles.

title: Remote channel system
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve the capacity of effective transfer by converting an address, a command, data, or the like to a redundant code in byte units to continuously transmit and receive them between a channel adapter and an input/output adapter. CONSTITUTION:A channel adapter (CHA) 3 is connected to a device body (including a channel) 1 through an interface cable 5 of a parallel signal line group, and an input/output device adapter (IOA) 4 is connected to an input/output device 2 through an interface cable 7 of a parallel signal line group. The channel adapter 3 and the input/output device adapter 4 are connected by an optical fiber or a digital line 6 for bit serial transmission. In this case, the redundant code which can be checked in byte units is used for data transmission between the channel adapter 3 and the input/output device adapter 4 instead of conventional frame constitution. Thus, the delay time is considerably shortened and the resistance to noise of the optical fiber or the like is effectively used to efficiently transfer data.

title: Method and automated system for assisting in the prognosis of alzheimer’s disease, and method for training such a system
abstract: The invention relates to a method and an automated system for assisting in the prognosis of the progress of, and for assisting in the diagnosis of, Alzheimer’s disease in patients having mild cognitive impairment, or MCI. The invention also relates to a method for training such a system related to identifying discriminant regions of the brain and using said regions to fine tune the assistance method based on new known cases. The invention uses imaging data (PET or MPET) representing the cerebral activity in a plurality of spatial areas (voxels). The method thus includes an image data standardization process and an analysis of cerebral activity values noted in a selection of voxels forming at least one predetermined discriminant region defined by the coordinates thereof in a spatial reference system. The invention may also include a combination of the imaging results with the results of one or more cognitive tests.

title: Apparatus and method for determining sleep stage
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a sleep stage determination apparatus and a sleep stage determination method for determining an accurate sleep stage.  <P>SOLUTION: A boundary value change part 25 calculates the boundary value of a sleep stage within a range where different sleep stage distributions overlap with each other for a biological feature amount in the sleep stage distributions which are the distributions of the biological feature amounts for each sleep stage of an individual for the biological feature amount regarding the sleep of the individual, and a sleep stage determination part 34 determines the sleep stage of the individual on the basis of the biological feature amount and the boundary value. title: PET (polyethylene terephthalate) plastic alloy
abstract: The invention discloses a PET (polyethylene terephthalate) plastic alloy, which is prepared according to the following steps that PET, PE (poly ethylene), PP (propene polymer), EVA (ethyleno vinyl acetale copolymetr), PC (poly carbonate), ABS (acrylonitrile butadiene styrene), SMA (styrene maleic anhydride), PA6 (polyamide) and thermal stabilizing agents are proportionally weighed according to the weight part ratio; the combustion speed is 3 to 7mm/min; the fire resistance of the product is excellent; the combustion speed is 3 to 7mm/min; the product bending intensity is 50 to 70MPa; the elasticity modulus is 810 to 850 MPa; the product low-temperature notch impact intensity is 2 to 8kJ/m<m>; the stretch intensity is 25 to 45 MPa; the fracture elongation percentage is 15 to 35 percent; the cost is low; the operation is simple.

title: Egg roll making machine
abstract: The invention discloses an egg roll making machine. The egg roll making machine comprises a housing. The housing comprises a base and a shell installed on the base. A metal sleeve installed on the base is arranged in the shell. A heating device is arranged on the outer surface of the metal sleeve. The upper end of the metal sleeve is connected with the upper end of the shell through a guiding device. A guiding through hole is formed in the guiding device and connected with a sleeve opening formed in the upper end of the metal sleeve. A push-and-pull device for uniform smearing is arranged in the metal sleeve. Egg liquid can be uniformly smeared quite conveniently and easily through the push-and-pull device; besides, the egg liquid can be heated more uniformly, the heating time of the egg liquid is shortened, and the making efficiency of egg rolls is greatly improved.

title: Setting device for gain in reading radiation picture information
abstract: PURPOSE:To make it possible to compensate the difference in pickup condictions, the intensity variation in the laser light source for reading, and the output variation in a light sensor by setting the gain of a reading system so that the measuring level of laser light for reading is matched with the level of a reference signal. CONSTITUTION:Part of the laser light 2 from the light source 1 is introduced to a light sensor 6 through a half mirror 9, a lens 10, and an optical fiber 8. The output of the sensor 6 is converted to a voltage 13, compared with a reference voltage, which is established based on the reference signal S through a reference voltage setting circuit 15, in a comparator 16. A high voltage power source 12 is adjusted so that both signal voltages are matched, and the gain of the light sensor 6 is established. The light 2 is linearly deflected by a galvanomirror 3, and scans a moving storage type fluorescent plate 4 in two dimensions. The light emitted from the plate 4 is converted to a voltage 13, amplified 14, and sent to a picture processing part.

title: Information processing apparatus, information processing system, information processing method, and program
abstract: An information processing apparatus, an information processing system, an information processing method, and a program. The information processing apparatus includes: a data processing unit which performs copy processing for recording recorded data of a first medium in a second medium, wherein the data processing unit performs processing for referencing copy restriction information received from a management server, comparing the copy restriction information with apparatus setting information set in a memory of the information processing apparatus, determining whether or not the copy processing is permitted in accordance with the comparison result, and copying recorded data of the first medium to the second medium under the condition it is determined that the copy processing is permitted.

title: Robot audiovisual system
abstract: (57) [Summary] [PROBLEMS] To provide a robot audio-visual system capable of real-time processing for tracking visual and auditory sense of an object. An auditory module identifies a speaker's sound source by extracting pitch, separating and localizing a sound source from a sound signal of a microphone to extract an auditory event, and a visual module identifies a speaker's face from a camera image. The visual control module 40 for rotating the robot in the horizontal direction extracts the motor event 49 from the rotation position of the motor, and the association module 60 for controlling each module extracts the auditory event, the visual event, and the visual event 39. An auditory stream 65 and a visual stream 66 are generated from the motor event, and an association stream 67 is generated by associating the auditory stream 65 and the visual stream 66, and the attention control module 64 performs attention control for planning the drive motor control.

title: How to make mullite
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] To provide a method for recovering paper sludge incineration ash and extracting papermaking filler or mullite as an active ingredient. [Structure] Paper-making sludge incineration ash is pressure-molded to have a uniform particle size, then pre-baked, and a liquid flow L,   In the firing process that passes through the three stages of dissolution reprecipitation M and solid phase sintering S, the temperature increase of the pre-firing is stopped under the temperature conditions of the final process of the dissolution reprecipitation process M before entering the solid phase sintering stage S. Then let it cool.

title: Installing nuclear reactor on bed of water course, e.g. for power generation, involves using submersible barge to transport reactor to site before sinking
abstract: The method enables a nuclear reactor (1) to be fixedly installed in a watercourse or a body of water (6). It mainly comprises a barge (10) constructed in a shipyard and in which is constructed and placed the nuclear reactor (1). The barge (10) held in a floating state, is transported to the site, and submerged by means of ballasts (14) to rest fixedly on the bottom (8) of the stream or body of water (6).

title: Continuous casting equipment
abstract: (57) [Summary] [PROBLEMS] Conventionally, an electromagnet part of a magnetic field generator is arranged above an upper surface of a molten metal pool, and a magnetic field is applied from the upper surface side of the molten metal pool to control the flow of the molten metal. However, in this case, there is a problem that the electromagnet becomes a hindrance when supplying flux or the like from above the molten metal pool. Conventionally, even in the case of a continuous casting apparatus capable of changing the size of a slab, it has been necessary to change the magnetic field generator according to each size. Therefore, an object of the present invention is to provide a continuous casting apparatus that solves these problems. A molten metal pool (1) in a continuous casting mold (16).   In the continuous casting apparatus having the electromagnet core 14 facing upward from the upper surface of the molten metal pool 9, the notch 11 a provided in the long side mold wall 11 above the upper surface of the molten metal pool 19, the tip side of the electromagnet core 14 (core embedded). Part 10) is embedded.

title: Infrared ray insulation electrothermic cape
abstract: The utility model discloses an infrared heat insulation electrothermal shawl, including a shawl body, an electrothermal film extended and hidden in the shawl body, a controller and a power supply. The electrothermal film is composed of metal foil and at least one layer of polyurethane coated on the surface of the metal foil; moreover, the polyurethane layer contains 4-31% of medical stone, 2-11% of soybean powder and 2-12% of animal ashes in weight percentage. Such a structure enables the shawl to be electrified and heated and can reflect the infrared of human body by using the infrared material powders of the polyurethane layer to achieve the effects of heat insulation and preservation. The utility model is safe, durable, environmentally friendly and highly efficient.

title: Toners for electrostatic-image development
abstract: Toners for electrostatic-image development which are toners produced through emulsion polymerization and aggregation and which have excellent fixability even at a higher temperature while retaining intact other various properties and emit no odor offensive to people; and a process for producing the toners. One of the toners produced through emulsion polymerization and aggregation is characterized by having an odor index in terms of the odor of aliphatic aldehydes as determined by gas chromatography of 300 or lower. The other toner produced through emulsion polymerization and aggregation is a toner obtained via a polymerization step, aggregation step, and aging step and is characterized in that the latex which has been obtained by emulsion polymerization before the aggregation step is a latex having a peoxide value of 30 or smaller.

title: A kind of roll lathe realizing automatic loading and unloading roll
abstract: The utility model relates to a kind of lathe, is specifically related to a kind of roll lathe realizing automatic loading and unloading roll.The lathe bed side of this roll lathe is provided with motor, and lathe bed upper surface is provided with two Zu Gong tetra-road chutes, and lathe bed is provided with two groups of totally four slide blocks, and be provided with rotating shaft in slide block, slide block is connected with lateral column, it is long-armed that lateral column end is connected with fastening by piston rod.Roll lathe of the present utility model, effectively can improve the conevying efficiency of roll, reduce labour intensity, improve efficiency.

title: Method for producing high-permeability amorphous nanocrystalline alloy
abstract: The invention discloses a method for producing a high-permeability amorphous nanocrystalline alloy, which is characterized by comprising the following steps of: adding master alloy materials into a non-vacuum induction furnace for re-melting; after the master alloy materials begin to melt, adding materials to be supplemented, namely, calculating a weight difference between compositions of the used master alloy and required compositions, namely the amount of the materials to be supplemented; then adding perlite borax composite slag to isolate the alloy from the air; after the alloy and the composite slag are completely melted, when metal oxides are dissolved in the slag on the surface of the alloy feed liquid, removing the slag, then quickly covering composite slag on the surface of the alloy feed liquid, and removing the slag, and then covering composite slag on the surface of the alloy feed liquid, and repeating the operation until all the oxides floating in the alloy feed liquid are removed; then covering the composite slag on the surface of the alloy feed liquid, wherein the amount of the composite slag added for each time is 0.05 to 0.5 weight percent of the amount of the master alloy materials; and when the temperature of the alloy feed liquid reaches 1380 to 1410 DEG C, starting a band spraying machine for spraying a band. An amorphous band prepared by the method disclosed by the invention has stable contents of Si and B, and stable magnetic performance.

title: Apparatus with pendulum motion for balancing at least one person
abstract: An apparatus for pendulum motion for balancing at least one person or user in a plane, generally parallel to the ground, is characterized in that an extension for a footrest is carried by the suspension member further from the seat, and the extension of the suspension member is arranged in such a manner that, in the position of equilibrium of the apparatus, despite its connection to a suspension member remote from the seat in question, the footrest for the feet of the user of the seat is placed vertically downward of the means for pivotal connection of the suspension member closest to the seat in question.

title: Lower jaw moving function readjuster and instrument for positioning and setting
abstract:
PURPOSE: To enable the motion of the lower jaw to be imitated correctly whereby an upper support plate on which a model of the upper jaw is fixed is allowed to move freely.  
     CONSTITUTION: A front pan 16 and two rear pans 17, 18 are fixed on the respective positions of a lower support plate 2 in such a manner that each of the pans forms a triangle and a front describing needle 28 and rear describing needles 31, 32, all of which are immersed in quick-setting material packed in the pans 16, 17, 18, are fixed to the respective portions of an upper support plate 1 opposite to the lower support plate 2 while the heights of the needles are adjusted, and an upper spring 14 and a spring 15 installed in such a way as capable of being opened and closed by a hinge 13 have their end portions fixed to both sides of the upper support plate 1 and to both sides of the lower support plate 2, respectively.

title: Scheme for clearing away and using sludge
abstract: The invention relates to a scheme for clearing away and using sludge. The scheme is composed of a dam, a gate, sludge, a dump, a hoarding and an air inlet, wherein the sludge clearing and using are bundled so as to resolve the current problems and eliminate the root causes; the sludge is conducted for physico-chemical analysis so as to provide scientific data for comprehensive use, a self-developed dredger with anti-winding propellers is adopted to clear away sludge, so as to slidingly throw off impurities and sludge in the water; during the sludge excavation in either a deep water area or a shallow water area, the dredger is provided with navigation, positioning and sonar systems to monitor underwater sludge and construction progress; the sludge and mud on the ground surface are treated as follows: the way of the crawler belt of a modified hooking machine is utilized to construct on the mud laid with an alloy pressing plate, and the sludge is transported to the dump, wherein a metal fence is arranged around the dump, supports are arranged in the fence, and screen gauzes are arranged on the fence, and the filtrated and air dried sludge is prepared into energy-saving environment-friendly multi-purpose functional bricks, so that land can be saved, and a planting area can be improved due to the fact that the sludge and clay are synthesized to landfill soil; furthermore, the water storage of a dredged reservoir area can be improved by 4 folds, and the qualities of water body and aquatic products can be obviously prompted; in addition, levelers towed by the dredger in the reservoir area is used for clearing up and fishing operations can be realized.

title: Woodworking adhesives based on multistage emulsion polymer
abstract: A woodworking adhesive composition prepared by a two stage emulsion polymerization procedure wherein the first stage comprises the step of emulsion polymerizing vinyl acetate with 0.1 to 6% by weight of a post-crosslinking monomer in the presence of polyvinyl alcohol to produce a polyvinyl alcohol stabilized copolymer having a Tg within the range of +10° to +40° C. and containing no pre-crosslinking monomers and the second stage comprises the step of emulsion polymerizing methyl methacrylate to produce a methyl methacrylate homo- or copolymer containing at least 75% by weight methyl methacrylate and having a Tg within the range of +50° to +120° C., further characterized in that the ratio of the polymer produced in the first stage to the polymer produced in the second stage is within the range of 10:1 to 10:6 and wherein the first stage polymer and second stage monomer mixture are not equilibrated prior to the second stage polymerization.

title: Controller for revolving rack
abstract: PURPOSE:To use a controller efficiently against a revolving rack piled in layers with a plurality of revolving-rack-simple-substances by controlling a plurality of motors through changing in turn one speed controller by means of a changeover circuit. CONSTITUTION:A micro-computer, on the basis of an inputted request for depositing and drawing, pull-strikes depositing and drawing items from the inside of the article storage portion 15 of a revolving rack 10, and still more, classifies the pull-struck article storage portion 15 at every revolving-rack- simple-substance 11. The request for depositing and drawing classified with each revolving-rack-simple-substance 11 is classified into block units, and articles to be deposited are marshaled in order of a block unit on a conveyer. After marshaling, for example, firstly, the depositing and drawing of articles for the 1st stage-5th stage revolving-rack-simple-substances 11 is done. After the completion of this, the control of the open/close operation of a controller is done, and the 6th stage-10th stage revolving-rack-simple-substances 11 become turning-controllable, and the depositing and drawing of articles for the revolving- rack-simple-substance 11 is done.

title: Coating a heat curable liquid dielectric on a substrate
abstract: A porous substrate curtain coated with a single coating of a liquid dielectric that is cured into a well adhering film at least 15 microns thick with a uniformity of less than 5 microns. The substrate is cleaned to remove contaminants, heated to remove moisture, curtain coated with a single coating of a viscous heat curable liquid dielectric such as polyimide, and heated to cure the dielectric by increasing the temperature at most 15° C. per minute to a predetermined cure temperature not exceeding 450° C. The invention is well suited for fabricating a dielectric layer in a high density multichip module.

title: A kind of autonomous method for inspecting of unmanned plane for exchange double back tangent tower
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of autonomous method for inspecting of unmanned plane for exchange double back tangent tower, comprising the following steps: S1. determines exchange double back tangent tower key inspection point；S2. take pictures key point and the track key point during inspection are chosen, inspection course line is set；S3. manual inspection is carried out according to the inspection course line of setting, and during inspection, acquisition track key point coordinate, key point of taking pictures coordinate, key point of taking pictures head angle and holder angle；S4. according to data collected during manual inspection, the autonomous flight task of unmanned plane and task of independently taking pictures are generated；S5. the patrol task of generation is uploaded to unmanned plane, unmanned plane is controlled according to the full autonomous flight of task, reaches adjust automatically head course and holder angle when taking pictures key point, camera is triggered after being adjusted in place and is taken pictures, it takes pictures and followed by executes follow-up work, until task is completed and returns to takeoff point.The present invention has inspection risk low, and routing inspection efficiency is high, the good advantage of data consistency.

title: Assembly jig for display panel
abstract: Provided is an assembly jig for a display panel. The assembly jig is applied to assemble the display panel. The assembly jig for the display panel comprises a body, a supporting piece, a plurality of guide posts and a fixing device. The body comprises two side plates in parallel, wherein a long and narrow placing space is formed between the two side plates. The body further comprises a plurality of parallel long groove holes and a plurality of combination portions, wherein each long groove hole is formed in each side plate and each combination portion is arranged on the outer side face of each side plate. The supporting piece comprises a tray and a plurality of abutting portions, wherein the tray is placed in the long and narrow placing space, each abutting portion which extends to the tray penetrates through one of the long groove holes and protrudes on the outer side face of each side plate, and a penetrating hole is formed in each abutting portion. The plurality of guide posts are respectively arranged on the outer side face of one of the side plates and penetrate through the penetrating holes of the abutting portions, and two ends of each guide post are respectively combined with one of the combination portions. The fixing device is used for locking the abutting portions on the guide posts so that the tray is fixed. The assembly jig for the display panel has the advantages of being beneficial for assembly and high in generality.

title: Step-up switching voltage regulator circuit
abstract: This invention provides a voltage booster type switching regulator circuit which avoids uselessly boosting the voltage supplied from a battery and thus wasting the battery. A switch for switching the outputs is provided such that, when the power source voltage supplied from the battery is large in comparison with a given output voltage, the power source voltage supplied from the battery is used as an output voltage, and when the power source voltage supplied from the battery is small in comparison with the given output voltage, the power source voltage from the battery is boosted up to the given output voltage.

title: Assembled construction gateway
abstract: The invention relates to an exit gateway of a construction site, and particularly relates to an assembled construction gateway. The invention provides an assembled construction gateway to solve the problems that the traditional gateway is complicated to manufacture, cannot be repeatedly utilized, and the like. The assembled construction gateway comprises two gateway upright posts, operating derricks, and door heads, wherein the operating derricks are arranged inside the gateway upright posts; the door heads are connected to the top ends of the gateway upright posts; each gateway upright post is a vertical cuboid hollow upright post which is formed by a plurality of steel plates connected with a steel frame in a splicing manner; each door head is a horizontal cuboid hollow upright post which is formed by the plurality of steel plates connected to the steel frame in the splicing manner. The assembled construction gateway has the beneficial effects that the gateway upright posts and the door heads are prefabricated in blocks and produced in a standardizing manner; transportation and storage are facilitated; the targets of rapidly assembling the construction gateway on the spot and repeatedly utilizing after dismantling are achieved; large hoisting equipment and a construction scaffold are not needed in assembly and disassembly of the entire gateway; the engineering cost is saved; and the construction efficiency is improved.

title: Pedestal pan and seat ring thereof
abstract: The utility model discloses a seat ring of a pedestal pan. The seat ring comprises a seat ring body and a seal board, wherein the whole seat ring body is in an annular shape, an annular inner cavity provided with a downward opening is formed on the bottom surface of the seat ring body and surrounds the seat ring body, the inner side wall of the seat ring body is provided with a plurality of first through holes communicated with the annular inner cavity, the seat ring body is further provided with a connector used for being connected with an exhaust fan, and the connector is communicated with the annular inner cavity; and the seal board is fixed on the bottom surface of the seat ring body and seals up the opening, a plurality of grooves are formed on the bottom surface of the seal board, and the grooves are communicated with the inner side wall and the outer side wall of the seat ring body. According to the seat ring of the pedestal pan, odor inside the pedestal pan can be exhausted through the first through holes in the inner side wall of the seat ring body, speed is fast, and electric energy is saved. On the basis of the seat ring, the utility model further provides the pedestal pan provided with the seat ring.

title: Low dielectric constant printed circuit board and manufacturing method thereof
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Object] The present invention relates to a low dielectric constant printed circuit board widely used for circuit configurations of various electronic devices and a manufacturing method thereof,   It is an object of the present invention to improve the joining reliability and prevent the insulation from being deteriorated due to the adhesive flowing out to the portion other than the joining portion. [Structure] The signal pattern 2 and a connection land 3 higher than the signal pattern 2 are formed on the surface of the inner layer substrate 1, and the surface of the fine metal particles having excellent conductivity is thermoset and heat-treated on the upper surface of the connection land 3. A microcapsule type conductive adhesive 15 covered with a plastic insulating resin is coated, and the connection lands 3 face each other, and the conductive adhesive 15 between the connection lands 3 is electrically conducted by heating and pressing. Then, the conductive adhesive 15 remaining on the surface of the laminated inner layer substrate 1 is removed by washing with water.

title: Aluminium Die-Cast Part
abstract: An aluminum diecast part is provided, in particular in the form of a load-bearing motor vehicle part. In order to protect against sudden breaking loads, at least one tension element, made of a material that can be deformed in a ductile manner and having a different thermal expansion coefficient to the die-cast part, is bonded, in a load-resistant manner to the side of the die-cast part that is external to the load. The die-cast part remains highly deformable, even under the effects of greater temperature fluctuations, by way of the punctiform, shear-resistant interconnection of the die-cast part and the tension element at multiple sites distributed over the bond.

title: Transmission level control method and transceiver apparatus in wireless local loop system
abstract: A transmission level control method in a wireless local loop system capable of suppressing occurrence of an unnecessarily high transmission level, comprises a step of generating a required reception level corresponding to a classification of data, a step of detecting the reception level of data at a receiver side transceiver apparatus, a step of finding a level difference between the detected reception level and the required reception level corresponding to the classification of the related received data, and a step of controlling a change of the transmission level at a transmitter side transceiver apparatus according to this level difference.

title: Connector mounting means
abstract: The utility model relates to a fixing device for a connector. The bottom of the back end of an insulating base body and two sides of the insulating base body are forwards extended and formed with containing sheets and protecting sheets spaced with the base body, and after the insulating base body is assembled in a metallic shielding element, the bottom seams and two sides of the metallic shielding element can be clamped by the containing sheets and the protecting sheets in order to reinforce the structure of the connector. In addition, the circumference of a splicing end opening of the metallic shielding element can be folded with fixed sheets having screw holes toward lower part to two sides in order to locking screws and fix the connector which is welded on the machine shell for reinforcing the assembled structure of the connector.

title: Superconductive current limiting element
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a superconductive current limiting element which prevents a superconductive film from separating off due to heat distortion or from being deteriorated in its superconductive characteristics, and is restrained from releasing heat due to the transfer of a current from an electrode to a superconductor and vice versa.  <P>SOLUTION: The superconductive current limiting element is equipped with a superconductor 3 composed of a substrate 1 and a superconductive film 2 formed on it, and a first electrode 4 and a second electrode 5 which are connected to the surface of the superconductive film 2 at ends of the superconductor 3. In the superconductive current limiting element, a current flowing through the first electrode 4 is made to flow out through the second electrode 5 passing through the superconductive film 2 of the superconductor 3, and the first electrode 4 and the second electrode 5 are composed of a plurality of split rectangular electrode pieces 6, respectively.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2005,JPO&NCIPI

title: Film resistor
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] Claiming a film resistor in which the cap of a film fixed resistor is formed only on the surface of a metal plate by electroless plating to improve the reliability and yield. [Structure] Conventionally, tin is mainly formed on the surface of the cap, so that the hardness is low, so rubbing line marks and metal scraps are generated during the manufacturing process, resulting in a defective resistance value. In addition, in order to increase the hardness, it is difficult to store the metal plate only, except tin, so that the weldability is poor when nickel is formed under the copper by plating or nickel is formed by electrolytic plating on the surface. , The welding strength was low. The present invention provides a film fixed resistor in which a nickel-based alloy is formed on the surface of a cap by electroless plating to suppress the occurrence of defective resistance values, excellent weldability, and high welding strength.

title: Fastener mounting method and mounting device
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] The purpose of the present invention is to automatically attach a fastener to a through hole formed in the overlapping portion of the first container frame and the second container frame by a machine. [Structure] The fastener 1 in the first state is converted to a second state by pressing both wing pieces from the left and right in the rear of the fastener frame 2, and the two wing pieces facing each other in the second state are The holding piece 63 is fitted into the fine gap to maintain the second state, and the fastener in the second state is moved to the processing portion and fitted to the mounting portion from the front to hold the collar portion. The blades 63 are pulled out to restore both winglets by the elastic force to return to the first state, and then the first wingpiece is pressed from the surface to be locked to the second wingpiece. It is configured to be converted into a state and firmly attached to the attachment part.

title: Solid-state image-pickup element
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve the coefficient of light utilization as well as to contrive increase in photosensitivity by a method wherein a protective film of low refractive index is provided on the non-photosensitive part located between light-receiving sections, and a protective film having the refractive index higher than said low refractive index protective film is provided thereon. CONSTITUTION:A protective film 6 of low refractive index having a spherical cross section is formed on a light shielding material 4 as a non-photosensitive part. Besides, a protective film of high refractive index, having a trapezoidally formed part corresponding to the photodiode 2 to be used as a photosensitive section and also having a concavity corresponding to a light shielding material 4, is formed on a film 5. According to this constitution, among incident lights L, the incident light L which is made incident on the projected flat part of a film 7 is transmitted rectilinearly through said film 7 and the film 5, and made incident on a diode 2. On the other hand, as the incident light of large incident angle to be made incident on the concaved part of the film 7 coresponding to the light-shielding material 4 has a high refractive index at the concaved part, said incident light is transmitted through the film 7, and concentrated on the film 6 located on the light-shielding material 4. Among the above-mentioned lights, the light L having large incident angle is reflected on the side of the diode 2 at the interface of the film 5 and the film 6.

Among the above-mentioned lights, the light L having large incident angle is reflected on the side of the diode 2 at the interface of the film 5 and the film 6.

title: Wireless charging device and its coil switching method, relevant apparatus
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of wireless charging device and its coil switching method, charging station and intelligent garage, described device includes phase detecting module and at least two wireless chargings transmitting coil/wireless charging receiving coil, and wireless charging transmitting coil/wireless charging receiving coil be arranged in parallel according to default spacing；The charging station and intelligent garage include above-mentioned wireless charging device.Compared with prior art, wireless charging device and its coil switching method, charging station and intelligent garage that the present invention is provided, when can ensure that the position of wireless charging receiving coil/wireless charging transmitting coil corresponding with wireless charging transmitting coil/wireless charging receiving coil changes, the spacing of the corresponding wireless charging receiving coil/wireless charging transmitting coil of wireless charging transmitting coil/wireless charging receiving coil can reach the wireless charging distance of setting, can carry out electric energy transmission according to maximum power transfer efficiency.

title: Toner remaining amount notification method
abstract: Before a standard toner remaining amount warning is issued, a warning is issued by recognizing that a user has come.   Information from a toner remaining amount detection sensor and a paper discharge unit sensor is processed by a printer control unit, and the result is sent to a main controller unit. Based on the threshold value “b” and the standard threshold value “a” input by the user from the display unit and the operation unit 50 having various keys, the main controller unit 10 is normal if the remaining toner amount “X” is larger than the threshold value “b”. When the toner remaining amount “X” is smaller than the threshold value “b” and larger than the threshold value “a”, a warning is issued in response to the detection of the paper discharge unit sensor 40, and the remaining toner amount “X” is the threshold value. If it is smaller than “a”, a warning is issued as usual. The warning is displayed on the operation unit 50 and / or sounded from the speaker unit 60.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: The compression processing method and device of multi-dimensional nmr log data
abstract: The present invention provides a kind of compression processing method and device of multi-dimensional nmr log data, wherein this method includes：Obtain multi-dimensional nmr well logging echo string data and multi-dimensional nmr well logging nuclear matrix；Primary compression processing is carried out to echo string data using window-averaging method, primary compression processing is carried out to nuclear matrix using window-averaging method；One-dimensional discrete cosine transform is carried out to the echo string data after primary compression, obtains the first discrete cosine transform coefficient, and obtain the first low-frequency data；Two-dimension discrete cosine transform is carried out to the nuclear matrix after primary compression, obtains the second discrete cosine transform coefficient, and obtain the second low-frequency data；One-dimensional discrete cosine inverse transformation is carried out to the first low-frequency data, and 2-D discrete cosine inverse transformation is carried out to the second low-frequency data, obtains compressed multi-dimensional nmr log data.The compression method compression ratio is high, and reduces the calculation amount of nuclear magnetic resonance log data inversion process, improves inversion speed.

title: Method of relieving analgesia and reducing inflamation using a cannabinoid delivery topical liniment
abstract: A method of relieving analgesia and reducing inflammation using a cannabinoid delivery topical liniment composition containing from about 97.5% to about 99.5% by weight a 70% monohydric alcohol solution, and from about 0.5% to about 2.5% by weight of a synergistic cannabinoid mixture extracted from the female plant  Cannabis sativa  L, including in combination: 9-Tetrahydrocannabinol (delta-9-THC), 9-THC Propyl Analogue (THC-V), Cannabidiol (CBD), Cannabidiol Propyl Analogue (CBD-V), Cannabinol (CBN), Cannabichromene (CBC), Cannabichromene Propyl Analogue (CBC-V), Cannabigerol (CBG), terpenoids, and flavonoids. The liniment is applied topically, preferably by spraying, and the constituents of the mixture are absorbed through the skin and interact with cannabinoid receptors in the body and tissues of a human patient to produce therapeutic analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects without undesirable psychotropic side effects.

title: Network cable wiring frame
abstract: The utility model discloses a network cable wiring frame, which is used for wiring network cables inside an electric power cabinet. The network cable wiring frame comprises a wiring plate and a fixing plate connected on the wiring plate. A plurality of wire through holes for network cables to pass through are arranged on the wiring plate. The network cable wiring frame can be conveniently arranged inside the electric power cabinet. Network cables inside the electric power cabinet can be arranged in order through the wire through holes. The possibilities for workers to mistakenly touch the network cables when working in the electric power cabinet can be reduced. Communication of electric power equipment can be prevented from being affected. The safe running of an electric power system is guaranteed. Meanwhile, the maintenance on the network cables by the workers can be facilitated.

title: Game machine
abstract: To provide a gaming machine having a new game form by providing a sorting device in a temporary storage means and providing the sorting device with a new function.   SOLUTION: In a temporary storage means 55 provided in a game area 15 of a game board 14, a ball entrance 61 into which a game ball enters, a plurality of falling ball openings 62a to 62e, and a rolling area 63 in which the game ball rolls. , A distribution device 60 that distributes game balls, and a discharge port 64 that discharges the game balls that have passed through the falling ball openings 62a to 62e to the game area 15 are provided, and a lottery means is provided below the discharge port 64 by passing the game balls. A special passing area 44 for executing a big hit lottery is provided, and the falling ball outlets 62a to 62e include normal-fluctuating falling ball outlets 62b and 62c that are used as a trigger for displaying a change in the normal symbol. The ball dropping holes 62a to 62e are distributed to the ball dropping holes 62a to 62e, and the ball dropping holes 62a to 62e and the discharge port 64 are configured to be visible from the front of the game board 14.   [Selection] Figure 3

title: Styrene resin composition modified by rubber
abstract: A styrene resin composition modified by rubber comprising a continuous matrix phase of styrene copolymer (A) and 5 to 45 wt.% relative to the resin composition of rubber particles dispersed in the continuous matrix phase, where the styrene copolymer is obtained by polymerizing 90 to 50 wt.% of styrene monomer, 10 to 50 wt.% of acrylonitrile monomer and 0 to 40 wt.% of other copolymerizable monomer, and the rubber particles comprises: (1) emulsified rubber particle (B) having weight average diameter of 0.05 to 0.8 (muon)m, and (2) bulk (or solution) rubber particles (C) having weight average diameter of 0.1 to 10 (muon)m, the average thickness of the hard styrene copolymer obtained by grafting emulsified rubber particle (B) and polymerizing grafted polymerizable monomer being 30 to 160A, and the average thickness of the hard styrene copolymer obtained by grafting bulk (solution) rubber particle (C) and polymerizing grafted polymerizable monomer being 90 to 300A.

title: Search system and search method
abstract: An object of the present invention is to perform an efficient search while protecting the privacy of an object to be searched and parties concerned with the object.   A communication tag is attached to a shoe or the like of a target person, and a transmission / reception device such as a home controller transmits a tag ID received from the communication tag to a management device. If the received tag ID is designated as a search target, the management device 40 transmits a search instruction request to the transmission / reception device 50. The transmission / reception device 50 that has received the search instruction request transmits a search instruction to the nearby search terminal 30 and requests the searcher P3 carrying the search terminal 30 to search for the target person P1. A communication tag is attached to a shoe or the like of a target person, and a transmission / reception device such as a home controller transmits a tag ID received from the communication tag to a management device. If the received tag ID is designated as a search target, the management device 40 transmits a search instruction request to the transmission / reception device 50. The transmission / reception device 50 that has received the search instruction request transmits a search instruction to the nearby search terminal 30 and requests the searcher P3 carrying the search terminal 30 to search for the target person P1. title: Jig for measuring hardness of camshaft
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent an indenter or the like from being damaged and to improve measuring accuracy by attaching/detaching a plate for supporting a camshaft to/from a base and forming a supporting groove passing the center line of the indenter on the upper surface of the plate.  
     CONSTITUTION: The measuring jig 11 is constituted of the base 12 and the plate 13. A center line P extended in the longitudinal direction of the supporting groove 14 formed on the upper face of the plate 13 passes the center line Q of the indenter 4. The camshaft 16 is set up on V blocks 15 supported by the supporting groove 14 so as to be optionally slid. Thereby, the axial center S of the shaft 16 can be automatically set up on the center line Q of the indenter 4 by setting up the shaft 16 on the blocks 15, the alignment of the shaft 16 can be automatically executed and the hardness of the shaft 16 can be always accurately measured. In the case of detaching the jig 11 from a Vickers hardness measuring instrument 1 a volt 13a is removed, the plate 13 is detached from the base 12 and then the base 12 is detached from a supporting spindle 2 to complete the detachment of the jig 11. Since the base 12 and the plate 13 can be individually detached, the jig 11 can easily be detached and the generation of a trouble such as the destruction of the indenter 4 or the like can be prevented. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1991,JPO&Japio

title: Gain adjusting device and method
abstract: A gain adjusting device and method is described, the device including a first processing module, a gain adjusting module, a second processing module and a gain control module. The first processing module uses a first voltage for a working voltage and receives an input signal to generate a first signal. The gain adjusting module receives the first signal and adjusts a gain of the first signal to output a third signal according to a gain control signal. The second processing module uses a second voltage for a working voltage and receives the third signal to generate a second signal. The gain control module generates the gain control signal according to the first voltage and second voltage.

title: Processing method for myotonin
abstract: A disclosed processing method for myotonin comprises the following steps: step 1, drying, sending rough myotonin to a drying apparatus for drying; step 2, husking, sending dried rough myotonin into a husking machine for husking; step 3, removing impurities, sending husked myotonin to a specific-gravity selecting machine to remove the impurities; step 4, removing seed coats, sending unpolished myotonin into a myotonin bran machine to remove the deep yellow coat on the surface; step 5, performing stone-removing, impurity-removing and specific gravity selection, sending myotonin subjected to seed coat removing to a stone-removing specific gravity machine for removing impurities, removing stones and grading to obtain coarse myotonin; step 6, polishing, performing polishing on coarse myotonin; step 7, washing with water, putting polished myotonin into a water washing machine to clean; step 8, dewatering, dewatering cleaned myotonin with a dewatering apparatus; step 9, selecting color, performing color selecting on myotonin by a color sorting machine; and step 10, packaging, finally performing packaging and warehousing on myotonin subjected to color selecting. The processing method helps to solve the problems that the drying manner of conventional technologies for processing myotonin is high in energy consumption and not beneficial to environment protection, the quality of myotonin is easy to influence, the standard of the sulfur content in myotonin is easy to exceed, the processing cost on myotonin is relatively high, and the like.

title: A kind of automatic rinser
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of automatic rinser, including, body, set that there are two cleaning chambers on body；The side of each cleaning chamber is each formed with feeding station；Each cleaning intracavitary is each formed with washing station；Conveying mechanism, for conveying workpieces to feeding station；Described two feeding stations are intervally arranged along the conveying direction of conveying mechanism；Testing agency, each feeding station are equipped with the testing agency, and testing agency is used to detect workpiece and sends detection signal；Material fetching mechanism, material fetching mechanism are set between two cleaning chambers, and are moved back and forth between can cleaning chamber at two；The material fetching mechanism is used for according to the workpiece motion s for detecting signal gripping feeding station to washing station.The automatic rinser of the utility model can will carry out washing and cleaning operation in workpiece transfer to washing station, the degree of automation is higher.

title: Switching regulator circuit and semiconductor integrated circuit device mounting the same
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] Switching that can reduce the self-consumption current of the error amplifier and further reduce the shoot-through current to significantly improve the efficiency when the load current is small and to improve the noise margin against the power supply noise. (EN) Provided is a regulator circuit, and a semiconductor integrated circuit device in which the regulator circuit is mounted and low power consumption and noise resistance are realized. A step-up chopper type switching regulator circuit comprising a charging / discharging coil 1, an error amplifier 3 for comparison with a reference voltage 2, an oscillator circuit 4 for generating various signals, and a D-type flip-flop for output latch. The error amplifier 3 is composed of a circuit 5, a gate circuit 6 by a logical product operation, a MOS transistor 7 for switching control, and the like.   Of the error amplifier 3 is shifted to the low current mode except the fixed mode by the operation control signal from the oscillation circuit 4.   Is output as a digital signal by the D-type flip-flop circuit 5, and the subsequent circuit elements are operated.

title: Vehicle-borne following vehicle distance sensing and prompting system
abstract: The invention provides a vehicle-borne following vehicle distance sensing and prompting system. A mobile communication network and a system server are used to establish the binding relation and communication operation between a vehicle-borne following vehicle distance prompting signal display terminal and the mobile client used by a user, the setting of the control parameter of the vehicle-borne following vehicle distance prompting signal display terminal installed and arranged in a vehicle is carried out through the mobile client, when the vehicle-borne following vehicle distance prompting signal display terminal uses the distance sensing ability of the terminal senses and judges that a following vehicle distance is smaller than a preset limit, a vehicle distance maintaining prompting signal display operation is executed, the condition of a too close following vehicle distance can be sensed and prompted, thus the relief of the 'road rage' mood of drivers between driving vehicles is helped, the traffic hidden risk brought by a too close distance between vehicles is reduced, the system is convenient to use by a user, the functions are diversified, the technology realization difficulty is small, the application effect is remarkable, and the system has a good market application prospect.

title: High-power high-frequency transformer
abstract: The utility model relates to a high-powered and high-frequency transformer comprising transformer iron cores, windings, and an insulating layer. The iron cores are U-shaped or cylindrical ferrites. The primary winding is a high-frequency winding wire and 1-6 secondary windings are common enameled wire windings. The insulating layer is the combination of a paper insulating layer and a reinforcing insulating layer. The reinforcing insulating layer which is a film made of polyimide or polyester is added in the paper insulating layer, thereby the insulation strength of the transformer is ensured effectively. The utility model has the advantages of simple structure, easy processing and production, high work efficiency and less waste due to the adoption of ferrite iron cores, small size and high power due to the high-frequency windings and the reinforcing insulating layers, therefore the utility model is applicable to the front terminals of various rectifier circuits.

title: Dewatered sludge soil enrichment method
abstract: A method of pasteurizing dewatered sludge into valuable soil conditioners is provided. Unpasteurized dewatered sludge is introduced into a first end of an dryer and maintained under vacuum pressure. Moisture is removed using a condenser and knock out tank while a boiler provides heat to treat the dewatered sludge. An auger moves the sludge to an outlet.

abstract: In a connection arrangement (1) comprising a frame profile (2) of a window or a door, with a rebate surface (5) on its upper side, which has a rollover (6) on one longitudinal side and a glass bead groove (7) on the opposite longitudinal side, a post profile forming a hollow profile (3) and a post connector consisting of an upper part (8) and a lower part (9) by means of which frame profile (2) and post profile (3) can be connected, wherein the lower part (9) on the rebate surface (5 ) on the frame profile (2), the upper part (8) placed on the lower part (9), connected to this, inserted into the hollow profile of the post profile (3) and secured thereto, is on the lower part (9) on the rollover (6) side facing a projecting mold formation (10) attached, which is positively received in an undercut (6) formed undercut (11), and on the opposite side of the lower partly (9), a catch formation (12) engaging in the glass bead groove (7) is provided, which is spring-deflected elastically perpendicular to the longitudinal axis of the glass bead groove (7) during latching insertion into the glass bead groove (7) and connected to the lower part (9).

title: Stored-program control machine
abstract: A microprocessor with a hierarchical PLA control arrangement with a relatively rich function capability is achieved by applying the same subsection of the bit field of the output register of a control PLA to the inputs of each of the controlled PLA's. In addition, routing bits in the output register of the control PLA are applied to gate the clocks at the inputs of the controlled PLA's. Significant increase in PLA function, relative to PLA size, is achieved.

title: Automatic vegetable plant transplanter
abstract:
Automatic transplanting machine for vegetable plants which performs
the functions of removing the plant from the tray (2), dibbling the ground, placing
the plant in the ground and subsequent earthing up of the soil, for which by
means of a series of pusher rods (4) the root ball is removed from the receptacle
being held by the pincers (7) of the conveyor, being subsequently placed on the
horizontal conveyor belt (9), where the plants by means of a moving comb (8) are
positioned between some vertical rubber belts (10) which support the root ball
and by means of some convergent discs (12) position the plant in an upright
position. The machine has on its front part a furrowing coulter and on the
rear part some earthing-up discs (11).

title: Multistage gearing
abstract:
PURPOSE: To make chain transfer into smoothness by forming the plural number of teeth of a large diametral gear into easily-detachable-form ones, installing a receiving part and an escaping for a detachable chain in the rear in a direction of rotation of these teeth, and setting a distance between tooth-gap centers of both large and small diametral gears in a chain transfer part, to the integer of a chain pitch.  
     CONSTITUTION: Both first and second teeth 11, 12 adjacent to a large diametral gear 1 are formed into easily-detachable-form ones, while a chain receiving part 14 receiving an outer plate 32 in the rear of an inner plate 31 of a detachable chain and a chain escaping part 15 both are installed in an inner surface 1b at the side of a small diametral gear of a gear body 1a and also in an intermediate position between the tooth 12 at the rear in a direction of rotation and another tooth 13 adjacent to the rear. Both large and small diametral gears 1, 2 are combined together so as to cause a distance between a tooth-gap center 01 between these teeth 12 and 13 and an optional tooth-gap center 02 of the small diametral gear 2 to become the integral double of a chain pitch. With this constitution, chain transfer is smoothable. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1990,JPO&Japio

title: Heatproof cover for protecting tap hole opener of blast furnace
abstract:
The present invention relates to a separate heat dissipation cover for protecting the openings penetrating through the outlet of the furnace, to replace only the central portion where the partial erosion occurs and to reduce the local erosion by the scattering products.
   
   
    To this end, the present invention is attached to the end of the opening machine, the opening plate formed at least one bolt hole for the bolt insertion and the opening bar through-hole for penetrating the opening bar of the opening; It is formed to a volume to cover the local erosion by the impact of the fly ash, and forms a through-hole bar for penetrating the through-opening bar of the opening machine, the outer shell is made of a steel shell and the interior is castable construction, the tip of the fly-on collision Formed inclined surface for relief and at least one bolt is installed at the rear end, consisting of a separate local heat dissipation cover that is bolted to or separated from the opening plate, to reduce the refractory and reduce the workload, scattered from the exit It can alleviate collisions with the product and extend its lifespan.

title: Coke pusher slot type collecting device for two ends coke
abstract: The utility model relates to a discharging device of coke furnace, in particular to  a coke pusher in horizontal carbonization chamber, which is characterized in that the head-tail coke channel type collection device comprises a driving mechanism, a maintaining platform, a coke bucket, a baffle, a moving tank and a safety balustrade. The maintaining platform is connected with the moving tank, the driving mechanism is arranged on the maintaining platform, and the driving mechanism drives the moving tank to advance or back off, the baffle is arranged at the top of the moving tank, the coke bucket is connected with the bottom of the moving tank, when the moving tank advances, it can reach the position of collecting heat and tail coke through the safety balustrade, when the moving tank backs off, the head and tail coke is pushed into the coke bucket due to the scraping action of the baffle, the coke outlet is below the coke bucket, the head and tail coke is collected into the collector by opening the coke outlet periodically by the hydraulic pressure system. The utility model is allowed to install safety balustrade in the side of the coke furnace so as to meet the safety regulations and production requirements, the utility model is also a proper solution to solve the treatment of the head and tail coke and reduce the chances of equipment wear.

title: Low temperature thermal insulation shaft sleeve
abstract: The utility model discloses a low temperature thermal insulation shaft sleeve which comprises a cylindrical steel sleeve with a central through hole, wherein a thermal insulation sleeve with good thermal insulation performance is tightly embedded in the central through hole in interference fit manner, a flange stage body is arranged on the outer wall at one end of the thermal insulation sleeve, and a concave cavity bearing stage locked with the flange stage body in positioning manner is arranged on the inner wall of the central through hole of the steel sleeve. The lower temperature thermal insulation shaft sleeve can meet the supporting requirements of various vertical or horizontal low temperature thermal insulation containers in all specifications, has simple structure, high safety, greater impact resistance, static load resistant strength and good thermal insulation performance and also can reduce the waste of gas and prolong the low temperature storage time of the container.

title: Optimal compositions and methods thereof for treating hcv infections
abstract: The present invention relates to optimal compositions useful in treating HCV infections in humans. These compositions comprise alpha-interferon or a derivative thereof and an IMPDH inhibitor, wherein the IMPDH inhibitor is present in an amount such that a ration of Cavg/Cmin is between 1 to 10, wherein: Cavg is average plasma concentration produced by said IMPDH inhibitor in said human; and Cmin is estimated through concentration produced by said IMPDH inhibitor in said human. The present invention also relates to methods of producing and using the optimal compositions to treat HCV infections in humans.

title: Method and mobile phone for simulating an optical distance sensor using a gravity sensor
abstract: The present invention provides a method and a mobile phone for simulating an optical distance sensor using a gravity sensor. The method comprises: when the phone is answered, obtaining data according to the gravity sensor so as to determine whether the phone is in a vertical state or a horizontal state; if it is in the vertical state, determining that the user uses an answering manner of putting the phone beside his/her ear by a hand, then controlling by the CPU to turn off the touch screen backlight and locking the touch screen so as to avoid false operations; and if it is in the horizontal state, determining that the user does not use the answering manner of putting the phone beside his/her ear by a hand, then not turning off the touch screen backlight and not locking the touch screen so that the user can conveniently use other functions of the phone while answering the phone. The method for simulating an optical distance sensor using a gravity sensor provided in the present invention uses the gravity sensor which is necessary to each smart phone to simulate the function of an optical distance sensor. The method may realize the function of the optical distance sensor without arranging one, which can reduce the production cost of mobile phones, reduces the volume thereof and further saves resources.

title: Gathering and processing method of cone needed by cunninghamia lanceolata somatic embryo inducement
abstract: The invention discloses a collecting and treating method of cone required for fir somatic embryo induction. Immature cones are collected 107-149 days after a fir is hybridized and pollinated; the cones collected are wrapped with wet cloth, sealed and put into a refrigerator with a controlled temperature of 4-8 DEG C for refrigerating for 0-50 days; the refrigerated cones are taken out, and seeds are taken out of the cones and sterilized; the sterilized seeds are dried and peeled, and the obtained seeds are suitable for being inoculated onto a culture medium that is inducted by fir somatic embryo for forming ESM. Therefore, high inductivity is acquired, and the method can be combined with other technologies, and can fully meet the requirement of industrialization production of the fir somatic embryo, thereby realizing the industrialization production of the fir.

title: Driving semiconductor integrated circuit
abstract: PURPOSE:To decrease the timing skew between multephase clocks, by integrating the driving circuits within a semiconductor chip and adding a timing generating means which can be adjusted. CONSTITUTION:AND circuits 1i, 2i and 4i (i=0-n) plus a selecting circuit 3i are put in a set, and n sets of these circuits are connected in parallel to form a driving circuit group. The timing relation is prescribed to each other for the output signals of a set of driving circuits. Then a chip clock 34i, a chip address 33i, a chip clock 32i and a chip read/write controlling signal 34i are delivered in that order. An optional set is designated in the driving circuit group by connecting an OR circuit 5 to an external delaying circuit 6. And the timing is produced by connecting set/reset FF circuits 1-4 to the circuit 6. Then a chip selection signal 10i, an address signal 201 and a read/write controlling signal 202 are applied, and the circuits 5 and 6 plus the FF1-4 are combined successively. Then the AND is secured for the circuits 1i-4i to deliver the signals 31i-34i. Thus a memory device 10ij(j=0-m) is driven.

abstract: The invention discloses a kind of equipment, adopt the present invention can shorten reaction time of esterification, and realize the continuous production esters product atomizing raw materials continuous production ester class.Realize purpose by following technical scheme: comprise batching fore-warmer tank (1), usefulness feed pump (2), esterifying kettle (3), spraying gun (4), water cooler (5), atomizing esterification column (8), pressure regulator valve (7); Described batching fore-warmer tank (1) links to each other by pipeline with spraying gun (4), the nozzle of spraying gun (4) stretches into the top in the atomizing esterification column (8), the bottom of atomizing esterification column (8) is connected with esterifying kettle (3) top by pipeline, the top of atomizing esterification column (8) is connected with water cooler (5) by pipeline, pressure regulator valve (7) is installed in the top of water cooler (5), establishes feed pump (2) between batching fore-warmer tank (1) and spraying gun (4).

title: LED light source with radiator
abstract: The utility model discloses an LED light source, in particular to an LED light source with a heat radiator. The LED light source comprises a lamp cap, a lamp, an installation base, and a heat radiator. The heat radiator consists of a base plate and a plurality of heat radiation blades which are formed integrally on the surface of the heat radiation base plate. The blades of the heat radiator are vertical to the base plate; certain intervals between blades are arranged; and the heat radiator is connected with a transparent outer cover with grids. In order to improve deficiencies of poor heat radiation effects and poor appearance of the existing LED lamps, the lamp provided with the structure has the advantages of strong working stability, long product service life, little light decaying of the light source and high photoelectric efficiency; the radiator is integrally formed by die-casting, has beautiful appearance and is light and durable; and the heat radiator is connected with the transparent outer cover with grids, thus leading the light source to have a larger light-emitting angle and causing the light to be soft.

title: Methods and systems for the autonomous parking of vehicles
abstract: Systems and methods for controlling the parking operation of an autonomous vehicle are provided. A method for parking an autonomous vehicle also includes receiving sensor data indicating an exterior environment of the autonomous vehicle. The received sensor data is processed to determine parking lot characterization. Additional sensor data indicative of an occupant position within the autonomous vehicle is received. A processor determines a parking position within a parking lot based on the parking lot characterization and the position of the occupant. The processor generates control signals to actuate one or more actuator devices that maneuver the autonomous vehicle into the parking space at the park position.

title: Hand apparatus
abstract: A part gripping hand apparatus according to the present invention includes a body, drive motors disposed at three points on the body which are not on a straight line, arms integrally mounted on the drive shafts of the drive motors and extending from the center of rotation along radial directions with a predetermined length, finger members mounted on the ends of the arms, and a control unit for positioning and controlling the finger members at any position with the circumference of each of the finger members as the operation range.

title: Electric motor based holding control systems and methods.
abstract: A holding system includes a force control module configured to generate a force signal to cause a holding device to perform at least one of a hold stroke and a release stroke. The hold stroke includes transitioning a gripping element of the holding device to a first position to grip an object. The release stroke includes transitioning the gripping element to a second position to release the object. The holding device is non-backdrivable. A stall detection module is configured to (i) monitor a sensor signal received from a sensor of an electric motor assembly of the holding device and (ii) detect a first stall condition of an electric motor based on the sensor signal. A shut off module is configured to shut off current to the electric motor based on the detection of the first stall condition during or at an end of the release stroke.

title: Multi-stage hotword detection
abstract: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on a computer storage medium, for multi-stage hotword detection are disclosed. In one aspect, a method includes the actions of receiving, by a second stage hotword detector of a multi-stage hotword detection system that includes at least a first stage hotword detector and the second stage hotword detector, audio data that corresponds to an initial portion of an utterance. The actions further include determining a likelihood that the initial portion of the utterance includes a hotword. The actions further include determining that the likelihood that the initial portion of the utterance includes the hotword satisfies a threshold. The actions further include, in response to determining that the likelihood satisfies the threshold, transmitting a request for the first stage hotword detector to cease providing additional audio data that corresponds to one or more subsequent portions of the utterance.

title: Processing of speech signal
abstract: A computer-implemented method for processing a speech signal, includes: identifying speech segments in an input speech signal; calculating an upper variance and a lower variance, the upper variance being a variance of upper spectra larger than a criteria among speech spectra corresponding to frames in the speech segments, the lower variance being a variance of lower spectra smaller than a criteria among the speech spectra corresponding to the frames in the speech segments; determining whether the input speech signal is a special input speech signal using a difference between the upper variance and the lower variance; and performing speech recognition of the input speech signal which has been determined to be the special input speech signal, using a special acoustic model for the special input speech signal.

title: Operation control method for cogeneration system
abstract: PURPOSE: To perform operation by an hourly optimum operation system to which an operation is selected by a method wherein an operation state at a certain point of time is determined through measurement, a power load at a current point of time is estimated, and an operation system coinciding with an objective function which is minimized by the energy simulation result of each operation system based on the estimated load is selected. CONSTITUTION: The operation state of a system is measured at S1 . At the next point of time, a power load after an elapse of approximately 10 minutes- 1 hour is estimated from measurements and a past operation experience at S2 . Based on the estimated load, energy simulation of the operation system of each of a power, a heat load follow-up load operation, a plurality of sets rated operation, one set partial load operation (a load of 75%, 50%, and 25%), and a prime mover stop operation is performed at S5 , S7 , S9 , S11 , S13 , and S15 , and respective energy consumption amounts are calculated at S6 , S8 , S10 , S12 , S14 , and S16 . After energy consumption amounts are calculated, in the case of an objective function, to be minimized, for example, an energy consumption itself, a most energy saving operation system is selected at S17 .

title: Method of predicting driving range of all-electric passenger vehicles
abstract: The invention discloses a method of predicting driving range of all-electric passenger vehicles. The method includes the steps of S1, modeling by means of fuzzy clustering; S2, modeling for energy consumption of an all-electric passenger vehicle by a fuzzy time sequence analysis algorithm; S3, building a fuzzy time sequence model; S4, dividing energy consumption into super-high, high, normal, low and super-low states for description; S5, subjecting an influencing factor predicted value, deducted through a fuzzy time sequence, to weight similarity matching so as to obtain an energy consumption match value, and operating the energy consumption match value and a section energy consumption weight to finally obtain a weighted energy consumption predicted value; S6, subtracting the weighted energy consumption predicted value by an energy consumption residue value to obtain an energy consumption residue predicted value, and converting the energy consumption residue predicted value into a driving range; S7, ending the algorithm until the section energy consumption residue predicted value is smaller than or equal to a lowest energy consumption required value. By accurately predicting the driving range, the problem that predicting the driving range for all-electric passenger vehicles at preset can be solved.
