title: Integrated vacuum microelectronic tactile sensor array
abstract: An integrated vacuum microelectronic tactile sensor array for measuring multi-point micropressure and microshift and sensing the image of object is composed of the 2D array of vacuum microelectronic tactile sensing cells and the signal processing circuit. Said tactile sensing cell consists of microfield emission silicon cathode cone-tip array, vacuum microcavity, insulating layer and elastic anode membrane. Said signal processing circuit is composed of horizontal and vertical scan circuits, MOS switch transistor array and signal output. Its advantages are high temp stability, sensitivity, resolution and response speed, low power, radiation resistance and small size.

title: Method for leveling embedded parts at bottom of vertical column in sintered ring cooling machine
abstract: The invention discloses a method for leveling embedded parts at the bottom of a vertical column in a sintered ring cooling machine. The method comprises the steps as follows: 1) when constructing a concrete base (6) of the vertical column in the ring cooling machine, embedding four round steel (4) into the concrete base (6); 2) after the concrete base (6) reaches the strength requirement, screwing nuts (3) into the positions of the threads (1) of the embedded round steel (4), correspondingly forming openings in an embedded part steel plate (2) according to the positions of the embedded round steel (4), mounting the embedded parts onto the embedded round steel (4) after the openings are formed, and pressing the bottom surface of the embedded part steel plate (2) onto the nuts (3); 3) adjusting the elevation and the flatness of the embedded part steel plate (2) through adjusting the lifting positions of the nuts (3); and 4) grouting. The method has the advantages of convenience in embedded part leveling process, and high precision and working efficiency, and avoids gaps which are easily formed between the embedded part steel plate and the concrete base.

title: Enhanced syndication
abstract: A variety of tools and techniques are disclosed for managing, viewing, publishing, searching, clustering, and otherwise manipulating data streams. Data streams such as RSS data feeds may be searched, aggregated, and filtered into a processed feed. The processed feed, along with rules used to process the feed may be shared in a number of ways. A data feed management system may provide an integrated user interface through which a user may manage feeds, including searching for new feeds, managing and filtering current feeds, modifying a user profile, and sharing feeds and feed configuration data with other users. A server may provide a complementary search engine to locate new feeds and to store and/or index items or posts in known feeds. Together, these technologies may provide a richly-functioned feed management system and greater ease of use for individuals in managing large numbers of feeds and large amounts of data in feeds. Additional functional layers may provide for authentication, security, and privacy, metadata creation and management, and social networking features. Using the management tools and additional functionality, a syndicated data stream system may provide a platform for a wide array of useful consumer and business applications.

title: Lidar sensor
abstract: A lidar sensor 5 for vehicles is proposed, the light exit surface 15 of which can be driven in rotation. In addition, the lidar sensor 5 comprises a cleaning device 31 and a wiper device 29, so that by actuating the cleaning device 31 and rotating the light exit surface 15, the light exit surface 15 is cleaned without the laser pulses emitted by the lidar sensor 5 being disturbed by a wiper .

title: Visualization framework based on document representation learning
abstract: A visualization framework based on document representation learning is described herein. The framework may first convert a free text document into word vectors using learning word embeddings. Document representations may then be determined in a fixed-dimensional semantic representation space by passing the word vectors through a trained machine learning model, wherein more related documents lie closer than less related documents in the representation space. A clustering algorithm may be applied to the document representations for a given patient to generate clusters. The framework then generates a visualization based on these clusters.

title: Welded gaps localization method and device
abstract: This application involves a kind of welded gaps localization method and devices.In this method, after gap candidate regions are filtered out to original image, gap candidate regions are based on specific CNN networks, carry out feature extraction, export the position of the endpoint in gap.The framework of wherein used CNN networks includes successively from output is input to：1 the first convolutional layer, N number of second convolutional layer, N number of pond layer, 1 splicing layer, 1 residual error network layer, 1 full articulamentum and 1 output layer；First convolutional layer includes three M1*M1 convolution kernels；Next layer of the output result of the two of which convolution kernel of first convolutional layer is the second convolutional layer, and next layer of another convolution kernel is the residual error network layer；Second convolutional layer includes 1 M2*M2 convolution kernel and 1 M3*M3 convolution kernel；Pond layer includes two M4*M4 ponds windows；Splice splicing result of the output result of layer for the output result of two pond windows of pond layer.

title: A kind of GPU Memory Optimize Method and system towards deep learning training mission
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of GPU Memory Optimize Methods and system towards deep learning training mission.This method comprises: (1) designs basic swapping in and out operation；(2) static data acquisition is carried out first before training starts；(3) swapping in and out strategy is not taken, first trains several epoches, carries out Dynamic Data Acquiring during this period；(4) performance model of swapping in and out strategy is established, and clear GPU calculating, memory, the restricting relation between PCIe communication three；(5) optimal policy is determined according to performance model；(6) remaining epoch continues training until terminating using optimal minibatch size and its matched swapping in and out strategy.The present invention solves the problems, such as that ultra-deep neural network model can not train or can train minibatch size is too small to cause training effectiveness low, can make full use of GPU resource and promotes ultra-deep neural network model training effectiveness.

title: Radar signal processor
abstract: (57) [Abstract] An object of the present invention is to provide a radar signal processing device capable of easily detecting and tracking even a target having a small reflected signal amplitude. According to the radar signal processing apparatus of the present invention, a signal that is clearly discriminated as noise from each pixel amplitude information of a scan screen is invalidated, and then stored for each scan screen. Then, an arbitrary pixel of the stored initial scan screen is specified as a virtual target, and a virtual motion path starting from the virtual target pixel is assumed across continuous scan screens including the initial scan screen, and on that system road. The validity / invalidity of the pixel located at is determined. If it is an effective pixel, it is determined and extracted as the same virtual target, and the target probability that the virtual target is a true target is calculated from the number and the number of observed scan screens. If this target probability is greater than or equal to the specified value, the virtual target is determined to be a true target.

title: Neural network accelerator with parameters resident on the chip
abstract: One embodiment of the accelerator comprises a compute unit, a first memory bank for accommodating input activations, and a second memory bank for accommodating parameters used when performing computations. The two memory banks are configured to store a sufficient amount of neural network parameters on the compute unit to allow delays below a certain level with throughput above a certain level. The compute unit contains at least one cell that contains at least one product-sum (“MAC”) operator that receives parameters from the second memory bank and performs the computation. The computing unit further includes a first traversal unit that feeds a control signal to the first memory bank to give input activation to the data bus accessible by the MAC operator. The compute unit performs calculations related to at least one element of the data array, and one or more computations are performed by the MAC operator.

title: Selecting a training strategy for training a machine learning model
abstract: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on computer storage media, for training a machine learning model. One of the methods includes performing experiments to select a training strategy for use in training the model on a particular data set. The selected training strategy includes a binning strategy for binning the raw feature vectors before the raw feature vectors are provided to the predictive model.

title: Lane keeping assistance system
abstract: A lane keeping assistance system including position means for determining a first position of the vehicle in a network with a first accuracy; first interface for providing trajectory of the vehicle in the network; second interface for providing position data of right boundary objects and position data of left boundary objects, and radar signatures of these boundary objects; radar system to scan right and left lateral environments of the vehicle and determine distances to objects on a right of the vehicle and radar signatures thereof, and distances to objects on a left of the vehicle and radar signatures thereof; evaluation unit to perform identification of acquired objects based on the first position, the provided data, and the determined data, and to determine a second position of the vehicle with a second position accuracy; and control device to control the vehicle taking into consideration the target trajectory and the second position.

title: Optimal test suite reduction as a network maximum flow
abstract: A novel approach to test-suite reduction based on network maximum flows. Given a test suite T and a set of test requirements R, the method identifies a minimal set of test cases which maintains the coverage of test requirements. The approach encodes the problem with a bipartite directed graph and computes a minimum cardinality subset of T that covers R as a search among maximum flows, using the classical Ford-Fulkerson algorithm in combination with efficient constraint programming techniques. Test results have shown that the method outperforms the Integer Linear Programming (ILP) approach by 15-3000 times, in terms of the time needed to find the solution. At the same time, the method obtains the same reduction rate as ILP, because both approaches compute optimal solutions. When compared to the simple greedy approach, the method takes on average 30% more time and produces from 5% to 15% smaller test suites.

title: Method, device, equipment and storage medium for generating and executing action molecules
abstract: The application provides a method, a device, equipment and a storage medium for generating and executing action molecules, wherein the method for generating the action molecules comprises the following steps: obtaining an action molecule template of an action molecule to be generated; wherein the action molecule template comprises a name identifier, and the name identifier corresponds to a third action unit sequence; the type of the action unit comprises at least one of an action atom and an action molecule; generating the action molecules to be generated according to the action molecule template and the parameter values of the action molecules to be generated; wherein the parameter value is used to determine a third sequence of action units to be performed from the third sequence of action units. Compared with the prior art, the action molecule template and the parameter value of the action molecule are called to generate the action molecule, so that the robot is controlled to move to complete corresponding actions, the difficulty of a user in controlling the robot to execute tasks can be reduced, and the interaction capacity and the flexibility of the robot are improved.

title: Statistical pattern generation for information extraction
abstract: An apparatus for extracting selected information from a set of symbols includes said alignment module is configured to retrieve test patterns from a symbol input, and to attempt alignment of test patterns with a canonical pattern. Successful alignment between a particular test pattern and said canonical pattern indicates of existence of information of interest in a particular candidate pattern. Upon detection of a successful alignment, the alignment module passes information concerning the test pattern to a user. Additionally, in response to detecting an unsuccessful attempt to align the first test pattern and the canonical pattern, said alignment module passes, to said user, information concerning the first test pattern.

title: System and method to hardcode interger linear optimization problems on physical implementations of the ising model
abstract: Systems and methods for allowing analog Ising machines to be able to run Integer Linear Programming (ILP) problems, i.e. a compilation method for setting the state of the physical memory units, flexible to be adapted to each specific device. The method describes how variables and numeric parameters which specify the problem can be hard-coded (embedded and physically represented) in the hardware circuitry of the device in a deterministic way, with a predetermined bound on the number of required physical spins to be used in the Ising device.

title: Scalable multilingual named-entity recognition
abstract: Software on a website serves a user of an online content aggregation service a first article that the user views. The software extracts named entities from the first article using a named-entity recognizer. The named-entity recognizer uses a sequence of word embeddings as inputs to a conditional random field (CRF) tool to assign labels to each of the word embeddings. Each of the word embeddings is associated with a word in the first article and is trained using an entire topical article from a corpus of topical articles as a context for the word. The software then creates rankings for articles ingested by the content aggregation service based at least in part on the named entities and serves the user a second article using the rankings.

title: Speech recognition system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a speech recognition system in which the robustness of an HMM error model (HEM) is improved by performing an adaptation process to a noise environment.   In a speech recognition system, each of a plurality of previously learned hidden Markov models is a filter model expressing an observation vector by a hidden Markov model having a mixed Gaussian distribution having a plurality of Gaussian distributions as a symbol output probability. And a residual model that expresses the difference between the modeled output of the filter model and the observation vector by a Gaussian mixture distribution having a plurality of Gaussian distributions. The average vector of a plurality of Gaussian distributions of the residual model is adapted according to the external environment.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 3

title: Method for fabricating vacuum-sealed conduction filament for crown glass dedicated to electric light source
abstract: The manufacturing method includes following steps: selecting bar material of nickel iron alloy and oxygen free copper tube, and obtaining their fresh surfaces after cleaning repeatedly; embedding bar material of nickel iron alloy to oxygen free copper tube so as to obtain composite blank; after composition of cold fixing walls, procedure of complete heating fixing walls is carried out under reducing atmosphere; after diffusion anneal in high temperature, sealing conducting wire threads are obtained through procedures: surface cleaning, cold drawing, high temperature annealing again, cold drawing again, oxidizing and boriding treatment, and compound wound. Contact surfaces between nickel iron alloy and oxygen free copper tube in the produced conducting wire threads are penetrated to each other so as to be combined hard. Advantages are: permanent air-tightness capsulation after packaging crown glass and conducting wire threads, fine and reliable electrical properties.

title: Method and apparatus for creating digital signature defined by biometric identification
abstract: The invention relates to a method for generating a digital signature linked to a biometric identifier. The method comprises the steps of receiving a document to be signed and storing it as an electronic document (44); receiving a biometric identifier from at least one signatory and storing it as biometric data (42); generating a digest (41) of the electronic document (44); associating the digest (41) with the biometric data (42) in order to obtain a first set of information and encrypting said first set of information in order to generate a biometric signature (43) and associating the biometric signature (43) with the electronic document (44) in order to obtain a second set of information and signing said second set of information by means of a cryptographic method-based digital signature (46) in order to generate a signed electronic document package (47). The invention also relates to an ap paratus and a system for generating a digital signature linked to a biometric identifier.

title: Analyzing semantic places and related data from a plurality of location data reports
abstract: Computer-implemented methods and systems of determining semantic place data include receiving a plurality of location data reports from a plurality of mobile devices, partitioning them into localized segments, and estimating a geographic region bucket for each segment. For clustering canopies of localized segments identified as satisfying a potential geographic overlap characterization, an overlap score is calculated that correlates the overlap among actual geographic regions covered by movement of the mobile devices generating the localized segments in that given clustering canopy. A data structure that provides a hierarchical clustering configuration of the localized segments in each geographic region bucket is generated from the determined overlap scores. Additional semantic data for nodes in the data structure can also be provided.

title: Efficient determination of optimized learning settings of neural networks
abstract: Optimized learning settings of neural networks are efficiently determined by an apparatus including a processor and one or more computer readable mediums collectively including instructions that, when executed by the processor, cause the processor to train a first neural network with a learning setting; extract tentative weight data from the first neural network with the learning setting; calculate an evaluation value of the first neural network with the learning setting; and generate a predictive model for predicting an evaluation value of a second neural network with a new setting based on tentative weight data of the second neural network by using a relationship between the tentative weight data of the first neural network and the evaluation value of the first neural network.

title: Method for the secure training of dynamic models
abstract: The invention relates to a computer-implemented method for the safe and active training of a computer-aided model for modeling a time sequence of a physical system using a Gaussian process, having the steps of specifying a safety threshold α, initializing by executing a safe initial curve as an input value on the system, creating an initial regression model and an initial safety model, repeatedly carrying out the steps of updating the regression model, updating the safety model, determining a new curve segment, executing the determined new curve segment on the physical system and measuring an output value, entering a new output value into the regression model and the safety model, until N cycles have been executed, and outputting the regression model and the safety model.

title: Recommendation for an individual based on a mood of the individual
abstract: Generating recommendations for an individual based on a mood of the individual. Receiving information corresponding to one or more activities associated with an individual over a period of time. The received information corresponding to the one or more activities associated with the individual is processed to detect a mood of the individual. A recommendation is generated for the individual based on the detected mood of the individual and a future event associated with the individual. The future event has an occurrence at a later time instance.

title: Transforming steering wheel and steering apparatus including the same and driving method thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to a transforming steering wheel, a steering apparatus including the same, and a driving method thereof and, more specifically, provides a steering wheel transformable in accordance with a driving mode, a steering apparatus including the same, and a driving method thereof. In an autonomous driving mode, a larger and efficient space can be provided to a passenger getting in a driver′s seat, and in a driver driving mode, the transformable steering wheel enables a driver to directly and conveniently steer a vehicle. Moreover, convenience is provided for the driver to easily recognize vehicle driving information.

title: Synthetic formation evaluation logs based on drilling vibrations
abstract: A method and apparatus for predicting a formation parameter at a drill bit drilling a formation is disclosed. A vibration measurement is obtained at each of a plurality of depths in the borehole. A formation parameter is obtained proximate each of the plurality of depths in the borehole. A relationship is determined between the obtained vibration measurements and the measured formation parameters at the plurality of depths. A vibration measurement at a new drill bit location is obtained and the formation parameter at the new drill bit location is predicted from the vibration measurement and the determined relation. Formation type can be determined at the new drill bit location from the new vibration measurement and the determined relationship.

title: Data storage apparatus with an A/D converter having a reference voltage control based upon a signal before and after discrimination
abstract: A data storage apparatus and method that allows the signal processing circuit to be in integrated form, so that the magnetic storage system may be reduced in size with increased performance is described. The apparatus includes a reproducing head that reproduces information stored on a recording medium, a preamplifier that amplifies the output of the reproducing head, and a low-pass filter. An A/D converter converts the output for the low-pass filter to a digital signal and has a reference voltage. A discriminator is coupled to an output of the A/D converter and discriminates the digital signal. A circuit, coupled to the discriminator, provides negative feedback control of the reference voltage of the A/D converter as a function of the digital signal before the discrimination by the discriminator and the digital signal that has been discriminated by the discriminator.

title: Method for sea clutter suppression and moving target detection based on FRFT (Fractional Fourier Transform) domain non-coherent accumulation
abstract: The present invention discloses a method for sea clutter suppression and moving target detection based on FRFT domain non-coherent accumulation, and belongs to the field of radar signal processing and detecting technology. A conventional time domain clutter map cancellation technology is difficult to detect a target moving at a low speed, and under the background of strong sea clutter, signal-to-clutter ratio in a target unit is quite low and sea clutter peak is easy to cause false alarm, thus detecting performance is decreased. Therefore, a moving target detecting technology based on the FRFT provided in the invention respectively employs an FRFT domain mean value accumulation method and an FRFT domain simple pole feedback accumulation method to finish the non-coherent accumulation via iterative smoothing of FRFT domain delay data, and the technology carries out cancellation of FRFT domain signal and accumulated data to suppress the sea clutter and improve the signal-to-clutter ratio, with the amplitude of output signal being taken as detection statistics. A detector provided in the invention has an ability to detect a weakly moving target, with no need of the prior information of an optimum transformation angle, and can estimate the motion parameter of the target, being suitable for the condition of low signal-to-clutter ratio, being simple in realization and having popularization and application values.

title: Method and system for predictive modeling of signage location and pricing
abstract: A method, computer system, and computer program product that aggregates sample data regarding a plurality of factors associated with income and geographic location; performs iterative analysis on the sample data using machine learning to construct a predictive model; populates, using the predictive model, a database with predicted values of encountered income for a selected set of predefined signage locations; converts the predicted values of encountered income in the database into percentages of observed values of encountered income for signage locations within the selected set over a specified time period to create indices of encountered income; and rank orders the signage locations within the selected set according to their indices of encountered income.

title: A kind of efficient implementation method of the Jacobi conversion based on FPGA
abstract: The invention belongs to signal processing technology field, a kind of efficient implementation method of the Jacobi conversion based on FPGA is particularly related to.The method of the present invention mainly includes：Determine the relation in matrix A between element before and after Jacobi conversion；Build the Cordic modules for Jacobi conversion；The Cordic modules built using step calculate the element of matrix A after Jacobi is converted   Beneficial effects of the present invention are：Compared with conventional method, the method of the present invention uses a kind of efficient Serial Control Scheme algorithm, only the calculating that Jacobi is converted is realized using a Cordic module, and while hardware resource consumption is reduced, time required for completing calculating is as parallel algorithm, i.e. such numerical procedure algorithm has the advantages that calculating speed is fast, save hardware resource consumption, has application value very high in Practical Project.

title: Lane determination device and navigation system
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a lane determination device quickly and accurately determining the lane in which its own vehicle is traveling on a road with a plurality of lanes each way.SOLUTION: The lane determination device 100 detects a reference position 402 or 502 set in advance at an entrance to the road B with a plurality of lanes each way, and determines in which lane out of traveling lanes B1-B3 of the road B with a plurality of lanes each way the own vehicle 400 travels, based on an entry distance L from the reference position 402 or 502 and map information.

title: A kind of overhead transmission line ageing state comprehensive multi-index ranking method
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of overhead transmission line ageing state comprehensive multi-index ranking methods, the multinomial evaluation index of overhead transmission line is chosen first, multinomial evaluation index testing inspection is carried out to the sample of sampling overhead transmission line, according to delivery test data and actual tests data variation rate.Evaluation index is established according to obtained test data change rate and assigns divider then, and divider is assigned according to obtained evaluation index and then assigns score score to each single item evaluation index of overhead transmission line sample.Calculate the weighted value of every evaluation index.It is finally calculated according to the score score of the weighted value of every evaluation index and every evaluation index, obtains the degree of aging TOP SCORES of overhead transmission line sample.The multi objective of ageing state can be carried out comprehensive consideration and multinomial evaluation index is carried out quantitatively evaluating by the present processes, accurately the ageing state of overhead transmission line is assessed, the situation of unilateral, lag or inaccuracy by online detection instrument and the existing evaluation of micro-judgment is reduced and occurs.

title: Lane recognizing method for use with driver assistance system of vehicle i.e. motor vehicle, involves reconstructing characteristics of lane markings and/or lanes from position of supporting points in coordinate system
abstract: The invention relates to a method for tracking detection using a driver assistance system 1 of a vehicle 33 comprising a sensor system for lane detection 2. The lane detection sensor system 2 detects lane markings of a traffic lane 31 in a region of a traffic space located in front of the vehicle 33. The lane markings are assigned to nodes with at least coordinates of a first coordinate system x <SUB> Fzg </ SUB>, y <SUB> Fzg </ SUB>. The coordinates of the nodes are converted into a second coordinate system x <SUB> world </ SUB>, y <SUB> world </ SUB>. The course of lane markings and / or lanes 31 is reconstructed from the position of the interpolation points in the second coordinate system. The invention further relates to a driver assistance system.

title: Multi-pipeline phase information sharing method based on data buffer storage
abstract: The present invention relates to a multi-pipeline phase information sharing method based on data buffering storage, which belongs to the technical field of video and image coding and decoding in signal processing. The method is used in a decoder structure which is divided into N pipeline phases, and comprises a shared memorizer with macro block information of the previous row and a data buffering region or a data buffering region with left macro block information, wherein the shared memorizer is used to memorize the macro block information of the previous row. The data buffering region is used to buffer the macro block information of the previous row to be used by each pipeline phase. The present invention can cause the multi-pipeline phases to share the macro block information of the previous row or the left macro block information stored in the shared memorizer, without need of separately storing and maintaining the macro block information of the previous row or the left macro block information in each pipeline phase, so that the resource of the memorizer on the chip of the decoder is effectively saved. Simultaneously, a pointer needs to be installed every time when a pipeline phase is added, so control is simple.

title: Pattern recognition processor
abstract: A pattern recognition processor is a hardware device which realizes pattern recognition algorithm, and comprises a linear transformation processor and a support vector machine processor. The two processor systems are connected on an information processing channel to form a system core of the pattern recognition processor. The linear transformation processor realizes space transformation of input vectors, the space transformation usually occurs from a higher dimensional space to a lower dimensional space, which simplifies complexity of input objects; the support vector machine processor realizes decision operation and determines prediction or differentiated types of the input objects. A model of the linear transformation processor and a model of the support vector machine processor are acquired by a machine learning method. Models for different applications have different parameters but the same structure, and can be accepted by the pattern recognition processor. The linear transformation processor and the support vector machine processor have the same components, and respectively consist of a model parameter module, an arithmetic component, a control component, an input vector register, an output register and an input/output communication component. Each processor respectively defines five commands, namely, a model loading command, an input vector loading command, an operation start command, a state detection command and a result recovery command. The pattern recognition processor is coupled with an external system by the input/output communication component; and the external system realizes function call for the pattern recognition processor by a command system of the pattern recognition processor.

title: Sound volume controller
abstract:
PURPOSE: To improve the S/N using the dynamic range widely to a low level signal by providing a gain adjusting device to a pre-stage of an A/D converter and using the gain adjusting device for sound volume adjustment.  
     CONSTITUTION: After an inputted analog sound signal is subjected to level adjustment by the gain adjusting device 4, the result is inputted to the A/D converter 1, where the signal to converted into a digital signal. The digital signal is subjected to control of proper sound quality by a digital signal processing section 2. A microcomputer 3 applies gain control of the gain adjusting device 4 and control for sound quality or the like in the digital signal processing section 2 through a bus line. Thus, the input adjustment of the A/D converter 1 is applied by the gain adjusting device 4 and sound control is applied also so as to improve the dynamic range by increasing the sound volume. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1986,JPO&Japio

title: Method for clustering and packaging generated APP
abstract: The invention discloses a method for clustering and packaging a generated APP. The method comprises the following steps that the generated APP makes a packaging request to a load balancing server; the load balancing server distributes the packaging request to one of multiple manufacturing platform servers; the manufacturing platform server obtaining a packaging request task transmits the packaging request to one of multiple packaging servers connected with the manufacturing platform server; when the manufacturing platform server obtaining the packaging request task receives a platform updating request, platform updating operation is performed, the load balancing server does not transmit packaging requests received subsequently to the manufacturing platform server any more, and the packaging server connected with the manufacturing platform server suspends execution of other operations or is connected to any other manufacturing platform servers after processing the packaging service in the execution process. According to the method, it can be guaranteed that packaging is not interrupted in the upgrading process of the manufacturing platform servers, and high-concurrency and high-efficiency manufacture under the condition of a large user number can be supported.

title: FPGA-based signal processing module of satellite-borne ADS-B receiver
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of aviation monitoring, and particularly discloses a signal processing module of a FPGA-based satellite-borne ADS-B receiver, which comprises a clock unit, an ADC (analog-to-digital converter) unit, a digital down-conversion unit, a coarse synchronization unit and a single signal decoding unit, wherein the single signal decoding unit is used for outputting data after coarse synchronization after compensation, fine synchronization and demodulation processing as output signals of the signal processing module. In the invention, the signal sampling frequency is reduced for multiple times in the processing process, the number of signal points is reduced, and the FPGA resource consumption and the processing delay are reduced; the syndrome combination matching method adopted during error correction reduces the processing delay; the sensitivity can reach the requirement of directly configuring the use in the satellite-based ADS-B load.

title: Enhancing cybersecurity and operational monitoring with alert confidence assignments
abstract: Tools and techniques are described to automate triage of security and operational alerts. Insight instances extracted from raw event data associated with an alert are aggregated, vectorized, and assigned confidence scores through classification based on machine learning. Confidence scoring enables heavily loaded administrators and controls to focus attention and resources where they are most likely to protect or improve the functionality of a monitored system. Feature vectors receive a broad base in the underlying instance values through aggregation, even when the number of instance values is unknown prior to receipt of the event data. Visibility into the confidence scoring process may be provided, to allow tuning or inform further training of a classifier model. Performance metrics are defined, and production level performance may be achieved.

title: Unified deep bayesian network generation for system modeling
abstract: Examples of techniques for unified deep Bayesian network generation for system modeling are described herein. An aspect includes determining a unified failure modes and effect analysis (FMEA) model based on a plurality of FMEA models of an overall system, wherein the overall system comprises a plurality of domains, and wherein the plurality of FMEA models each corresponds to a respective domain of the plurality of domains. Another aspect includes determining a cross-domain Bayesian network based on the unified FMEA model. Another aspect includes determining a unified deep Bayesian network based on the cross-domain Bayesian network, wherein one or more relationships in the unified deep Bayesian network comprise neural networks. Another aspect includes training the neural networks in the unified deep Bayesian network using training data corresponding to the overall system. Yet another aspect includes determining an overall system model based on the trained unified deep Bayesian network.

An aspect includes determining a unified failure modes and effect analysis (FMEA) model based on a plurality of FMEA models of an overall system, wherein the overall system comprises a plurality of domains, and wherein the plurality of FMEA models each corresponds to a respective domain of the plurality of domains. Another aspect includes determining a cross-domain Bayesian network based on the unified FMEA model. Another aspect includes determining a unified deep Bayesian network based on the cross-domain Bayesian network, wherein one or more relationships in the unified deep Bayesian network comprise neural networks. Another aspect includes training the neural networks in the unified deep Bayesian network using training data corresponding to the overall system. Yet another aspect includes determining an overall system model based on the trained unified deep Bayesian network.

title: A kind of vehicle-mounted voice control method and its system based on deep learning
abstract: The present invention discloses a kind of vehicle-mounted voice control method and its system based on deep learning, includes the following steps, signal acquisition module, acquires the real-time audio signal of user in vehicle；Signal increasing circuit provides audio input signal after receiving the electric signal aggregation amplification that multiple signal acquisition modules generate；Speech recognition module, the audio input signal are input to the speech recognition module and generate recognition result；Control module receives the execution that matched described instruction signal is instructed.Beneficial effects of the present invention: the speech recognition based on deep learning improves the precision of speech recognition to a certain extent, can better understand language expressed by user in vehicle and be intended to, thus the action of more accurate speech-controlled vehicle.

abstract: The present disclosure relates to determining visual equipment for a patient or user. In an embodiment, a machine learning-based approach considers the face of a user in context of a database of labeled faces and visual equipment, each of the labeled images reflected the aesthetic value of a proposed visual equipment relative to the face of the patient or user.

title: Cruise control for motor vehicles
abstract: The invention relates to a cruise control for motor vehicles for the control of the speed to a predetermined target speed. The cruise control comprises a monitoring unit (Ü) which monitors an activation of the brake pedal during active cruise control and introduces an interruption or modification of the cruise control when brake activation is recognized. In addition, the monitoring unit is designed to monitor and evaluate signals of a foot well sensory monitoring mechanism (S) with respect to braking readiness, and to introduce an interruption or modification of the active cruise control when braking readiness is recognized.

title: Vehicle control device
abstract: In a case where existence of a branch point in front of a vehicle is not recognized based on position information of the vehicle and map information, when a lane width variation is greater than or equal to a first threshold value larger than a second threshold value, a determination that the branch point exists is made by a determination unit of a vehicle control device. On the other hand, in a case where existence of the branch point is recognized based on the position information of the vehicle and the map information, when the lane width variation is greater than or equal to the second threshold value smaller than the first threshold value, a determination that the branch point exists is made by the determination unit.

title: Asynchronous start bit deciding method
abstract:
PURPOSE: To surely decide a start bit, by performing sampling to confirm the start bit at a position before the center of one bit length.  
     CONSTITUTION: A start bit detection circuit 1 detects the change of the start bit B, and outputs a trailing edge detection signal P1. A counter 2 counts a clock signal Pc at every inputting of the signal P1. The counter 2 counts 16 signals Pc in one bit length. A count detection circuit 3, when the number of counting of the counter 2 arriving at the set number of counting ≤ 8, generates a sampling signal P2. In the titled method, the signal P2 is outputted at the time of counting the counter from 6 to 7. A signal state detection circuit 4 detects the signal state of a transmission data at the time of inputting the signal P2, and outputs a start bit detection signal P3 when it is a state 0, and outputs a re-detection indicating signal P4 when it is a state 1, to the circuit 1. The circuit 1 restarts a detection operation based on the signal. A counter 5 outputs a sampling signal P5 to a data fetching circuit 6 setting the signal P3 as reference. In such constitution, it is possible to surely perform the confirmation of a second start bit within one bit length of the the start bit, even when noise E is generated at the position shown in figure, and the detection of the start bit is performed again.

title: Method and system for clustering products in an electronic commerce environment
abstract: A method and system for clustering products by determining a similarity of the products based on their characteristics. Based on the similarity of the products, an n-space mapping can be generated. The n-space mapping can then be used to reflect how products are clustered together based on similarity propagation.

title: A kind of self-supplying water flowerpot of controllable water supply
abstract: A kind of self-supplying water flowerpot of controllable water supply is made of pot body (A), the flower soil pallet (B) containing the pit that draws water (D) and water level management valve (C).Pot body (A) is made of water storage box (3) outer basin (1) and interior basin (2) and cultivates chamber (E), tank top has water injection hole (4), inner wall lower has confession water hole (8), and interior basin bottom has overflow pipe (9).The lower part interior pelvic cavity (E) is separated out the cell cavity that draws water (F) by flower soil pallet (B).Being close to the inside and outside wall of water tank below pallet (B) respectively has the embedding hole of a controlling valve (6), is externally embedded to hole (6) and is in controlling valve manipulation chamber (7).The height at the basin internal control mouth of a river (20) can be changed to control the cell cavity that draws water (F) and the pit that draws water (D) interior height of water level in the rotating handle (18) that controlling valve (C) is manipulated outside basin, just water tank (3) are controlled to the automatic water-supply amount for cultivating chamber (E), realize the design object to supply water on demand.

title: Vehicle control device
abstract: The present invention provides a technique capable of properly performing deceleration support control to prevent a collision with a closest preceding vehicle even in a situation with the difficulty of distinguishing a lane on which the preceding vehicle exists. If a sign of the relative speed of a closest non-stationary object is negative, a user lane determination width is expanded in the lane width direction. According to the expanded user lane determination width, both sides of a preceding vehicle on an adjacent lane and a preceding vehicle on the user lane are recognized to exist on the user lane. Therefore, if the risk of colliding with the preceding vehicle on the adjacent lane is determined to be high, deceleration support control to prevent a collision with the preceding vehicle is performed. In addition, if the risk of colliding with the preceding vehicle on the user lane is determined to be high, deceleration support control to prevent a collision with the preceding vehicle is performed.

title: Slope system failure probability calculation method based on Support Vector Machine (SVM)
abstract: The utility model provides a slope system failure probability calculation method based on support vector machine SVM, put forward intensity reduction method SRM and assess the stability coefficient, and adopt initial sampling point strategy and initiative learning function, the initiative learning support vector machine ASVM proxy model of original extreme state function L SF has been constructed, combine Monte Carlo simulation MCS and ASVM proxy model to assess the failure probability of slope system, can quantify the influence of random variable and relevant parameter to the slope stability, greatly reduced initial sample point, effectively improved computational efficiency, can automatic identification soil property side slope in the glide plane of arbitrary shape, it is more convenient when carrying out the reliability analysis to the stratiform side slope that has complicated geometry.

title: System and method for configuration of an ensemble solver
abstract: In a system for enabling configuration of an ensemble of several solvers, such that the ensemble can efficiently solve a constraint problem, for each one of several candidate configurations, an array of scores is computed. The array corresponds to a statistical parameter related to a problem solution, and the computation is based on, at least in part, a set of features associated with the problem. One candidate configuration is assigned to a solver, and based on the array of scores associated with that candidate configuration the same or a different candidate configuration is assigned to a another solver. A system for dynamically reconfiguring an ensemble of solvers obtains runtime data from several solvers, and a new configuration is determined by applying a machine learning and/or heuristic analysis procedure to the runtime data. The configuration of a solver may be updated according to the new configuration while that solver is running.

title: On-device feature and performance testing and adjustment
abstract: Apparatuses, methods, systems, and program products are presented for on-device feature and performance testing and adjustment. An apparatus includes an audit module configured to determine one or more capabilities of a mobile device. An apparatus includes a feature module configured to determine one or more potential features that are executable on a mobile device. An apparatus includes an adjustment module configured to selectively configure, during runtime, one or more potential features that are executable on a mobile device in response to execution of the one or more potential features being affected by one or more capabilities of the mobile device.

title: Balanced conductance compensation-type global linear symmetry method for obtaining power flow of direct-current power grid
abstract: A balanced conductance compensation-type global linear symmetry method for obtaining a power flow of a direct-current power grid comprises: first, according to a node load parameter and a node power supply parameter in a direct-current power grid, establishing a balanced conductance compensation-type global linear relation about a node injection power and a node translation voltage (101); then, establishing a balanced conductance compensation-type global linear symmetric model of a power flow in the direct-current power grid according to the balanced conductance compensation-type global linear relation and a power balance reference node number (102); by using an M-P inverse matrix, establishing a balanced conductance compensation-type global linear symmetric matrix relation about a whole-network node translation voltage and a non-power balanced node injection power according to the balanced conductance compensation-type global linear symmetric model (103); and finally, computing a voltage value of each node and a transmission power value of each branch in the direct-current power grid according to the balanced conductance compensation-type global linear symmetric matrix relation (104). The method has a small computing amount, does not have the convergence problem, and has a high precision when the operating state of the direct-current power grid changes in a great range.

title: Autonomous robot using data captured from a living subject
abstract: Using various embodiments, an autonomous robot using data captured from a living subject are disclosed. In one embodiment, an autonomous robot is described comprising a robotic skeleton designed similar to that of a human skeleton to simulate similar movements as performed by living subjects. The movements of the robotic skeleton are resultant due to control signals received by effectors present near or on the robotic skeleton. The robot can be configured to receive sensor data transmitted from a sensor apparatus that periodically gathers the sensor data from a living subject. The robot can then process the sensor data to transmit control signals to the effectors to simulate the actions performed by the living subject and perform a predictive analysis to learn the capability of generating spontaneous and adaptive actions, resulting in an autonomous robot that can adapt to its surroundings.

title: Modular robot system
abstract: Disclosed is a modular robot system capable of assembling a plurality of cube-shaped unit robots. According to an aspect of the present invention, there is provided a modular robot system including N cube units, wherein N is an integer of 2 or more, wherein each of the N cube unit robots is a cube-shaped housing within the housing. A step motor to be installed and a control unit installed in the housing and controlling the step motor, wherein one surface of the housing is provided with a mounting groove into which a rotating body rotated by a rotation shaft of the step motor is mounted, A connection groove having the same shape is formed on the other side of the housing, and a modular robot system that can connect with another cube-shaped unit robot through a connection body mounted on the connection groove is provided.

title: A kind of landform flat zone soil heavy metal cadmium spatial distribution Forecasting Methodology
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of landform flat zone soil heavy metal cadmium spatial distribution Forecasting Methodology, the Nonlinear Mapping relation between each influence factor and soil cadmium content is set up using radial basis function neural network model first；For the change of soil cadmium content correlation between each factor in the different range of distance analysis region, analyzed area is divided into inner and outer two regions of distance analysis region 10km scopes, the neural network model of the Nonlinear Mapping relation between soil cadmium content and soil cadmium content influence factor that discloses is built respectively；The residual error of Neural Network model predictive result is simulated with HASM models again, obtains predicting the outcome analysis area soil cadmium content spatial distribution.The present invention improves 5.56% 17.65% to the precision that check post predicts the outcome；Meanwhile, the method can preferably reflect the detailed information of analysis area soil cadmium content spatial variations.

abstract: The Mixed gas identification method based on convolutional neural networks that the invention discloses a kind of, class picture matrix will be mapped as according in the way of different by the original gas time series data that sensor obtains, it recycles convolutional neural networks MODEL C NN to carry out feature extraction and classification, is achieved in the classification to mixed gas.The present invention is based on the classification advantages of convolutional neural networks, the classification field of the mixed gas applied to timing, extract matrix data more fully feature using the convolution operation of CNN, not only speed is fast, additionally it is possible to obtain higher accuracy rate.The present invention, which is able to solve existing mixed gas sorting technique, not can be used directly the VGG of image classification due to the limitation of input data, and the CNN such as Google-Net network is aiming at the problem that mixed gas data are classified.

title: Joint optimization of ensembles in deep learning
abstract: Computer-implemented, machine-learning systems and methods relate to a combination of neural networks. The systems and methods train the respective member networks both (i) to be diverse and yet (ii) according to a common, overall objective. Each member network is trained or retrained jointly with all the other member networks, including member networks that may not have been present in the ensemble when a member is first trained.

title: Road shape estimator
abstract: A road shape estimation device (100, 100A) comprising: a vehicle-mounted object detection section (104) for transmitting an electromagnetic wave (W1) in a predetermined detection area, and receiving a reflected wave (W2) of the electromagnetic wave (W1), thereby object information (B) including a relative speed between the vehicle and an object (A) present in the detection area; a detection section (106, 107) for detecting roll rate information (E) or steering angle information (F) of the vehicle; a first road shape estimation section (101) for estimating a first road shape (D1) of a road on which the vehicle is traveling, based on the roll rate information (E) or the steering angle information (F); a hard object determining section (105) for determining, based on the item information (B), whether the object (A) is a static object and generating a plurality of solid object information (C); a second road shape estimation section (102) for estimating a second road shape (D2) of the road on which the vehicle is traveling, based on the plurality of solid article information (C), when it is determined that the article (A) is a static article; a third road shape estimation section (103, 103A) for calculating a third road shape (D3, D3a, D3b) of a road on which the vehicle is expected to travel; and a vehicle speed detecting section (108) for detecting the speed of the vehicle as vehicle speed information (V); wherein the third road shape estimation section (103, 103A) calculates the third road shape (D3, D3a, D3b) using the first road shape (D1) and the second road shape (D2) based on a comparison between distance information and a predetermined distance (500) is changed from the third road shape estimation section (103A) in accordance with the vehicle speed information (V).

title: A kind of integrity risk probability distribution method of support satellite navigation reliability of positioning demand
abstract: The invention belongs to satellite navigation positioning technical field, and in particular to a kind of integrity risk probability distribution method of support satellite navigation reliability of positioning demand.The present invention includes：The navigation performance according to needed for different navigation application, for different application in many integrity risk sources set up fault tree models；According to bayesian criterion, the optimal distributing scheme of integrity risk probability is completed；Single order Markov switching model is set up to each main integrity risk source, and the primary condition and prior information of the model are set according to specific integrity risk source, finally determine P md ；Statistical property that specific integrity risk source in for different application influences on position error etc..The present invention proposes the modified sigma expansion algorithms based on coefficient of expansion collection, and determines the coefficient of expansion, and the perfect error for needed for integrity monitoring is assumed to provide theoretical foundation.Final design goes out the level of protection of minimum, to meet the requirement that satellite navigation positions high reliability.

title: Driver assistance system and device for brake control
abstract: The invention relates to a driver assistance system for assisting the driver of a motor vehicle during dangerous or emergency braking situations, wherein the speed of the vehicle (vref), actuation of an accelerator pedal by the driver, actuation of a brake pedal by the driver and the current driving situation, at least the distance and relative speed in relation to a preceding vehicle, are detected and wherein intervention in the braking control occurs based on all detected values. The invention also relates to a device for controlling or regulating a motor vehicle braking system.

The invention also relates to a device for controlling or regulating a motor vehicle braking system.

title: Lane departure warning system
abstract: Devices, methods and systems are disclosed herein to describe a lane departure warning system that warns the driver that the vehicle is about to leave a current lane and enter an adjacent lane. The driver of the vehicle is identified, and a corresponding profile is accessed. The driver's pupils may be measured and compared to pupil size data stored in the accessed profile. If the difference in pupil size exceeds a certain threshold, then the vehicle may activate a passive lane departure detector that warns the driver each time the vehicle is getting too close to an adjacent lane, thus alerting the driver that the vehicle may be unintentionally drifting into the next lane. Additional driving tendencies, such as steering angles and braking force, may also be used to determine whether the driver may benefit from lane departure assistance and whether to trigger activation of the lane departure detector.

title: Systems and Methods for Providing Personalized Online Content
abstract: A system for providing online-content includes a data-acquisition module configured to collect user data and product data. A configuration module determines a predictive algorithm and one or more filters based on received marketer-input. A recommendation engine generates recommendations in real-time, in response to a request. The recommendations are generated via the predictive algorithm, which generates scalar scores from the dot-product multiplication of at least one user-vector and at least one product-vector, the scalar score indicating the likelihood that a desired interaction will occur between the user and the product. The algorithm also determines a hierarchical list based on the scalar scores, and applies the filters to the hierarchical list so as to identify the recommendations. The recommendation engine can generate recommendations in two ways: recommend items based on users, and recommend users based on items. A rendering module generates a recommendation block based on the recommendations, which is transmitted to a user-computer in response to the request.

title: Method and system for autonomous spacecraft control
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To autonomously implement multiple mission purposes by providing an autonomous control system, generating the sequence of low order commands selected from multiple high-order commands, and sending it to a flight control device. SOLUTION: An autonomous control system 203 is mounted in a spacecraft 201, a mission plan 221 is generated from one or more mission targets 219 by a mission control device 217 in it, and the operation procedure of the spacecraft 201 for implementing the targets 219 is scheduled. The mission control device 217 generates the sequence of loworder commands according to the mission plan 22 1 and transmits it to a flight control device 207 at a proper time to implement the target 219. The mission control device 21 7 monitors the data stream from the flight control device 207 and monitors the operation state of the spacecraft 201 by selectively using the data stream. The spacecraft 201 can autonomously implement the mission targets 29 via the minimum monitor and intervention from a ground support.

title: Robot control device
abstract: A technique is provided that allows a teacher to easily create a control program. A robot control device includes: a display control unit configured to display an input screen including an operation flow creation area for creating an operation flow of a work including a force control operation on a display device; and a control program for controlling the created operation flow. And a control execution unit that executes the control program to control the robot. The display control unit displays a screen that presents a countermeasure for realizing the preset predetermined operation when the operation of the robot is not the predetermined operation after the control program is executed by the control execution unit. Display on the device. [Selection diagram] FIG.

title: Apparatus and method for operating robots
abstract: A pendant is provided as a robot operating apparatus. The pendant includes an operation-input mode detecting unit that detects an operation-input mode of a touch operation inputted to a touch panel. In addition, in the pendant, an action setting unit sets an action direction and a number of actions of an inching action by a robot, based on an action mode associated with the operation-input mode with a predetermined amount of margin. Furthermore, an action command generating unit generates an action command to operate the robot such that the inching operation is performed in the action direction and by the number of actions set by the action setting unit.

title: Driver inputs allowing full speed range adaptive cruise control to release brake hold
abstract: A method for implementing adaptive cruise control for a vehicle includes the steps of stopping the vehicle, determining whether a driver of the vehicle has taken a deliberate action to move the vehicle, and moving the vehicle, on the condition that the driver has taken the deliberation action to move the vehicle.

title: Wall plate of prefabricated wall
abstract: The utility model discloses a wall plate of a pretreated wall. The wall plate of the prefabricated wall comprises a wall body and embedding grooves, wherein the embedding grooves are formed in the left side, the right side, the upper side and the lower side of the wall body respectively, and an infill panel is centrally arranged in the wall body. According to the wall plate of the prefabricated wall, a foamed plate is clamped in the middle of the wall plate, the foamed plate and the wall plate are integrated through pouring, the wall plate is made to maintain preset thickness and strength, and meanwhile the weight of the wall plate is reduced. The formed plate can also be replaced by a density board or a bamboo board according to local demand situations and local raw material convenience.

title: A kind of preparation method of lycopene microcapsule
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of preparation method of lycopene microcapsule, by the way that lycopene is dissolved in salad oil, and add compound emulsifying agent and obtain core, by the way that gelatin, maltodextrin, starch syrup, sodium alginate are mixed in a certain ratio to obtain wall material, high-pressure homogeneous and ultrasonic emulsification after core is mixed in proportion with wall material again, it is finally spray-dried to obtain lycopene microcapsule.For the present invention by the compound allotment to wall material and core, and the optimization of wall material and core mixing homogenizing process, obtained lycopene microcapsule has good water solubility and embedding rate, while good to light, heat, the stability of oxygen.

title: Piezoelectric film structures and sensors and display assemblies using same
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a piezoelectric film structure and a sensor, and a display assembly using the same. The piezoelectric film structure is transparent and comprises: a substrate; A lower optical layer disposed on or on the substrate; A lower conductive layer disposed on or in the lower optical layer; At least one piezoelectric layer disposed on or above the lower conductive layer; An upper conductive layer disposed on or in the at least one piezoelectric layer; And an upper optical layer disposed on or over the upper conductive layer. The sensor includes a piezoelectric film structure electrically connected to the signal processing system. The display assembly includes a sensor operably arranged relative to the display device. The piezo film structure and sensors may be configured to determine one or more touch-sensitive features associated with a touch event.

title: Automation tool development method for building computer fraud management applications
abstract: A method of fraud management follows several steps that each require the involvement and support of financial networks, secure servers, and proprietary databases. A selected variety of fraud classification algorithms are assembled together into a “jury” that includes neural networks, case based reasoning, decision trees, genetic algorithms, fuzzy logic, and rules and constraints. Operating parameters that matter specifically to each are extracted in parallel from the same records of historical transaction data, and that then is used to initialize a general payment fraud model. This is then converted into computer-program executable form for later execution on a third party computer system. These are further integrated by expert programmers and development system with smart agents and associated real-time profiling, recursive profiles, and long-term profiles. The trainable general payment fraud product is applied by a payments-processing client to screen real-time transactions and authorization requests for fraud.

title: A kind of sound fault recognition method based on mel energy spectrum and convolutional neural networks
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of sound fault recognition method based on mel energy spectrum and convolutional neural networks, the audio data of initial input is subjected to preemphasis first, it needs to carry out framing, windowing process to data later, then Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) is carried out to the audio signal after framing, adding window, after energy feature on extraction frequency domain, energy spectrum is passed through to the triangle filter group of one group of Mel scale, the energy of different frequency domains is corresponded to as Y-axis to each frame later, different frame converts data to Meier energy spectrogram as X-axis in time domain.Hereafter, it needs further to carry out framing to energy spectrogram, to adapt to the input of CNN (convolutional neural networks), each frame is a sample, output of the one-hot coding of the corresponding label of each sample as CNN network, CNN network model is trained, until network training error reaches minimum.In prediction, the probability value of each class label is exported, takes the maximum label of probability value as final differentiation result.

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR ASSISTING A VEHICLE DRIVER FOR A MANEUVER
abstract: Assistance method for a parking maneuver with automatic longitudinal and / or transverse guidance determining a path for automatically guiding the vehicle (1) by monitoring the environment. In the event of driver intervention on the steering if the automatic transverse guidance is in progress or if the accelerator pedal is commanded by the driver if the automatic longitudinal guidance is in progress or if the driver intervenes on the steering or of the accelerator pedal, during the automatic execution of the longitudinal guide and the transverse guide, the control of the vehicle (1) is transferred back to the driver only if the path resulting from the control of the steering or the accelerator pedal, does not translate into a risk to the environment.

title: Domain ranking for digital magazines
abstract: A digital magazine server displays content items from various sources to users of client devices. Each source of a content item is identified by a domain, and content items for different sources have different domain-level quality. To differentiate sources of content items, the domains identifying the sources are ranked based on domain scores of the domains generated by an aggregate of multiple trained domain classifiers. A domain score of a domain indicates a domain-level quality of content items provided by a source identified by the domain. Each of the trained domain classifiers (e.g., a naïve Bayes classifier, a random forest classifier, and a logistic regression classifier) generates a prediction of whether a domain is a spam domain based on the domain features and domains with known labels. Based on the domain scores of domains, the domain ranking module may adaptively select content items from the sources with corresponding domains scores.

title: Techniques for volumetric estimation
abstract: The present disclosure relates generally to the operation of autonomous machinery for performing various tasks at various industrial work sites, and more particularly to the volumetric estimation and dimensional estimation of a pile of material or other object, and the use of multiple sensors for the volumetric estimation and dimensional estimation of a pile of material or other object at such work sites. An application and a framework is disclosed for volumetric estimation and dimensional estimation of a pile of material or other object using at least one sensor, preferably a plurality of sensors, on an autonomous machine (e.g., robotic machines or autonomous vehicles) in various work-site environments applicable to various industries such as, construction, mining, manufacturing, warehousing, logistics, sorting, packaging, agriculture, etc.

title: Adaptive vehicle control system with integrated maneuver-based driving style recognition
abstract: A vehicle control system that classifies a driver's driving style based on characteristic maneuvers. The system includes a plurality of vehicle sensors that detect various vehicle parameters. A maneuver identification processor receives the sensor signals to identify a characteristic maneuver of the vehicle and provides a maneuver identifier signal of the maneuver. A style characterization processor receives the maneuver identifier signals, sensor signals from the vehicle sensors and the traffic and road condition signals, and classifies driving style based on the signals to classify the style of the driver driving the vehicle. The classification of the driver style can be provided for a level-1 combination that combines the classification results from different maneuver type classifiers for a single maneuver, a level-2 combination that combines the classification results from multiple maneuvers that are of the same type and a level-3 combination that combines the classification results from different types of characteristic maneuvers.

title: Time and frequency domain analysis of bytecode for malware detection
abstract: A method, computer program product and computer system are provided. A processor retrieves a target file for inspection of malware. A processor converts the target file to a time domain format. A processor determines one or more time-frequency domain features of the converted target file. A processor generates a malicious classification for the target file based on the one or more time-frequency domain features of the converted target file and one or more classification models.

title: Determining the driving of a vehicle on a driveway
abstract: A method is described for determining the driving of a first vehicle (10) on a first roadway (3), which is a driveway to a second roadway (1). The method comprises the steps of determining whether the first vehicle (10) is turning; determining whether an end (6) of a lane boundary (4, 5) of the lane (3) traveled by the first vehicle (10) is provided by a second lane (1); determining whether there is parallel traffic by determining whether at least one second vehicle (20) is located on a lane (2) of the second carriageway (1) which is adjacent to the lane (3) currently being traveled by the first vehicle (10). in the direction of travel (9) of the first vehicle (10) moves; determining whether there is tangential traffic by determining whether at least one second vehicle (20) is traveling tangentially to a curve currently being traveled by the first vehicle (10); determining that the first vehicle (10) is traveling on a driveway (3) when the driving of the first vehicle (10) in a curve or the end (6) of a road boundary (4, 5) has been determined and determined at the same time, that parallel or tangential traffic exists.

title: Joint limits detection method, device, robot and computer readable storage medium
abstract: The invention belongs to robotic technology field more particularly to a kind of joint limit detection method, device, robot and computer readable storage mediums.The method determines steering engine corresponding with joint of robot to be detected first, then the steering engine is controlled to rotate to preset first direction, measure the movement angle of the joint of robot in preset first duration, judge whether the movement angle of the joint of robot is greater than preset angle threshold again, if the movement angle of the joint of robot is greater than the angle threshold, then after preset second duration, it returns and executes the measurement in preset first duration the step of the movement angle of the joint of robot and its subsequent step, until the movement angle of the joint of robot is less than or equal to the angle threshold, if the movement angle of the joint of robot is less than or equal to the angle threshold, the current position of the joint of robot is then determined as the first extreme position.

title: Method for providing food to user and apparatus thereof
abstract: According to an embodiment of the present invention, a movable mobile robot including a housing, comprising: at least three wheels disposed at a lower end of the mobile robot; A sensing unit configured to measure a weight of a mobile robot applied to each of the at least three wheels; A linear actuator connected to the housing to impart linear movement to the housing in the direction of the front and rear of the mobile robot; And a processor configured to control the linear actuator to impart a linear movement to the housing based on a result of measuring the weight applied to each of the at least three wheels through the sensing unit. In addition, a mobile robot center of gravity control method including a method implemented in the above-described mobile robot may be provided, and a nonvolatile computer readable recording medium containing a computer program for performing the mobile robot center of gravity control method may be provided. Can be.

title: Training method, detection method and device of advertising word violation detection model
abstract: The application provides a training method, a detection method and a device of an advertising word contraband detection model, wherein the training method of the advertising word contraband detection model comprises the following steps: acquiring a training sample set, wherein each training sample comprises a sample word sequence forming a single sample sentence and a label sequence corresponding to each sample word sequence; representing the vocabulary in each sample word sequence as one-hot coding, and obtaining a coding matrix of each sample word sequence; obtaining the probability that the vocabulary in each sample word sequence belongs to forbidden vocabulary based on the coding matrix and the neural network model of each sample word sequence; and updating the parameters of the neural network model to obtain an advertising word contraband detection model. According to the method and the device, through a self-attention mechanism, deep semantic analysis is carried out on the advertising words, so that the advertising word banning detection model obtained through training can be used for mining deep semantic information of the advertising words, banning detection is carried out on the advertising words better, and the situations of erroneous judgment or missing judgment are reduced.
