title: Generating water marked copies of audio signals and detecting them using a shuffle data store
abstract: An encoding data processing apparatus generates a marked version of an audio signal provided on an audio channel. The marked copy is generated by embedding data representative of a payload data word into the audio signal. The encoding data processing apparatus comprises a code word generator operable to generate a water mark code word from the payload data word and to read data representing the water mark code word into a shuffle data store. A shuffle processor is operable to generate pseudo randomly at least one address within an address space of the shuffle data store for each predetermined period and to read data representing part or parts of the water mark code word out from the data store at locations identified by the randomly generated address, and a data embedding processor operable to receive the audio signal and to embed the data representing the part or parts of the water mark code word read out from the shuffle data store into the audio signal for each predetermined period. In one example, the audio signal is one of a plurality of audio signals, each of which is provided on one of a plurality of audio channels of a media item, and the marked copy is generated by embedding the part or parts of the data representative of a payload data word into the audio signal of one or more of the audio channels. As such, even though different parts of the water mark code word may be embedded into the different audio channels, because of the pseudo-random generation of addresses, there is an increased likelihood that if there is a sufficient of the marked audio signal available, then the water mark code word can be recovered from the different audio channels or one of the audio channels.

title: Antenna apparatus
abstract: In the antenna apparatus according to the present invention, a plurality of antennas for receiving a plurality of broadcast signals; A first signal processing unit for processing a plurality of broadcast signals received by a plurality of antennas; At least one output port connected to the broadcast receiving apparatus and outputting a broadcast signal processed by the first signal processing unit to the broadcast receiving apparatus; A plurality of antennas are provided corresponding to the plurality of antennas, and the antenna supports are disposed in multiple stages in at least one direction to support the plurality of antennas. Accordingly, the reception performance of a plurality of broadcast signals received by the plurality of antennas can be improved by a simple structure supporting a plurality of antennas and including a signal processing module.

title: Method of detecting low-noise marine object
abstract:
FIELD: physics. 
     SUBSTANCE: method of detecting a low-noise marine object includes first detecting in receiving devices the "reference" amplitude-frequency response of the noise field of a water area for subsequent processing in a primary signal processing unit in order to determine pairs of receiving devices in a decision-making and cross-correlation function computing unit of a secondary signal processing unit; transmitting the "reference" amplitude-frequency response to corresponding inputs of an adaptive filter of the secondary signal processing unit, where the "normalised" amplitude-frequency response of the noise field of a secure water area is generated; when a low-noise marine object appears in the secure water area in the region where the receiving devices are located, generating the "operating" amplitude-frequency response of the water area, which is transmitted via a preselected first receiving channel to the first input of the decision-making and cross-correlation function computing unit and the first input of the adaptive filter of the secondary signal processing unit; when the amplitude of the "operating" amplitude-frequency response of the water area exceeds the generated threshold of the normalised amplitude-frequency response, recording the amplitude-frequency response of the low-noise marine object. The fundamental distinction of the present invention is that the disclosed method, which is realised in the disclosed apparatus for detecting a low-noise marine object, further employs a decision-making and cross-correlation function computing unit, as well as an adaptive filter, based on the principle of minimisation of the root-mean-square error of interference, which enables to suppress transient interference with a short correlation interval relative to the arrival time of the marine object, which improves noise-immunity when detecting a low-noise marine object. 
     EFFECT: high accuracy and shorter time for analogue-to-digital conversion, use in measuring the primary hydroacoustic field of low-noise marine objects in conditions with high level and transience of background noise within the detection time of the arrival of the marine object, as well as use in security devices for protecting off-shore areas, port and other structures. 
     6 dwg

title: Apparatus and method for sensing touch input
abstract: The present invention relates to a touch sensing device and method. According to the present invention, a sensing circuit unit for generating a plurality of sensing signals from a plurality of capacitance changes occurring in each of the plurality of electrodes provided in the panel portion, and each of the two or more electrodes spaced apart by a predetermined distance from each other of the plurality of electrodes A signal processing unit for comparing the level of two or more sensing signals generated from the capacitance change with a predetermined reference value, wherein the signal processing unit is configured to generate the plurality of capacitances when all of the levels of the two or more sensing signals are greater than the predetermined reference value. A touch sensing device which determines that a change is generated by noise is proposed.

title: Generation of Simulated Patient Data for Training Predicted Medical Outcome Analysis Engine
abstract: A system receives feature parameters, each identifying possible values for one of a set of features. The system receives outcomes corresponding to the feature parameters. The system generates a simulated patient population dataset with multiple simulated patient datasets, each simulated patient dataset associated with the outcomes and including feature values falling within the possible values identified by the feature parameters. The system may train a machine learning engine based on the simulated patient population dataset and optionally additional simulated patient population datasets. The machine learning engine generates predicted outcomes based on the training in response to queries identifying feature values.

title: Crowdsourced, self-learning security system through smart feedback loops
abstract: Systems are provided for utilizing crowdsourcing and machine learning to improve computer system security processes associated with user risk profiles and sign-in profiles. Risk profiles of known users and logged sign-ins are confirmed by user input as either safe or compromised. This input is used as crowdsourced feedback to generate label data for training/refining machine learning algorithms used to generate corresponding risky profile reports. The risky profile reports are used to provide updated assessments and initial assessments of known users and logged sign-ins, as well as newly discovered users and new sign-in attempts, respectively. These assessments are further confirmed or modified to further update the machine learning and risky profile reports.

title: SPEED OPTIMIZED MOTORWAY CONTROL FOR MOTOR VEHICLES
abstract: An automotive trailer assist system includes an auxiliary user input feature that may be used by a vehicle operator to provide a steering curve command corresponding to a desired vehicle path curvature without a user having to move a steering wheel of the vehicle. The trailer backup assist system is configured to control a vehicle speed using an input comprising at least one of a steering curve command and an angle of a trailer with respect to the vehicle while the vehicle is reversing with a trailer coupled thereto. The trailer backup assist system controls at least one of a brake system, an engine torque, and a transmission gear selection to thereby control the vehicle speed in a reverse direction.

title: External module and vehicle connected thereto
abstract: The present invention relates to an external module comprising: an interface physically connected to a vehicle so as to exchange data with the vehicle; and a processor for receiving peripheral information of the vehicle and state information of the vehicle through the interface, acquiring the ADAS information, on the basis of the peripheral information of the vehicle and the state information of the vehicle, and performing control so as to allow a display inside the vehicle to display the ADAS information by transmitting the ADAS information, through the interface, to the vehicle.

title: Parking assistance control for vehicle with autonomous operation capability
abstract: Provided is a method and device parking assistance for a vehicle capable of autonomous operation. The embodiment herein operates to receive a parking zone, which is based on a destination location and a user-defined parking parameter, and includes a plurality of parking locations. When on approach to the parking zone under an autonomous vehicle operation, the parking assistance determines whether the parking zone includes at least one parking location that is physically available for parking the vehicle. When the parking zone does not, the parking assistance prompts the vehicle to engage in a holding pattern for a predetermined period of time. While in the holding pattern under the autonomous operation, the parking assistance periodically determines whether the at least one parking location becomes available. When the predetermined period of time lapses, parking status of the vehicle is transmitted to the vehicle user.

title: A robust, scalable and generalizable machine learning paradigm for multi-agent applications
abstract: Described is a learning system for multi-agent applications. In operation, the system initializes a plurality of learning agents. The learning agents include both tactical agents and strategic agents. The strategic agents take an observation from an environment and select one or more of the tactical agents to produce an action that is used to control a platform's actuators or simulated movements in the environment to complete a task. Alternatively, the tactical agents produce the action corresponding to a learned low-level behavior to control the platform's actuators or simulated movements in the environment to complete the task.

title: Generating quantum computing circuits by distributing approximation errors in a quantum algorithm
abstract: Methods for generating quantum computing circuits by distributing approximation errors in a quantum algorithm are described. A method includes decomposing a quantum algorithm into quantum circuits. The method includes using at least one processor, automatically performing a step-wise decomposition of the quantum algorithm until the quantum algorithm is fully decomposed into the quantum circuits, where the automatically performing the step-wise decomposition results in a set of approximation errors and a set of parameters to instantiate at least a subset of the quantum circuits corresponding to the quantum algorithm, such that an overall approximation error caused by the automatically performing the step-wise decomposition is maintained below a specified threshold approximation error.

title: Nondestructive measuring method for ripeness of fruit
abstract: PURPOSE: To make accurate non-destructive judgement of the ripeness of fruit by irradiating the fruit with a laser beam of a specific wavelength, allowing the beam to penetrate the fruit, and using the calculated photo-absorptiveness as the index for the ripeness. CONSTITUTION: Mono-color laser beams with a wavelength varied within a specified range are emitted one by one from an exciting light source 1 and light parametric oscillator 2. A laser beam intensity reflected by a mirror 3 is sensed by a reflected light intensity sensor 4 and processed by a signal processing part 7 for each wavelength. The intensity of the laser beam having penetrated the mirror 3 is processed by this processing part 7 as the product of the sensed 4 intensity and a constant 24, and the intensity of laser beam having penetrated upon irradiation of the fruit is sensed by a transmitted light intensity sensor 6, and the resultant is subjected to processing 7 so that the photo-absorptiveness is obtained. After ten days, the same part of the fruit 5 is irradiated with laser beam, followed by similar processing 7 t,o obtain the photo-absorptiveness. If the fruit 5 is ripened, the absorptiveness decreases by laser beam irradiation with any wavelength, and the degree of decrement is greater in a riper part. Using this absorptiveness as index, accurate non-destructive measurement of the ripeness is made practicable even when the device used is of a small size.

title: Hydraulic pump fault detection method and system
abstract: The invention provides a hydraulic pump fault detection method for a BASA-optimized GRBF-SVM. Another technical solution of the present invention is to provide a hydraulic pump fault detection system based on the BASA-optimized GRBF-SVM according to the above method, comprising: the acceleration sensor is used for acquiring a vibration signal of the hydraulic pump; the characteristic extraction model is used for extracting the characteristics of the vibration signal; the general radial basis kernel support vector machine is optimized through a longicorn whisker search algorithm, kernel parameters and punishment parameters in the general radial basis kernel support vector machine are optimized through the longicorn whisker search algorithm, and whether the hydraulic pump breaks down or not is detected in real time according to the characteristics of the vibration signals. By adopting the design, the invention can detect the fault of the hydraulic pump on line in real time so as to ensure that the fault of the hydraulic pump is correctly and quickly discovered.

title: Voice tone color method for measuring similarity under instrument tamber migration
abstract: A kind of voice tone color method for measuring similarity under being migrated the present invention relates to instrument tamber.This method calculates the logarithm Meier spectrum signature of the abundant and balanced musical instrument data collection audio of data volume first, obtains eigenmatrix, trains depth convolutional neural networks model with musical instrument data, obtains trained depth convolutional neural networks model；Then insufficient to data volume, unbalanced voice audio data set, its logarithm Meier spectrum signature is calculated with same method, trained depth convolutional neural networks model is finely adjusted using the method for trimming based on transfer learning again, obtain the characterization model of voice tone color, the output of model is then the tone color vector of voice, finally by the cosine similarity calculated between tone color vector, it can be achieved that the similarity measurement of voice tone color.

title: Roadside assistance system
abstract: According to some aspects of this disclosure a roadside assistance application programming interface (API) may allow any type of application, internet of things device, voice recognition device, and others to provide roadside assistance functionality. According to some aspects of this disclosure a device may communicate with sensors or an on-board diagnostics system of a vehicle and retrieve vehicle data. The device may recommend a service based on the vehicle data. The device may send a request for roadside assistance. The device may be used to enroll a user as a member of a roadside assistance benefits program. The above mentioned steps may all be performed via a single application running on the device. According to some aspects of this disclosure a device may process a roadside assistance request and determine a roadside assistance service provider to send to a user that requested roadside assistance.

title: Bot framework
abstract: Methods and apparatus, including computer program products, are provided for a bot framework. In some implementations, there may be provided a method which may include receiving a request comprising a text string, the request corresponding to a request for handling by a bot; generating, from the request, at least one token; determining whether the at least one token matches at least one stored token mapped to an address; selecting the address in response to the match between the at least one token and the at least one stored token; and presenting, at a client interface associated with the bot, data obtained at the selected address in order to form a response to the request. Related systems, methods, and articles of manufacture are also disclosed.

title: Seismic data reconstruction method and system adopting compressed sensing algorithm
abstract: The invention discloses a seismic data reconstruction method adopting a compressed sensing algorithm, which comprises the following steps: performing sparse transformation on the original data by using an over-complete dictionary to replace a basis function; selecting an initialized random unit array as an observation matrix; the sampling matrix is combined with regularization and then the recovery reconstruction of the missing seismic data is achieved through an orthogonal matching tracking algorithm. The invention provides improvement for the processes of signal sparse representation, observation matrix design, signal reconstruction, data reconstruction and the like in the compressive sensing theory, further enhances weak signals, and obviously improves the seismic resolution.

title: Apparatus and method for assisting safety driving
abstract: The present invention relates to a vehicle safe running support terminal device, which includes a core processing device, a V2X communication device, and an Internet communication device, and the core processing device is a processing device for supporting the safe running of the vehicle, A detection unit, a vehicle motion detection unit, a precise vehicle position recognition unit, a precise obstacle position recognition unit, a risk and attention calculation unit, a risk response module unit, and a control unit.

title: Method and apparatus for performing simultaneous localization and mapping
abstract: A method of performing simultaneous localization of a mobile body and mapping of its environment, includes the steps of: a) defining an occupancy grid (G) on a region of the environment and a pose grid (Π) comprising for the mobile body; b) receiving a first time series of distance measurements (z1, z2) and, upon reception of a distance measurement: either b1) updating occupancy probabilities of the occupancy grid; or b2) updating pose probabilities of the pose grid; and c) receiving a second time series of odometry measurements (u1, u2), each of the measurements being representative of a motion of the mobile body in the environment and, upon reception of an odometry measurement, updating the pose probabilities of the pose grid. An apparatus for carrying out such a method is also provided.

title: Vehicle speed control
abstract: A speed control system for a vehicle. The speed control system has a torque control for automatically causing application of positive and negative torque to one or more wheels of a vehicle to cause a vehicle to travel in accordance with a target speed value. The system receives information indicative of a gradient of a driving surface over which the vehicle is driving, with the torque control being configured to control the rate of change of the amount of torque applied to the one or more wheels, in order to attempt to maintain the vehicle traveling in accordance with the target speed value, in dependence at least in part on the gradient of the driving surface.

title: LTCC band-pass filter
abstract: The utility model discloses a LTCC band pass filter, including the metallic shield shell, metallic shield shell one end is equipped with port input coupling line, the metallic shield shell other end is equipped with port output coupling line, it has multilayer ceramic medium to link between port input coupling line and the port output coupling line, it has first syntonizer to coat on the multilayer ceramic medium, the second syntonizer, the third syntonizer, fourth syntonizer and oval function zero point coupling piece, some signals are through port input coupling line, first syntonizer, the second syntonizer, the third syntonizer, fourth syntonizer and port output coupling line, another part signal is through port input coupling line, first syntonizer, oval function zero point coupling piece, fourth syntonizer and port output coupling line. The utility model discloses the wave filter not only can solve the bulky problem of wave filter, adopts the design of elliptic function simultaneously, can reach the higher outband rejection requirement outside the passband, improves signal processing quality and wireless transmission signal.

title: A kind of meter and honourable probabilistic electric automobile charging station electricity pricing method
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of meter and the probabilistic electric automobile charging station electricity pricing methods of scene, comprising: obtains regional historical meteorological dataset, is clustered using clustering algorithm to day wind speed, intensity of illumination, obtain cluster centre and weight；Establish charging station wind-power electricity generation and photovoltaic power generation power output model；The charging time model of separate unit electric car is constructed, and calculates the chargeable duration of separate unit；The response model and probability transfer matrix for constructing separate unit charging electricity price, the separate unit charging probability Distribution Model after obtaining tou power price；Analog charge, the daily load demand for obtaining electric car group and the total charge power model of charging station, charging station are to the workload demand model of power grid；The charging station Benefit Model for constructing time-sharing charging electricity price, using the charging electricity price of day part in genetic algorithm solving model；It takes optimum individual to decode, obtains electric automobile charging station tou power price.The present invention constructs charging station economic benefit objective function, optimal solution is found out, so that electricity pricing process is more accurate.

title: Method for synthesizing various strontium molybdate micro-nano structures at room temperature
abstract: The invention provides a method for synthesizing various strontium molybdate micro-nano structures at room temperature, and the method comprises the steps of selecting quaternary microemulsion consisting of a non-ionic surfactant of alkyl polyoxyethylene (10) ether (OP-10), cyclohexane, n-octanol and a water phase, taking sodium molybdate and strontium chloride as reactants, mixing various components for composing inverse microemulsion and strong stirring on a magnetic stirrer at the room temperature for preparing the uniform and transparent inverse microemulsion with stable nature, then dripping the microemulsion of the strontium chloride in the microemulsion of the sodium molybdate, leading the two to react in finite domain space of the microemulsion, carrying out reaction, aging and centrifugal separation, and washing with acetone, anhydrous ethanol and secondary water repeatedly, thereby preparing the various strontium molybdate micro-nano structures with uniform appearance and size. The technical scheme designs a new microemulsion system and utilizes a template and the finite domain role of the inverse micell microemulsion for preparing the novel various strontium molybdate micro-nano structures. The method is characterized by simple production technology, safe production process and difficult clustering of products and can be widely used in the preparation of inorganic functional materials with three-dimensional structures.

title: A kind of hardware-accelerated method of SSD towards intelligent terminal
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of hardware-accelerated methods of the SSD towards intelligent terminal, belong to FPGA hardware acceleration, target detection, computer vision and Heterogeneous Computing technical field.The hardware-accelerated method of SSD towards intelligent terminal of the invention uses ARM+FPGA isomery framework in edge side smart machine terminal, carries out computing hardware acceleration based on edge side target detection service application scene；The model training of SSD algorithm is completed by cloud data center, and is directed to different FPGA design personalization algorithms, and FPGA is dynamically loaded into smart machine terminal；3x3 convolution, add tree calculating and Relu computing unit are designed using dot-product operation and tree-like adder to SSD algorithm.The hardware-accelerated method of the SSD towards intelligent terminal of the invention can satisfy requirement of the edge side for calculating power, real-time and power consumption, have good application value.

title: A kind of automatic obstacle-avoiding mechanism of Xun Bao robots
abstract: The utility model provides a kind of automatic obstacle-avoiding mechanism of Xun Bao robots,Including electric telescopic rod,Touch bar,Fixed seat,Electric rotating machine,Fixed plate,Electric pushrod and case,Electric telescopic rod is assemblied in by mounting plate on the upside of chassis interior,Electric telescopic rod lower face is equipped with touching bar,Fixed plate is symmetrically mounted on chassis interior front and rear sides,Fixed seat is mounted on fixed plate centre position by sliding shoe,Fixed seat lower face is equipped with electric rotating machine,The design solves the problems, such as original Xun Bao robots existing defects on automatic obstacle avoidance functions,Electric pushrod is assemblied in robot body's inner back side by mounting plate,Electric pushrod front end face is connected by connecting rod with case rear end face,Case is moved by pulley in sliding rail,The design solves the problems, such as that original Xun Bao robots do not have storage configuration,The utility model is reasonable for structure,Automatic obstacle-avoiding,It is stored convenient for treasure,Work efficiency is high.

title: Elevator device
abstract: The method of the invention can be used to improve the performance of an elevator system. In the method, the acceleration and/or velocity of at least one door in the elevator system is measured and a dynamic model of the door is created. Using the model, an estimation of acceleration and velocity can be calculated as a function of unknown parameters. From the estimated acceleration or velocity and the measured acceleration or velocity an error function is obtained, and a search is performed in an optimizer to find its minimum value. The unknown parameters corresponding to the minimum value indicate the value of the kinetic parameters of the door at the instant being considered. By utilizing the calculated values of the kinetic parameters, the functions of the doors in the elevator system are optimized separately for each door.; Using a genetic algorithm, it is possible to determine, in addition to the unknown kinetic parameters, the operational state of the door closing device as well.

title: Method and apparatus for evaluating bids for scheduling a resource
abstract: A method for scheduling a resource for processing a workpiece includes defining a commitment window having a kernel specifying a time period required for processing the workpiece. A plurality of candidate bids having candidate commitment windows within the commitment window with varying start times, end times and candidate commitment window sizes is generated. A cost for each of the plurality of candidate bids is determined. A flexibility discount is applied to the cost of the candidate bid. Each candidate bid is evaluated in accordance with an objective function. A candidate bid is selected for scheduling the resource based on the objective function evaluation. A system includes a resource for processing a workpiece and at least one scheduling agent. The scheduling agent is configured to define a commitment window having a kernel specifying a time period required for processing the workpiece, generate a plurality of candidate bids having candidate commitment windows within the commitment window with varying start times, end times and candidate commitment window sizes, determine a cost for each of the plurality of candidate bids, apply a flexibility discount to the cost of the candidate bid, evaluate each candidate bid in accordance with an objective function, and select a candidate bid for scheduling the resource based on the objective function evaluation.

title: Bayesian network approximation device
abstract: It is possible to provide a Bayesian network approximation device for performing a Bayesian network approximation. The Bayesian network approximation device includes: sensitivity data input reception means for receiving input of sensitivity data; validity reference data input reception means for receiving input of validity reference data; input record input reception means for receiving input of an input record; experience record input reception means for acquiring an experience record; calculation means for calculating, as validity for each experience record, the total of multiplications performed by weighting the input record and experience record with the sensitivity data given for each of their fields, classifying it according to the validity reference data, and outputting a value of output value field in the experience record classified into a high validity reference; and output means for receiving the output data from the calculation means and outputting it.

title: Robotic kitchen assistant for preparing food items in a commercial kitchen and related methods
abstract: A flexible robotic kitchen assistant automates the preparation of food items. The robotic kitchen assistant includes a robotic arm, a sensor assembly comprising a plurality of cameras aimed at a kitchen workspace for preparing the food items, a controller operable to move the robotic arm, and a processor. The processor is operable to command the robotic arm to perform a food preparation step on the food items in the kitchen workspace based on order information, recipe information, kitchen equipment information, and camera data. The system is capable of performing a wide range of tasks commonly used in residential and commercial kitchens and is able to work collaboratively with and in close proximity to human kitchen workers.

title: CNN method and device using 1xH convolution
abstract: The present invention provides a CNN method and apparatus using 1xH convolution, which learns parameters of a CNN used for image recognition, provided for hardware optimization that satisfies KPI (Key Performance Index), and includes: the learning device (a) makes the 1 st transposition layer or the pooling layer cascade the pixels on the pooled feature map according to each ROI to generate an integrated feature map; (b) generating a 1 st adjustment feature map by using a 1 st reshaping feature map generated by cascading features in H1 channels of the integrated feature map in the 1xH1 convolutional layer, and generating a 2 nd adjustment feature map by using a 2 nd reshaping feature map generated by cascading features in H2 channels of the 1 st adjustment feature map in the 1xH2 convolutional layer; and (c) separating the 2 nd adjustment feature map by the 2 nd transposition layer or the classification layer according to the pixel level to generate the pixel level feature map.

title: Systems and methods for predicting persistent memory device degradation based on operational parameters
abstract: In accordance with embodiments of the present disclosure, an information handling system may include a processor, a memory system communicatively coupled to the processor, the memory system comprising one or more persistent memory modules, each of the one or more persistent memory modules comprising a volatile memory and a non-volatile memory, and a management controller communicatively coupled to the processor and the memory system. The management controller may be configured to correlate temperature sensor information with one or more other operational parameters associated with the one or more persistent memory modules and predict a likelihood of degradation of the one or more persistent memory modules based on correlation of the temperature sensor information with the one or more other operational parameters.

title: Capacitive mems sensor device
abstract: The present invention relates to a capacitive MEMS sensor device for sensing a mechanical quantity. To provide such a capacitive MEMS sensor device which enables fast recovery from (near) sticking after a mechanical overload situation it is proposed that the sensor device comprises:—a first bias voltage unit (V 1 ) for supplying a first bias voltage (V bias 1 ) to a first plate of said MEMS sensing element,—a second bias voltage unit (V 2 ) for supplying a second bias voltage (V bias2 ) to the second plate of said MEMS sensing element,—a signal processing ( 20 ) unit for processing said electrical quantity into an output signal (V OUT ),—a comparator unit ( 21 ) for comparing said output (V OUT ) signal to a reference signal (V ref ) for detection of an overload condition of said MEMS sensing element ( 10 ) and for outputting a comparator signal,—a control unit ( 22 ) for controlling the discharge of said MEMS sensing element ( 10 ) in case of an overload condition signalled by said comparator signal by connecting, in case of an overload condition, said first plate to a first discharge terminal (D) during a first time interval (T 1 ) and said second plate to a second discharge terminal (D) during a second time interval (T 2 ).

title: Arrangement for ripping and covering traces of running gear of machine and tractor unit
abstract: The invention relates to agricultural machinery, in particular, to devices for sealing traces of propellers and wheels of a machine-tractor unit. The purpose of the invention is to preserve soil fertility. The device is equipped with additional working bodies 9 for loosening the subsoil layer. The working bodies for embedding traces are made in the form of left-handed and right-turning plow bodies 6 and 7 and a tine harrow mounted on the head. The working bodies 9 are installed with a height offset relative to the plow bodies 6 and 7 and harrow 8 for embedding traces. Working bodies (9, 6, 7, 8) are placed behind the trailer 5 of the machine-tractor unit. When moving along the field, the working bodies 3 form grooves, the thrusters 1, 4 compact the subsoil layer along the bottom of the grooves. Working bodies 9 loosened subsoil. The working bodies (6, 7, 8) level the furrows with soil from the arable layer, which avoided spraying with movers 1, 4 and wheels. 1 hp f-ly, 2 ill.

title: It is a kind of applied to electronic scale based on BP neural network compensation temperature gain method
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of applied to electronic scale based on BP neural network compensation temperature gain method, and the method comprising the steps of：101, the neural network model of weighing sensor temperature gain correction is established；102, the learning training sample data of network is obtained；103, sample data is pre-processed；104, network training is carried out to sample number；105, test network prediction effect；106, compensation formula is written in microcontroller firmware program.The present invention can be corrected temperature sensor using neural network method, it can quickly, accurately realize the temperature-compensating of weighing sensor, not only reach the precision of compensation tache to measure within the scope of allowable error, but also for not having skilled temperature spot that there is predictive compensation effect.

title: In-cabinet type bus partial discharge real-time detection device of switch cabinet
abstract: The utility model discloses an in-cabinet type bus partial discharge real-time detection device of a switch cabinet. A temperature, humidity and dust detection module detects the temperature, the humidity and dust concentration of a bus environment and transmits signals to a DSP signal processing module, a bus partial discharge detecting portion detects bus partial discharge pulse signals and transmits the signals to a signal isolation and regulation module, the signal isolation and regulation module specifically preprocesses the bus partial discharge signals and transmits the signals to the DSP signal processing module, the DSP signal processing module processes the signals to generate signals transmitted to an output control module, the output control module receives control instructions to control an external control device to act, and the DSP signal processing module is communicated with an external computer via a communication module and in man-machine interactive communication with a key display module. The in-cabinet type bus partial discharge real-time detection device of a switch cabinet can detect the state of bus partial discharge harmful to safe running of the switch cabinet in real time, timely transmits protection signals, and improves safety of power grid running.

title: Life-time management of downhole tools and components
abstract: Systems, methods and devices for evaluating a condition of a downhole component of a drillstring. Methods include estimating a value of a tool parameter of the component at at least one selected position on the drillstring; and using the estimated value to evaluate the condition of the downhole component. The estimating is done using a trained artificial neural network that receives information from at least one sensor that is positionally offset from the selected position. The method may further include creating a record representing information from estimated values of the tool parameter at the at least one selected position over time. The at least one selected position may include a plurality of positions, such as positions at intervals along the component, including substantially continuously along the component.

title: Passenger-riding parking system and parking method based on information exchange between radar and automobile
abstract: The invention discloses a passenger-assistant parking system based on information exchange between radar and an automobile, which comprises an information center, a radar sensor, a communication module system and a map navigation system, the radar sensor is used for detecting information related to a target automobile and an obstacle and parking space information, and sends the detected information to an information center, the information center receives and processes the information sent by the radar sensor and sends the information to a map navigation system, and generates a driving instruction according to the planned path and an obstacle avoidance instruction, the information center sends the driving instruction according to the planned path and the obstacle avoidance instruction to a control center of the target automobile through a communication module, the map navigation system is used for receiving the information sent by the information center, planning the running path of the target automobile according to the information, and sending the running path to the control center of the target automobile through the communication module. The invention enables an automobile with only an extremely basic automatic driving function to realize an automatic parking function.

title: Artificial intelligence based solution generator
abstract: A solution generation and planning system uses Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques such as machine learning (ML) data models, predictive analytics and natural language processing (NLP) techniques for generating outputs to aid decision making in the domain of public infrastructure development. The problem statement is analyzed using the NLP techniques to generate word tokens which are employed in identifying issues that aid in selection of appropriate data sources from a plurality of discrete data sources. In addition, data models trained to produce probable solutions for the issue are also selected. The probable solutions are presented to the user who selects one of the probable solutions for implementation. Feedback from the implementation is also incorporated so that the data models are updated per the latest information obtained from the implementation of the user-selected solution.

title: Biped robot
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of robots, in particular to a biped robot which comprises a body, a walking function module, an infrared obstacle avoidance function module, a dance function module, a communication module and a controller, wherein the walking function module enables the robot to walk, the infrared obstacle avoidance function module enables the robot to automatically stop walking when encountering obstacles, and the dance function module enables the robot to automatically dance.

title: Elevator button positioning and recognition methods based on artificial target and geometric transformation
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of elevator button positioning and recognition methods based on artificial target and geometric transformation, it includes elevator panel sample training process and elevator panel identification process, the elevator panel sample training process is to obtain the layout and coordinate of button in elevator panel sample and carry out function setting to the button in elevator panel sample, the elevator panel identification process to be recognized the layout and coordinate of button in elevator panel to obtain, and combines the push button function in elevator panel sample come to be recognized that each button is positioned and recognized in elevator panel.The method of the present invention it is simple but it is reliable efficiently, can completing button in a short time positioning and identification, have important help for the self-service vertical ladder up and down of robot.

title: The method and system of FPGA processing complex matrix multiplication in a kind of LTE reception system
abstract: The present invention provides the method and systems that FPGA in a kind of LTE reception system handles complex matrix multiplication, comprising: receives MMSE filtering data, the MMSE filtering data includes the first complex matrix and the second complex matrix of pending multiplying；According to first complex matrix and second complex matrix, the first parameter COMM (m, n), the second parameter REAL (m, n), third parameter IMAG (m, n) are obtained；According to the first parameter COMM (m, n), the second parameter REAL (m, n) and the third parameter IMAG (m, n) are obtained real part Cr (m, n), imaginary part Ci (m, n)；According to the real part Cr (m, n), imaginary part Ci (m, n) obtains third complex matrix, and the third complex matrix is exported.The present invention uses serial pipeline organization, both saves adder, does not waste extra placement-and-routing's resource, and unified simple, can build the matrix multiplication of any number of stages.

title: Robot controller bootloader, bootloader monitoring apparatus
abstract:
The robot controller boot loader according to the present invention includes a connection-oriented communication interface that provides a boot command function and a data exchange function with an external device, broadcasts a boot message along with booting of the robot controller, and broadcasts it on a network. It includes a connection-oriented communication interface for receiving the information, characterized in that to inform the boot state of the robot controller to the external device on the network through the connection-oriented communication interface. 
     As such, the present invention checks the operation state of the robot controller using a connectionless oriented communication interface and provides a boot command and a file transfer function using the connection oriented communication interface, thereby providing a plurality of robot controllers with one host terminal. Not only can be managed by using, but also has the effect of monitoring the remote robot controller.

title: Method for fusion bonding plastic and fusion bonding material used therefor
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide plasticity, simple handling, excellent operability and secure fusion bonding work with heat by embedding a fusion bond material in grooves, press bonding plastics to be fusion bonded, then supplying a higher current to fiber bundles of the material than that at presetting, and fusion bonding the plastics by heating the bundles. SOLUTION: Raw threads 6 are extended on base 71 by using a fixing member 72 to meet grooves 12, 22 of the same shapes as those of adhesive surfaces 11, 21 of a pair of plastics 1, 2. Leads 8 led from a variable transformer are, for example, prepared as a current supply unit 8 at both ends of the bundle 51 of a core of the threads 6. Then, a current of, for example, 10 to 50 V is supplied from the unit 8 slightly for 1 to 4 sec, the bundle 61 is heated so that its carbon fibers are heated. A resin film layer 62 is molten from its interior at a suitable temperature, and its bending point is clearly bent. When it is cooled, it is solidified and molded in a shape as desirably designed, and can be preset in a mold in which a following fusion bonding work can be facilitated.

title: A kind of telepilot adjusting multi-mode steering vehicle wheels
abstract: The utility model provides a kind of telepilot adjusting multi-mode steering vehicle wheels, comprise a box body, box body is provided with wheels switch, direction switch, adjusting knob and signal processing circuit, this signal processing circuit comprises the commutation circuit, control circuit and the amplifying circuit that connect successively; Commutation circuit comprises the wheels commutation circuit be connected with wheels switch, the direction commutation circuit be connected with direction switch, and commutation circuit is used for, when pressing respective switch, the relation between current switch and controlled wheels is sent to control circuit; Control circuit is also connected with adjusting knob, and the control signal of reception is sent to amplifying circuit by control circuit; Amplifying circuit is used for being sent to controlled vehicle by after current control signal amplification.The utility model independent of outside the control system of vehicle, can carry out independent adjustment to the steering angle of each wheels of vehicle, solves vehicle and casts anchor in the problem that cannot move or drag on the way.

title: Wheel for car
abstract: The invention relates to a wheel for a car. The wheel is characterized in that a spoke flange part of a spoke is provided with a concentric-arc-shaped bending surface lateral edge part which extends out from the surface lateral end edge of an embedding straight ring part, is bent to the inner side in the radial direction, and is sunken in the direction facing the back face relative to the outer end of the lateral edge part of a spoke part. According to the wheel for the car of the structure, through the shape effect of the bending surface lateral edge part, the high strength and the high rigidity of loads and bending or twisting loads in the radial direction can be borne, and deformation, generated by the car in the traveling process, of the spoke flange part can be restrained. In this way, stress concentration acting on a joining part of the spoke and a rim can be remitted.

title: Meter reading method, device, system and storage medium
abstract: The application relates to a meter reading method, a device, a system and a storage medium. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring an indication image of the instrument acquired by the optical sensor; transmitting the indication image to a convolutional neural network dedicated chip; processing the indication image through a convolutional neural network model on the convolutional neural network special chip to obtain a reading value of a target instrument; and outputting the reading value of the target instrument. By adopting the method, the meter data can be automatically read with low power consumption, the interference of human factors is eliminated, and the accuracy of reading the meter data is improved.

title: Concealing a personal number
abstract: A method includes receiving information about a person at a server, the information including a name and a personal number; storing the name and a portion of the personal number in a database in the server, such that the name and portion of the personal number are searchable; converting the personal number to an image that is designed to not be easily readable by optical character recognition, and storing the image; receiving, at the server, a request for a search of the database from a client device including a graphical user interface that has a movable pointer capable of hovering over a spot on the graphical user interface; displaying the name and the portion of the personal number, at a user client device in communication with the server, in response to results of the search matching information about the person; and displaying the image at the user client device in response to the pointer hovering over the portion of the personal number. Other systems and methods are provided.

title: Systems and methods for debugging neural networks with coverage guided fuzzing
abstract: The present disclosure provides systems and methods for debugging neural networks. In one example, a computer-implemented method is provided, which includes obtaining, by one or more computing devices, one or more inputs from an input corpus. The method further includes mutating, by the one or more computing devices, the one or more inputs and providing the one or more mutated inputs to a neural network; obtaining, by the one or more computing devices as a result of the neural network processing the one or more mutated inputs, a set of coverage arrays; determining, by the one or more computing devices based at least in part on the set of coverage arrays, whether the one or more mutated inputs provide new coverage; and upon determining that the one or more mutated inputs provide new coverage, adding the one or more mutated inputs to the input corpus.

title: Generating output sequences from input sequences using neural networks
abstract: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on computer storage media, for generating output sequences from input sequences. One of the methods includes obtaining an input sequence having a first number of inputs arranged according to an input order; processing each input in the input sequence using an encoder recurrent neural network to generate a respective encoder hidden state for each input in the input sequence; and generating an output sequence having a second number of outputs arranged according to an output order, each output in the output sequence being selected from the inputs in the input sequence, comprising, for each position in the output order: generating a softmax output for the position using the encoder hidden states that is a pointer into the input sequence; and selecting an input from the input sequence as the output at the position using the softmax output.

title: Training multiple neural networks of a vehicle perception component based on sensor settings
abstract: A method for controlling a vehicle based on sensor data having variable sensor parameter settings includes receiving sensor data generated by a vehicle sensor while the sensor is configured with a first sensor parameter setting. The method also includes receiving an indicator specifying the first sensor parameter setting, and selecting, based on the received indicator, one of a plurality of neural networks of a perception component, each neural network having been trained using training data corresponding to a different sensor parameter setting. The method also includes generating signals descriptive of a current state of the environment using the selected neural network and based on the received sensor data. The method further includes generating driving decisions based on the signals descriptive of the current state of the environment, and causing one or more operational subsystems of the vehicle to maneuver the vehicle in accordance with the generated driving decisions.

title: Driver assistance apparatus and method
abstract: A driver assistance method includes: sensing whether a vehicle enters a slope road; detecting information of the slope road using sensors which are equipped in the vehicle; confirming whether the slope road is a curved road based on the information of the slope road; measuring a curvature of the slope road when the slope road is confirmed to be a curved road; and assisting a driving operation of the vehicle based on the curvature of the slope road.

title: State of emotion time series
abstract: Methods, computer program products, and systems are presented. The methods include, for instance: inputs of emotion time series data of a user and environmental factor data from one or more data collection device for a user assistance service. A baseline emotion time series is generated and an environmental factor that is likely to have affected changes in state of emotion on a subject is identified by regression analysis. An emotion time series model for the identified environmental factor is produced and prediction of a path to attain a target state of emotion at a certain time in the future is made. Recommendation to achieve the target state of emotion is produced based on the predicted path.

title: Control system for internal combustion engine using common rail fuel injection system allows first and second injections of fuel into each cylinder with second injection controlling mixture strength
abstract: The internal combustion engine control system uses first and second injections of fuel into each cylinder. The first injection (Q1) may be a pilot injection of a constant amount of fuel. The second injection (Q2) may be variable to control mixture strength and power developed by the engine. The engine has common rail fuel injection system and the pressure (P rail) in the common rail may be measured. The time difference (t diff) between the two injections may be measured. The measured input quantities (110) may be fed into a neuronal computer network (120), containing first (121) and second (122) neurons. An output value (dQ2) is produced.

title: Educational robot control design case based on neuroid
abstract: The invention belongs to robotic technology field, educational robot control design case specifically related to based on neuroid, including educational machine human agent, the educational machine human agent includes robot head, machine human body, robot left upper extremity, robot right upper extremity, robot left lower extremity and robot right lower extremity, control panel is provided with the machine human body, neuron chip is provided with the control panel, the output end of the control panel is electrically connected with head control module, expression control module, surrounding motion-control module and speech control module, the robot head is provided with vision module, the vision module is provided with vision sensor, neuron chip connection in the output end and control panel of the vision module.The present invention provides the educational robot control design case based on neuroid, educational robot can be made to obtain new behavior by the on-line study that interacts with environment so that educational robot can reach the optimal action of target according to specific task choosing.

title: Human body ground reaction indirect measurement system, measurement method, device and controller
abstract: The method comprises the steps of obtaining first motion information collected by a first inertia measurement unit, obtaining second motion information collected by a second inertia measurement unit, obtaining third motion information collected by a third inertia measurement unit, judging the contact condition of the leg of a user to be measured and the ground according to the first motion information and the second motion information, calculating the third motion information according to preset algorithm logic based on the judgment result of the contact condition of the leg of the user to be measured and the ground, and obtaining the ground reaction of the leg of the user to be measured, which is in contact with the ground. The embodiment of the application has the effects of low cost in the process of measuring the ground reaction force of the human body, low requirement on the measuring environment of a measured person and robustness.

title: Medical record encoding method and device, storage medium and electronic equipment
abstract: The embodiment of the disclosure provides a medical record encoding method and device, a storage medium and electronic equipment. The method comprises the following steps: extracting a plurality of target entities from a target medical record; determining the one-hot codes corresponding to the target entities based on the number of the entities in the preset knowledge graph; determining a plurality of first vectors corresponding to the target entities based on a first vector of each entity in a preset knowledge graph; determining a vector of the target medical record based on a plurality of first vectors corresponding to the target entities and the one-hot codes corresponding to the target entities; and determining the code corresponding to the vector of the target medical record through a deep learning model. The vector of the target medical record is determined based on the knowledge graph, accurate vector representation of the target medical record is achieved, then automatic coding based on the vector is achieved by combining a deep learning model, and medical record coding efficiency and accuracy are improved.

title: Echo cancellation device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To reduce cost by surely processing echo cancellation in the case of hand-free speech for a cellular telephone system or the like so as to reduce a signal processing scale and a equipment scale. SOLUTION: A received voice signal Sa from a reception section of a cellular telephone set is amplified by an amplifier 14a and a voice is outputted from a speaker 14. A voice St at the speech by a TX microphone 11 and a voice output of the received voice signal Sa from the speaker 14 are inputted by the device and its mixed voice signal Se is inputted to a differential amplifier circuit 13. A transmission signal from EC microphone 12 is amplified by an amplifier 12a and inputted to the differential amplifier circuit 13, in which the mixed voice signal Se from the TX microphone 11 and the echo voice signal through the EC microphone 12 and an amplifier 12a are amplified differentially to conduct echo cancellation processing and the transmission voice signal Sb is sent to a transmission section of the cellular telephone set.

title: Preparation and application of granular sulfate reducing bacteria immobilized bioactive filler with polyvinyl alcohol fiber as skeleton material
abstract: The invention discloses preparation and an application of a granular sulfate reducing bacteria immobilized bioactive filler with a stereo three-dimensional reticulate polyvinyl alcohol fiber as a skeleton material, and belongs to the technical field of water treatment. The bioactive filler comprises two parts: an embedding body and a fiber yarn skeleton; the embedding body is obtained by boric acid secondary cross-linking of an embedding liquid containing sulfate reducing bacteria; the embedding body is embedded into pores among fiber yarns, and the irregular fiber yarns in the skeleton and the embedding body are combined into a stable organic whole. The preparation comprises the steps: soaking a fiber block composed of the stereo irregular polyvinyl alcohol fiber yarns in the embedding liquid formed by mixing a sulfate reducing bacteria concentrated solution and a polyvinyl alcohol solution, followed by carrying out boric acid secondary cross-linking immobilization, cleaning, and cutting to obtain the granular bioactive filler. The problems that sulfate reducing bacteria in a traditional sulfate wastewater treatment reactor are poor in film-forming property, easy to lose and the like are solved, and the prepared bioactive filler has good stability and good application prospects.

title: Ship allocation plan creation device, method and program
abstract: A ship allocation plan creation device for creating a ship allocation plan for transporting raw materials of multiple brands from a plurality of loading sites to a plurality of landing sites, including data fetching means; ship financial resource creation means; A mathematical model setting means for setting a mathematical model that represents at least the operational constraint of the ship and the supply and demand balance constraint of the raw material at the landing; and at least the transportation cost is constructed using the mathematical model that is set An optimization calculation means for performing an optimization calculation based on the objective function performed; an inventory transition simulator that operates based on a result of the optimization calculation and simulates a transition of the inventory status; and a transition of the ship operation status A ship allocation plan creation device comprising: a simulator including a ship operation state transition simulator for simulating a ship; and an output means.

title: Learning system and learning method
abstract: To provide a learning system and a learning method capable of acquiring a safe and optimal action series under a dynamic environment.SOLUTION: A learning system comprises: an output generation unit for generating a locus Tr with which a robot 10 reaches a target place Ta while avoiding an obstacle 30 by optimal control for each of a plurality of conditions composed of an initial value of a state of the robot 10 and a position of the obstacle 30; a determination unit for determining a convergence property of generation of the locus Tr by optimal control for each of the conditions; an exception generation unit for generating the locus Tr by exceptional control for condition which has been determined not to converge; an integration unit for integrating the locus Tr generated for each condition by utilizing generalization performance of a neural network; and a learning unit for feeding back an integration result from the integration unit to the optimal control and learning the generation of the locus Tr with each condition and integration of the locus Tr generated with each condition by repeating them a preset number of times.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 7

title: Disambiguating search queries
abstract: A network -based service is disclosed for disambiguating search queries based on a location-based clustering of search results corresponding to the query. In one embodiment, a user may submit a query for travel items, such as hotel accommodations. The service can determine, based on the query, an initial set of hotels providing such accommodations. The service can then cluster the hotels according to their geographic positions. If the service identifies multiple clusters, the user can be prompted to select a specific cluster to receive additional information regarding the cluster. Illustratively, if a user submits a query for a hotel in "Springfield," the service may ask the user to select among multiple clusters of results, each corresponding to a different city named "Springfield" in which results have been located.

title: Tobacco leaf mildew detection system based on block chain and deep neural network
abstract: The invention discloses a tobacco leaf mildew detection system based on a block chain and a deep neural network. The method comprises the following steps: the system comprises a rough semantic segmentation unit, a mildew position image acquisition unit, a mildew judgment unit, a mildew position acquisition unit and a mildew result display unit, wherein all nodes in a cloud server cluster are loaded with parameters and weights required by a mildew detection network to generate a mildew detection network reasoning block private chain; and aiming at each neural network reasoning request, randomly selecting available nodes from the cloud server cluster to obtain a node chain sequence matched with the private chain of the mildew detection network reasoning block, and executing the mildew detection network reasoning in parallel, thereby realizing tobacco mildew detection. By using the method and the device, the detection efficiency and the detection precision can be improved in the detection of the mildewed tobacco leaves, and meanwhile, the safety performance in the data processing process is improved.

title: A kind of seat earth limestone gushing water evaluation method based on Fuzzy Level Analytic Approach
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of methods of determination seat earth limestone gushing water evaluation based on level fuzzy analysis, comprising: concludes the Dominated Factors for influencing limestone gushing water, establishes hierarchical structure model；Hierarchy Model is relied on, establishes set of factors and weight sets respectively；According to experience with mining combination production practices, opinion rating collection is established；Determine each influence element assessment index degree of membership and fuzzy relation matrix；According to Fuzzy Level Analytic Approach as a result, combining assessment grade collection, overall merit limestone gushing water.The present invention is based on Fuzzy Level Analytic Approach theories, in conjunction with experience with mining and production practices, the evaluation limestone gushing water of qualitative and quantitative, evaluation result is rationally reliable, with certain novelty, and operation of the present invention is simple, is easy to practical application, provides a kind of new method and thinking for the evaluation of bottom plate limestone gushing water.

title: Method, device and equipment for processing signal source positioning data and storage medium
abstract: The invention provides a method, a device, equipment and a storage medium for processing signal source positioning data, which are used for acquiring the current positioning data of a signal source in a signal source positioning data processing instruction when the signal source positioning data processing instruction is received; inputting the current positioning data into a preset Bayesian identification model, so that the Bayesian identification model can output the target posterior probability of the current positioning data based on the relevant track data of the current positioning data in the current time period and the relevant position probability corresponding to the relevant track data; and comparing the target posterior probability with a first probability threshold, and marking the current positioning data as correct positioning data or error positioning data according to a comparison result. According to the method, the accuracy of the positioning data of the signal source is identified through the Bayesian identification model, historical data with large data volume does not need to be accessed, the identification efficiency of the positioning data is improved, and the accuracy of the positioning data is improved.

title: Method for evaluating reliability of system with grid-connected photovoltaic power station
abstract: The invention discloses a method for evaluating the reliability of a system with a grid-connected photovoltaic power station, belonging to the technical field of electrical power system control. The major consideration is given to photovoltaic power station output modeling with the combination of multi-state transition and time sequence information and to calculation of a threshold of the effect of a photovoltaic access system on a reliability index. The method comprises: employing fuzzy c-means clustering to make a clustering analysis of historical data of a photovoltaic power station according to four different weather types; establishing a transition probability matrix of power generation states of the photovoltaic power station on the basis of a clustering result; classifying the transition states of the photovoltaic power station into 16 basic types; performing ARMA time sequence modeling of the transition states; and finally establishing a complete output model with state transition and time sequence features of the photovoltaic power station considered. The model can relatively truly simulate the output condition of the photovoltaic power station. By means of the output model, the effect on the system reliability after photovoltaic accesses the system is tested. The method is simple and practical and plays an active role in evaluation of the effect of photovoltaic access on the system.

title: Data processor for assembling transport data packets
abstract: In a digital television signal processing system, a special codeword, a Packet Alignment Flag (PAF (14), is inserted into an MPEG codeword bitstream to signify the presence of a Group of Pictures (GOP). The PAF immediately precedes a Picture Start codeword for an "I" frame, which initiates a GOP. A data packet (12) under construction when a PAF (14) appears is terminated since a GOP is intended to begin at a packet boundary. Such termination may result in an abbreviated packet of less than a prescribed number of codewords needed to complete a data packet. The last word of each packet is designated as such to facilitate the subsequent combining of data packets (12) with respective headers (18). An incomplete data packet is filled with null (zeroed bits) words to make up a complete data packet with a prescribed number of words.

title: Self-development type voice language pattern recognition system, and method and program for structuring self-organizing neural network structure used for same system
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a self-development type voice language pattern recognition system capable of efficiently performing pattern recognition processing for voice language data at a high recognition rate and self-adaptively developing its system configuration.  <P>SOLUTION: Mutually relative neurons among respective neurons included in a self-organizing neural network structure structured in a pattern recognition section 12 are coupled with each other through a weight coefficient to be related in steps corresponding to the hierarchical recognition level of the voice language data. Specifically, each neuron is included in one of a plurality of network layers corresponding to hierarchical levels (phoneme level, word level, phrase level, and sentence level) of the voice language data, respective neurons included in the respective network layers are mutually coupled to only neurons included in network layers adjacent to each network layer.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2006,JPO&NCIPI

title: Compressing and volumetric reducing treatment of solid waste
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent the exposing of compressed bodies to the outside after an embedding disposition and to reduce cost by packing solid waste containing rubber, etc., which internally contain reaction after compression into containers and subjecting the waste to compressing and volumetric reducing in this state then to a heating treatment, thereby forming the stable compressed bodies.  
     CONSTITUTION: The fire retardant or other solid waste is packed into the containers 1 such as drum cans and are compressed by a compressing device 2 to form the compressed bodies 4 which are decreased in volume to a fraction. The compressed bodies 4 are then subjected to the heating treatment by a heater provided with a heating means 5 such as electric heater. The heating temp. is preferably set at the temp. above the softening temp. at which the rubber, etc., in the compressed bodies 4 soften to decrease the internally existing reaction and below the temp. at which the thermal decomposition of the rubber, etc., and the generation of harmful gases such as gaseous chlorine do not arise. Said temp. is preferably about 200W400°C with, for example, rubber. Plural pieces of the compressed bodies 4 from which the internal reaction is removed by the heating treatment in such a manner are packed into a storage container 6 such as drum can and thereafter, a fixing material 7 such as mortar is packed between the outside peripheral face of the compressed bodies 4 and the inside peripheral face of the container 6 by a packing machine 8 and the entire part is solidified. The waste body is thus formed. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Next-generation molecular profiling
abstract: Comprehensive molecular profiling provides a wealth of data concerning the molecular status of patient samples. Such data can be compared to patient response to treatments to identify biomarker signatures that predict response or non-response to such treatments. This approach has been applied to identify biomarker signatures that strongly correlate with response of colorectal cancer patients to FOLFOX. Described herein are data structures, data processing, and machine learning models to predict effectiveness of a treatment for a disease or disorder of a subject having a particular set of biomarkers, as well as an exemplary application of such a model to precision medicine, e.g., to methods for selecting a treatment based on a molecular profile, e.g., a treatment comprising administration of 5-fluorouracil/leucovorin combined with oxaliplatin (FOLFOX) or with irinotecan (FOLFIRI).

Such data can be compared to patient response to treatments to identify biomarker signatures that predict response or non-response to such treatments. This approach has been applied to identify biomarker signatures that strongly correlate with response of colorectal cancer patients to FOLFOX. title: Battery device and controlling method thereof
abstract: Provided is a control method of a battery, which allows an artificial neural network to learn so as to obtain first characteristic data in a battery corresponding to first input/output data, collects second input/output data for a certain period of time by charging or discharging the battery based on the obtained first characteristic data and usage environment information of a user, updates a parameter of the artificial neural network based on the collected second input/output data, and allows the artificial neural network to learn so as to obtain second characteristic data in the battery corresponding to the collected second input/output data based on the updated parameter.

title: Space self-attention mechanism and target detection method
abstract: The invention provides a space self-attention mechanism and a target detection method, which are used for carrying out self-adaptive average pooling on a characteristic diagram F to obtain a characteristic diagram F'; carrying out dimensionality reduction mapping twice on the characteristic diagram F ' to obtain F (F ') and g (F ') and expanding the F (F ') and the g (F ') according to rows to obtain a matrix M and a matrix N; multiplying the matrix M and the matrix N to obtain a matrix Z; performing row convolution on the matrix Z to obtain a characteristic diagram Y; activating and expanding by using sigmoid to obtain a characteristic diagram Q; and performing inverse self-adaptive average pooling on the feature map Q to obtain the weight of each pixel in the final space, and performing point multiplication on the weight and the feature map F to obtain a final feature map R as the input of the next convolutional layer. The method is based on a space self-attention mechanism, can better improve the precision of the target detection method, is simple and efficient, has low calculated amount, can be applied to the forward process of any convolutional network, provides global information guidance for a characteristic diagram, and improves the expression capacity of the convolutional network.

title: Boolean function affine equivalence judgment method based on matrix equivalence
abstract: The invention discloses a Boolean function affine equivalence judgment method based on matrix equivalence, which comprises the following steps: s1, carrying out affine equivalence judgment on the two Boolean functions of any variable; s2, generating an orthogonal matrix group and a sine matrix group according to the Boolean function F2, and obtaining an orthogonal matrix generator, a sine matrix generator and a nonsingular matrix generator; s3, inputting the orthogonal matrix generator, the sine matrix generator and the nonsingular matrix generator into a GAP system to generate all orthogonal matrices, sine matrices and nonsingular matrices, and traversing a search space to obtain ordered pairs (A, b) in the affine equivalence of the Boolean function; s4, the steps S1, S2 and S3 are applied to a combinational logic circuit, an FPGA programmable logic array and error correction coding.

title: Power grid operation assessment method for realizing multilayer indicator system
abstract: The invention provides a power grid operation assessment method for realizing a multilayer indicator system. The method comprises the following steps that step one, a multilayer indicator hierarchical model is established; step two, an evaluation and judgment matrix is constructed layer by layer; step three, the weight of each indicator is calculated by adopting a geometrical analysis method; step four, the consistency of the evaluation indicator judgment matrix is judged; and step five, the weight result of all layers is combined, and qualitative indicators and quantitative indicators required by a scheme layer are determined. Multilayer three-dimensional assessment is performed on the power grid operation process by the method so that the assessment result is more accurate. The method adopts a scientific analytical algorithm so that comprehensive and objective analysis and assessment of the multilayer indicator system can be realized, reconstruction of power grid operation can be realized and high efficiency and safety of power grid operation can be enhanced.
