title: Method for manufacturing electrode catalyst layer for fuel cell
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide: a method for manufacturing an electrode catalyst layer for a solid polymer fuel cell, the electrode catalyst layer including a polymer electrolyte, a conductive particle and a catalyst material and exhibiting high power generation characteristics using an oxide based non-platinum catalyst as the catalyst material; an electrode catalyst layer; a membrane electrode assembly; and a solid polymer fuel cell.SOLUTION: A method for manufacturing an electrode catalyst layer for a solid polymer fuel cell in which a polymer electrolyte membrane sandwiched with a pair of electrode catalyst layers is held by a pair of gas diffusion layers includes the step of embedding a polymer electrolyte to a conductive particle.

title: Feature fusion method based on deep learning
abstract: The invention discloses a feature fusion method based on deep learning, and relates to the technical field of electromagnetic signal identification. Firstly, preprocessing a target discrete signal, extracting power spectral density P of all data by using short-time Fourier transform, and taking the power spectral density P as the characteristic of a communication signal source; then, the power spectral density P is used as the characteristic of a communication radiation source and is led into a neural network trained in advance to finish the extraction of the characteristic, and the characteristic P1 is obtained; secondly, segmenting the target discrete signal, solving the relative deviation between the carrier frequency and the code element rate of each segment, and taking the relative deviation as a characteristic P2; finally, the extracted feature P2 and the feature P1 are correspondingly spliced together in magnitude order to serve as a fusion feature P3; the signals are identified using the fusion signature P3. Compared with the prior art, the technical scheme of the invention has the beneficial effects that: the method has higher identification rate and can accurately identify the communication signal equipment.

title: System and method for optimal sensor placement
abstract: A controller (380) includes a memory (330) that stores instructions and a processor (320) that executes the instructions. The instructions cause the controller (380) to execute a process that includes receiving (S656A, S656B) sensor data from a first sensor and a second sensor. The sensor data includes a time-series observation representing a first activity and a second activity. The controller (380) generates (S658A, S658B, S658C, S658D) models for each activity involving progressions through states indicated by the sensor data from each sensor. The controller (380) receives (S659A, S659B) from each sensor additional sensor data including a time-series observation representing the first activity and the second activity. The controller (380) determines (S660) likelihoods that the models generated a portion of the additional sensor data and calculates (S662) a pair-wise distance between each sensor-specific determined likelihood to obtain calculated distances. The calculated distances for each sensor are grouped (S664), and a relevance of each sensor to each activity is determined (S666) by executing a regression model using the grouped calculated distances.

title: System and Method for Identifying Travel Way Features for Autonomous Vehicle Motion Control
abstract: Systems and methods for identifying travel way features in real time are provided. A method can include receiving two-dimensional and three-dimensional data associated with the surrounding environment of a vehicle. The method can include providing the two-dimensional data as one or more input into a machine-learned segmentation model to output a two-dimensional segmentation. The method can include fusing the two-dimensional segmentation with the three-dimensional data to generate a three-dimensional segmentation. The method can include storing the three-dimensional segmentation in a classification database with data indicative of one or more previously generated three-dimensional segmentations. The method can include providing one or more datapoint sets from the classification database as one or more inputs into a machine-learned enhancing model to obtain an enhanced three-dimensional segmentation. And, the method can include identifying one or more travel way features based at least in part on the enhanced three-dimensional segmentation.

title: A device of automatic connection checking for data communication cable
abstract: According to the present invention, in the data communication system, a connection error of the data communication cable can be automatically checked for signal processing connected to the inside of the system. In particular, when the capacity of the system increases and the number of data cables to be connected increases, And a data communication system in which an incorrectly connected data cable is easily identified, wherein the main processing unit and the subordinate processing unit each have an identification function, wherein the main processing identification function receives a control signal from a processor. A first unique number generator for generating a cable unique identification number, a first counter for outputting a count value for counting a unique number applied from the unique number generator, and a count value applied from the first counter portion; And a scrambler for modulating the signal to protect it from a noise signal, And a first data transmitting and receiving unit for amplifying a unique number received from the scrambler and transmitting the same through a cable. Each of the same unique identification number is transmitted through a cable to monitor whether or not it is properly connected or incorrectly connected. Alternatively, it is possible to use the LED to check and to find an error part easily in the industry.

title: Error Detecting Device for Line Length Decoder
abstract:
The present invention relates to an error detection apparatus of a code decoder. In the related art, data compression can be efficiently performed according to a variable length coding method that can be easily implemented in hardware. However, when decoding is performed in real time, at least one run value is incorrect. As the positions of the generated coefficients continue to be wrong, there is a problem in that data processing takes a long time or errors occur in the processing operation as the coefficients are out of synchronization.  
   
    In view of this point, the present invention converts the absolute address (Addr) and the level signal (Level) by receiving and calculating the run / level code, and stores the result in the memory when the EOB signal is detected. And generate a coefficient that is a digital signal and detect a bit error in accordance with the coefficient generation.
     
    Therefore, when error propagation continues due to continuous bit errors, stable signal processing can be performed by stopping the sign operation of the system by detecting the error propagation.

In view of this point, the present invention converts the absolute address (Addr) and the level signal (Level) by receiving and calculating the run / level code, and stores the result in the memory when the EOB signal is detected. And generate a coefficient that is a digital signal and detect a bit error in accordance with the coefficient generation. Therefore, when error propagation continues due to continuous bit errors, stable signal processing can be performed by stopping the sign operation of the system by detecting the error propagation.

title: Time series data intelligent fault diagnosis method based on deep learning
abstract: The invention discloses a time series data intelligent fault diagnosis method based on deep learning, which comprises the following steps: 1) collecting one-dimensional time sequence health state data of the electromechanical equipment; the fault data is set at a preset measuring point of the electromechanical equipment; 2) constructing a one-dimensional time sequence original fault data set according to the acquired N health state data; 3) data preprocessing, wherein the preprocessing comprises normalization and data truncation; 4) constructing a two-dimensional characteristic diagram fault data set; 5) dividing a data set; 6) constructing a deep learning fault diagnosis model; 7) training a deep learning fault diagnosis model to obtain parameters; 8) and carrying out fault diagnosis on input sample data to be diagnosed by using a deep learning fault diagnosis model, and outputting a final fault diagnosis result. According to the invention, the two-dimensional characteristic diagram is constructed and the traditional convolutional neural network model structure is improved, so that the fault diagnosis speed and the fault diagnosis accuracy are improved.

title: Method for manufacturing transistor in semiconductor device
abstract: The present invention relates to a method of manufacturing a transistor of a semiconductor device, comprising the steps of: providing a semiconductor substrate provided with a device isolation film; Low concentration impurity ion implantation into a source / drain preliminary region in the semiconductor substrate; Depositing an insulating film for forming a gate on the semiconductor substrate; Etching the gate forming insulating layer to define a gate forming region to expose a predetermined semiconductor substrate; Depositing a nitride film on the resultant product; Isotropically over-etching the nitride film to form a spacer on a sidewall of an insulating film for forming a gate, and simultaneously etching a portion of the exposed semiconductor substrate; Annealing the result; Forming a gate insulating film on the etched semiconductor substrate; Embedding a conductive film for a gate on the entire surface of the resultant product in which the gate insulating film is formed; Etching the gate conductive film until the gate forming insulating film is exposed; Removing the gate forming insulating film; And forming a source / drain region by performing a high concentration of impurity ion implantation on the resultant product. As a result, the channel length can be secured.

SOLUTION: In this visual field expanding film, a lot of mortar-shaped recesses 12 and 14 are provided with the diameter of 1 to 1000 μm, the depth of a central part of >=1 μm which is <=13 thickness of a transparent film 1 on at least one side of the transparent film 1 and concerning the production thereof and liquid crystal display device using the same, a lot of mortar-shaped recesses 12 and 14 are provided by dispersing fine spherical bodies over the surface of a transparent solution casting film in the state of not hardening that film yet, embedding one part of these fine spherical bodies in the transparent solution casting film and removing these fine spherical bodies after the said transparent solution casting film is hardened. Besides, this visual field expanded film is mounted on a liquid crystal; display screen superimposedly.

title: A kind of Cycloid tooth profile correction method
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of Cycloid tooth profile correction methods, comprising the following steps: establishes Cycloidal Wheel optimized mathematical model；Cycloidal Wheel optimized mathematical model is solved using genetic algorithm, obtains optimal modification of equidistance amount and modification of moved distance amount；Force analysis is carried out according to tooth of the obtained modification of equidistance amount and modification of moved distance amount to different teeth number, obtains the contact tooth of the maximum tooth number of stress；It is compared according to obtained contact tooth with desired contact tooth, if meeting expectation contact tooth, exports result.The present invention can be improved Cycloidal Wheel design efficiency.

title: Method and apparatus for generating a model
abstract: The embodiment of the application discloses a method and a device for generating a model, wherein the  concrete implementation mode of the method comprises the steps of obtaining a sample set, wherein the sample set comprises sample sentences and marking knowledge corresponding to the sample sentences, selecting samples from the sample set, and executing the following training steps of inputting  th initial models of the sample sentences to generate  th prediction knowledge corresponding to the sample sentences, inputting  th prediction knowledge into second initial models to generate  th prediction sentences corresponding to  th prediction knowledge, inputting marking knowledge into the second initial models to generate second prediction sentences corresponding to the marking knowledge, inputting the second prediction sentences into  th initial models to generate second prediction knowledge corresponding to the second prediction sentences, determining  th reward signals, and training by using an intensified learning method according to the determined  th reward signals to obtain  th models.

title: Deep neural network system for similarity-based graph representations
abstract: There is described a neural network system implemented by one or more computers for determining graph similarity. The neural network system comprises one or more neural networks configured to process an input graph to generate a node state representation vector for each node of the input graph and an edge representation vector for each edge of the input graph; and process the node state representation vectors and the edge representation vectors to generate a vector representation of the input graph. The neural network system further comprises one or more processors configured to: receive a first graph; receive a second graph; generate a vector representation of the first graph; generate a vector representation of the second graph; determine a similarity score for the first graph and the second graph based upon the vector representations of the first graph and the second graph.

title: A kind of detection method and detection device of Bridge Crack
abstract: This application discloses a kind of detection method of Bridge Crack and detection devices.The detection method includes obtaining acquisition picture, carries out data extending to acquisition picture, and make training sample set and test sample collection；Construct full convolutional neural networks；Full convolutional neural networks are trained by training sample set to obtain trained full convolutional neural networks；Test sample collection is inputted into trained full convolutional neural networks, first time confirmation is carried out to Bridge Crack；Second is carried out to Bridge Crack with Bayesian decision theory to confirm.The speed that bridge Crack Detection can not only be promoted in this manner, can also promote the precision of bridge Crack Detection.

title: Neural network matrix multiplication in memory cells
abstract: Various examples for accelerating multiplication operations are presented, which can be employed in neural network operations, among other applications. In one example, a circuit comprises a non-volatile memory cell, and an input circuit coupled to a gate terminal of the non-volatile memory cell. The input circuit is configured to ramp a control voltage applied to the gate terminal at a ramp rate representing a multiplicand value. An output circuit coupled to an output terminal of the non-volatile memory cell and is configured to generate an output pulse based on the control voltage satisfying a threshold voltage of the non-volatile memory cell, where the output pulse has a duration comprising the multiplicand value multiplied by a multiplier value represented by the threshold voltage.

title: Systems and Methods for Customized Data Parsing and Paraphrasing
abstract: An approach is provided in which an information handling system parses content received from resources based on a user query corresponding to a user. Next, the information handling system selects a set of prioritized content from the parsed content based on a confidence ranking the plurality of parsed content. The information handling system then filters the set of prioritized content based on a learning style of the user and presents a summarized output of the filtered set of prioritized content to the user.

title: Method for preventing activation of resume function in a cruise control system
abstract: A method to selectively prevent a vehicle from resuming a vehicle set speed stored in memory of a cruise control system includes monitoring a vehicle speed, determining that the vehicle speed indicates operation in a low speed range, determining a threshold slow zone maneuver based upon the vehicle speed substantially remaining in the low speed range through a predetermined duration, and inhibiting resumption of the vehicle set speed based upon the threshold slow zone maneuver.

title: Method and system for optimizing high performance computational architecture sparse matrix vector multiplication
abstract: The invention discloses a method for optimizing sparse matrix vector multiplication of a high-performance computing framework, which divides sparse matrix vector multiplication into two parts of column direction multiplication and row direction addition: the column-wise multiplication operation is firstly carried out according to the columns of the sparse matrix, and in the process, the data access of the input vector x is changed from irregular and discrete to continuous; the line-to-line addition operation is carried out according to the line of the intermediate result, and in the process, the data access of the output vector y is changed from irregular and discrete to continuous, so that the problem of high access delay caused by irregular data access is avoided; the invention also designs a four-layer division mechanism which comprises core group layer division, customized division, secondary core layer division and local memory layer division, so that a multi-level computing framework and a memory structure of 'light of Shenwei Taihu' are fully utilized, and the problems of local memory limitation and load imbalance on a computing core are avoided.

title: Digital rights management based on formatting feature
abstract: Technologies are generally described for methods and systems effective to generate modified content data. In some examples, the methods may include obtaining, by a processor, identification data associated with an identification. The processor may generate offset data using the identification data, where the offset data may include an indication of the identification. The processor may determine first position data that may be effective to define a first position of a first object and a second position of a second object in a source document that corresponds to source content data. The processor may generate second position data using the offset data and the first position data. The second position data may be effective to define a third position of the first object and a fourth position of the second object. The processor may generate the modified content data by application of the second position data to the source content data.

title: A vehicle, a controlling apparatus for the vehicle and a method for controlling the vehicle
abstract: The present invention relates to a vehicle, a vehicle control apparatus, and a control method for a vehicle, the vehicle including a lane information obtaining unit for obtaining information on a lane, A vehicle control unit for determining a risk level indicating a dangerous degree at the time of lane change by using at least one of the environment of the vehicle and the operation of the vehicle at the time of departure and an alarm unit for providing the driver with different levels of warning according to the risk have.

title: Robot control apparatus, robot control method, and robot control program
abstract: The present invention provides a robot control technology capable of quickly picking a workpiece to be conveyed. The arrival prediction unit 320 picks up the workpiece W transported by the transport device 200 by the picking device 120 based on the transport speed information Ivt supplied from the transport device 200 or the like and the sensing information Ise supplied from the image acquisition device 410. title: Light emission microscope sample
abstract: A photo emission microscope sample comprises: a chip which has a first bonding pad; a PCB board which has a second bonding pad electrically connected with the first bonding pad; and a fixing carrying assembly which is used for carrying and fixing the chip. The photo emission microscope sample further comprises: a transparent base plate which passes through an embedding hole of the PCB board and bears the chip; a fixing assembly which is used for fixing the chip mechanically onto to the transparent base plate, wherein the transparent base plate and the PCB board are interlocked and in parallel with each other; and an inversion assembly which is used for inverting the PCB board around a shaft and locking the PCB board. The photo emission microscope sample has quick preparation and high quality.

title: A kind of UPLC-MS-MS rapid screenings Artemisia capillaris and the method for artemisia scoparia difference base source otherness
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of UPLC MS MS rapid screenings Artemisia capillaris and the method for artemisia scoparia difference base source otherness, including：（1）Artemisia capillaris to be distinguished and artemisia scoparia medicinal material are collected, standard decoction sample is made；（2）Sample is entered into UPLC MS MS network analyses, obtains corresponding mass spectrometric data；（3）The data of acquired original are introduced directly into Compound Discoverer2.1, carry out data analysis；（4）Using the correction chromatographic peak drift of Dynamic Programming calculating method, align chromatographic peak, and the material for being closer to retention time using closest clustering method is registered as a compound；（5）The material of sample room otherness is calculated using variance analysis, determines the otherness of different Ji Yuan.The output of compound Information in Mass Spectra is original document by the present invention, it is not required to be converted into extended formatting, it can be introduced directly into and search for compound into Compound Discoverer2.1 storehouses, this method can realize otherness compound present in quick lock in Chinese medicine sample, and measure is quickly analyzed suitable for high-volume sample.

title: Electric car permanent magnet synchronous motor command filtering fuzzy control method taking iron loss into account
abstract: The invention discloses an electric car permanent magnet synchronous motor command filtering fuzzy control method taking iron loss into account. According to the fuzzy control method, a command filtering technology is introduced in a traditional back-stepping design method, error caused by filtering is reduced by introduction of compensation signals, and a problem of 'calculation explosion' caused by continuous derivation in the traditional back-stepping control is overcome successfully. In the control method provided by the invention, a fuzzy logic system is used for approaching a nonlinear function in the system, a command filtering back-stepping technology and a fuzzy self-adaptive method are combined together to form a fuzzy self-adaptive speed controller; after being regulated by the control method provided by the invention, a motor can quickly run in a steady state, and the control method is more suitable for a control object needing fast dynamic response, such as an electric car drive system; simulation result shows that, with the control method provided by the invention, influence caused by inaccuracy of parameters can be overcome, ideal control effect is guaranteed beneficially, and fast and steady response to revolving speed is realized.

title: A kind of close-coupled switch temperature harvester
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of close-coupled switch temperature harvester, comprising: killer switch, is characterized in that: described killer switch is equipped with film circuit board outward, between described film circuit board and killer switch, is connected by heat conductive silica gel.The utility model gathers switch temperature data by heat conductive silica gel heat conduction to temperature sensor, by connector socket, data upload is arrived to temperature collect module, and full wafer temperature collecting device all covers embedding by heat conductive silica gel, ensures insulation, dustproof, moistureproof.The utility model, with small compact, fast and easy substitute mode, greatly improves installing space and the quick-replaceable time of product, thereby effectively reduces production costs, and promotes product quality, improves enterprise's business benefit.

title: Injection for treating hepatitis B and its preparation
abstract: The invention provides an injection for treating hepatitis B and its preparation wherein the preparation process comprises, (1) disintegrating flavescent sophora root into coarse powder, (2) subjecint flavescent sophora root coarse powder to diacolation with hydrochloric acid, (c )adjusting the pH of the diacolation liquid with queous alkali, filtering, (4) passing the filter liquor to H#+[+] type cationic ion-exchange resin, aqueous ammonia elution of the positive resin, collecting the eluent, (5) adjusting the pH of the eluent to acidity with acids, filtering, (6) passing the filter liquor to OH#+[+] type anion exchange resin, collecting the effluent liquid, (7) passing the effluent liquid to cationic ion-exchange resin, aqueous ammonia elution of the cationic ion-exchange resin, collecting the eluent and condensating till dry, thus obtaining sophocarpidine, (8) preparing aqueous solution of sophocarpidine, adjusting the pH of the aqueous solution of sophocarpidine, (9) charging activated charcoal, heating, filtering, (10) embedding to obtain colourless injection.

title: Blending control method for temperature of reactive kettle
abstract: The invention relates to a blending control method for temperature of a reactive kettle. The prior method is poor in control effect and not suitable for the requirements on energy saving and emission reduction and environment protection. The method provided by the invention comprises the following steps of: firstly, designing a proportional plus integral plus derivative controller for a reactive kettle temperature process through a typical responsive cure method, then, building a process model necessary for a non-minimized model prediction function controller based on the real-time process data of the reactive kettle temperature, further designing a non-minimized model prediction function proportional plus integral plus derivative controller, and obtaining the present control parameter value according to a target function. The control method provided by the invention can effectively reduce the error between a reactive kettle temperature technological parameter and a practical reactive kettle temperature technological parameter, so as to further make up for the defects of a conventional controller and synchronously ensure that a control device is operated in an optimal state, so that the reactive kettle temperature technological parameter in the production process can be strictly controlled.

title: Method for eliminating harmonic interference of earthquake data
abstract: The invention claims a method for eliminating harmonic interference of earthquake data, comprising the following steps: according to the original waveform data in the earthquake data, determining the initial frequency of harmonic interference through the oscillation period of the original data and the maximum position of the amplitude spectrum; calculating the amplitude of the harmonic interference cosine function; and according to the earthquake data vector, the amplitude of harmonic interference cosine function, the harmonic interference cosine function vector and the target function derivative, the harmonic interference frequency amendment quantity and the time delay amendment quantity, adopting a frequency modifier formula to determine the harmonic interference frequency; and calculating the effective signal of earthquake. The method overcomes the disadvantage that the frequency domain suppresses the harmonic interference, and is quicker in speed than the time domain harmonic interference suppressing method, thereby improving the signal-to-noise ratio, and being capable of eliminating the harmonic interference in the earthquake data generated by high voltage transmission line and also eliminating the harmonic interference in the earthquake data generated by periodic vibration.

title: Shock absorber
abstract: PURPOSE: A shock absorber is provided to promote the simplification of a piston valve structure and the improvement of productivity by embedding a function of a disc-S in the shock absorber. CONSTITUTION: A shock absorber is constituted of a piston(30) combined to a piston rod(20) moving rectilinearly along a tube(10), and an intake valve(60) and a disc(70) assembled on both sides of the piston controlling paths(31,32) flowing oil to chambers(40,50). Herein, many orifice holes(64) are installed in slit part(62) of the intake valve at a certain interval to make oil in a rebound chamber(40) flow to a compression chamber(50) via the orifice holes at low speed damping section and pass through a compression path(32). And only a disc is assembled without a disc-S in the rebound path.

title: Method for making spatial entropy based decision-tree considering distribution of spatial data
abstract: A method for constructing a spatial entropy-based decision tree considering distribution of spatial data is provided to enable a user to estimate correlation of objects non-spatially classified in a spatial dimension by considering the distribution of the spatial data. Dispersion reflecting a distance ratio between a central point of each class and the object included in the same class is calculated. Dissimilarity is calculated by standardizing the central point of each class to obey Z-normal distribution based on the dispersion and the number of data. Spatial entropy is calculated by considering a ratio between the dispersion and the dissimilarity.

title: Virtual digital brain construction method and system and intelligent robot control system
abstract: The present disclosure provides a virtual digital brain construction method and system and an intelligent robot control system, wherein the virtual digital brain construction method comprises the following steps: constructing a virtual digital brain to obtain a brain function causal connection network in a resting state and a task state; constructing a brain structure network by using a mixed fiber bundle tracking method combining a deterministic algorithm and a probabilistic algorithm; comparing the structure network with the causal connection network of brain function, deleting the causal connection without direct structure connection between brain regions to obtain improved virtual digital brain; and taking the resting state as a baseline to obtain the activation state of the brain region under the stimulation of the task signal, and establishing a node neural activity signal prediction model which is the final virtual digital brain. According to the method, the causal connection network of the brain function is improved through the structural network, the causal connection without direct structural connection between brain regions is deleted by jointly using the function and structural information, and the influence of indirect connection is removed, so that a more effective node neural activity signal prediction model can be established in subsequent processing.

title: Method for creating a markov process that generates sequences
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for creating a Markov process that generates sequences. Each sequence has a finite length L, comprises items from a set of a specific number n of items, and satisfies one or more control constraints specifying one or more requirements on the sequence. The method comprises the steps of receiving data defining an initial Markov process of a specific order d and having an initial probability distribution and of receiving data defining one or more control constraints. The method further comprises the step of generating data defining intermediary matrices, each matrix being of dimension nd by n, by zeroing out transitions in the initial Markov process data that are forbidden by the one or more control constraints.
text: Method for creating a markov process that generates sequences The present invention relates to a method for creating a Markov process that generates sequences. Each sequence has a finite length L, comprises items from a set of a specific number n of items, and satisfies one or more control constraints specifying one or more requirements on the sequence. The method comprises the steps of receiving data defining an initial Markov process of a specific order d and having an initial probability distribution and of receiving data defining one or more control constraints. The method further comprises the step of generating data defining intermediary matrices, each matrix being of dimension nd by n, by zeroing out transitions in the initial Markov process data that are forbidden by the one or more control constraints.

title: Composite microbial inoculum for improving corn soaking effect and application thereof
abstract: The invention relates to the field of corn deep processing, and discloses a composite microbial inoculum for improving a corn soaking effect and application thereof. The compound microbial inoculum contains strains capable of producing protease, cellulase and hemicellulase. The invention utilizes several microbes with different functions to ferment and produce functional enzymes such as protease, hemicellulase, cellulase and the like, and combines the functional enzymes into a corn soaking section, thereby achieving the purpose of reducing SO based on the microbial community clustering effect 2 The addition amount, the soaking time is shortened, and the yield of the starch is improved.

title: The laser barrier-avoiding method of a kind of pilotless automobile and system
abstract: The invention discloses laser barrier-avoiding method and the system of a kind of pilotless automobile, this system includes Driving control module, laser assembly, automatic obstacle avoiding module, wherein, Driving control module controls the traveling of pilotless automobile by the instruction of automatic obstacle avoiding module；Laser assembly includes generating laser and the laser pickoff being arranged on pilotless automobile, described generating laser outwardly sends laser, described laser pickoff receives the laser that extraneous barrier reflects, and laser signal is sent the automatic obstacle avoiding module to pilotless automobile；Automatic obstacle avoiding module controls pilotless automobile for the laser signal sent according to laser instrument receptor and carries out avoidance.The laser obstacle avoidance system of pilotless automobile of the present invention, it is possible to carried out disturbance in judgement thing by acceptance by the laser signal of external reflection, it is achieved the automatic obstacle-avoiding of pilotless automobile, automaticity is high, safe and reliable, easy to use.

title: Intelligent medicine box
abstract: The utility model relates to an intelligence medicine box, comprises a box bod and a box cover, be connected through pivot mechanism between box body and the lid, a plurality of cell bodies have been seted up in the box body, it holds gliding medicine storage cavity around can to run through in the cell body, the rear portion at medicine storage cavity is equipped with the motor drive who stores up medicine cavity one-to-one, motor drive is connected with the rear portion transmission of medicine storage cavity, be equipped with automatically controlled box on the back inner wall of box body, the inside control circuit board that is equipped with of automatically controlled box, be equipped with blood pressure measuring device in one side of box body, the display screen is installed in the embedding in the lid, speaker and button, all motor drive, blood pressure measuring device, the display screen, speaker and button pass through cable connection control circuit board, control circuit board passes through during power cord and plug access 220V commercial. title: Adaptive health status scoring for network assurance
abstract: In one embodiment, a device receives network metrics regarding networking equipment of a network in a physical location. The device predicts a health status score for the networking equipment in the physical location using the received network metrics as input to a machine learning-based predictive scoring model. The device provides an indication of the predicted health status score in conjunction with a visualization of the physical location for display by an electronic display. The device adjusts the predictive scoring model based on feedback regarding the predicted health status score.

title: Data Processing System with Machine Learning Engine to Provide Roadside Assistance Functions
abstract: Systems, methods, computer-readable media, and apparatuses for receiving requests for roadside assistance, generating user interfaces and using machine learning to generate roadside assistance instructions are provided. In some examples, a request for roadside assistance may be received. A user and one or more partners may be identified based on the request. In some examples, a profile associated with the user, partner or the like may be identified. A user interface may be generated based on the profile and may include features unique to the profile, partner, or the like. In some arrangements, the interface may include a first portion and a second portion. Selection of an option from the first portion may cause the system to identify data for display in the second portion and cause the data to be displayed in the second portion. Machine learning may be used to determine or identify one or more roadside assistance instructions and a roadside assistance instruction may be generated and executed.

title: A kind of indoor orientation method and device based on SLAM
abstract: The embodiment of the present invention provides a kind of indoor orientation method and device based on SLAM, obtain the bit image undetermined of user terminal uploads, the picture database of posture information is had by SFM algorithm rapid build, the feature vector of bit image undetermined and the feature vector set of database images are extracted by convolutional neural networks, calculate the similarity between bit image undetermined and the feature vector of database images, complete winding detection, obtain in picture database with the highest image of image similarity to be positioned and its corresponding first posture information, to obtain the accurate position of user terminal and posture information.Bag of words are used with traditional vision SLAM algorithm, recognition capability is weaker to be compared, and the present invention uses the profound feature of neural network learning image, and higher recognition accuracy may be implemented, and improves the accuracy rate of winding detection.

title: Blending connection recommendation streams
abstract: A machine may be configured to blend connection recommendation streams. For example, the machine, based on a member identifier of a member of a SNS, accesses a list of other members of the SNS and a list of guests (e.g., non-members). The machine identifies a member probability value representing a likelihood of the member inviting another member to connect via the social graph of the member, and identifies a guest probability value representing a likelihood of the member inviting a guest to connect via the social graph. The machine generates a blended list of other members and guests based on the member probability values, the guest probability values, and a coefficient value selected to control a presence of a type of connections in the blended list. The machine generates recommendations for the member to invite people included in the blended list to connect with the member via the social graph.

title: Autonomous farm equipment hitching to a tractor
abstract: A method for autonomously maneuvering a tractor in reverse for attachment to a trailer using a hitch assist system, the method including: entering a hitch assist mode, displaying a camera image on a user interface, and receiving an indication of a selected trailer. The method also includes determining a planned path with a computing device a tractor path from an initial position to a final position adjacent the trailer, the tractor path including maneuvers configured to move the tractor along the tractor path from the initial position to the final position. The method also includes autonomously following, at a drive system in communication with the computing device, the tractor path from the initial position to the final position.

title: Enhanced grant detection method
abstract: A method and system to reduce a probability of incorrect interruption of an uplink transmission of a wireless device are disclosed. According to one aspect, decoding of a sequence of bits obtained from a signal received by the wireless device is performed without knowing whether the sequence corresponds to one of a grant for uplink transmission and noise. Decoding of the sequence of bits is performed to determine a probability metric associated with a first m bits of the sequence, where m is an integer greater than 1. The probability metric is compared to a threshold. The received signal is interpreted as having a grant sequence if the probability metric is greater than the threshold. The received signal is interpreted as noise if the probability metric is not greater than the threshold.

title: Algorithm testing method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium
abstract: A test method of an algorithm is applied to the technical field of test and comprises the following steps: the method comprises the steps of carrying out voice signal processing on a voice signal to be recognized by adopting an algorithm to be tested to obtain audio data, carrying out voice recognition on the audio data by adopting a preset voice recognition algorithm model to obtain corresponding voice recognition accuracy, updating the value of the parameter of the algorithm to be tested according to a preset parameter adjusting algorithm, carrying out the step of carrying out voice signal processing on the voice signal to be recognized by adopting the algorithm to be tested again, and selecting the value of the parameter which enables the voice recognition accuracy to be the highest from all the obtained voice recognition accuracy as the optimal value of the parameter of the algorithm to be tested after traversing all the values of the parameter of the algorithm to be tested. The invention also discloses a testing device, electronic equipment and a storage medium of the algorithm, which are applicable to different algorithms and have high testing efficiency.

title: Embedding-based Parsing of Search Queries on Online Social Networks
abstract: In one embodiment, a method includes receiving a query including multiple n-grams; parsing the query to identify a subset of n-grams; generating, for each identified n-gram, an embedding of the n-gram; determining, for each identified n-gram, one or more word senses; calculating, for each word sense for each identified n-gram, a relatedness-score for the word sense based similarity metrics of the embedding of the word sense and the embeddings of each of the other word senses corresponding to the other identified n-grams; selecting, for each identified n-gram, one of the word senses determined for the identified n-gram having a highest relatedness-score; identifying objects matching at least a portion of the query; ranking each identified object based on a quality of matching of the object to selected word senses; and sending search results corresponding to one or more of the identified objects and having a rank greater than a threshold rank.

title: Catheter with fluid medication injectors
abstract: A device for injecting medication into a vessel wall includes a plurality of flexible tubes mounted between a multi-lumen catheter and a grommet. A push-pull wire is connected to the grommet and passed through a lumen of the multi-lumen catheter. A plurality of injectors are mounted on each of the flexible tubes. During use, the device is first positioned in a vessel. The push-pull wire is then partially withdrawn forcing the grommet to advance towards the multi-lumen catheter. The advancing grommet forces the flexible tubes to bow outwardly, embedding the injectors into the vessel wall. A fluid medication is then introduced through the multi-lumen catheter, into the flexible tubes and out of the injectors for infusion into the vessel wall.

title: Optimization of Parameters of a System, Product, or Process
abstract: A computer-implemented method is provided for optimization of parameters of a system, product, or process. The method includes establishing an optimization procedure for a system, product, or process. The system, product, or process has an evaluable performance that is dependent on values of one or more adjustable parameters. The method includes receiving one or more prior evaluations of performance of the system, product, or process. The one or more prior evaluations are respectively associated with one or more prior variants of the system, product, or process. The one or more prior variants are each defined by a set of values for the one or more adjustable parameters. The method includes utilizing an optimization algorithm to generate a suggested variant based at least in part on the one or more prior evaluations of performance and the associated set of values.

title: A kind of water outlet ammonia nitrogen concentration prediction technique based on adaptive Recurrent Fuzzy Neural Network
abstract: A kind of water outlet ammonia nitrogen concentration prediction technique based on adaptive Recurrent Fuzzy Neural Network not only belongs to control field, but also belongs to water treatment field.For the problems such as current sewage disposal process water outlet ammonia nitrogen concentration measurement process is cumbersome, instrument and equipment cost is high, measurement result reliability and accuracy is low, the present invention is based on municipal sewage treatment biochemical reaction characteristics, the prediction to crucial water quality parameter ammonia nitrogen concentration is realized using a kind of adaptive recurrence fuzzy neural network, solves the problems, such as that water outlet ammonia nitrogen concentration is difficult to measure；The result shows that the Recurrent Fuzzy Neural Network can be quick.The accurately concentration of prediction sewage treatment water outlet ammonia nitrogen is conducive to the concentration quality monitoring level of lifting sewage treatment process water outlet ammonia nitrogen and reinforces municipal sewage plant's fine-grained management.

title: Bayes-network-based diagnosis system e.g. for motor vehicles, has actual state of technical system formed with status/state parameters
abstract: A diagnosis procedure for technical systems (2) has Bayes-network based expert system, in which in at least one electronic computer unit a data bank (knowledge-base) in the form of a model-based junction tree and model based decision is filed, in which the model based decision is partly based on analytic computer modules (M1,M2,MM) of the technical system. The actual state of the technical system (2) is formed with status (state) parameters (T1,T2...Tn) and the threshold values are selected for a diagnosis decision by the status parameter.

title: Method for checking plug connections
abstract: The invention relates to a method (300) for checking a plug connection, in which a first plug part is connected to a second plug part. The method (300) comprises determining (301) a force-time curve (103) of a force (101) applied by an assembler during an assembly process of a plug connection. In addition, the method (300) comprises determining (302) characteristic values of a plurality of characteristics of the force-time curve (103). The method (300) also comprises classifying (303) the plug connection by means of a machine-learned classifier on the basis of the characteristic values of the plurality of characteristics.

title: The control method and system of switched reluctance machines
abstract: The present invention is torque pulsation big technical problem when solving switched reluctance machines operation, provides a kind of control method and system of switched reluctance machines, which includes the following steps：Obtain the given rotating speed of switched reluctance machines；Obtain the phase current of the rotor-position signal and each phase of switched reluctance machines；The feedback rotating speed of switched reluctance machines is calculated according to rotor-position signal；The expectation torque of switched reluctance machines is calculated according to given rotating speed and feedback rotating speed；The output torque of each phase of switched reluctance machines is distributed according to desired torque, and the expectation electric current of each phase of switched reluctance machines is calculated according to the output torque of each phase of switched reluctance machines；According to the expectation electric current and phase current of each phase of switched reluctance machines, corresponding drive signal is generated using neural network ADAPTIVE ROBUST sliding mode control algorithm, to be controlled switched reluctance machines according to drive signal.The present invention can effectively inhibit the torque pulsation of switched reluctance machines.

title: Closed-loop mechanical arm system collision detection method based on momentum observer
abstract: The invention relates to a collision detection method of a closed-loop mechanical arm system, in particular to a collision detection method of the closed-loop mechanical arm system based on a momentum observer, and belongs to the technical field of robots. According to the invention, the motion sensor is arranged at the joint of the closed-loop mechanical arm system to measure the joint motion information, the six-dimensional force/torque sensor is arranged to measure the constraint force and the constraint torque of any at least one joint in each closed loop, and the collision recognition and the real-time detection of the collision information of the closed-loop mechanical arm system are realized based on the momentum observer. The sensors required by the method are all arranged at the joints, so that the method is simple in assembly and high in reliability and flexibility; according to the method, joint angular acceleration information or inversion of a high-dimensional time-varying quality characteristic matrix is not needed, and the collision information observation result is high in precision and low in time delay; the method can adjust the performance and the detection sensitivity of the observer by changing the gain of the observer and the collision judgment threshold value.

abstract: Disclosed is an activity monitor for a modular software system. The system has a first software component that configures the operation of a second software component via a proxy and stub interface. The activity monitor has an input that monitors a first event associated with the first software component and a second event associated with the proxy, a processor arranged to compare the first and second events to a schedule of events to assess compliance with the schedule of events, and an output to generate an error message in response to non-compliance with the schedule of events. The system may be a vehicle system, such as the cruise control and the second software component is a drivetrain component. The first software component may be a logic component that generates command events to control the second component based on input events, such as speed sensor readings.

title: System, method and computer program product for query clarification
abstract: A system, method and computer program product for query clarification are described. Data from a corpus is automatically labelled using a trained classifier. The labels are assigned to indicator variables that each relate to the context of each data. During query, a decision tree is generated from the search results in such a way as to maximize information gain obtainable from a question:answer pair that can be posed to the user. The search results can be narrowed by obtaining the answer and correspondingly pruning the decision tree.

title: Heuristic graph embedding methods for adiabatic quantum computation optimization
abstract: Methods are provided for implementing schemes for embedding a particular optimization problem into a particular hardware solution employing unique graph embedding techniques. The disclosed methods implement an adiabatic quantum optimization in a quantum computing device or a quantum processor. Heuristics for graph minor embedding are employed to map a problem graph structure of a particular binary unconstrained optimization problem onto a physical graph structure (topology) of the quantum computing device or quantum processor to provide an optimized hardware implementation. Known constraints that are presented with current schemes in their application to particular hardware solutions are avoided, including limited qubit connectivity and the presence of faulty qubits.

title: A kind of three-dimensional class cycloid intelligence polishing method of Hilbert curve guidance
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of three-dimensional class cycloid intelligence polishing methods of Hilbert curve guidance, comprising steps of establishing the space reflection relationship of workpiece three-dimension curved surface and two-dimensional surface；Standard Hilbert curve is generated in two-dimensional parameter domain, and is carried out deformation and obtained improvement Hilbert curve；To improve Hilbert curve as guide line, step pitch and the adjustable cycloidal path of radius are generated；Computation model, the average value and mean square deviation of each vertex material removal depth of prediction three-dimensional grid curved surface are removed using artificial neural network fitting polishing material；Constrain the value range of each parameter of polishing locus；Using the average value of material removal depth and mean square deviation as optimization aim, determine that the optimal value of adjustable parameter in cycloidal path combines using intelligent optimization algorithm；The cycloidal path that parameter determines is projected on two-dimensional surface, and resequences to form complete cycloidal path to the track disconnected on boundary；By the cycloidal path inverse mapping on two-dimensional surface to three-dimension curved surface, the three-dimensional class cycloidal path of final actual processing is obtained.

title: In-vitro neural network construction system based on robotization
abstract: The utility model discloses an in vitro neural network construction system based on robotization, wherein a biological culture dish is internally provided with neuron tissues to be constructed; the laser subsystem comprises a laser source, a laser conduction device and a focusing objective lens, the laser source is connected with the laser conduction device through an energy supply cable and used for conducting laser energy, the focusing objective lens is connected with the laser conduction device through a laser optical fiber and arranged above the biological culture dish, and the focusing objective lens is used for focusing the conducted laser; the focusing objective lens is fixed on the displacement control platform, the biological culture dish is arranged below the focusing objective lens by controlling the displacement control platform to move, and laser ablation or optical stimulation is carried out on target point cells or tissues in the biological culture dish. The utility model discloses possible to carry out the specificity to single neuron and activate, can also record the reaction of other neurons in the neural network simultaneously, easily integrate, and integrated cost is lower, possesses very high flexibility and maneuverability.

title: Method and apparatus for variable time delay optical coherent transient signal processing
abstract: A method of optical coherent transient signal processing to generate a signal (10) having a variable time delay, by applying a pattern optical pulse (40), a first and second frequency-shifted, chirped optical pulse (20, 30), and a data optical pulse (50) to the optical absorbing medium (100), whereby each pulse is incident to the absorbing medium at a same spatial location and at a different incident angle, whereby an output signal is emitted from the absorbing medium after a time delay that is variable according to an amount of frequency-shifting of the chirped optical pulses.

title: Method and driver assistance system for automatically controlling the speed of a vehicle
abstract:
The invention relates to a method for automatically controlling the speed of a vehicle, wherein a triggering of the automatic control in response to the operation of an accelerator pedal of the vehicle takes place.
      It is envisaged that when the accelerator pedal is released by a driver assistance system (10), a limit is set to a travel speed that is equal to or greater than a predetermined amount greater than a measured vehicle speed at the time the accelerator pedal is released.   The invention further relates to a driver assistance system (10) for a vehicle for automatically controlling the speed of the vehicle.

title: Vehicle control system, vehicle control method, and storage medium
abstract: A vehicle control system includes: a lane change support control unit ( 150 ) configured to execute lane change of a vehicle independently of a steering operation by an occupant of the vehicle by receiving an operation from the occupant of the vehicle; a road information acquiring unit ( 151 ) configured to acquire a type of a road on which the vehicle is traveling; a lane changeability determining unit ( 152, 153 ) configured to determine whether lane change of the vehicle is to be executed by the lane change support control unit; and a lane keeping support control unit ( 140 ) configured to control a steering device such that the vehicle is prevented from departing from a lane on which the vehicle is traveling independently of the steering operation by the occupant of the vehicle and to continue to perform a lane keeping operation in a case that the lane changeability determining unit determines that lane change of the vehicle is not to be executed on the basis of the type of the road.

title: Mechanism-parameter-calibration method for robotic arm system
abstract: A mechanism-parametric-calibration method for a robotic arm system is provided, including: controlling the robotic arm to perform a plurality of actions so that one end of the robotic arm moves toward corresponding predictive positioning-points; determining a predictive relative-displacement between each two of the predictive positioning-points; after each of the actions is performed, sensing three-dimensional positioning information of the end of the robotic arm; determining, according to the three-dimensional positioning information, a measured relative-displacement moved by the end of the robotic-arm when each two of the actions are performed; deriving an equation corresponding to the robotic arm from the predictive relative-displacements and the measured relative-displacements; and utilizing a feasible algorithm to find the solution of the equation. When an ambient temperature changes or a stress variation on the robotic arm exceeds a predetermined range, re-obtaining the set of mechanism parametric deviations corresponds to a current robot configuration.

title: Multiple control-point control system and method of use
abstract: A control system for rapid fault tolerant control of a multiple control-point apparatus is disclosed. The system comprises: a host subsystem acting as a user interface; a plurality of control-point actuators; a master controller subsystem which receives initialization data from the host terminal and which generates behavior commands; and a control-point controller subsystem which receives behavior commands from the master controller subsystem and generates control-point actuator commands. The control-point controller subsystem is made fault tolerant by using a plurality of control-point processors connected to control-point interfaces through a programmable crossbar switch such that if any of the control-point processors develops a fault, the crossbar switch will connect one of the other control-point processors to the control-point interface previously serviced by the faulty control-point processors. The master controller subsystem can be made fault tolerant by including an odd number of at least three master processors in the master controller subsystem such that each master processor runs a common control program in parallel with every other master processor and the master control output for each master processor is compared with the other master control outputs to generate the output common to the majority of master processors as the majority control output.

abstract: Location and mapping method. title: High voltage system electric voltage and insulaiton measurement circuit
abstract: The present invention provides a measurement device for the voltage of a high voltage system and an insulation resistance, which comprises a high voltage system direct current voltage sampling module, an insulation resistance sampling module, a signal processing module, a high voltage system isolation module, a primary controller module, a CAN bus interface module and a power supply module. The high voltage system direct current voltage sampling module and the insulation resistance sampling module are connected with a positive end of a high voltage direct current system by sampling resistances R36 and R38, and connected with a negative end of the high voltage direct current system by the sampling resistances R37 and R39. The sampling voltage is directly transmitted to the signal processing module through amplifiers U16A and U17B, and voltage signals U1 and U2 are output. The voltage signals U1 and U2 are isolated after connecting with the high voltage system isolation module, and output signals AD1 and AD2 are directly input an AD converter of the primary controller module. Pins164 and 265 of a primary controller are connected with the CAN bus interface module. A power supplying module is connected with a direct current power supply +9V-+18V which can supply the whole system. The present invention can transmit the measured insulation resistance and the direct current voltage to a CAN bus and can be connected to vehicle systems easily.

title: Active optical power dividing or combining transmission method and device
abstract: The invention discloses an active optical power dividing or combining transmission method and device, which solve the problems that the existing optical power dividing or combining devices are difficult to manufacture, can not be flexibly configured, have large transmission loss and poor consistency or have high power consumption, high error rate and the like. The invention comprises an active optical power dividing or combining transmission method and device. The invention has no factors such as optical amplification, power amplification and the like which are easy to introduce noise and cause signal distortion, the optical power division is obtained by converting a plurality of paths of electric signals into optical signals, and the whole-process digital signal processing is kept in the processes of copying, merging, mapping and the like of the electric signals, thereby ensuring the signal integrity and the low bit error rate of high-speed signals.

title: Satellite radio wave receiving device, electronic timepiece, positioning control method, and storage medium
abstract: A processor of a satellite radio wave receiving device processes radio waves received by a receiver to identify a bit value in each of divided unit time segments that are obtained by dividing a time period of one bit into a plurality of unit time segments of equal duration; creates a bit array having the identified bit values in respective divided unit time segments by sequentially arranging the identified bit values in an order of receipt, the one or more processors creating said bit array in a plurality by successively shifting a time at which the bit array starts by one unit time segment; and performs a bit edge detection operation by detecting a head timing of the bit data at which a bit value changes in the received radio waves based on said plurality of bit value arrays.

title: Accelerator Automation Framework for Heterogeneous Computing in Datacenters
abstract: Systems and methods for designing an information processing system are described. In one embodiment, a design space is partitioned into a plurality of independent partitions based on a defined set of rules. A unique processing core is assigned to each partition. A plurality of starting points is generated for each partition, where each starting point is associated with a machine learning algorithm. The starting points for each partition may include a performance driven seed and an area-driven seed. A set of feasible designs associated with the information processing system are determined.

title: Utilizing heuristic and machine learning models to generate a mandatory access control policy for an application
abstract: A device processes, with a model, an application to identify a set of file paths with process identifiers. The device identifies patterns associated with the set of file paths with process identifiers, and determines positions of random elements in each file path of the set of file paths with process identifiers. The device processes the patterns and the positions of the random elements to train a machine learning model, and utilizes the machine learning model to generate a first set of rules to identify files required for execution of the application, and a second set of rules to identify files not required for execution of the application. The device generates a mandatory access control policy based on the first set of rules and the second set of rules, and provides the mandatory access control policy to be implemented by an operating system of a client device.

title: Dressing replacement system in 2D games based on machine learning
abstract: Abstract The application relates to a dressing replacement system in 2D games based on machine learning. The application is mainly used in the field of the dressing system of games. This application depends on Generate counter network and the structure of an encoder and a decoder in a generator in the Generate counter network. It is an image stitching system to make the new images could joint suitably and reasonably with other images which have been practiced. The invention consists of the following steps: Firstly, we use web crawler to acquire a sufficient number of pictures from the Internet. Secondly, the data set having been selected and preprocessed is divided into training set and verification set. Thirdly, we put the training set of data into the convolutional neural network in batches. By constantly adjusting the parameters of the network, the model will reach the optimal performance. Finally, the verification set of data is put into the trained neural network and the different generated images are verified to achieve high enough image stitching accuracy. As a result, after 150 epochs, the images are spliced together correctly. The application could be used to splice new characters' images and equipment's images together to gain a new characters' image which dressed exiting equipment of the games. The invention consists of the following steps: Firstly, we use web crawler to acquire a sufficient number of pictures from the Internet. Secondly, the data set having been selected and preprocessed is divided into training set and verification set. Thirdly, we put the training set of data into the convolutional neural network in batches. By constantly adjusting the parameters of the network, the model will reach the optimal performance. Finally, the verification set of data is put into the trained neural network and the different generated images are verified to achieve high enough image stitching accuracy. As a result, after 150 epochs, the images are spliced together correctly. The application could be used to splice new characters' images and equipment's images together to gain a new characters' image which dressed exiting equipment of the games. title: Automatic Discovery of High-Performance Features for Customer Lifetime Value Optimization via Low-Variance Random Projection
abstract: Techniques for automatic discovery of high-performance features for customer LTV optimization via low-variance random projection are described. In one or more implementations, a random projection matrix is generated that is usable to compress a dataset representing a plurality of features associated with one or more customers. Using a first subset of the plurality of features, a simulator is created to model customer behavior. In addition, a policy is trained to determine which advertisements to present to a new customer based on a second subset of the plurality of features. In implementations, the policy is trained by at least using the random projection matrix to compress the second subset of the plurality of features. Subsequently, a performance of the policy is evaluated using the simulator to determine a level of the performance of the policy. This process is repeated a number of times in order to evaluate several possible candidate transformations and compressions of the dataset, with the goal of autonomously discovering and identifying a new compressed set of high-performing features for use in LTV learning algorithms.

title: Systems and methods for predictive gear shifting and integrated predictive cruise control
abstract: A control system, apparatus, and method integrates vehicle speed management and predicted gear shifting of a vehicle by determining current and future engine power requirements from the current and forward-looking route conditions to improve performance, drivability, and/or fuel economy of the vehicle over what is achievable through conventional gear state selection via static calibration tables and conventional shifting strategies. The selection of the vehicle reference speed is responsive to a gear selection to provide increased fuel economy, decreased trip time or combinations thereof.

title: Alarm transfer system
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] To provide an alarm transfer system for quickly transferring an alarm generated in an AU level signal system to a TU level signal system. [Structure] The STM-1 level signal is input to an AU pointer processing unit 1, and a first LOP detection unit 2 and a first AIS are provided.   The detection unit 3 detects LOP and AIS at the AU level, and sends flag data to the TU level signal processing unit 7. The STM-1 level signal is input to the TU pointer processing unit 4 that processes the TU pointer in the STM-1 signal, and the second LOP detection unit 5 and the second AIS detection unit 6 perform LOP at the TU level. And AIS are detected, and flag data is transmitted to the TU level signal processing unit 7. The TU level signal processing unit 7 outputs the TU level signal as "ALL1" if at least one of the flag data indicates an alarm state. Therefore, it is possible to quickly transfer the TU level alarm.

title: Provision of television that assists the user in finding programs
abstract: a provision that has an adaptive search function and adaptive function provides quick revision.  Search functions and adaptive quick review may be selected to receive suggestions referred to watch programs.  The arrangement may provide a suggestion exhibiting an adaptive search region or region adaptive quick review that includes a suggestion program.  The provision identifies programs to suggest, based on user activity on TV viewing.  The arrangement uses different algorithms are user selectable and adjustable by the user to identify program suggestions.  The arrangement can interrogate a database of program guide to prepare a list of programs that have similar attributes to the attributes of the current program or the last program viewed.  The arrangement may use an adaptive learning algorithm such as a neural network.  The neural network can be guided by the program guide to monitor the activity of watching TV from the user.  Each algorithm can be customized for multiple users.

title: Multichannel ocean underwater sound collector

title: Wide Band Signal Process System using 2 Acceleration Sensors
abstract: PURPOSE: A wide-band signal processing system is provided to record sensed running velocity and direction state of a vehicle so as to be used as running data of the vehicle at accident. CONSTITUTION: A wide-band signal processing system comprises the first to third shafts, the first to third amplifiers each corresponding to the first to third shafts, the first to third AD converters each corresponding to the first to third amplifiers, and a data recording unit. The shafts are divided into the amplifiers so as to be connected to the converters, thus data from the shafts is provided to the data recording unit.

title: Mobile communication system
abstract: The present invention relates to a mobile communication system which can be automatically switched between using a ground system and using a satellite system. The system is provided with mobile telephones and relay devices, wherein the mobile telephones is positioned at places where the ground system is not available and artificial satellites of the satellite system are not connected. Under the condition that a wireless interface of the ground system is different with that of the demodulation mode, etc., of the satellite system, RF signals are switched in the ground system, while IF signals and base-band signals are switched in the satellite system according to signal processing modes. The relay devices switch the RF signals of the satellite system and that of the ground system. Thus, wireless/high-frequency units are unnecessary to be transposed, while the usage of the ground system and that of the satellite system can be automatically switched and used. Meanwhile, relay devices can be easily constructed when the satellite system is used indoors.

title: Time sequence Bayes compression sampling and signal decompression reconstruction method and data loss recovery method
abstract: The invention provides a time sequence Bayes compression sampling and signal decompression reconstruction method and a data loss recovery method, wherein the method comprises the steps of selecting a measurement matrix of signal compression sampling, designing a basis vector matrix, modeling the signal itself and the change sparsity of the signal in adjacent time periods, solving Bayesian probability of decompression reconstruction signals in each time period, quickly optimizing and estimating hyper-parameters, diagnosing reconstruction precision based on posterior uncertainty quantification, and recovering the signal loss in health monitoring wireless sensing. The method adopts a hierarchical sparse Bayesian learning modeling and solving algorithm, has unique advantages in the aspects of embedding the signal and two sparsity characteristics of the signal along with time change, fast solving of hyper-parameters, robustness of signal reconstruction under higher compression ratio, uncertainty quantification of signal reconstruction and the like, and has better robustness to noise.

title: More speaker speech synthetic methods, system and device
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of more speaker speech synthetic methods and system, the synthetic method includes: the progress Speech acoustics statistical nature extraction from multiple sound people corpus, obtains sentence level dictionary and phone-level dictionary；Based on text analyzing method, text feature is extracted from text to be measured；By the text feature and sentence level dictionary and phone-level dictionary dynamic bind, the relevant speaker feature of phoneme is obtained；Speaker speech information is determined according to the text feature and speaker feature based on average submodel and adaptive submodel；Voice is synthesized by vocoder neural network based according to the speaker speech information.The text feature and sentence level dictionary and phone-level dictionary dynamic bind are obtained the relevant speaker feature of phoneme, to can be improved to the fine description to speaker pronunciation character by the present invention；Further by vocoder neural network based, voice is synthesized, so as to effectively provide the accuracy of speech synthesis.

title: System and Method for Associating User-Entered Text to Database Entries
abstract: System and method for associating user-entered consumable item description to an entry in a consumable item database. In one embodiment, formally structured restaurant menu item is matched to a large database of food items that has been constructed via crowd-sourcing. A novel, practical, and scalable machine learning solution architecture, consisting of two major steps is utilized. First a query generation approach is applied, based on a Markov Decision Process algorithm, to reduce the time complexity of searching for matching candidates. That is then followed by a re-ranking step, using deep learning techniques, to ensure matching quality goals are met.
