title: Method for performing parallel linear algebraic calculation in interactive R language platform
abstract: The present invention discloses a method for performing parallel linear algebraic calculation in an interactive R language platform. The method comprises the following steps: providing two calculation platforms, wherein one calculation platform is an interactive R language platform, and the other calculation platform is a parallel linear algebraic calculation platform, and the two calculation platforms communicate with each other via a computer network; then, in the interactive R language platform, designing and implementing a parallel linear algebraic calculation application program interface; and finally, in a distributed matrix class of the parallel linear algebraic calculation application program interface, comprising a member variable of an R environment type, and in the initialization process of an object of the distributed matrix class, by using an reg.finalizer function of the R language, registering a garbage collection response mode of the member variable to a garbage collector of the interactive R language platform. According to the method for performing parallel linear algebraic calculation in the interactive R language platform, which is provided by the present invention, the defect that parallel linear algebraic calculation cannot be carried out in an existing interactive R language programming platform is overcome, and calculation capability of the interactive R language platform is extended.

title: Method of controlling robot with hand gripping two workpieces and robot control apparatus
abstract: A robot control apparatus for controlling a robot for gripping two workpieces includes an upper limit value changing unit for changing at least one of the upper speed limit value and the upper acceleration limit value of the robot depending on the type and number of workpieces gripped, and an operation controlling unit for controlling the operation of the robot such that at least one of the speed and the acceleration of the robot does not exceed the changed upper speed limit value and upper acceleration limit value.

abstract: The present invention relates to a vehicle cluster driving control device, a system including the same, and a method thereof, wherein the vehicle cluster control device according to an embodiment of the present invention is a leader vehicle according to the information transmitted and received between the cluster driving vehicles and the driving situation when controlling the cluster driving A processor that performs one of trajectory tracking control, leader vehicle lane center tracking control, lane maintenance control, and front vehicle tracking control; And a storage unit for storing data for vehicle control performed by the processor.

title: Clutter frequency spectrum compensation technology-based three-coordinate radar moving target processing method
abstract: The invention belongs to the field of radar signal processing, and relates to a three-coordinate radar moving target processing method based on a clutter frequency spectrum compensation technology, which is used for improving the elevation angle measurement precision in a strong ground clutter environment. Windowing DFT (discrete Fourier transform) is carried out on each distance bin pulse group data of each elevation layer to calculate an initial frequency spectrum; acquiring the maximum spectral line amplitude and speed information of the initial spectrum, reconstructing a virtual clutter spectrum according to the information, and subtracting the virtual clutter spectrum from the initial spectrum to obtain a compensated spectrum, namely a new spectrum; iteratively calculating the maximum spectral line amplitude and speed of the new spectrum, reconstructing a virtual clutter spectrum according to the information, subtracting the virtual clutter spectrum from the new spectrum until the maximum spectral line amplitude of the new spectrum is less than K times of the noise level, and recording the iterative estimation result of each time; and (4) performing constant false alarm processing on each channel of the DFT, and selecting final output according to the constant false alarm detection result and a preset speed threshold. The invention recovers the relative relation of target energy on different elevation layers by compensating clutter energy for multiple times, and improves the elevation angle measurement precision.

title: Grid based wireless sensor network fuzzy-locating method
abstract: The invention discloses a grid based wireless sensor network fuzzy-locating method in the technical field of wireless sensor network application. The grid based wireless sensor network fuzzy-locating method includes: transmitting information to a node to be located by anchor nodes, receiving information and build an neighbor anchor node chain table through the node to be located; dividing an area where the sensor network is located into grids in assigned number; computing membership degree of the node to be located to each grid and arranging the node to be located in descending order according to the membership degree; computing average values of sequence numbers of all the grids comprising auxiliary locating points by setting peaks of the grids as the auxiliary locating points to form a sequence (QY); selecting a former first assigning item from the (QY) and setting the centroid of the auxiliary locating point of the corresponding grid as roughly evaluated coordinates of the node to be located; clustering the auxiliary locating points corresponding to the former second assigning item in the (QY) by setting the roughly evaluated coordinates as the initial clustering center and obtaining the coordinates of the node to be located. The grid based wireless sensor network fuzzy-locating method is capable of computing accurate evaluated coordinates of the node to be located, complete and excellent in locating performance.

title: Pedestrian overcrossing with pulling and crushing resistant support structure
abstract: The invention relates to a pedestrian overcrossing with a pulling and crushing resistant support structure. The pedestrian overcrossing comprises an overcrossing body and piers and is characterized in that the overcrossing body is connected with the piers through the pulling and crushing resistant support structure. The pulling and crushing resistant support structure comprises fixing steel parts, chord member leveling parts and movable connecting parts, the fixing steel parts are fixed to the piers, the chord member leveling parts are fixed to the bottom surface of the overcrossing body, each fixing steel part and the corresponding chord member leveling part are respectively provided with a groove, each movable connecting part is an I-type embedding module, the upper end of each movable connecting part is embedded into the groove of the corresponding chord member leveling part, and the lower end of the movable connecting part is embedded into the groove of the corresponding fixing steel part, so that a snap-in movable connecting structure is formed, and the pulling and crushing resistant support structure is formed at the connecting positions of the overcrossing body and the piers through the snap-in movable connecting structure. The pedestrian overcrossing has good tension resistance, crushing resistance, pulling resistance, overturning resistance and other prominent performance.

title: Unmanned aerial vehicle, obstacle avoidance method for same, and obstacle avoidance system thereof
abstract: An unmanned aerial vehicle, an obstacle avoidance method for same, and an obstacle avoidance system thereof. The obstacle avoidance method comprises the following steps: S 1 , prestoring a first three-dimensional map (110); S 2 , acquiring the first three-dimensional map of the location at where an unmanned aerial vehicle is located, the first three-dimensional map comprising flight environment parameter information, the flight environment parameter information comprising real-time relative position information of the distance between an obstacle in the first three-dimensional map and the unmanned aerial vehicle (120); and S 3 , generating, on the basis of the relative position information, a flight path avoiding the obstacle (130). The unmanned aerial vehicle, under the conditions of dim ambient brightness, complex obstacle texture information, and ranging apparatus failure, can still utilize three-dimensional map information to fly safely and to accurately avoid obstacles, thus comprehensively increasing the stability and safety of the unmanned aerial vehicle.

title: Method for detecting risk level of driver based on hidden Markov model
abstract: The invention discloses a method for detecting a driver risk level based on a hidden Markov model, which judges driving behaviors and classifies the driver risk level by acquiring speed data of a vehicle and different alarm types of a driver, identifies the driver risk level by using the trained hidden Markov model, and judges the driver risk level by using an identification result. The invention is mainly used for a safety management system of a transportation enterprise, and when the driver is identified to be a high-risk driver, corresponding management training measures can be taken to improve the safety of the driver. The practicability of the invention can reduce the casualties and property loss caused by traffic accidents and improve the overall safety of the traffic system.

title: A kind of method for diagnosing faults based on the preferred wavelet packet of improvement
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of based on the decision tree SVM analog-circuit fault diagnosis method for improving preferred wavelet packet, includes the following steps: to extract the circuit response signal under each fault mode using circuit simulating software；The Optimum wavelet basic function for extracting fault signature is selected using improved preferred method of wavelet packet；Wavelet package transforms are carried out to original signal using the optimal wavelet basic function selected, form fault sample set of eigenvectors；The link structure between all fault feature vector collection is sought using minimum spanning tree；Optimal decision tree topology is found out using the distance that connects between group；Decision-tree model is trained according to topological tree Structure, finally trains the corresponding SVM classifier of each node using fault sample vector set.The present invention has good robustness, and Generalization Capability is stronger.

title: Option emphasization for call-to-action interfaces
abstract: The present disclosure describes techniques for configuring a call-to-action (CTA) interface for a particular user of a social networking system (SNS) by emphasizing an option included with the CTA interface based on a machine learning system. The machine learning system may be used to determine to emphasize a first user-selectable option instead of a second user-selectable option (sometimes referred to as an emphasization determination). The emphasization determination may indicate a prediction of an intent of a user to select the first user-selectable option (e.g., an intent for the user to register an account with the SNS or to login to an account of the SNS). Based on the emphasization determination, an interface (e.g., a graphical user interface) may be configured to emphasize the first user-selectable option, and the interface may be sent to a user device for presentation to the user.

title: Identifying text for labeling utilizing topic modeling-based text clustering
abstract: Software that selects portions of unlabeled text for labeling, by performing the following operations: (i) receiving a set of unlabeled input text for classification with respect to a particular domain, wherein the domain includes a labeled corpus for which topics of a set of topics correspond to labels from the corpus, and wherein the topics include statistical probability distributions of words in the corpus; (ii) performing topic modeling on the input text to associate portions of the input text with respective classifications, wherein the classifications include statistical probability distributions of topics of the set of topics in the respective portions of the input text; and (iii) applying a machine learning-based selection strategy to the portions of the input text and their respective classifications to identify one or more portions of the input text for labeling.

title: Method for separating out a defect image from a thermogram sequence based on weighted naive bayesian classifier and dynamic multi-objective optimization
abstract: A method for separating out a defect image from a thermogram sequence based on weighted naive Bayesian classifier and dynamic multi-objective optimization. A method extracts these features and classifies the selected TTRs into K categories based on their feature vectors through a weighted naive Bayesian classifier, which deeply digs the physical meanings contained in each TTR, makes the classification of TTRs more rational, and improves the accuracy of defect image's separation. Meanwhile, the multi-objective function does not only fully consider the similarities between the RTTR and other TTRs in the same category, but also considers the dissimilarities between the RTTR and the TTRs in other categories, thus the RTTR selected is more representative, which guarantees the accuracy of describing the defect outline. The initial TTR population approximate solution for multi-objective optimization is chosen according to the previous TTR populations, which makes the multi-objective optimization dynamic and reduces its time consumption.

title: Mobility services platform for self-healing mobiilty clients
abstract: The disclosed embodiments are directed to a mobility services platform for self-healing mobility clients. In an embodiment, a method comprises: obtaining, by one or more server computers, diagnostic data from a plurality of mobility clients; applying, by the one or more server computers, machine learning to the diagnostic data; identifying, by the one or more server computers, outlier data resulting from the machine learning; identifying, by the one or more server computers and from the outlier data, a new error class; determining, by the one or more server computers, an impact of the error class (e.g., short-term, medium-term, long-term impact) on the plurality of mobility clients; and generating, by the one or more server computers and based on the determined impact, an update for the plurality of mobility clients.

title: Matrix inversion
abstract: An apparatus relating generally to matrix inversion is disclosed. This apparatus includes a matrix inversion module coupled to receive matrix information and to provide an approximation of an inversion of the matrix information. The matrix inversion module comprises a decomposition block coupled to receive the matrix information and to decompose the matrix information into diagonal matrix information and off diagonal matrix information, and an expansion block. The expansion block is coupled to receive the diagonal matrix information and the off diagonal matrix information, and to invert a matrix sum of the diagonal matrix information and the off diagonal matrix information by generation of a portion of a series expansion.

title: Memristive dot product engine virtualization
abstract: An example system includes at least one memristive dot product engine (DPE) having at least one resource, the DPE further having a physical interface and a controller, the controller being communicatively coupled to the physical interface, the physical interface to communicate with the controller to access the DPE, and at least one replicated interface, each replicated interface being associated with a virtual DPE, the replicated interface with communicatively coupled to the controller. The controller is to allocate timeslots to the virtual DPE through the associated replicated interface to allow the virtual DPE access to the at least one resource.

title: Novel track-changing shoe forging die sleeve
abstract: The utility model discloses a novel become rail and bear shoes forging die sleeve belongs to and forges apparatus technical field. The upper die sleeve and the lower die sleeve are identical rectangles, a dovetail is arranged on the top surface of the upper die sleeve, a dovetail is arranged on the bottom surface of the lower die sleeve, positioning key grooves are formed in the dovetails, rectangular guide locking grooves are formed in the periphery of the bottom of the upper die sleeve, rectangular guide locks are formed in the periphery of the top surface of the lower die sleeve, cylindrical cavities are formed in the end surfaces of the upper die sleeve and the lower die sleeve, skid-mounted key grooves communicated with the cylindrical cavities are formed in two sides of the contact surfaces of the two die sleeves, and wedge rod through holes penetrating through the side walls of the cylindrical cavities are formed in the side walls of; a core embedding mold is arranged in a cylindrical cavity of the mold sleeve, a prying hole positioned beside a prying key groove of the core embedding mold is formed in the side wall of the core embedding mold, a fastening inclined plane is formed in the side wall of the upper core embedding mold, through which a wedge rod through hole of the mold sleeve passes, and a cavity is formed in the end face of the core embedding mold; the wedge rods are inserted into the wedge rod through holes and limit the upward and downward displacement and rotation of the core embedding mold.

title: Electromagnetic bone-assessment apparatus and method
abstract: Non-invasive quantitative in-vivo electromagnetic evaluation of bone is performed by subjecting bone to an electrical excitation wave-form supplied to a pair of electrodes on opposite sides of a bony member, and involving a repetitive finite duration signal consisting of plural frequencies that are in the range 0 Hz-200 MHz. Signal-processing of a bone-current response signal and a bone-voltage response signal is operative to sequentially average the most recently received given number of successive bone-current and bone-voltage response signals to obtain an averaged per-pulse bone-current signal and an averaged per-pulse bone-voltage signal, and to produce their associated Fourier transforms. These Fourier transforms are further processed to obtain the frequency-dependent bone-admittance function. In a separate operation, the same electrodes respond to the same excitation signal via a medium of known electromagnetic properties and path length to establish a reference-voltage signal and reference-current signal, which are processed to produce their associated Fourier transforms. These two Fourier transforms are further processed to produce a frequency-dependent reference-admittance function, which together with the bone-admittance function are processed to derive the frequency-dependent bone-conductivity real function, σ' b  (f), and frequency-dependent dielectric bone-permittivity real function, .di-elect cons.' b  (f). The function σ' b  (f) is related to the energy loss in the bony member, and the function .di-elect cons.' b  (f) is related to the energy storage in the bony member. A neural network, configured to generate an estimate of one or more of the desired bone-related quantities, is connected for response to the functions σ' b  (f) and .di-elect cons.' b  (f), whereby to generate the indicated estimates of bone status, namely, bone-density, bone-architecture, bone-strength and bone-fracture risk.

title: Network flow abnormal behavior identification method based on automatic encoder
abstract: The invention provides a network flow abnormal behavior identification method based on an automatic encoder, which belongs to the cross technical field of combination of machine learning and information safety, and aims to balance the category distribution of normal flow data and abnormal flow data in flow data by using a comprehensive few oversampling methods and combine the automatic encoder, so that nonlinear structure information can be effectively extracted from mass data, and abnormal behaviors in network flow can be identified.

title: Ladle Robot having the same
abstract: The present embodiment comprises: a ladle body provided with a handle on a main body in which a space for food is formed; a flexible guide having a connection end connected to the main body; and a deformation mechanism for modifying a shape of the flexible guide to vary an upper side angle of the flexible guide. According to an embodiment of the present invention, the flexible guide can minimize the overflow of food.

title: Device for bringing a motor vehicle to a target position
abstract: In the case of a system for automatically bringing a motor vehicle into a target position, having a sensor system and an analyzing unit for determining the position of the motor vehicle relative to the target position as well as devices for planning a collision-free drive from the current position to the target position, and devices for implementing the planned drive, a first part of the sensor system is arranged at or in the motor vehicle, and a second part of the sensor system is arranged in a stationary manner in a defined position close to the target position.

title: Billboard watches flow of the people analysis system
abstract: The invention discloses billboards to watch flow of the people analysis system, including camera：Camera is installed to advertisement and launches place, camera is enable accurately to take advertisement viewing crowd；Data acquisition unit：Picture captured by acquisition camera acquires advertisement delivery point and watches number in real time using number parser to acquiring picture analyzing；Real-time analytic unit：Each advertisement delivery point viewing number data collected in real time upload to cloud server, and the advertisement delivery live effect in each advertisement delivery point real time data and the certain specified regions of statistical analysis is presented in analysis in real time after calculating；Later stage statistical analysis unit：By the off-line data comparative analysis in local data base, advertisement delivery strategic planning is obtained in conjunction with customer demand.This programme can calculate advertisement during dispensing automatically by above-mentioned principle, each to play the period, how many people's viewing, realizes advertisement delivery strategic planning in total, and simple to operate, statistical number of person is accurate and reliable, and later stage use value is high.

title: Sensor arrangement for detecting a state of a road with at least two ultrasonic sensors, driver assistance system, motor vehicle and associated method
abstract: The invention relates to a sensor arrangement (3) for detecting a condition of a roadway (10), having a sensor device (8) which is designed to impinge on water (12) during travel of a motor vehicle (1) on the roadway (10) ) on a Radlaufverkleidung (13) of the motor vehicle (1), and with a control device (7) for detecting the state of the road (10) based on the means of the sensor device (8) detected impact of the water (12), wherein the sensor device (8) comprises a first ultrasonic sensor (4) and a second ultrasonic sensor (5), which are each adapted to receive an ultrasonic signal and which are also adapted to detect the impact of the water (12) on the Radlaufverkleidung (13) ,

title: Steering engine state control method and device for robot, robot and storage medium
abstract: The application is suitable for the technical field of computers, and provides a steering engine state control method of a robot, which comprises the following steps: determining control parameters of a target steering engine which shakes and/or generates abnormal sound according to the rotation angle value of each joint part at the current moment, and adjusting the rotation state of the target steering engine based on the control parameters of the target steering engine. The problem that the robot shakes or makes abnormal sound during operation in the prior art can be solved, and the service life of the robot can be influenced.

title: Fixed speed running aparatus of vehicles
abstract: A device for driving a vehicle with constant speed is provided to allow a driver to set speed of the vehicle as fast as they needed by stopping an accelerator pedal when driving speed of the vehicle reached to set speed. A device for driving a vehicle with constant speed comprises a driver's operation panel, an ECU, and a control unit(300). The control unit has a body(360), an assembling unit(410), a stopper(420), an active plate, a solenoid(310) and a step motor(320), and an operation rod(330). The control unit controls operation of an accelerator pedal(400) according to a signal of the ECU. The body of the control unit is elastically supported by a spring(600), and on which an accelerator pedal is installed to move around a hinge(500). The assembling unit is pulled in and out from the body according to operation state of the accelerator pedal. The stopper is fixed at center of the assembling unit. The active plate is fixed to a lower end of the assembling unit. The solenoid and the step motor are operated by the ECU. The operation rod is operated by the solenoid, and of which a protrusion(332a) is engaged with a groove unit(321) of the step motor.

title: Constructing and calibrating enthalpy based predictive model for building energy consumption
abstract: A predictive model for building energy consumption may be constructed and run to predict energy consumption in a building or to detect anomaly in energy consumption in a building or combinations thereof. Historic energy consumption data associated with energy consumed in a building may be received. Enthalpy of air outside the building may be determined. An energy consumption model may be calibrated based on the historic energy consumption data and the enthalpy of air outside the building. The energy consumption model incorporates enthalpy difference between a balance enthalpy and the enthalpy of air outside the building.

title: Identification and classification of web traffic inside encrypted network tunnels
abstract: The present principles are directed to identifying and classifying web traffic inside encrypted network tunnels. A method includes analyzing network traffic of unencrypted data packets to detect packet traffic, timing, and size patterns. The detected packet, timing, and size traffic patterns are correlated to at least a packet destination and a packet source of the unencrypted data packets to create at least one of a training corpus and a model built from the training corpus. The at least one of the corpus and model is stored in a memory device. Packet traffic, timing, and size patterns of encrypted data packets are observed. The observed packet traffic, timing, and size patterns of the encrypted data packets are compared to at least one of the training corpus and the model to classify the encrypted data packets with respect to at least one of a predicted network host and predicted path information.

title: Apparatus for software-defined raido terminal supporting beamforming algorithms and methods for distributing and installing software-defined raido terminal applications
abstract: PURPOSE: An SDR(Software Defined Radio) terminal device for beamforming and a method for distributing and installing an SDR terminal application thereof are provided to execute the same radio application in a terminal with a different modem chip by using a standard API(Application Program Interface). CONSTITUTION: A microprocessor(320) reads a code with a radio controller layer and a baseband driver layer from a storage unit(310). The radio controller layer transfers a control command to control a baseband accelerator for beamforming signal processing. The baseband driver layer transfers the control command of the radio controller layer to the baseband accelerator(330-1~330-5). The microprocessor loads at least one of function blocks from the storage unit to the baseband accelerator.

abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To filter an input signal and to prevent a difference in delay time due to variation during the beginning and ending of the processed signal from being caused.  <P>SOLUTION: A low-pass filter LPF comprising a capacitor C1 and a resistance R1 which are connected in series is provided between a power source VB and an input terminal I1, and a capacitor C2 and a resistance R2 which constitute a time constant switching circuit CT is provided in parallel to the capacitor C1. abstract: An ultrasonic wave signal processing device (1) is provided with a vibration element array (2), a transmission control unit (3), and a reception control unit (4), the transmission control unit having: a first code generation unit (200); a second code generation unit (201); and a pulsar (112) for generating ultrasonic waves by (i) outputting a first code string (G1) at a first timing and outputting a second code string (G2) at a second timing to a first vibration element (100), and (ii) outputting a third code string (G3) at the first timing and a fourth code string (G4) at the second timing to a second vibration element sandwiching the first vibration element, the reception control unit having: a decoding processing unit (210) for performing a first filter process and a second filter process on, respectively, a first echo of the ultrasonic wave of the first timing and a second echo of the ultrasonic wave of the second timing; and a code addition unit (211) for adding the results of the first filter process and for adding the results of the second filter process.

title: Network configuration change analysis using machine learning
abstract: In one embodiment, a network assurance service that monitors one or more networks receives data indicative of networking device configuration changes in the one or more networks. The service also receives one or more performance indicators for the one or more networks. The service trains a machine learning model based on the received data indicative of the networking device configuration changes and on the received one or more performance indicators for the one or more networks. The service predicts, using the machine learning model, a change in the one or more performance indicators that would result from a particular networking device configuration change. The service causes the particular networking device configuration change to be made in the network based on the predicted one or more performance indicators.

title: Sparsity-aware hardware accelerators
abstract: A special-purpose, hardware-based accelerator may include an input subsystem configured to receive first and second vectors as operands of a full dot-product operation. The accelerator may also include a sparsity-aware dot-product engine communicatively coupled to the input subsystem and configured to perform adaptive dot-product processing by: (1) identifying, within the first and second vectors, at least one zero-value element and (2) executing, in response to identifying the zero-value element, a reduced dot-product operation that excludes, relative to the full dot-product operation, at least one mathematical operation in which the zero-value element is an operand. The accelerator may also include an output subsystem that is communicatively coupled to the sparsity-aware dot-product engine and configured to send a result of the reduced dot-product operation to a storage subsystem. Various other accelerators, computing systems, and methods are also disclosed.

title: Method and device for actively starting LKA function through voice
abstract: The invention discloses a method for actively starting an LKA function by voice. The method comprises the steps of starting an ACC function and detecting LKA starting information when the vehicle is detected to be powered on and LKA starting confirmation information is obtained; and judging whether the LKA opening condition is met or not according to the LKA opening information and sending notification information to the large instrument screen. The invention also discloses a device for actively starting the LKA function by voice. The method and the device for starting the LKA function intelligently use the language identification function, are simple, convenient and quick, improve the actual use experience of a user, and can automatically start the ACC function while starting the LKA function. When the starting condition of the LKA function is not met, text prompt appears on the large screen of the instrument in time for feedback, and a user can know the starting condition of the related function clearly.

title: Method for determining layer stoppage in ldpc decoding
abstract: A method for determining a layer stoppage in LDPC decoding is provided. The method may include determining the occurrence of the layer stoppage to detect and record a convergence of a layer arithmetic unit after the performance of a layer decoding operation using LDPC decoding, and in a subsequent iteration operation stopping an operation of the layer arithmetic unit that has converged and repeating determining the layer stoppage for the layer arithmetic unit that has not yet converged. An output of the non-convergent layer may be diverted to the next non-convergent layer while bypassing the convergent layer without interrupting the subsequent iteration operation while maintaining the overall error correction capability.

title: Apparatus and method for switching control of autonomous vehicle
abstract: Disclosed is an apparatus for switching the operation control of an autonomous vehicle and a method thereof. A method of switching a driving control right of an autonomous vehicle according to the present invention includes the steps of setting a degree of connection between a steering wheel and a steering wheel in an autonomous driving mode and, when receiving a first transition request from the driver in the autonomous driving mode, Setting a connection degree so as to allow the driver to input a second transition request; releasing the lock of the handle when receiving a second transition request from the driver; and when receiving the third transition request from the driver, And causing the steering of the driver to be controlled by the steering operation of the driver.

abstract: Provided is a system for managing sharing of a saddle riding-type vehicle, the system characterized in having: a position specifying means, which is provided in the saddle riding-type vehicle, for specifying the position of the saddle riding-type vehicle; a position acquisition means for acquiring the position of surrounding vehicles from the surrounding vehicles that are present around the saddle riding-type vehicle; and a determination means for determining a parking position at which the saddle riding-type vehicle is parked on the basis of the position of the saddle riding-type vehicle specified by the position specifying means and the positions of the surrounding vehicles acquired by the position acquisition means when the saddle riding-type vehicle is parked.

title: Film carrier and molding using it
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain film carriers which can prevent resin from leaking out of the range of a sealed zone efficiently and positively in molding by embedding given points of conductor leads with a required heat-resistant insulator.  
     CONSTITUTION: This film carrier comprises a tape 21 with a required heat- resistant insulation and many conductor leads 28 attached to the carrier tape 21 and incorporates a monolithic connection of inner leads 28 1  and an IC chip 23 with given points of the conductor leads 28 embedded with a required heat- resistant insulator 30. For example, they are spanned with an outside support ring 25 via outside tiebars 24 1 , 24 2  and with an inside support ring 25 1  via an inside tiebar 24 1 , and points of conductor leads 28 above the outside support rings 25 are embedded with the heat-resistant insulator 30. Embedding positions should correspond to the position of joint with the periphery of a die cavity upon mold clamping.

title: Automatic Sound Mode Selector of Stereo Sound Equipment
abstract: The present invention relates to a sound mode automatic selection device of a stereo sound device that can maximize the stereo sound effect by determining whether the input audio signal is a stereo signal or a mono signal and automatically selects a stereo sound mode according to each signal. A stereo sound processor configured to process the input audio signal in stereo stereo mode and stereo mono mode; A signal discriminating unit which determines whether the input audio signal is a stereo signal or a mono signal; And a control unit for automatically selecting and controlling the signal processing of the stereo sound processor in stereo stereo mode or stereo mono mode based on the determination result of the signal discrimination unit, thereby maximizing stereo sound effects according to the input audio signal. It is a useful design to do.

title: Method and system for protecting a machine learning model against extraction
abstract: A method for protecting a machine learning (ML) model is provided. During inference operation of the ML model, a plurality of input samples is provided to the ML model. A distribution of a plurality of output predictions from a predetermined node in the ML model is measured. If the distribution of the plurality of output predictions indicates correct output category prediction with low confidence, then the machine learning model is slowed to reduce a prediction rate of subsequent output predictions. If the distribution of the plurality of categories indicates correct output category prediction with a high confidence, then the machine learning model is not slowed to reduce the prediction rate of subsequent output predictions of the machine learning model. A moving average of the distribution may be used to determine the speed reduction. This makes a cloning attack on the ML model take longer with minimal impact to a legitimate user.

title: Electroencephalogram signal analysis method based on data structured decomposition
abstract: The invention discloses an electroencephalogram signal analysis method based on data structured decomposition. Although different cerebral cortex are responsible for different functions, the different cerebral cortex are affected with each other and are easily interfered, so that the characteristics of nonlinearity and non-stationarity of the brain electrical signals are caused. The invention is as follows: 1. acquiring electroencephalogram data of a subject; 2. and decomposing the two-dimensional electroencephalogram data. 3. And respectively solving a global information low-rank matrix, a public information matrix and a noise matrix. 4. And constructing a sample subspace and an identification scheme. The invention provides a novel and effective physiological signal processing mode capable of distinguishing different application scenes, which can effectively process electroencephalogram signals, and can separate an electroencephalogram intrinsic part and a differentiation part suitable for pattern recognition and a noise part capable of influencing the recognition accuracy from the electroencephalogram signals; the separated intrinsic part and the differentiated part can be used for improving the identification accuracy in various electroencephalogram identification tasks.

title: External Entity Cross-Relational Dynamic Matching System
abstract: Systems for providing cross-relational matching functionality are provided. In some examples, a system may receive a request for a product which may be evaluated to determine whether a requesting user qualifies for the product. If so, the product may be approved and cross-relational matching functionality may be enabled. A plurality of eligible users may be identified. The plurality of eligible users may be identified as potentially interested in assisting in providing the product to the requesting user. Each eligible user of the plurality of eligible users may be evaluated (e.g., using machine learning) to determine whether the user matches one or more predetermined rules or qualifications as likely to be interested in providing the product. If so, the eligible user may be added to a subset of eligible users.

title: Signal processing system and method
abstract: This application provides a signal processing method and apparatus. The apparatus includes: an input module, configured to receive an input signal matrix and a weight matrix; a first interleaving module, configured to interleave the input signal matrix to obtain an interleaved signal matrix; a first partitioning module, configured to partition the interleaved signal matrix; a second interleaving module, configured to interleave the weight matrix to obtain an interleaved weight matrix; a processing module, configured to process the interleaved weight matrix to obtain a plurality of sparsified partitioned weight matrices; a matrix multiplication module, configured to perform matrix multiplication on the plurality of sparsified partitioned weight matrices and a plurality of partitioned signal matrices to obtain a plurality of matrix multiplication results; and an output module, configured to output a signal processing result. The method and the related apparatus resolve a problem of load imbalance caused by uneven distribution of key weights, and improve computation efficiency of a neural network.

title: Optimizing Benefits Selection in View of both Member Population and Organizational Preferences
abstract: The present disclosure relates to systems and methods for optimizing benefits plan options offered by an organization through balancing derived population preferences with organizational preferences by analyzing historical selections made by individuals. Census data dividing members of an organization into census divisions may be applied to machine learning algorithm(s) to derive estimated selection preferences of the members. Using selection preferences, costs of various product offering scenarios and overall member satisfaction estimates of the scenarios may be calculated. Product offering scenarios meeting member preference criteria and organizational budget criteria may be presented for review.

title: Computation Engine with Strided Dot Product
abstract: In an embodiment, a computation engine may perform dot product computations on input vectors. The dot product operation may have a first operand and a second operand, and the dot product may be performed on a subset of the vector elements in the first operand and each of the vector elements in the second operand. The subset of vector elements may be separated in the first operand by a stride that skips one or more elements between each element to which the dot product operation is applied. More particularly, in an embodiment, the input operands of the dot product operation may be a first vector having second vectors as elements, and the stride may select a specified element of each second vector.

title: Apparatus and method for controlling creep torque of eco vehicle
abstract: The present invention relates to an apparatus and method for controlling creep torque in an environmentally-friendly vehicle. The apparatus includes detectors that detect driving-related information of the vehicle and a controller that calculates rolling resistance based on the driving-related information and variably controls the creep torque in consideration of the calculated rolling resistance depending on whether the vehicle satisfies a creep cruise control operating condition.

The apparatus includes detectors that detect driving-related information of the vehicle and a controller that calculates rolling resistance based on the driving-related information and variably controls the creep torque in consideration of the calculated rolling resistance depending on whether the vehicle satisfies a creep cruise control operating condition.

title: Test method for determining biomarkers
abstract: The present invention relates to the field of human and veterinary biomarker tests and more particularly to test kits and methods for determining a result based on the presence, absence or concentration of a biomarker or biomarkers from a sample of a subject. More particularly the present invention relates to a test arrangement for determining the presence, absence or concentration of a biomarker. Also use of a combination of a test and a mobile device executable application for determining the presence, absence or concentration of a biomarker is within the scope of the present invention.

title: Method for assisting parking process of motor vehicle i.e. lorry, by parking device, involves instaneously detecting contours of actuating position by sensor device, and guiding motor vehicle to actuating position by parking device
abstract: The method involves starting areas from an actuating position (11) and detecting the areas by a sensor device. A driver action is introduced by a driver of a motor vehicle (10). The motor vehicle is formed such that view of the driver of the motor vehicle is detected by a parking device to park the motor vehicle in the actuating position. Arrangement of the actuating position is detected by the sensor device relative to the vehicle. The contours of the actuating position are instaneously detected by the sensor device. The vehicle is guided to the actuating position by the parking device. An independent claim is also included for a parking device comprising a sensor device.

title: Methods and devices for determining movements of an object in an environment
abstract: An example method may include receiving a first set of points based on detection of an environment of an autonomous vehicle during a first time period, selecting a plurality of points from the first set of points that form a first point cloud representing an object in the environment, receiving a second set of points based on detection of the environment during a second time period which is after the first period, selecting a plurality of points from the second set of points that form a second point cloud representing the object in the environment, determining a transformation between the selected points from the first set of points and the selected points from the second set of points, using the transformation to determine a velocity of the object, and providing instructions to control the autonomous vehicle based at least in part on the velocity of the object.

title: Waterproof structure of LED lamp
abstract: The invention discloses a waterproof structure of an LED lamp. The waterproof structure comprises a casing and an LED assembly, wherein light transmitting holes are formed in the surface of the casing; embedding slots located in two opposite sides of the light transmitting holes are formed in the inner wall surface of the casing; the waterproof structure further comprises sealing strips, light transmitting components and supports; a through hole is formed in each sealing strip; a flange is arranged at one end of each light transmitting component; after the other end of each light transmitting component penetrates through the through hole in the corresponding sealing strip, at least one part of each light transmitting component is located in the corresponding light transmitting hole in the casing; each flange is tightly attached to the corresponding sealing strip; an accommodating groove is formed in each support; each LED assembly is located in the accommodation groove in the corresponding support; after each support is inserted into the corresponding embedding slots in the casing, the corresponding light transmitting component and the corresponding sealing strip are sequentially pressed between the corresponding support and the inner wall surface of the casing; and one part of the accommodation groove in each support corresponds to the through hole in the corresponding sealing strip. The waterproof structure disclosed by the invention has the advantage of good waterproof effect.

title: Multifunctional profile adhesive tape coextruder
abstract: The utility model discloses a multifunctional profile adhesive tape coextruder, comprising a conveyer working platform, a traction working platform, a coextruder working platform and an adhesive tape coextrusion device, wherein a crawling traction device is fixedly arranged on the traction working platform; an adhesive tape flow-combining mold is fixedly arranged on the coextruder working platform; a profile is connected with the adhesive tape flow-combining mold by the conveyer working platform and the crawling traction device on the traction working platform; the adhesive tape coextrusion device is fixedly arranged at one side of the coextruder working platform and consists of an adhesive tape material barrel, an adhesive tape hopper and an adhesive tape die head; the adhesive tape material barrel is fixedly arranged on a working platform surface; and the adhesive tape material barrel is connected with the adhesive tape flow-distributing mold by the adhesive tape hopper and the adhesive tape die head. By adoption of the technical scheme, the stable reliability of the adhesive-tape embedding profile is improved, and the adhesive tape can be embedded on the profile by the adhesive tape coextruder device; in the profile produced by the equipment, the sealing adhesive tape is firmly bonded, the damage and the dropping are not easy, the sealing effect is good, the labor cost is saved, the quality of a product is improved and the service life of the product is prolonged.

title: Game machine
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Object] To provide a gaming machine capable of operating the image display function of a variable display device normally as much as possible. In an LCD display, two types of signal processing systems for driving an LCD main body are formed on separate substrates. That is, an analog signal processing system is provided on the analog board 125, and a digital signal processing system is provided on the digital board 127. Thus, it is possible to prevent the two types of signal processing systems from affecting each other and generating noise in the course of each signal processing as much as possible.

title: A kind of machine learning platform for supporting custom algorithm component
abstract: The present invention discloses a kind of machine learning platform for supporting custom algorithm component, which provides unified access standard for the algorithm assembly that client is encapsulated in docker image, by incoming parameter in need defined by way of order line；Algorithm assembly defined interface is set, and client can configure packaged docker image to an algorithm assembly of platform；Incoming parameter is needed to configure to described in defined interface.Advantage of the present invention is as follows: one, supporting client's custom algorithm component, theoretically support all algorithm frames；Two, scalability is strong, for emerging algorithm, does not need to do additional adaptation；Three, safely controllable, it is provided by client oneself, algorithm platform is only responsible for scheduling.

title: Self-lubricating joint bearing
abstract: The utility model discloses a self-lubricating joint bearing, including outer loop and inner ring, the inside of outer loop is equipped with the oil storage chamber, the oil storage chamber is close inner ring one side and is equipped with the hydraulic fluid port, the tip embedding of hydraulic fluid port is provided with first magnetic sheet, first magnetic sheet sets up to four, and four first magnetic sheets keep away from the fixed spring that is equipped with in inner ring one side, just first magnetic sheet passes through spring coupling with the outer loop. The utility model discloses an inner ring removes in the spacing inslot, when the second magnetic sheet removed to first magnetic sheet bottom, the first magnetic sheet was adsorbed to the second magnetic sheet, make first magnetic sheet activity break away from the hydraulic fluid port, lubricating oil passes the hydraulic fluid port and is lubricated the processing for outer loop and inner ring junction this moment, when joint bearing did not use, the hydraulic fluid port was plugged up to first magnetic sheet through self elasticity pull back to the spring, stop lubrication, it is lubricated when this joint bearing uses, stop lubrication when not using, reduce cost effectively, good practicability.

title: A kind of intelligent digital musical instrument based on neural network Audiotechnica
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of intelligent digital musical instrument based on neural network Audiotechnica, intelligent digital musical instrument includes that digital musical instrument body and the interior neural network audio being arranged in digital musical instrument body improve unit；It includes programmable nerve network controller, audio sensor, source of sound CPU, communication module, conversion module that neural network audio, which improves unit,；Audio sensor is for acquiring audio data, the audio data of acquisition is inputted nerve network controller by conversion module, output data after being improved by nerve network controller, then target audio data are converted to by conversion module, source of sound CPU is connect by communication module with nerve network controller.The present invention forms diagnosis and deep learning so that the sound that the sound of digital musical instrument sent out is closer to the mankind or musical instrument is sent out by the complementations of two kinds of neural networks.

title: Determining grasping parameters for grasping of an object by a robot grasping end effector
abstract: Methods and apparatus related to training and/or utilizing a convolutional neural network to generate grasping parameters for an object. The grasping parameters can be used by a robot control system to enable the robot control system to position a robot grasping end effector to grasp the object. The trained convolutional neural network provides a direct regression from image data to grasping parameters. For example, the convolutional neural network may be trained to enable generation of grasping parameters in a single regression through the convolutional neural network. In some implementations, the grasping parameters may define at least: a “reference point” for positioning the grasping end effector for the grasp; and an orientation of the grasping end effector for the grasp.

title: Confidence checking for speech processing and query answering
abstract: An automatic speech recognition (ASR) system uses recurrent neural network (RNN) encoding to create a feature vector corresponding to a word sequence ASR result where the feature vector incorporates data from different hierarchies (i.e., frame level, phone level, etc.) of the ASR processing. The feature vector may be used with a trained classifier to confirm that the ASR result was correct, or to otherwise assign a confidence score to the ASR results.

title: Extraction of Anomaly Related Rules Using Data Mining and Machine Learning
abstract: Techniques are provided for extracting anomaly related rules from organizational data. One method comprises obtaining anomaly analysis data integrated from multiple data sources of an organization, wherein the multiple data sources comprise at least one set of labeled anomaly data related to anomalous transactions; extracting features from the integrated anomaly analysis data that correlate with an indication of an anomaly; training multiple machine learning models using the extracted features, where the machine learning models are trained using different combinations of the extracted features; evaluating a performance of the trained machine learning models; and extracting rules from the trained machine learning models based on the performance, wherein the extracted rules are used to classify transactions as anomalous. The trained machine learning models comprise a decision tree comprising paths to an anomaly classification. The extracted rules are optionally in a human-readable format.

title: Lane centering fail-safe control using differential braking
abstract: The present invention relates to a lane centering fail-safe control using differential braking, concretely to a method, a system and a non-transitory computer-readable medium for fail-safe performance of a lane centering system. An electrical power steering (EPS) system of a vehicle is monitored for a failure and operation of the lane centering system is switched to a differential braking controller to output differential braking commands to a differential breaking system upon determining that a failure of the EPS system has occurred, where the output braking commands direct the differential braking system to apply force a brake for a wheel of vehicle, such by the applied braking force the vehicle follows a desired path determined for a lane centering operation.

title: Vehicle braking control method, vehicle braking system and vehicle
abstract: A vehicle braking control method, a vehicle braking system and a vehicle are provided. The method includes: obtaining a total braking distance and a first speed of the vehicle; obtaining braking delay information which includes first time information and second time information, wherein the first time information reflects delay time of a braking signal, and the second time information reflects preparing time for performing a braking operation by the vehicle braking system according to the braking signal; obtaining deceleration speed information according to the total braking distance, the first speed and the braking delay information; generating the braking signal according to the deceleration speed information; and performing the braking operation according to the braking signal.

title: Travel assistance method and travel assistance device
abstract: Provided is a travel assistance method wherein a processor (111): sets a travel lane in which a host vehicle is to travel on the basis of detection information of a sensor installed in the host vehicle; identifies a leading vehicle traveling in front of the host vehicle in the travel lane on the basis of the detection information of the sensor; calculates, on the basis of the detection information, a first evaluation value indicating the potential of being able to return to the travel lane from an adjacent lane adjacent to the travel lane after the host vehicle has overtaken the leading vehicle; calculates, on the basis of the speed of the host vehicle and the speed of the leading vehicle, a travel time reduction obtainable by overtaking the leading vehicle; and assesses whether to overtake the leading vehicle on the basis of the first evaluation value and the reduction.

title: Predictions for a process in an industrial plant
abstract: To generate real-time or at least near real-time predictions for a process in an industrial plant, a set of neural networks are trained to create a set of trained models. The set of trained models is then used to output the predictions, by inputting online measurement results in an original space to two trained models whose outputs are fed, as reduced space inputs and reduced space initial states, to a third trained model. The third trained model processes the reduced space inputs to reduced space predictions. They are fed to a fourth trained model, which outputs the predictions in the original space.

abstract: The utility model discloses a cable line type temperature -sensing fire detector, including temperature sensing part, signal processing unit, terminating resistance R1, R2, the temperature sensing parts are formed by the closed type temperature switch of a plurality of series connection, first, second and parallel setting of the 3rd metallic conductor, and wherein the large -space between the arbitrary adjacent closed type temperature switch who places is not more than 1 meter, signal processing unit includes the operation device to and the alarm output device and the two sets of electric signal measurement device that link to each other with the operation device, closed type temperature switch, R1 and a metallic conductor of a set of electric signal measurement device and a plurality of series connection are connected and form a measurement circuit, the 2nd measurement circuit of formation is connected with the 2nd metallic conductor, R2 and the 3rd metallic conductor to another electric signal measurement device of group, second, the 3rd metallic conductor cover NTC characteristic material layer outward, second, the outside NTC characteristic material layer laminating of the 3rd metallic conductor, and stability, reliability and sensitivity are high.

title: Key with RF ID chip
abstract:
The present invention is the key embedded with RFID chip. 
     In addition to the function of opening and locking the lock like a conventional key, the RFID chip is embedded in the key handle portion of a conventional key, and a small chip is provided to provide the reader with the information embedded in the RFID chip in a non-contact manner. It is a key embedded with RFID chip designed to store and provide various information by embedding or accommodating tag in key handle part.

title: Anti-collision cement electric pole
abstract: The utility model provides a prevent cement pole that collides with relates to cement pole technical field, include: the concrete pole comprises a cement pole, a buffer material layer, a main rotating shaft, a supporting telescopic rod, a sliding chute, a bearing cylinder, a connecting rod and a spring; the outside of cement pole is cup jointed and is installed the buffer material layer, and main pivot is rotated and is installed in the outside on buffer material layer, supports telescopic link fixed mounting in the outside of main pivot, and the spout embedding is installed in the inside of main pivot, bears a section of thick bamboo fixed mounting in the top of supporting the telescopic link, and connecting rod one end fixed mounting is in the right flank that bears a section of thick bamboo, and other end slidable mounting is inside the spout, and spring fixed mounting is in the spout. title: Complex network structure based railway station technical operation planning method
abstract: The invention relates to a complex network structure based railway station technical operation planning method. The method includes the following steps: firstly, formulating basic units of a yard map between operation entries in operation planning; secondly, automatically generating instation train running routes for necessary data during train operation plan arrangement and train running simulation; thirdly, building a station technical operation intelligent planning model by taking an expert system as a basic model; fourthly, defining an operation state zone bit for representing arrangement condition of the operation during operation arrangement, and creating three lists, namely a non-arranged train list, an executing operation list and a current assessment operation list in the process of automatic planning, and processing multiple concurrent incidents through the three lists. The method is taken as an effective supplement of a running chart computer mapping method, the existing computer mapping method in China is further improved, and overall planning and all-round consideration of organizations of train running and internal operation of technical stations are realized.

title: Driving power control apparatus for internal combustion engine
abstract: A neural network of a neuro computer has learned a prediction pattern based on the vehicle speed and time series data of the acceleration stroke received before the shipment of a vehicle. Based on the vehicle speed and time series data of the acceleration stroke, a request on the acceleration is predicted by a neural network computer during driving. At this time, an acceleration sensor or the like is not used, and the acceleration request is predicted more directly. Based on the prediction result, the throttle sensitivity is computed and set. A throttle computer refers to the throttle sensitivity to open or close the throttle valve to control the output of the engine.

title: Target variable distribution-based acceptance of machine learning test data sets
abstract: Respective statistical distributions of a target variable within a proposed training data set and a proposed test data set for a machine learning model are obtained. A metric indicative of the difference between the two statistical distributions is computed. The difference metric is used to determine whether the proposed test data set is acceptable to evaluate the machine learning model.

title: Mobile robot state estimation method applied to non-Gaussian noise environment
abstract: The invention relates to a mobile robot state estimation method applied to a non-Gaussian noise environment. Aiming at the problem that the estimation accuracy of the existing filter is greatly reduced under a nonlinear non-Gaussian noise environment, the invention solves the problem of non-Gaussian nonlinear filtering by Gaussian and volumetric Kalman filtering, adopts convex combination fusion to perform weighted fusion on a large number of Gaussian terms generated by the Gaussian and the filter, and performs Salmood Gaussian mixture term combination method and a KL distance-based Gaussian mixture term combination method B (i, j) criterion to further obtain a better Gaussian term combination method. The invention can effectively improve the filtering precision and stability of the mobile robot in the non-Gaussian non-linear environment.

title: Control apparatus of multi-finger hand and grasping method using the same
abstract: A grasping method of a multi-finger hand including calculating positions of tips of plural actual fingers; calculating positions of tips of plural virtual fingers using the calculated positions of the tips of the plural actual fingers; judging that a central position among the calculated positions of the tips of the plural virtual fingers is a central position of a virtual object based on the calculated positions of the tips of the plural virtual fingers; and controlling joint torques of the respective actual fingers corresponding to the tips of the virtual fingers such that motions of the tips of the plural virtual fingers are carried out while uniformly maintaining the relative positional relationships of the tips of the plural virtual fingers based on the central position of the virtual object.

title: Optimization problem operation method and apparatus
abstract: An optimization problem operation method include accepting a combinatorial optimization problem to an operation unit that is capable of being divided into a plurality of partitions logically and solving the combinatorial optimization problem. The method include deciding a partition mode that prescribes a logical division state of the operation unit and an execution mode that prescribes a range of hardware resources used in an operation in the partition mode according to a scale or a requested precision of the combinatorial optimization problem. The method include causing execution of operations of the combinatorial optimization problem in parallel in the operation unit with the partition mode and the execution mode decided, based on the number of times obtained by dividing the number of times of execution of the combinatorial optimization problem by the number of divisions corresponding to the execution mode.

title: Vehicle security system for supporting or protecting view of drivers with critical driving situations, has multiple assistance unit and central processing unit, which comprises time sharing operating system
abstract: The vehicle security system (1) has a central processing unit (6) and multiple assistance units (2,3). The central processing unit comprises a time sharing operating system, to detect a data of the assistance units driven in cyclic manner and is used by a data processing algorithms. A certain selection of the assistance unit is connected to the central unit, are detected and evaluated per time slice cycle.

title: Audio representation learning method based on multilayer timing pond
abstract: The present invention provides the audio representation learning method based on multilayer timing pond, belongs to audio classification techniques field.The present invention extracts training set and the spectrum signature wait indicate each audio sample in audio first, and it is cut into the segment of equal length, using the segment rank time-frequency characteristics set training CNN network of training set, the segment rank character representation of audio to be indicated then is extracted with trained CNN network；Again using the segment rank character representation of the audio to be indicated of extraction as the input of multilayer timing pond network, each timing pond layer of multilayer timing pond network successively carries out nonlinear characteristic mapping to input data and sequential coding operates, the expression vector of final output audio to be indicated.The present invention solves the problems, such as the existing character representation technology for lacking and capableing of time-series dynamics information that is flexible, efficiently capturing any duration audio sample.The present invention can be used for robust and advanced audio representation.

title: Delay device
abstract: This invention relates to radio engineering and can be used to delay electrical signals. The purpose of the invention is to improve the accuracy of maintaining the amplitude of the delayed signals by reducing the amplitude of interference from the mutual influence of the signals of adjacent memory elements of the analog shift register. The delay device contains the first and second level converters, a low-pass filter, a clock pulse generator, a delay time control block and a two-channel delay line having a switch, the first and second keys, the accumulator, the first and second analog shift registers, and the frequency divider by two . The use of this device in pulsed radar C allows to provide signal processing with both constant and varying follow-up periods, eliminating the presence of blind speeds, as well as improving the quality of signal processing as a whole. 5 il. title: Two-way communacation method using communication terminal and the terminal threof
abstract: Embodiments of the present invention relate to a bidirectional communication method using a communication terminal and the terminal thereof. The communication terminal comprises: a near-field communication unit which is paired with a user terminal via a near-field communication network, and receives a control signal, transmitted to the user terminal from a counterpart terminal via a communication network, from the user terminal via the near-field communication network; a signal processing unit for processing the control signal to extract a control command included in the control signal; and an output unit for outputting at least one feedback signal among visual, auditory, or tactile feedback to a user, based on the control command. The purpose of the present invention is to provide a bidirectional communication method capable of emotional communications by improving conventional communication service methods, and a terminal executing the corresponding communication method.

title: Character input device using track point
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a character input device capable of inputting a character as if it were a small human information device that cannot take a large area for character input, as if it were a human character.   A three-component force sensor that detects finger pressure in each of the X-axis, Y-axis, and Z-axis directions, and a finger pressure change pattern in each of the X-axis, Y-axis, and Z-axis directions with respect to time progress for each character that can be input. , A finger pressure change pattern in each of the X-axis, Y-axis, and Z-axis directions acquired by the three-component force sensor, and each of the X-axis, Y-axis, and Z-axis directions accumulated in the character storage unit And a character recognition unit that selects the character with the smallest difference. The three-component force sensor is a strain sensor arranged around a plate to which a track point stick is fixed, and in two strain sensors symmetrical with respect to an axis, the X-axis direction and the Y-axis direction are determined by a difference in finger pressure. And the Z-axis direction is detected by the sum of finger pressures.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Single-channel voice separation method based on deep learning
abstract: The invention provides a voice separation method based on deep learning, which comprises the following steps: performing signal preprocessing on voice resources, and dividing an original data set into a training set and a test set according to a set proportion; decomposing the obtained time domain signal into a two-dimensional time frequency signal through short-time Fourier transform; extracting short-time Fourier logarithm energy spectrums of auditory features of the time-frequency unit level, and normalizing; and calculating the separation target by utilizing the pure short-time Fourier transform amplitude spectrum and the Fourier transform amplitude spectrum of the noise. And taking the extracted features as the input of the model, taking the selected separation target as the training target of the model, and training the deep model. And obtaining a time domain signal of the separated voice by utilizing the obtained estimated separation target and the generated noisy time frequency signal through inverse short-time Fourier transform, and obtaining the finally separated voice.

title: Hitch assist system and method for autonomously maneuvering a vehicle in a user-specified target travel direction
abstract: A hitch assist system and method are provided herein. A human machine interface is configured to receive user-input specifying a target travel direction of a vehicle. A controller is configured to generate commands for autonomously maneuvering the vehicle in the target travel direction, identify a hitch coupler of a trailer based on input received from an object detection system, and request additional user-input updating the target travel direction if the hitch coupler is unable to be identified.

title: Cross-view-angle trajectory model construction method based on transfer learning
abstract: The invention discloses a cross-view trajectory model construction method based on transfer learning, which comprises the following steps of 1, constructing a target domain target trajectory characteristic value sequence set; classifying the characteristic value sequence of the known label according to the label; step 2, constructing a source domain target track characteristic value sequence set; classifying the characteristic value sequence according to the label; step 3, training the HMM model by adopting the characteristic value sequence in the step 2; step 4, constructing a mapping model between the source domain and the target domain features according to the characteristic value sequence set in the step 1 and the characteristic value sequence set in the step 2, and obtaining the target domain observation probability according to the model; and 5, calibrating the target domain transfer probability according to the characteristic value sequence set in the step 1 and the training model parameters in the step 4 to obtain the target domain hidden Markov model. The method solves the problem that the target track model is not suitable and has low accuracy due to different visual angles in the prior art.

title: Artificially intelligent ejection fraction determination
abstract: Embodiments of the invention provide a method, system and computer program product for artificially intelligent ejection fraction determination. In a method for artificially intelligent ejection fraction determination, a neural network is loaded into memory of a computer, that has been trained with different sets of cardiac imaging data acquired during imaging of a ventricle for different hearts and a known ejection fraction for each of the sets. Then, a contemporaneous set of imaging data is acquired of a ventricle of a heart and the contemporaneous set of imaging data is provided to the neural network. Finally, an ejection fraction determination output by the neural network is displayed in a display of the computer without tracing a ventricle boundary of the heart.

title: Modular platform for robotic end effector
abstract: The disclosed system includes a robot system with a robot having a modular platform and a controller operably coupled to the robot. The modular platform includes a plurality of mount connectors and a plurality of receiving port connectors. Each of the mount connectors is configured to attach to the robot and each of the receiving ports is configured to connect to an end effector such as a gripper, sensor or other tool. The modular platform is configured to mount to the robot in a plurality of orientations and to connect with a plurality of different end effectors.

title: Speaker separation method, device, equipment and storage medium
abstract: The application provides a speaker separation method, a speaker separation device, speaker separation equipment and a storage medium, wherein the method comprises the following steps: segmenting a target speech including at least one speaker into a plurality of target speech segments; determining speaker classification characteristics corresponding to a plurality of target voice fragments respectively, wherein the speaker classification characteristics corresponding to one target voice fragment simultaneously comprise voiceprint information and semantic information of the voice fragment; and classifying the target voice fragments according to the speaker classification characteristics corresponding to the target voice fragments respectively to obtain a voice fragment set of each speaker. Because the speaker classification characteristics not only comprise the voiceprint information which can better distinguish different speakers, but also comprise the semantic information which can reflect the turning of the speakers, the voice segments of different speakers can be accurately separated by utilizing the speaker classification characteristics corresponding to the voice segments, and the separation effect is better.
