title: Hvac system with self-optimizing control from normal operating data
abstract: A building management system includes building equipment configured to operate in accordance with an input to alter a variable state or condition of a building as a process function of the input while incurring a cost of operating the equipment as a cost function of the input. The building management system also includes a controller configured to calculate a value of a self-optimizing control variable as a function of a measured state of the building equipment and drive the value of the self-optimizing control variable towards a setpoint value by generating the input based on the self-optimizing control variable and providing the input to the building equipment. The function comprises multiplying the measured state by a matrix and adding an offset vector. Values of elements of the matrix and the offset vector are determined using a non-optimal reference.

title: Intelligent substation sampling value return circuit polarity testing arrangement
abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent substation sampling value return circuit polarity testing arrangement, including SV decoding module, SV decoding module's output is connected with the input of DA module, the output of DA module is connected with the input of amplifying filtering module, the output of amplifying filtering module is connected with border detection module's input, border detection module's border detection output is connected with pulse width detection module's input, border detection module's upper and lower edge detection output and wiring identification switch module's output are connected with two inputs of exclusive-or gate respectively, the output of exclusive-or gate is connected with the control end of first single-pole double-throw switch, pulse width detection module's output is connected with the control end of second single-pole double-throw switch. title: Solution-preparation device
abstract: The utility mode provides a solution-preparation device which comprises a funnel, a spiral feeder, a blower, a mixer and a stirring barrel. The utility model is characterized in that the funnel is arranged on the spiral feeder driven by a motor, a discharge terminal of the spiral feeder connects with a charge tube; the blower connects with the mixer through a blast tube, the charge tube connects with the blast tube, the blower is driven by the motor; the mixer is arranged on the stirring barrel and communicates with the stirring barrel; the mixer is provided with a clapboard, the blast tube passes through the clapboard, the clapboard is provided with a nozzle, the mixer is provided with a water supply tube above the clapboard; the stirring barrel is provided with a stirrer. The utility model has advantages of charging evenly and the prepared solution with better dispersion, non-caking and non-clustering. The solution-preparation device can be used in the technique of mineral processing, environmental protection water treatment, food processing and chemical solution preparation, etc.

title: Protocol/medical image registration method, medical image provision method, protocol utilization method, protocol/medical image registration system, medical image provision system, protocol utilization system, vendor terminal, user terminal, and protocol management server
abstract: The present invention aims at permitting numerous user terminals to share protocols as common resources. A vendor terminal or user terminal registers a pair of a protocol and a medical image, which is produced during scanning performed according to the protocol, by recording data in a protocol/medical image database included in a protocol management server. The user terminal acquires a medical image from the protocol management server over a network, and displays it on a display device. Moreover, the user terminal downloads a required protocol from the protocol management server and sets it in a medical diagnostic imaging system.

title: Driving assistant system in a vehicle and method thereof
abstract: The present invention provides a vehicle driving assisting system, and a driving assisting method. According to the present invention, the vehicle driving assisting system comprises: an image obtaining unit obtaining a front image of a vehicle; an obstacle sensing unit sensing obstacles of a front side and a rear side of the vehicle; a determination unit determining a road as a merging road based on the obtained image; and a control unit automatically changing a lane of the vehicle when a road is determined to be the merging road and the obstacles are not sensed on the front side or the rear side of the vehicle.

title: Wavelet basis selection method based on principal component analysis
abstract: The invention aims to provide a wavelet basis selection method based on principal component analysis, which comprises the following steps: firstly, performing continuous wavelet transformation on a signal to be subjected to wavelet analysis to obtain a time-frequency matrix representing signal information; secondly, performing principal component analysis on the time-frequency information matrix to achieve the purpose of dimension reduction due to the redundancy of the time-frequency information matrix; thirdly, extracting main independent components of the signals and corresponding characteristic values of the main independent components; and fourthly, selecting a proper wavelet basis function according to the size of the characteristic value. According to the invention, a principal component analysis method is introduced into the selection of the wavelet basis functions, so that not only can the wavelet basis functions suitable for signal analysis be found, but also the characteristic value can be used as a characteristic in the signal analysis, the optimal wavelet basis can be simply and conveniently selected, and the accurate guarantee is provided for the next analysis of the signal.

title: Modular robot control system
abstract: A modular robot control system includes at least one actuator and circuit board. The actuator includes a hollow casing with an opening, a flywheel, a motor, a fixed gear, a rotating gear and a top cap sealing the opening. Flywheel is mounted between the top cap and the casing. A first and a second planet gears are mounted outside the flywheel rotatingly. The motor received in the flywheel has a rotor shaft on which the flywheel is mounted rotatingly. The circuit board is mounted with the casing and connected with the motor. The fixed gear is fixed in the flywheel and engages with the first planet gear. The rotating gear is connected inside the top cap and engages with the second planet gear. Accordingly, signal disturbance and noise produced during the operation of the robot control system of the present invention are low.

abstract: The invention belongs to Material Field, and in particular to one kind protection decoration embedding note sheet materials of ABS, the sheet material has good areal stretch performance.The present invention encloses decorative layer and coating for surface protection successively with ABS sheet materials as ground in ABS grounds, and coating for surface protection is made up of acrylic resin, polyester resin, vinyl chloride-vinyl acetate resin, carbimide curing agent, the ratio of each component is percentage by weight：Acrylic resin 20-70%, polyester resin 10-30%, vinyl chloride-vinyl acetate resin 10-60%, isocyanate curing agent 10-30%.Sheet material solution moulding of the invention is changeable, concavo-convex obvious surface of plastic products stretcher strain, and then improves the surface protection performance of product, is particularly applicable to protect performance requirement automotive trim plastic products high.

title: Apparatus and method for neural processing
abstract: The neural computing paradigm is characterized as a dynamic and highly computationally intensive system typically consisting of input weight multiplications, product summation, neural state calculations, and complete connectivity among the neurons. Herein is described neural network architecture for a Scalable Neural Array Process (SNAP) which uses a unique interconnection and communication scheme within an array structure that provides high performance for completely connected network models such as the Hopfield model. SNAP's packaging and expansion capabilities are addressed, demonstrating SNAP's scalability to larger networks. The array processor is made up of multiple sets of orthogonal interconnections and activity generators. Each activity generator is responsive to an output signal in order to generate a neuron value. The interconnection structure also uses special adder trees which respond in a first state to generate an output signal and in a second state to communicate a neuron value back to the input of the array processor.

title: Audio matching method, device, equipment and storage medium
abstract: The application discloses an audio matching method, an audio matching device, audio matching equipment and a storage medium, and belongs to the field of multimedia processing. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring a first feature vector of a first audio and a second feature vector of a second audio; calling a long and short memory LSTM neural network layer to fuse the first feature vector and the second feature vector to obtain a prediction vector of a first audio and a second audio; and calling a classification layer to predict the prediction vector to obtain the similarity probability of the first audio and the second audio. By constructing the LSTM neural network in the audio matching model, the audio matching model with the LSTM neural network can predict the similarity between different songs, so that a similarity calculation result with higher precision is obtained, the structure of the audio matching model is simplified, and the load of a server is reduced.

title: A kind of detection method and terminal device of anchor rod anchored defect
abstract: The present invention provides the detection method and terminal device of a kind of anchor rod anchored defect, method includes: acquisition echo-signal；The echo-signal is decomposed using variation mode decomposition method, the corresponding intrinsic modal components of each layer after being decomposed；Echo signal by the corresponding intrinsic modal components noise reduction process of each layer, after obtaining noise reduction；The echo signal is inputted into target nerve network, obtains anchor rod anchored defects detection result.Echo-signal of the present invention to acquisition, using based on the intrinsic modal components for improving each layer after variation mode decomposition method decomposes echo-signal, noise reduction is carried out to the intrinsic modal components of each layer, to input value of the intrinsic modal components as structural self-organizing Elman neural network after noise reduction, Detection of Bolt Bonding Integrity detection is carried out using structural self-organizing Elman neural network, anchor rod anchored defect, and anchor rod anchored defects detection precision with higher can quickly be detected.

title: Local feature calculation method based on statistics, electronic equipment, storage medium
abstract: The present invention provides the local feature calculation method based on statistics, comprising steps of successively centered on the element in initial data, left and right continuously respectively takes several data, generates the corresponding statistics transformation vector of each element, converts vector by the corresponding statistics of each element and generate statistics transformation matrix；Vector successively is converted to the statistics in statistics transformation matrix by statistical method to carry out counting clear, obtains general evaluation system result clear；The local feature that each statistics result clear in general evaluation system result clear is successively calculated by decision-making technique, obtains overall local feature.The present invention relates to electronic equipments and readable storage medium storing program for executing, for executing the local feature calculation method based on statistics；The present invention can save the effective information in former sequence to greatest extent, while filter out exceptional value or garbage, leave statistical nature of each element in local sequence, provide more accurately and reliably input data for subsequent machine learning analysis.
